E: Tingyun lightly touched the forehead of the mara-struck, transforming it into an Antimatter Legion Voidranger. The foxian broke her own neck, releasing a spirit flame that ascended from her form.

C: 你们被一道锁住的大门拦住。桑博称必须拿到「认证」才能进入史瓦罗的地盘，而这需要你通过来自机器人们的试炼。
E: You came upon a massive gate — sealed tight. Sampo explained that entry into Svarog's domain required "authorization," which could only be earned by passing a trial issued by the robots.

C: 你在赢得冠军后与星期日会面，他宣布拒绝你们所提供的星核应对方案，并质问你选择的价值观，对峙一触即发。
E: After claiming the championship, you met with Sunday. He announced his rejection of your proposed solution to the Stellaron crisis and challenged the values behind your choices, bringing the confrontation to a boiling point.

C: 波提欧向助蕉发动反击，他已分清孰善孰恶。有一种本能，从没开过枪的牛仔小子也会有，那就是向着邪恶开火！
E: Boothill launched a counter-attack against Assistanana, now knowing right from wrong. There was a certain instinct that even a greenhorn cowboy who had never fired a shot possessed: the urge to shoot at evil!

C: 那刻夏称赞白厄的演讲，随后走到陶罐前，闭眼等待。会场的喧嚣逐渐远去，那刻夏邀请瑟希斯一同前往冥界，去见证遐蝶给出的证明。
E: Anaxa praised Phainon's speech. He strolled up to the dolium, closed his eyes, and waited until the clamor of the assembly faded away. Anaxa invited Cerces to accompany him to the nether realm so they could meet Castorice. That way, they could prove his hypothesis once and for all.

C: 你们击败托帕的手下，托帕欲亲自加入战斗。布洛妮娅赶到试验场，称有一项重要成果希望得到公司的评估和星穹列车的见证。
E: After you defeated Topaz's subordinates, she stepped forward, prepared to join the battle herself. Bronya arrived at the testing ground and announced that there was an important breakthrough that required evaluation by the IPC and the presence of the Astral Express.

C: 在梦泡中，黑天鹅正在一起谋杀案的现场调查，此时桑博现身，案发现场的猎犬则在黑天鹅「记忆」的暗示下将二人视作「侦查人员」。
E: In the dream bubble, Black Swan was investigating a murder scene when Sampo appeared. Under Black Swan's hint via Remembrance, the Bloodhound at the scene regarded them both as detectives.

C: 一队云骑士兵经过，椒丘从空气中嗅到异常。但椒丘按捺住心中的疑惑，继续跟随雪衣前往探视。
E: A squad of Cloud Knights Soldiers passed by, Jiaoqiu sensed something unusual in the air. But he suppressed his doubts and followed Xueyi to the visit.

C: 经过慎重考虑，你谢绝姬子的邀请。你成为空间站的一名科员，并于此度过平静的一生。星辰如此遥远，仿佛踏上旅途的选择从未存在。
E: After careful consideration, you declined Himeko's invitation. You became a researcher on the space station and lived a peaceful life there. The stars felt so distant, as if the choice to set out on a journey had never existed.

C: 你为大家拍出一张令人难忘的合照。为表纪念，三月七将照片送给希露瓦和克拉拉，当作列车组的临别礼物。
E: You captured a memorable group photo. As a memento and a parting gift from the Crew, March 7th gave the picture to Serval and Clara.

C: 亲眼见到当年大放异彩的「云上五骁」之一，符玄觉得丹恒与绘影里记录的样子所差无几。
E: Meeting one of the legendary High-Cloud Quintet in person, Fu Xuan thought Dan Heng looked almost exactly as depicted in the visiograph.

C: 即便从战斗中落败，沉重的斗志仍然支撑他坚守岗位。或许你该想办法让他开心点儿。
E: Although defeated in battle, his strong will to fight allowed him to uphold his duty. Perhaps you should find a way to make him happy.

C: 砂金因诈骗案被捕，以命为赌注与翡翠谈判，要求三十枚赤铜币作为本钱。翡翠允诺赋予砂金新身份并招募他加入公司，创造更多财富。
E: Aventurine was arrested for scamming, negotiated with Jade by betting his life, and requested for <unbreak>30</unbreak> red copper coins as capital. She agreed and gave him a new identity, recruiting him into the IPC to gain more wealth.

C: 众人进入星期日内心世界，他以亲身回忆为例，引导列车组直观理解自己的信念。
E: Everyone entered Sunday's inner world, where he used his own experiences to help the Crew understand his beliefs on a more direct level.

C: 你们抵达剧院，却发现内部空无一人，气氛诡异异常。
E: You arrived at the theater only to find it was completely empty inside, with an extremely bizarre vibe.

C: 你们返回大厅，星期日现身，邀请你们观赏三出幕前剧。
E: Your party returned to the main hall as Sunday appeared, inviting you to view three stage plays.

C: 翡翠与知更鸟交谈，了解她对盛会之星未来的看法，并表达各取所需的合作态度。
E: Jade spoke with Robin and came to know the latter's views towards the Planet of Festivities' future, and also expressed her cooperative attitude of mutual benefit.

C: 流萤拜访翡翠典当行求生，但因缺乏等价抵押物遭拒，翡翠建议她亲眼见证代价。
E: Firefly visited Jade's pawnshop for a chance at survival, but was refused as she lacked an item of equivalent value to mortgage. Jade recommended that Firefly witness the cost of the shop with her own eyes.

C: 真理医生介绍，博识学会派他来匹诺康尼，是为「监考」公司的使节砂金。真理医生劝你好好享受庆典，只有劳逸结合才能更好地汲取知识。
E: Dr. Ratio explained that the Intelligentsia Guild sent him to Penacony to "supervise" IPC's envoy, Aventurine. Dr. Ratio advised you to enjoy the festivities, saying that balancing work and life was the best way to absorb knowledge.

C: 芭蕉花酱对着手机练习《睡蕉之歌》，期待着出演芮克先生拍的电影。
E: Nanabloom-chan practiced The Slumbernana Song on her phone, excited about starring in Mr. Reca's movie.

C: 波提欧与三月七交换信息，向其讲述原始博士的事迹。波提欧认为应该摧毁「睡蕉社」，三月七则带波提欧再去向蒙塔娜获取情报。
E: Boothill exchanged information with March 7th, telling her about Dr. Primitive's deeds. While Boothill believed they should destroy the Slumbernana Association, March 7th took Boothill to gather more intel from Montana.

C: 「苦茶大师」让乱破思考，何为属于她自己的忍道。乱破寻得的答案是——祓除万恶，不死不休，一心不乱，破邪显正！
E: Master Kucha made Rappa reflect on what her own way of the ninja should be. The answer Rappa found was: purge all evil, never rest until it's done, stay focused with her heart, and vanquish darkness to reveal the truth!

C: 波提欧出示抢来的社员证，成功混入睡蕉社。
E: Using the stolen membership card, Boothill successfully infiltrated the Slumbernana Association.

C: 列车广播传来帕姆的声音：「各位乘客请注意——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！」
E: The train's speakers carried Pom-Pom's announcement: "Attention, passengers. The Express is about to make the jump. Please be seated and hold on!"

C: 你与神秘的装置互动，希望这能有效。
E: You interacted with the mysterious device, hoping it would work.

C: 你与遐蝶交谈，得知她这么做是为了肯定阿格莱雅为奥赫玛做出的奉献，不想让阿格莱雅失落。随后你们与迷迷一同前往悬锋城。
E: In your conversation with Castorice, she explained her reason for doing so was to acknowledge Aglaea's dedication to Okhema — she didn't want Aglaea to feel disheartened. Then the three of you set out for Castrum Kremnos together.

C: 你进入试炼，发现自己身处尸骸遍地的奥赫玛，万敌在你身后出现，提醒你这只是试炼的影子。丹恒似乎不在附近，你与万敌结伴行动。
E: Within the trial, you found yourself amidst Okhema's corpse-strewn fields. Mydei appeared behind you, reminding you this was merely a shadow of the trial. Dan Heng nowhere to be seen, you and Mydei pressed forward together.

C: 白厄在房间里发现一块火山玻璃。缇宁称其由圣女为奔赴命运之死者所打磨，在仪式前夜，母亲也将同样的一块玻璃留给缇里西庇俄丝。
E: Phainon discovered a piece of volcanic glass brooch in the room. Trinnon explained that it was polished by the Holy Maiden for those who were to face a fated death, and that on the eve of the ritual, Mother had left an identical piece for Tribios.

C: 在围绕火种展开谈判前，阿格莱雅同意让遐蝶前去将其带回。阿格莱雅希望你与遐蝶同去觐见塞纳托斯，并安排赛飞儿担任你们的向导。
E: Before the debate about the Coreflames continued, Aglaea agreed to let Castorice bring back the Coreflame of Death. Aglaea hoped that you could accompany Castorice to search for Thanatos, and had Cipher act as your guide.

C: 灵魂球揭露出遐蝶在哀地里亚的记忆。阿蒙内特向遐蝶讲述最初的相遇，是斯缇科西亚女王为带她来巨龙怀中诞生的少女——遐蝶。
E: The spirit orb revealed more of Castorice's past, this time in Aidonia. Amunet spoke of her first meeting with Castorice, and how the queen of Styxia had plucked a baby from the embrace of a dragon and brought her to Aidonia. As fate would have it, Castorice was that very same child.

C: 天象画壁显出电闪雷鸣，晨昏之眼中异常威胁。距离完成逐火之旅只有一步之遥，必须逃离这里。
E: The celestial mural flickered with thunder and lightning. An ominous threat loomed in the Eye of Twilight. Only one step remained to complete the Flame-Chase Journey, and you must get out of here.

C: 徕啦迷对白厄、昔涟表达问候，并表示神谕牌是迷迷村长要求妖精们带回迷境的，想要藉此亲自见白厄、昔涟一面。
E: Inside the maze, Relimem welcomed Phainon and Cyrene. She said the Prophecy Cards were taken by the fairies on orders from the Mem village's chief, who wanted to use this ploy to see the Phainon and Cyrene face to face again.

C: 通过识刻锚的传输，你已知晓天才托付的任务——去往光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，取得「律法」的控制权，以此越过最终协议，扭转「再创世」。
E: Through the Chronocognitive Anchor's transmission, you now know the mission entrusted by the Genius. Travel to Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, gain control of the "Law" to bypass the final protocol and alter the course of "Era Nova."

C: 来古士介绍，海瑟音曾是名为「海妖」的泰坦眷属。当黑潮在世界深处暗涌时，正是海妖的国度最先拥抱了「毁灭」。
E: Lygus revealed that Hysilens was once of the Titankin race named "sea sirens." When the black tide roiled in the depths of the world, the kingdom of sea sirens was the first to face the Destruction head-on.

C: 至此，你将打开通往创世涡心的暗门。
E: Thus shall you unlock the hidden gate to the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 刻律德菈拒绝交出神权，她要献上一位半神的性命来改写「律法」。刻律德菈最后一次命令海瑟音，为征服献身，或用剑刺入暴君胸膛。
E: Cerydra refused to surrender her divine authority. She chose instead to rewrite the Law with the life of a demigod. In her final command, she ordered Hysilens to either offer herself in conquest, or drive her blade into the tyrant's chest.

C: 黑天鹅被长夜月带到<color=#f29e38ff>无名泰坦大墓</color>。长夜月请黑天鹅见证「记忆」在这个世界所扮演的角色，而「忘却」又将如何扑灭一位星神的野心。
E: Black Swan was led by Evernight to the <color=#f29e38ff>Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan</color>. Evernight invited Black Swan to witness the role that "Remembrance" played in this world, and how "Oblivion" would extinguish an Aeon's ambition.

C: 航线会议召开前，你在车厢房间中沐浴。但不知为何，你的房间里出现了一些奇怪的便笺和画幅。你决定仔细看看。
E: Before the navigation meeting, you were showering in your cabin. Strangely, unfamiliar notes and paintings had appeared in the room. You decided to take a closer look.

C: 来古士提醒丹恒，「大地」半神<color=#f29e38ff>荒笛</color>在这一世偏离了逐火命运，并将丹恒送离。与此同时，那刻夏质问来古士——<color=#f29e38ff>德谬歌，是为何物？</color>
E: Lygus reminded Dan Heng that the Earth Demigod <color=#f29e38ff>Terravox</color> had deviated from the path of Flame-Chase in this cycle, and sent Dan Heng away. Meanwhile, Anaxa confronted Lygus with a question — <color=#f29e38ff>What is the Demiurge?</color>

C: 侵晨刺向的深渊，就是「铁墓」的温床。众神与黑潮死斗，浴血捍卫利剑。万敌踏上不绝的征程，愿以此身换取「毁灭」在史诗中永恒的终结。
E: The Abyss pierced by Dawnmaker became the breeding ground of Irontomb. The gods fought the black tide to the death, defending the land while bathing their blades in blood. Mydei embarked on an endless journey, willing to trade his body for the eternal end of Destruction in this epic.

C: 风堇说黄金裔们在列车上醒来时，周围空荡荡的，没有见到列车组成员。风堇安慰你别担心，他们也一定在回家的路上。
E: Hyacine said, when the Chrysos Heirs woke up on the Express, it was empty around them and they did not see any of the Crew. Hyacine reassured you not to worry as they must be on their way home too.

C: 佩拉在扑满的掉落物中发现地髓激活元件。佩拉请玲可稍作休息，由她来维修炉具。
E: Pela found a Geomarrow Activation Element among the Trotter's dropped items. She asked Lynx to take a break while she repaired the stove.

C: 你终于找到了合适的隐藏地点，接下来，先去问问那位丹鼎司医士吧。
E: You finally found a suitable hiding spot. Next, you needed to get some answers from that Alchemy Commission healer.

C: 龙尊侍女浣溪交代不让丹恒见白露的原因：族内不想让白露继承龙尊之位。
E: Huanxi explained the reason she had not wanted Dan Heng to meet Bailu: The Vidyadhara did not want Bailu to inherit the position of high elder.

C: 捕快向黑天鹅介绍三位嫌疑人：<color=#f29e38ff>佐罗</color>在对抗山贼时<color=#f29e38ff>右手被斩断</color>，<color=#f29e38ff>钟珊</color>在逃避山贼时<color=#f29e38ff>脸破相了</color>，<color=#f29e38ff>阿佑</color>在私吞货物时被另两人<color=#f29e38ff>打折了腿</color>。
E: The Bailiff described the three suspects to Black Swan: <color=#f29e38ff>Lefton</color>, whose <color=#f29e38ff>right hand was severed</color> during a fight with bandits. There is <color=#f29e38ff>Zhongshan</color>, who suffered a <color=#f29e38ff>disfigured face</color> while escaping bandits. Finally, there is <color=#f29e38ff>Wright</color>, whose <color=#f29e38ff>leg was broken</color> by the other two after they caught him stealing goods.

C: 你为怀炎取来礼品匣。匣身泛着钝光，以非木非金的材质制成。匣面上嵌有金属丝络，勾勒出莲花纹样。
E: You retrieved the gift case for Huaiyan. The case gleamed with a muted luster, crafted from a material neither wood nor metal. Metallic threads were inlaid across its surface, outlining the pattern of lotus flowers.

C: 告别符玄后，回到绥园把岁阳「犀焰」锁进镇妖塔里吧。
E: Having said goodbye to Fu Xuan, you returned to Fyxestroll Garden to seal the heliobus Keralum in the suppression tower.

C: 流萤的记忆述说着：「门…打不开…这里是死路……」流萤被困在房间中，或许这正是其同行者原本的计划，将她作为忆域迷因的诱饵。
E: Firefly's memory stated: "The door... It won't open... It's a dead end..." Firefly was trapped in the room. Perhaps this was her companion's original plan, to use her as bait for the Memory Zone Meme.

C: 睡蕉小猴典藏款
E: Slumbernana Monkey Collector's Edition

C: 寒腿叔叔代工厂
E: Mr. Cold Feet OEM

C: 贝洛伯格下层-诊所
E: Belobog Underworld — Clinic

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: <color=#f29e38ff>展览任务奖励</color>可以领取了帕
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Exhibition Mission rewards</color> are now ready for collection.

C: 只要我够勇就无往不利！
E: Bravery will lead us to victory!

C: 你被仪器强行阻断了痛觉。
E: The machine forcibly blocks your sense of pain.

C: 舰长恢复了冷静，开始交代…
E: The captain calms down and begins his explanation...

C: 你在星阵棋中以微弱差距落败。
E: You lose by a narrow margin in starchess.

C: 你绣出了一朵七零八碎的梅花…
E: You end up with a shredded, lopsided plum blossom...

C: 在沉船里发现了一箱餐券…
E: You find a box of meal vouchers in a shipwreck...

C: 你发现售货机在憋笑「<unbreak>35</unbreak>秒，<unbreak>35</unbreak>秒后就宣告胜利吧。」
E: You notice the vending machine trying to stifle a chuckle. "Thirty-five more seconds. Just thirty-five more, then I'll announce my victory."

C: 为什么要我吃到这么好吃的饭？以后吃不到了怎么办！
E: Why do I have to eat such a delectable meal? What if I can never taste something like this ever again!?

C: 这下鉴定网络热门演出事故了。
E: Now this has officially become a viral performance mishap.

C: 原来是你小子，「最差劲的无名客」！
E: So it was you, "The Worst Nameless Ever"!

C: 你被天舶司檀檀狠狠地普法。
E: Sky-Faring Commission gave you a thorough legal lecture.

C: 只要坐上牌桌，今天这鱼就摸定了。
E: The moment I sit at the game table, the slacking is on!

C: 造物之柱
E: Pillars of Creation

C: 来自翁瓦克岛屿上的植物，在公司科技的培育下茁壮成长。没有攻击性，比起原生的同类来说相对安全。可采摘，可触摸，可品尝。
E: Plants from Vonwacq Island are thriving under the nurture of IPC tech. They're not aggressive and are relatively safe compared to their native counterparts. Picking, touching, and tasting are allowed.

C: 等级2
E: Lv. 2

C: 演武仪典行将启幕，八方宾客纷至沓来。幽狱重牢之底，关押已久的恶兽爪牙蠢动。
E: The Wardance is about to begin. Guests come forth from all across the universe, and in the roots of the prison, the machinations of a long-sealed evil are starting to tremble.

C: 已启用
E: Enabled

C: 四方览镜
E: Foursquare Mirror

C: 镇妖塔
E: Suppression Tower

C: 漂浮的灯
E: Floating Light

C: 军火
E: Military Armament

C: 苏乐达™小铺
E: SoulGlad™ Shop

C: 垃圾箱
E: Dumpster

C: 普通战利品
E: Basic Treasure

C: 击败残响回廊决胜乐园的所有挑战者
E: Defeat all challengers in the Corridor of Fading Echoes Victory Zone

C: 挑战完成黄光级的超链接对决
E: Challenge and clear the "Yellow Light Level" in Hyperlink Match

C: 所有「正式试炼」都获得至少1星
E: Obtain at least 1 star in all Official Trials

C: 完成全部星球的挑战，且冒险积分均达到<unbreak>20000</unbreak>分
E: Complete the challenges on all planets and reach <unbreak>20,000</unbreak> Points in Adventure Score

C: 通过「忘却之庭」的「回忆」其一
E: Clear Memory Stage 1 of the Forgotten Hall

C: 累计消耗#4点开拓力<color=#f29e38ff>（上限<unbreak>1400</unbreak>点开拓力）</color>
E: Consume a total of #4 Trailblaze Power <color=#f29e38ff>(<unbreak>1400</unbreak> Trailblazer Power max)</color>

C: 在「忘却之庭」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 stars from clearing Forgotten Hall stages

C: 在「关于波提欧的一切…」中完成所有特殊委托
E: Complete all special assignments in "All About Boothill..."

C: 在主控舱段拍摄「黑塔办公室」的照片
E: Take a picture of Herta's Office in the Master Control Zone

C: 在#1轮次内完成「羽量级」赛事
E: Complete the featherweight tournament within #1 Cycle(s)

C: 将历史区的展区等级升至3
E: Level up the History-Culture Hall exhibition area to Lv. 3

C: 在#1轮次内完成该场表演赛
E: Clear the exhibition match within #1 cycles

C: 在#1轮次内完成该场表演赛
E: Clear the exhibition match within #1 cycles

C: 使用「巡猎」命途完成「模拟宇宙：寰宇蝗灾」第五难度
E: Use the Path of The Hunt to complete Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster at Difficulty 5

C: 通关「差分宇宙」时，拥有的宇宙碎片大于等于#2（难度#1及以上）
E: Possess #2 or more Cosmic Fragments when clearing Divergent Universe (Difficulty #1 or higher)

C: 击败第2波次首领
E: Defeat the second wave's boss

C: 完成齿轮星球的挑战后解锁
E: Unlock by completing the Cogwheel Planet challenge

C: 获得庆典锦标赛的冠军
E: Become the grand champion of the tournament

C:
九百度的篝火能烧土成陶，上千度的炉火能熔断铜锡…越是本质的塑造，越渴求着极限的温度。

军团的生物渴望着从物质形态中剥离开来，祈求着只有毁灭热浪才能带来的更新质变。

技艺纯熟的火匠大师能够将炉火提升到不可思议的程度：烈焰的黑体辐射呈现蓝色光谱，几与濒死的恒星相近。火匠皆是掌控烈焰的天才，但只有其中佼佼者才被授予象征大师技艺的御火戒指。

战争熔炉早已不分匠人与匠材，锤炼着反物质生灵的火匠大师们也成为了毁灭武器的一部分。

「铸器由炉温决定，炉温由火匠决定。」对掌握毁灭技艺的火匠们来说，这再理所当然不过了。
E:
A <unbreak>900</unbreak>-degree kiln can turn clay into ceramic, a <unbreak>1000</unbreak>-degree furnace can melt tin and copper... As one pursues a purer creation, one must also pursue a more extreme temperature.

Creatures of the Legion crave for separation from the material existence, longing for the fundamental mutations that can only be brought forth by the scorching heat waves of Destruction.

A highly-skilled master Firesmith can raise the forge's temperature to unbelievable levels — the flame's black-body radiation would exhibit the blue spectrum like that of a dying star. Firesmiths are also geniuses at controlling flames, but only the best among them are bestowed with a ring of flame-mastery as a mark of their superb skill.

The Warforge had long ceased to differentiate between the smith and the smithed. All those Firesmith masters who had been smelting the Antimatter Creatures had also become parts of the Weapons of Destruction.

"The smelting depends on the temperature, and the temperature depends on the Firesmith." This is matter-of-fact knowledge to any Firesmith who can control the art of Destruction.

C:
步离族人游牧于银河之间，鄙夷固土而居的文明形态。他们掳走和平安稳，带来滔天战火。苛刻的生存信仰迫使他们征战不停，始终投入到刀尖舔血生活之中。

他们自有信念与手段，使步离人置足之处，便是步离人的疆域国土。

步离战首骄傲于燃起一处又一处的凄艳战火，碾压守护者尊严，痛饮流离者眼泪，践踏亲密者信任。他任荆棘疯长，沃土尽毁，他迫人为奴，奢侈享乐…为了超越历代王者，新任战首不得不抛却安稳，率将士远征外界以战功立名，巩固族中地位。

「步离巢父，行则战至，祸遍诸界。判其绝足禁闭，不得受生 。」

战首对判词感到疑惑，他环顾四周，惊讶于弱者们的审判。那些所谓罪行，不过是生存的法则。
E:
The borisin roam the galaxy, despising the settled civilizations. They took away peace and tranquility and brought all-consuming war with them. Their harsh beliefs in survival compel them to fight incessantly, ever-devoting themselves to a life of bloodshed.

They have their own beliefs and ways — wherever the borisin set foot, it becomes their territory and nation.

The borisin Warhead takes pride from igniting one flame of war after another, crushing the dignity of protectors, drinking the tears of the displaced, and trampling on the trust of close ones. He allowed thorns to grow wild and fertile land to be destroyed, forced people into slavery and enjoyed an extravagant life... In order to surpass the past leaders, the new Warhead had to cast aside peace and lead his soldiers on an expedition to the outside world in order to make a name for himself and affirm his position in the tribe.

"Borisin Brood Lord, with you come war and a scourge upon all worlds. Your sentence is to be eternally detained and imprisoned, never to be reborn."

The Warhead is puzzled by the sentence. He looks around, confused at the trials of the weak. Those so-called crimes are nothing more than the laws of survival.

C:
芭<unbreak>-77</unbreak>研究所的废墟位于天汇座-ψ，藏在某个丛林世界的地下。激进的游侠曾将此处捣毁，如今残余的线缆仍然闪烁着意义不明的信号。

「那该死的研究所就像树林里的叶子一样难找」——于层层叠叠的树皮下，树骨构成了入口的形状，穿过漫长的树洞后，游侠们才找到了目标。

这研究所比起「实验室」，更像是某种「美术馆」。繁杂的线缆在空中交织成册，按照设计者的意图泄下异色光彩，观者无不扶额感到晕眩，随后，光怪陆离的幻觉在眼前逐一铺开——纯黄的阈限空间，逐渐消失的人像画列，藏于帘后的怪物身影……

游侠们熟悉这些手段，若是继续停留在设施里，随后便会出现胡言乱语、手舞足蹈的症状…一声清脆的枪托撞击后，年轻的游侠借助阵痛与眩晕从思绪迷宫里走出。

在清醒的视线中，游侠向着最深处前行。芭<unbreak>-77</unbreak>研究所满是坍塌的雕塑、毁坏的壁画、色彩饱和度极高的装饰…而遍地破碎的容器又让此地形如监牢。游侠在最深处找到了一份报告，想象着建筑轰然坍塌前，曾发生过无数次的「认知实验」…某个下意识的瞬间，众人猛然回首，惊觉自己已身处丛林乐园之中，树叶不断向他们招手，询问他们是否还记得树上的美好。

「我不是个香蕉吗？话说我们来这里干嘛？」年轻的游侠试图回到树上，让自己不再「蕉绿」。

而盲眼的游侠意识到了问题，在一切变得无可挽回前，将年轻人生拉硬拽着带离了那里。

「蕉蕉——让那帮猴子蕉鬼去吧！」
E:
The ruins of the Ba<unbreak>-77</unbreak> research institute lay at Convergence-ψ, hidden underground beneath a jungle world. This place was once destroyed by extremist Rangers, and the remaining cables still flicker with unclear signals.

"That cursed research institute is as hard to find as a single leaf in a forest." Beneath layers of tree bark, the bones of plants form the shape of an entrance. After passing through a long tree hollow, the Rangers finally find their target.

This research institute is closer to an "art gallery" than a "laboratory." Cables run interwoven in the air above, leaking strange and colorful lights per the designer's intentions. The viewers all press their hands to their heads and feel a daze come over them. Then, grotesque illusions spread before their eyes — a pure-yellow liminal space, gradually row of fading human portraits, shapes of monsters hidden behind curtains...

The Rangers are familiar with these methods. If they linger in this installation, they will begin speaking nonsense and find their limbs compelled to flail... With a crisp sound from impact against the stock of a gun, the young Ranger uses pain and dizziness to emerge from the cognitive labyrinth.

Their vision now revitalized, the Rangers continue to proceed to the depths. The Ba<unbreak>-77</unbreak> research institute is filled with collapsed statues, destroyed murals, super-saturated colorful decorations... And yet, the shattered containers littering the ground make this place seem like a prison instead. The Rangers discover a report in the lowest depths, then imagine the countless "cognitive experiments" that were conducted in this place before the building fell... In an instant, everyone turns around, compelled by their subconsciousness, and is surprised to find themselves in a woodland paradise. The leaves wave to them ceaselessly, inquiring whether they recall the wonder of being upon the trees.

"Aren't I a banana? By the way, what are we doing here?" The young Ranger tries to get back to the tree to stop himself from "banaxiety."

But the blind Ranger senses the problem. Before everything reaches the point of no return, he forcibly drags the youth away from that place.

"Banana... Those monkeys need to go banana themselves!"

C:
神悟树庭的一缕思绪，巨树上的一束横枝。脉络牵出千百种论调，如繁枝细节般各自延展。虽相互独立，却又丛生交叠，最终，盘桓成令巨树繁茂蓬勃的树冠。

其中一根枝杈将叶柄指向了自己，纠结盘绕。「莲食学派」的苦行者为树纹花叶本身的奥秘所倾倒，将植生，乃至万象，都描绘为触手可及的显见存在。他们所专注的苦行，是调和世间万物的实践方式——在他们看来，苦修并非是弃绝自我的做法，反倒认识自己的捷径。

其中一根枝杈结育硕果，缀满枝头。「山羊学派」的学者们精于奇兽研究、繁殖和保护——奇美拉令人怜爱的百态，便是他们对万相生灵探求的小小实践。

其中一根枝杈虬结成完美的比例，精确而优雅。「绳结学派」的学者们宣称「万物皆数」，即——一切实体皆可用数字映射。作为树庭最早凝聚的学派，他们坚守学院门槛，要求「不识几何学者不得入内」，更将数理奉为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}统御世间的手段。

其中一根枝杈生得浑厚圆实、韧性十足。「曳石学派」要求学者须在拜入前挥舞投石索，将圆石抛掷出指定范围外，以此证明其有意在锻炼、思辨及其竞技活动中「追求极致」。

其中一根枝杈时而垂下，时而挺立，向知觉传达纯粹的美感。「赤陶学派」将艺术与感性的探讨视作对逻辑思维的本源，坚信感官直接提取的信息最为精炼，所抵世界更为达观。

于繁茂的树冠之上，那虔诚敬拜的枝杈最适合祭礼，它形自巨木主干。「敬拜学派」精于泰坦仪式的理解及其神迹的运用，被称作「翁法罗斯政治家的摇篮」。他们不仅主导树庭信仰祭仪，其成果更是深入翁法罗斯的方方面面。偏偏有一根新生锐利的嫩枝，与它争锋相对——

「智种学派」继承自「最初的学者」对灵魂学说，专精于生命与事物间转化及扬升的理论，创办最为晚近，论点却最为犀利，其主导的学说，意图指向所有生命和物体的源头。

七大学派的七贤人各执治学领域，原则上不分先后——而理性的巨树身怀七贤人之首的虚衔，于无休止的辩论声中，将学识与理性开枝散叶，播撒世间。
E:
Each thought of the Grove of Epiphany is like a branch on the giant tree. The veins form hundreds of viewpoints, expanding like an intricate web of young boughs. Though independent, they intertwine, ultimately forming the thriving canopy of the great tree.

One branch pointed its leaf stalk toward itself, twisting in intricate coils. The Ascetics of Lotophagism were captivated by the very patterns of the tree's leaves and flowers, believing that all life and even the cosmos were visible, tangible realities. Their practice was not merely asceticism for its own sake, but a method of harmonizing all things — seeing asceticism not as the denial of self, but as a direct path to understanding it.

Another branch bore heavy fruit, filling the boughs. Scholars of Caprism specialized in the study, breeding, and preservation of animals. The many forms of the chimeras, both pitiful and beautiful, were their small but meaningful experiment to understanding the vast diversity of life.

One branch twisted into a perfect proportion, precise and elegant. The scholars of Nodism asserted that "all things are numbers," believing everything could be mapped mathematically. As one of the earliest schools to form in the Grove, they imposed strict standards, proclaiming "No scholar who is ignorant of geometry may enter" and regarded mathematics as the very means by which {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} governs the world.

Another branch grew thick and resilient, sturdy and enduring. Helkolithism required the scholars to prove their discipline by swinging a sling before admission, casting stones beyond a specific range. This was a test to demonstrate their commitment to "perfectionism" in thought, physical rigor, and competitive spirit.

One branch alternated between drooping and standing tall, transmitting an exquisite beauty to the senses. The Erythrokeramists view art and sensibility as the core of logical thinking, believing that the rawest and most refined knowledge comes from direct sensory experience, leading to a more enlightened and profound understanding of the world.

High above, in the lush treetop, one branch devoted and worshipful stood closest to the heart of the giant tree. This branch was the most suited for ritual. The Venerationists excelled in the understanding of Titan ceremonies and the deployment of divine miracles, earning the nickname "The Cradle of Amphoreus' Politicians." They not only governed the Grove's sacred rites but also influenced the very fabric of Amphoreus' politics. However, there was a new and sharp young shoot, rising in opposition...

The Nousporist inherited the First Scholar's teachings on the soul, and specialized in the transformation and ascension of life and matter. It was the youngest school, yet with the most cutting-edge arguments, focused on tracing the origins of all life and material existence.

The Seven Sages of the Seven Schools each presided over their respective fields of study, with no hierarchy among them. The towering giant tree of reason, the symbolic head of the Seven Sages, spread knowledge and reason like branches, scattering them across the world amid endless debates and intellectual discourse.

C: ……岚倒是经常在凡人眼前露面，但祂的速度太快，本体的观察样本少而又少。比较可靠的资料都藏在仙舟联盟，弄到它花了我不少功夫。作为宇宙中极为稀少的，拥有星神完全赐福的派系；联盟是少数能和公司平等交流的存在，所以指望公司这条线根本没戏，最后还得靠阮•梅出面。在仙舟古语中，「岚」的意思是「不可捉摸的雾」，祂在仙舟的正式称呼是「帝弓司命」，按照仙舟人的解释，正是在文明行将陨落的岁月里，「巡猎」的光矢为他们指明了方向……
E: ...Lan, on the other hand, often appears before mortals. However, THEY move too fast, and very few observations have been made about THEIR actual form. Most of the reliable information is kept by the Xianzhou Alliance and it took me a great amount of effort to get. As one of the rare factions in the universe that is completely blessed by an Aeon, the Alliance stands on equal grounds with the IPC, which meant the IPC couldn't help me at all. In the end, Ruan Mei had to step up to help. In the ancient Xianzhou language, "Lan" means "an unpredictable fog," and the Aeon's formal name in Xianzhou is Reignbow Arbiter. According to Xianzhou natives, the Lux Arrow of The Hunt showed them the way as their civilization was about to fall...

C: 残存着奇异墨水气息的画卷，纸上沉睡的妖怪们正等待某位绘师点睛、赋名，加以唤醒。当时机来临，他会为每只怪物点上眼睛，将「幻造」的实体释放进现实，向背叛者施以最可怕的复仇。在妖怪生产效率日益提高的如今，卷轴里的群魔已无法成为恐吓小孩的都市传说，只有被工作压垮的绘师，才会不时在疲惫的梦里，构建出类似的妖怪复仇喜剧。
E: A tapestry scroll lingering with the scent of strange ink, the demons sleeping on its paper surface anticipating the finishing touch of a master painter, to be named and awoken. When such an opportunity arrives, he will dot the eyes of every monster, unleashing concrete illusion onto reality, exacting the most terrible vengeance on traitors. In the present day, where demon production efficiency ever rises, the hordes in this scroll are no longer urban legends to scare children — only overworked painters will conjure up such comedies of demonic revenge in fatigued dreams.

C: 有些人顺从脚下的大地，有些人向往头顶的天空，万尼特便是后者。这位来自布利萨的棉花糖制造师，曾经试图用十枚灌满浓缩糖精的火箭和一把折叠凳让自己飞上天空。据说发射那天，全城百姓甚至国王都前来观看，他的学徒劝他悬崖勒马，因为任何胆敢僭越天空的行为必将招来艾格勒的神罚。但是学徒们明显多虑了，万尼特仅仅飞起数米，糖精就被火焰的高温融化了。
E: Some people remain bound to the earth beneath their feet, while others yearn for the sky above. Vanet was one of the latter. A cotton candy maker from Bulsa, he once attempted to launch himself into the heavens using ten rockets filled with concentrated syrup and a simple folding stool. On the day of the launch, the entire city — king included — gathered to witness the spectacle. His apprentices pleaded with him to abandon the attempt, warning that any act of defying the Sky would surely invoke the wrath of Aquila. But their worries proved unnecessary. Vanet barely lifted a few meters before the syrup melted away, exposed to the intense heat of the flames.

C: 颓唐的自灭者中流传着一个说法：即宇宙万物并无意义，人类在星神眼里亦不值一提。如果星神当真凌驾众生，高高在上，又怎会在乎凡人的爱恨苦乐？沉眠无相者Ⅸ的存在就是明证。为了向自灭者证明星神在乎，混沌医师结合秘学僧侣的巫神术制造了星神火漆，据说盖下这枚火漆，就会遥遥吸引对应星神跨越时空的瞥视——目前还没有成功案例，不过，确实有些自灭者盖下火漆后，重拾了对宇宙、星神及其它一切的信心。
E: There is a saying amongst the dejected Self-Annihilators that the universe has no purpose and humans are nothing in the eyes of the Aeons. If the Aeons truly stand above all lifeforms and rule supreme, then why would they care about the everyday concerns of mortals? The existence of the sleeping and shapeless IX is proof of that. To show the Self-Annihilators that the Aeons do care, the Doctors of Chaos combined the demon god crafts of the occult monks to create the Sealing Wax of Aeons. It is said that stamping with this Sealing Wax will attract a glimpse from the corresponding Aeon from across space and time — There are no successful examples yet, but some Self-Annihilators did regain their faith in the universe, Aeons, and everything else after stamping with this sealing wax.

C: 相较石块、木料、黄金、超钛金属与货币，游牧矿工更热衷于挖掘「以太」。他们曾一度痴迷在矿地间用手指挖掘巨量「以太」的手感，但这种体验曾招来不幸：数名超巨型矿工终在不明区域被火药炸死，其间仅一位身材矮小的矿工得以幸存，它的胡须自此以后永远跳跃着一撮火焰。
E: Compared to currencies of stone, wood, gold, or supernium metals, the nomadic miners are more obsessed with the excavation of Aether. There was a period when they were infatuated with the sensation of digging vast quantities of Aether using their bare hands while in the mines, but these experiences brought calamity upon them. Several large-stature miners finally met their ends via exploding gunpowder in unknown areas, while only a short and small miner managed to survive. Its beard henceforth always flickered with a pinch of flame.

C: 博识学会中有一群人认为科学与魔法本为一体。发达的科学即是魔法，严谨的魔法则是科学。他们从远古的奇幻传说中汲取灵感，制造了「万识囊」——一种轻巧的便携储物装置。在博识学会的构想中，万识囊最终将连接向一个个独立的半位面，拥有无限的空间，而不是如今所使用的超距折叠技术……他们仍在努力。\n（该奇物已发生数据膨胀）
E: There is a group in the Intelligentsia Guild that believes science was originally the same as magic, that advanced science is magic and rigorous magic is science. They drew inspiration from ancient fantastic mythologies and created the Omniscient Capsule, a light-weight and convenient storage gadget. The Intelligentsia Guild planned for the Omniscient Capsule to ultimately lead to independent demiplanes, thus obtaining infinite space beyond the advanced spatial compression technologies currently in use... And they are still trying.\n(This Curio already underwent data expansion)

C:
我的表亲蒂泰尼，是守望沙漏的记述官之一。
岁月的指尖划出河流，让时间在其中流淌，
大地静默地陪伴着世人，承载千载的时光。
他们从河畔淘来沙粒，当它从沙漏中落下，
承载的历史也得以释放。
它曾是阿卡索斯的短剑，被战争卷携，
受冥河侵蚀，在水中迷离了百年的时光。
它曾是埃普斯的石雕，随纷争陷落深渊，因嬉戏的奇兽被洗刷至此。
由大地与岁月降下的赐福，自沙粒中解读出过往，
他们笃信，只要仍有人在读着翁法罗斯的故事，世界便永不灭亡。
E:
My cousin Titanis is one of the chroniclers who watch over the Hourglass.
The fingers of time drew river ways, time flowing through them.
The earth quietly stood by, bearing the weight of centuries.
The chroniclers gathered grains of sand from the riverbank and put them in the hourglass.
Each grain of sand would release a piece of history it bore.
Once, it was the short sword of Icatus, swept away by war,
Eroded by the River of Souls, lost to the currents for a century.
Once, it was a statue from Epos, fallen into the abyss in the wake of conflict, brought ashore by the playful beasts of legend.
A benediction from the earth and time enables us to read the past from the sand.
They believe that as long as there are those who read the stories of Amphoreus, the world shall never perish.

C: 妙笔生花

C: 咕咕钟狂热粉丝（其一）
E: Cuckoo Clock Fanatic (I)

C: 万象无常骰曾在宇宙中极为常见，造成无数微小但邪恶的混乱。它的使用方法是这样的：手掌紧紧握住骰子，默念任意一句有意义的话，想着你最想吃的食物同时将骰子掷出。某一面向上时你会得到意外之财，某一面向上时你会收获美好的爱情，但更多面的结局是疾病、霉运、诅咒和终生相伴的梅雨。尽管如此，仍有许多人热衷于投掷万象无常骰，并快乐地宣称这不过是假面愚者的一个玩笑。
E: Entropic Dice are common in the universe and cause countless tiny but malevolent disturbances. To use it, you grab the die tightly and think of any meaningful sentence in your head, then as you throw the die, think about the food you want to eat the most. You will receive unexpected wealth if the die lands on a certain number and wonderful love on another number, but the ends you will meet for other numbers include illness, bad luck, curses, and lifelong rain. Despite this, many people still love to play with these dice, and happily declare that these items are just a joke made by the Masked Fools.

C: 于黑森林中，一块海绵奇迹般地产生了自由意志。它试图与同样产生意识的螺丝展开社交，却屡屡碰壁；它痛定思痛，学会了抹去身上所有的棱角与漏洞，让自己不断焕发光彩，跻身上流社会——它最后变成了一块圆滑的海绵。现在，它正致力于帮助那些被丢弃在垃圾堆里的海绵萌生自由意志。
E: In the Black Forest, a sponge miraculously became sapient. It tried to interact with the similarly sapient screws, but found itself hitting a brick wall. It pondered about its painful experience and learned to smooth away all the edges in its personality, allowing itself to constantly shine and climb up the societal ladder, ultimately turning into a smooth and slick sponge. Now, it dedicates its efforts to uplifting discarded sponges into developing their own self-awareness.
