C: 角色故事·一
E: Character Story: Part I

C: 将宇宙视为游戏的超级骇客。 \n无论怎样棘手的防御系统，银狼都能轻松破解。她与「天才俱乐部」螺丝咕姆的数据攻防战，现已成为骇客界的传说。 \n宇宙中还有多少亟待攻破的关卡？银狼对此十分期待。
E: The universe is just another game to this super hacker.\nNo matter how thorny the defense system, Silver Wolf can crack it with ease. Her hacking battle with Screwllum of the Genius Society has become stuff of legends in the hacking world.\nHow many more levels are there to beat in the universe? Silver Wolf looks forward to finding out.

C: 这位正是全贝洛伯格最天才的机械师兼摇滚明星、银鬃铁卫戍卫官杰帕德•朗道的姐姐…… 「停，打住。前面的可以留着，后半句就免了吧。」 「劝你别这样简单概括我的身份…我，希露瓦•朗道，从来都不是任何人的附属品。」 「…呃，没下文了吗？行吧，那我自己再补充点：有什么东西坏了的话——你可以来行政区的机械屋『永动』找我，我随时欢迎。」 「什么，想来听摇滚？嘿，那我可更欢迎啦——你还是可以来行政区的机械屋『永动』，和『机械热潮』一起，让这座城市燥起来吧！」
E: This is the most talented mechanic in all of Belobog and rock star. Did we mention she's also the sister of Captain Gepard Landau of the Silvermane Guards? "Stop. Stop that. Keep the first part, and leave out the second part." "I'd like you not to gloss over my identity like that... I, Serval Landau, am no one's accessory." "...Oh, there's nothing else afterward? Okay. Let me chip in then: If something's broken, drop into the Neverwinter Workshop in the Administrative District to see me, any time." "What's that, you wanna hear some rock'n'roll? Well, that's even better — drop into our Neverwinter Workshop in the Administrative District to rock this city — with Mechanical Fever!"

C: 位列帝弓七天将之一的「神策将军」，外表懒散、心思缜密。不以危局中力挽狂澜为智策，因此在常事上十分下功夫，以免节外生枝。因其细心谋划，仙舟承平日久，看似行事慵懒的景元反被送上绰号「闭目将军」。
E: The Divine Foresight, one of the Seven Arbiter-Generals. Although his appearance may be one of indolence, he is more meticulous than seemingly meets the eye. He does not consider saving a situation from the brink of disaster to be a show of wisdom, and is thus fastidious with routine affairs to avoid any potential problems. Due to his careful management, Xianzhou has enjoyed many years of peace, with Jing Yuan's seemingly lazy demeanor having earned him the moniker of the "Dozing General."

C: 意气飞扬的云骑骁卫，仙舟「罗浮」最强剑士。\n为剑生亦为剑痴，当彦卿手中握剑时，无人敢小看这位尚在总角之年的天才。\n或许能让手中宝剑微微收敛锋芒的，只有时间。
E: The spirited lieutenant of the Xianzhou Luofu, and also its most proficient swordsman.\nHe was born for the sword and is obsessed with it. Whenever a sword rests in Yanqing's hand, none would dare underestimate this genius still in the early days of his youth.\nPerhaps the only thing capable of dulling his treasured blade's sharp edge is time.

C: 纪念黑塔女士诞辰██周年研讨会 会议记录•议题一：黑塔女士科学成就回顾 会议记录•议题二：黑塔女士生平轶事回顾 …… 会议记录•议题五：专题研讨「科学的极限与真意」 …… 会议记录•临时议题：默哀环节：据权威媒体突发报道，黑塔女士已因病离世…… 会议记录•临时议题二：黑塔女士现身致辞！ 黑塔女士发言： 「感谢各位对我的深情悼念，真不巧，又要让某些人失望了。」 「您是…黑塔女士？」 「这是，黑塔女士的人偶？」 「是那篇返老还童的论文…真的实现了？！」 「黑塔女士，请解释一下！」 …… 黑塔女士清了清喉咙，举起手中的权杖—— 「是因为『魔法』。」 「黑塔女士，请留步！」 「不可能！返老还童仅仅具备理论上的可能性，离实现还有十万八千里……」 「科学…她还算个科学家吗！一派胡言！」 「不是姐们…你怎么做到每次出场都这么酷炫的？」 「好玩吧？媒体为了抢头条总是三天两头假报新闻，而那些老家伙总盼着我去世，好验证我返老还童的理论不过是纸上谈兵。」 她关掉会议录像，继续悠然享用每日下午茶。 「你的每一项理论成果，最后都被证明有实现的可能，不过…后世的学者从未理解你的真意，因此也无法复现。」清冷的女士端起茶。 「逻辑：所谓重返青春的『魔法』，是黑塔女士表示嘲讽的修辞。推理：该理论的基础原理涉及能量的逆转与时间的流动，涉及到苛刻的实现条件。计算：……」 她笑眯眯地将一块梅花糕点推至智械面前，打断了他的话。 「看破不说破。吃你的吧。」
E: Memorial Symposium: Celebrating Madam Herta's ██th Birthday Meeting Minutes, Topic One: A Retrospective of Madam Herta's Scientific Achievements Meeting Minutes, Topic Two: Anecdotes and Stories from Madam Herta's Life ... Meeting Minutes, Topic Five: Panel Discussion on "Exploring the Boundaries of Science and its Profound Implications" ... Meeting Minutes, Provisional Topic: Moment of Silence. Breaking news from reliable media sources, Madam Herta has passed away... Meeting Minutes, Provisional Topic 2: Madam Herta Makes an Unexpected Appearance and Delivers a Speech! Madam Herta's Speech: "Thank you all for your heartfelt condolences. Unfortunately, it seems I must disappoint some of you yet again." "Are you... Madam Herta?" "Is this a puppet of Madam Herta?" "Did your paper on de-aging... actually work!?" "Madam Herta, we need an explanation!" ... Madam Herta cleared her throat and lifted her scepter aloft — "It's all thanks to Magic." "Madam Herta, hold on a moment!" "It's impossible! The de-aging concept is purely theoretical. We're light-years away from actual application..." "Science? Can she even be called a scientist anymore? That's just absurd!" "Not to kill the vibe, but how do you always manage to make such a stunning entrance?" "Pretty amusing, isn't it? The press loves to churn out fake news for headlines, while the old timers can't wait for me to bite the dust, hoping to prove my anti-aging theory is just a pipe dream." She switches off the conference video and calmly resumes her afternoon tea. "All your theories have been shown to have potential, yet... future scholars have never truly captured your essence, making replication impossible." The calm woman sips her tea. "Logic: The so-called 'magic' of youth Madam Herta mentions is her biting satire. Deductive: The theory's core principles involve reversing energy and manipulating time, which requires exacting conditions. Computation: ..." Her smile broadens as she slides a plum pastry across to the Intellitron, cutting off his monologue. "Some truths don't need to be spoken. Here, have a treat."

C: 三相的神谕自雅努萨波利斯，传向大地上无尽纷争的城邦。 「拯救世界…从来不是执棋者的兴趣。」 她品味神谕，熊熊燃烧的未来仿佛就在眼前—— 「但与那自视为主宰的神明相争，乃至走向天外…的确是旷古而绝世的一局！」 漫漫长夜中，她如璀璨的灯火吸引流淌金血的人子： 奥赫玛的议院中，黄金裔与平民共享争论与决议的公民权。 宏伟的图书馆拔地而起，逐火的使命人人皆可获取。 军队的旧习被废除，深海的游鱼搁浅在陆地，循着血与火的气味成为她的剑旗。 奥赫玛的政坛中，圣城的「金织」冉冉升起，金丝的颤动将众人的命运彼此连缀。 …… 但那棋盘以黄金之血勾勒，她的对手是神明。即便她以燃烧之痛换来冠冕，以永驻幼年换取未来，胜利的天平似乎从未真正倾向人子。 「逐火是不断失却的旅途…… 「唯有同等的代价，才能交换同等的胜利。但要击落神明，还远远不够……」 她日日夜夜推演，不愿自己的忧虑被人看见。 「既然你是棋手，我们便是棋子，对吧？」 不等她的回答，以剑为琴的少女洗去手上的血腥，点了点头。 「我明白了。」 唯有此时，那高傲的女皇才会罕见地沉默。 「如果可以……」 她的脸上浮现一丝似有若无的苦涩。 「不，没有如果。」 猎夺「海洋」火种的战役前，她再一次站在高台，望着五百位屏息等待谕令的臣子。 「诸位——」 当她的声音响起，欢呼声响彻云霄。 「今日，『海洋』将为我们倾覆，那『毁灭』的巨兽将成为无往而不利的武器，为征服星海举杯吧！」 她知道前方是有去无回的血海，但她必须扮演斩钉截铁的君王。 再一次，她仿佛听到老师的告诫—— 「棋是牺牲的艺术。 因此，棋手须首先立下必死的决心。」
E: The tripartite prophecy spreads from Janusopolis to the city-states in endless strife throughout the land. "Saving the world... has never been of a chessmaster's interest." She ponders the prophecy, envisioning a fiery future unfolding before her. "But to challenge gods who see themselves as rulers, and even venture beyond the sky... now that's a game worth playing!" Through the endless night, she draws golden-blooded children of humanity like a brilliant flame: In Okhema's Council, Chrysos Heirs and common folk alike share the right to debate and vote. Magnificent libraries rise from the ground, granting all access to knowledge of the Flame-Chase mission. As ancient military orders crumble into dust, a gladius of the deep is drawn to shore, following the perfume of blood and fire to serve as her blades. In the political waters of the holy city, the Goldweaver of Okhema rises on the horizon, and the trembles of golden threads entangle the people's fates. ... Yet her chessboard is etched in golden blood, and she plays against gods themselves. Though she trades burning pain for her crown and suffers eternal infancy for the future, the scales of victory have never truly tipped in humanity's favor. "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey..." "Only through a worthy sacrifice can we gain a befitting victory. But to topple gods, this is far from enough..." Day and night she studies the board, concealing her anxieties from any watchful eyes. "If you're the chess master, then that makes us the pawns, right?" Without waiting for an answer, the girl who wields a sword like a musical instrument wipes blood from her hands and nods. "I understand now." Only in moments like these would the proud empress fall uncharacteristically silent. "If only..." A trace of bitterness flickers across her face. "No, there are no 'if onlys' anymore." Before the battle to claim the Ocean's Coreflame, she stands once more upon the platform, looking down at five hundred subjects who hold their breath, awaiting her decree. "My warriors..." As her voice resounds, cheers erupt throughout the crowd. "Today, the 'Ocean' shall surrender to us, and the beast of 'Destruction' will become our unstoppable weapon. Now, raise your cups! To our conquest of the sea of stars!" She knows that only a crimson sea of no return awaits ahead, but she must wear the mask of the unflinching ruler. In that moment, the wisdom of her teacher whispers to her again... "Chess is the art of sacrifice." "Your hands must accept death before touching the board."

C: 驻守冰原的旧忆
E: Old Memories of the Icy Post

C: 知更鸟？：愚者总按两遍铃
E: Robin?: The Fool Always Rings Twice

C: 黑塔：幻镜求谜
E: Herta: Answers Within Mirrors

C: 风堇：落羽化生
E: Hyacine: Rebirth of Fallen Feathers

C:
现在，你的脑海里又回响起了这句话：「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
你还未下决心，又或是你心中已经有了决定，只是你还不确定，这么想的是不是只有自己……
没关系，你还可以把它藏在心中，听听别人的想法……
说不定，你们想的完全一样呢？
E:
These words resurface in your mind once more. "When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret."
You haven't made up your mind yet, or could it be that you have. However, you're just not sure if anyone else shares your point of view...
It's alright. You can hide it deep in your heart and listen to what others think...
Is it possible that you all think the same?

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C:
矿区的危机基本解除，绝大部分「地火」成员已经护送矿民先行撤离现场。
不过，希儿尚未将布洛妮娅押送至首领面前，而你们也没有见到这位大人物——而这正是你们此行的根本原因。
然而，你的去路被一辆报废矿车强行隔断。
所幸你们阴差阳错之下捡到了被遗留在矿洞里的星际和平公司寻物产品「查宝」，或许它可以带你们找到修复矿车所需的部件……
E:
The crisis in the mines is no more, and most of the Wildfire members have left the spot, escorting miners to safety along with them.
However, Seele has not yet brought her captive, Bronya, to the chief, and you haven't had the chance to meet this important figure, a meeting with whom is the biggest motive behind this journey.
And yet, the way forward is cut off by a mine cart out of order.
Luckily, you happen to have picked up a Findie, a product from the Interastral Peace Corporation with the purpose of searching for things. Someone must have left behind in the mines. Maybe it can lead you to the parts required to fix the mine cart...

C: 你们抵达了孤儿院门口，也大致了解了布洛妮娅困惑的原因——尽管目前仍只是个猜测，但她或许曾在这里生活过一段时间…\n总之，先在此处搜索娜塔莎需要的物资吧。
E: You arrive at the orphanage entrance and have somewhat understood what's bothering Bronya — although it's just speculation, she might have lived here in the past...\nAnyways, first search this place for the supplies that Natasha wants.

C: 你们终于在迂回曲折的铆钉镇中找到了前往孤儿院的路。沿路拾级而上，便能看到那坐落在高处的豪华宅邸，它日复一日地俯瞰着小镇的种种世事无常。\n你看到希儿的表情变得有些许复杂；更令人费解的是，就连布洛妮娅也流露出类似的情绪…
E: You finally find your way through the complex roads of Rivet Town and discover the path to the orphanage. As you make your way uphill, you can see the luxurious mansions that overlook the town, watching its every move each and every day.\nYou see that Seele's expression has turned complex, but what's more confusing is that Bronya seems to be having the same emotions...

C: 桑博如约带你们来到了通向史瓦罗基地的大门前，却又在此处卖了个关子：原来，想要打开这道铁门，你们必须从认证机器人处收集认证才行。\n如果他能一次性把话说完的话，你们也不至于浪费时间兜这个圈子了——这就是你不想和桑博共事的原因…之一。\n你已经取得了第一级认证，赶快向下一级认证进发吧。
E: As promised, Sampo leads you to the gate of Svarog's base. He then leaves you with a cliffhanger: In order to open this gate, you'll have to collect certifications from the certification robot.\nIf he could just tell you everything at once, you wouldn't have to waste time running in circles — this is the reason why you dread working with Sampo... One of the reasons at least.\nYou've collected the Level-1 Certification. Hurry and collect the next level of certifications.

C:
在亲眼见证朗道家姐弟二人在疆场上并肩作战的模样后，你才真正认识到坚韧与英勇究竟是为何物。
你们方才成功穿过杀声如雷的战场，却又立刻遁入沉默的裂界迷宫中——周遭的死寂使你不禁感到毛骨悚然。
在发现布洛妮娅遗留的物品后，三月七又立功了：这次，她发现守护者母女二人的幻象残影出现在了前方不远处。
这无疑是裂界摹写现实特性的具现——两人不久前很可能曾在此停留。跟上去看看吧！
E:
After witnessing the Landau siblings fighting side by side, you truly understand what perseverance and bravery really mean.
You just made your way through a fierce battlefield and now you find yourself inside a Fragmentum maze deafened by silence — the deathly quiet of this place sends a chill down your spine.
March 7th accomplished another feat after discovering the item left behind by Bronya. This time she discovered that the echoing mirages of the guardian mother and daughter have appeared just up ahead.
This is undoubtedly a manifestation of the Fragmentum's unique nature of imitating reality — the two might have been here not long ago. Catch up to them and take a look!

C: 得知你们为星核而来，停云邀众人前往司辰宫通传来意。\n仙舟之上，六司各掌其职。在这敏感时刻，你们若想在罗浮上自由行动，便须取得司掌航行与外交的天舶司长官，驭空的首肯。
E: Knowing that you came for the Stellaron, Tingyun invites everyone to the Palace of Astrum for a meeting.\nSix individual commissions oversee the Xianzhou. If you wish to move freely on the Luofu during these sensitive times, you must obtain the approval of the Head of the Sky-Faring Commission, Yukong, who is in charge of transport and diplomacy.

C: 列车之上，遥望不容踏足的故土，你曾以为此生再也不会见到罗浮「玉界门」的景色。\n然而翻看卡芙卡所留下的通讯影像，你意识到她的邀请中潜藏着致命的危险——她的同伴，名为「刃」的男子，与你之间曾有刻骨宿怨。\n你决心违犯禁令，再踏罗浮。
E: As you cast your gaze from the Express toward a home you can never return to, you recall a time when the prospect of looking upon the Jade Gate of the Luofu seemed utterly unbelievable.\nAs you review the video communication sent by Kafka, you realize there is a hidden and lethal danger in her invitation — Her companion, the man named Blade, has an ancient and indelible feud with you.\nYou decide to go against the ban and set foot on the Luofu once again.

C: 翻看卡芙卡所留下的通讯影像，你意识到她的邀请中潜藏着致命的危险——她的同伴，名为「刃」的男子，与你之间曾有刻骨宿怨。\n你决心违犯禁令，再踏罗浮。然而当你登陆流云渡，却察觉着卡芙卡所言非虚，受星核作祟，罗浮已然陷入灾变。
E: As you review the video communication sent by Kafka, you realize there is a hidden and lethal danger in her invitation — Her companion, the man named Blade, has an ancient and indelible feud with you.\nYou decide to go against the ban and set foot on the Luofu once again. Yet, when you land on Cloudford, you feel that Kafka was not lying. The Luofu has fallen into a catastrophe due to the influences of the Stellaron.

C: 航线会议结束了，帕姆说的「三件事」果然不包括星穹列车其实可以变形成巨大机器人一事。不得不说，这真的很让人失望，但老无名客追迹之旅和匹诺康尼本身倒也足够吸引人。\n在正式开始跃迁以前，不妨和大家交流交流各自的安排吧。当然，你也可以收听新一期星际和平播报，看看列车组是不是真的能天天上新闻。
E: The navigation meeting has come to an end and the "three things" that Pom-Pom mentioned do not include the Astral Express being able to transform into a giant robot. Though you have to admit this is disappointing, a journey to track a trace of the old Nameless and Penacony itself are enticing enough topics.\nBefore the warp begins, why not discuss your individual plans with everyone? Of course, you could also check in on the newest Interastral Peace Broadcast and see if the Crew can really make the headlines every day.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 你安然无恙地返回「黄金的时刻」——带着无比巨大的信息量一起。如果不出意外，列车组的同伴们听过你的见闻后一定会露出无比惊讶的表情…前提是你的舌头别打结。\n拭目以待吧。
E: Safe and sound, you return to the Golden Hour with a repertoire of information. If everything goes as planned, the Crew will surely be blown away after hearing your experiences... provided that you don't get tongue-tied.\nLet's look forward to it.

C: 这群猴子小可爱搞的蕉皮玩意儿满地都是，这该死的地方也没有环卫工——所以，你不介意帮这儿的人们打扫卫生。\n扫帚就是你手里的枪。
E: These lil' fudgin' monkeys are tossing banana peels everywhere like it's nobody's business. Since there's no janitor in this dump, you might as well lend a hand in cleaning up.\nWith your pistols as your broom, of course.

C: 匹诺康尼的旅程再次告一段落。如今列车能源告急，亟需一场足够「开拓」的旅程进行补充。
E: The journey to Penacony has come to a close once again. With the Express running low on energy, a journey that is sufficiently Trailblazing is urgently needed to refuel.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 名为那刻夏的黄金裔生死未卜，以炼金术留下线索。{NICKNAME}一行人根据他的指引，前去查看火种安危。
E: The Chrysos Heir Anaxa's whereabouts remain uncertain, but he left alchemical clues. {NICKNAME}'s group follows these leads to verify the Coreflame's condition.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 借助{NICKNAME}的力量，白厄等人来到了命运重渊的往世——神谕的圣地「雅努萨波利斯」，并在这里见到了缇宝三人千年前的模样。
E: Through {NICKNAME}'s power, Phainon's group journeys to the past of the Abyss of Fate — the "Sanctum of Prophecy" Janusopolis, where they see the Tribbie trio as they were a thousand years ago.

C: 次日午时，扎格列斯的半神将成为冥河之行的向导。今日今时，应为远行留存体力。\n{NICKNAME}就像学黉里准备春游的学生…即便性命危在旦夕，{F#她}{M#他}还是这么松弛，姑且算作是好事吧。
E: At noon of the next day, Zagreus's demigod will become a guide to traverse the River of Souls. Today, stamina should be conserved for the long trip ahead.\n{NICKNAME} is like a student preparing for a spring break trip... Even if lives are at stake {F#she}{M#he} is still so relaxed. That might be a good thing.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 盗火行者再次出现在我们面前，这意味着…\n去吧，{NICKNAME}，去帮助白厄，完成「再创世」！
E: The Flame Reaver stands before us once more, which can only mean...\nGo now, {NICKNAME}, help Phainon complete the "Era Nova"!

C: 「戏剧」实为某人年少时的记忆，舞台是昔日的哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}带着一肚子的问题， 扮演着其人「最重要的伙伴」，陪伴他与昔涟一同找寻着某物…
E: The "theater" is actually someone's childhood memories, staged in the Aedes Elysiae of old. {NICKNAME}, with many questions in mind, assumes the role of this person's "most important companion," joining him and Cyrene on their search for something important...

C: 激动人心的全新冒险即将展开，本姑娘却在临出发前突发恶疾…不对，身体抱恙，甚至还陷入了昏迷？！\n等到恢复清醒，眼前的景象却让本姑娘大吃一惊——光怪陆离的心像世界，恶魔低语般的切切呢喃——这里莫非就是……\n…完全没头绪！话说回来，我真的清醒了吗？
E: Just when an exhilarating new adventure was about to begin, I'm suddenly hit with some mystery illness... Wait, no, I got sick, and even fell into a coma!?\nWhen I finally came to, what I saw nearly knocked me off my feet — a bizarre, psychedelic world of mind, with hissed demonic whispers. Could this be...\n...No, I have no clue at all! Come to think of it... am I even really awake?

C: 在学会忙里偷闲的时候，你已经真正成为了空间站的一员。
E: Once you've learned how to steal a moment of leisure amid the busy work, you'll know you truly become a member of the space station.

C: 哈哈，相信你会得到一个惊喜的。
E: Haha, bet you're in for a real surprise.

C: 一路收集伙伴，然后和大魔王对决，是不是很王道的展开？不对，我拍的不是恐怖片吗？
E: Gather companions along the way and face off against the Demon King — isn't that a textbook setting for a heroic journey? Wait... wasn't this supposed to be a horror film?

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 退场歌已终。你要亲手用火种烧尽台下无人的剧场，再亲手拉开下一场序幕——又是荒唐的悲剧，还是荒诞的喜剧？这一切仅有前进才得以窥见，身后万物都将迎来又一次退场。\n但无需遗憾，无需留连，因为世代如落叶，英雄亦如是。
E: The curtain call music has ended. You must use the Coreflame to burn down this empty theater, then raise the curtain for the next act. Will it be an absurd tragedy, or a preposterous comedy? Only by moving forward can we glimpse what lies ahead, while everything behind us faces another final bow.\nBut there's no need for regret or lingering attachment, for generations fall like leaves, and so, too, do heroes.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…为什么自己什么都不记得？难道真的是以「记忆」为代价…？\n这不是匹诺康尼吗？难道说「太一之梦」就一直没醒来？
E: The Era Nova Ceremony was a success, and the journey in Amphoreus had reached its end... So why can't you remember anything? Was it really at the cost of "memories"...?\nIsn't this Penacony? Could it be that you never woke up from Ena's Dream?

C: 多亏了星期日与长夜月的短暂碰撞，得以让潜伏起来的黑天鹅锁定了长夜月的藏身处，并沿着命途的河流逆流而上。\n忆庭决不允许黑天鹅擅自行动，而黑天鹅也不知道自己将面对什么……
E: Thanks to the brief collision between Sunday and Evernight, Black Swan, who had been lurking, managed to lock onto Evernight's hideout and travel upstream along the currents of the Path.\nThe Garden of Recollection would never allow Black Swan to act on her own, while she had no idea what she was about to face...

C: 你从空间站的医疗舱醒来，正巧撞见医疗科员乔安为另一名科员诊疗。这位患者自述有短期失忆现象，更重要的是，她的名字…叫做「希拉」。\n嗅到了古怪、秘密与阴谋的气息，你答应前往希拉指定的房间替她展开调查。
E: You wake up in the space station's Medical Department, just as a medical researcher, Joanne, is treating another researcher. The patient claims that she is suffering from short-term memory loss. More importantly, her name is... "Sheila."\nSensing oddity, secrecy, and conspiracy, you agree to go to the room Sheila tells you about and start an investigation.

C: 利用相机扫描怪物，击败藏有右侧房间密钥的怪物
E: Use the camera to scan for monsters and defeat the monster that is carrying the encryption key to the room on the right

C: 怪物清缴完毕，向艾丝妲远程复命
E: Monster elimination complete, report to Asta remotely

C: 嗅嗅，嗅嗅。\n跟随佩佩继续前进吧！
E: Sniff sniff, sniff sniff.\nKeep following Peppy!

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 漫长猩红的幻觉之夜，仍然还未结束。\n银枝邀请与你「单独沟通」，他的行为模式实在难以令常人理解……
E: The long, scarlet night of hallucinations forges endlessly on.\nArgenti invites you to a "1-on-1 discussion." His behavior is truly impossible for normal people to parse...

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n三月开心，想去。再去问丹恒。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nMarch wants to go. Asking Dan Heng next.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n姬子来了。合同没签，布洛妮娅自有妙计。必须找到托帕。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHimeko is here. Didn't sign the contract. Bronya has a plan. Must find Topaz.

C: 矿车工老师傅似乎为你准备了新的谜题——去问问他准备的如何了吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator seems to have prepared a new puzzle. Go and inquire about his preparation

C: 小贩是四位嫌疑人中的一位，没有不在场证据，需要仔细盘问，才能听出破绽。\n据斯薇塔介绍说这几位嫌疑人曾经都十分信任费斯曼老爹，一定是发生过什么，才会在彼此之间出现了裂隙。
E: The peddler is one of the four suspects. They have no alibi, and you need to question them in detail to see if they're hiding the truth.\nAccording to Swetta, these suspects used to trust Fersman with all their hearts. Something must have caused a rift between them.

C: 你已经做出了自己的判断，接下来就是要去验证它。跟紧虎克，别让真正的犯人逃走了。\n你也不清楚裁缝是否就是真正的小偷，但在寻找真相的路上，不能因为犹豫就止步不前。
E: You've made a clear deduction, and now it's time to prove it. Follow Hook and don't let the criminal run away.\nYou're not sure if the tailor is the thief, but one cannot waver in the search for the truth.

C: 没想到拍卖会上还有矿脉探测器可用的探针，没有比这更合适的礼物了，快去告诉虎克大人吧。\n又能将大熊玩偶「菌菌」卖掉，又能买到合适的礼物，世界上怎么会有这样两全其美的事呢？
E: You didn't expect to find a probe for the vein detector at this auction. This is a great gift, so you decide to tell Hook about it.\nNow you can sell the toy bear "Junjun" and buy a perfect gift. Great!

C: 拍卖会上的隐藏买家，都有可能抬高「菌菌」的价格。如果准备好了，就去找拍卖师等待拍卖开始吧。\n多问问，多看看，每一个人都可能是「菌菌」的狂热买家。
E: Every possible buyer at the auction can help you sell "Junjun" at a high price. Once you're ready, find the auctioneer and wait for the auction to begin.\nKeep looking and searching, because everyone here might become a fan of "Junjun."

C: 胜利的消息在磐岩镇的大街小巷中传扬。现在总算可以松一口气了——不妨同你与朗道姐弟救下的难民们聊聊天吧。
E: The news of the victory is spreading everywhere in Boulder Town and you can finally rest — Why don't you chat with the refugees whom the Landau siblings had saved.

C: 雪原极光观测之旅到这里就全部结束了，结局可谓是皆大欢喜，但两位女孩似乎还想让这趟旅行变得更加完美。\n她们已经各回各家，为晚些时候的夜宵各做准备，而此时的你则受到了来自朗道姐弟的短信。\n闲着也是闲着，看看他们又想找你请教些什么吧。
E: The trip to observe the Snow Plains aurora is now over. You achieve a happy ending, but the two girls seem to want to make this trip even more special.\nThey've both gone home to prepare for supper later, just as you receive a message from the Landau siblings.\nYou have free time anyways. Let's see what they want to ask you.

C: 卢卡的一连串反常行为引起了你和希儿的怀疑。\n为了一探事情的究竟，你们尾随他来到了铆钉镇。\n悄悄地跟在卢卡身后，看看他究竟在隐藏什么不可告人的秘密。
E: Luka's string of weird behaviors have made you and Seele quite suspicious.\nYou follow him to Rivet Town in order to find out the truth of the matter.\nFollow Luka quietly and see what kind of secret he is hiding.

C: 工业展区的雕塑「齿轮与智慧」失窃了，你和佩拉来到下层区的机械聚落调查此事。\n没想到，你们居然从故障的机器人体内发现了「齿轮与智慧」的组件。\n眼前有一台瘫痪的「灰熊」型号机兵，检查一下它体内有没有你需要收集的零件吧。
E: The sculpture Gears and Wisdom in the Industrial Exhibit was stolen. Pela and you arrive at the Robot Settlement in the Underworld to investigate this matter.\nYou did not expect to find parts of Gears and Wisdom inside the malfunctioning robot.\nThere is a paralyzed Automaton Grizzly before you. Check whether its interior contains a part you need to collect.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n你和佩拉来到了没落的商业街，追查嫌疑人诺尔伯特公子的下落。\n诺尔伯特的言谈已经揭露了他既是展品贩子的不争事实。继续前进，把他捉拿归案。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nYou and Pela arrive at the desolate shopping street to chase down Norbert, the suspect.\nNorbert's words and actions have already revealed the indisputable fact that he is the artifact peddler. Keep going and take him into custody.

C: 博识学会的学者陶德•雷奥登似乎又遇到了新的难题，不过这一次，除了「学术」问题之外，似乎还有别的隐情……
E: Scholar Todd Riordan of the Intelligentsia Guild seems to have encountered a new problem. But this time, besides "academic" problems, there seems to be something else...

C: 仙舟之上，往来都离不开星槎。人犯在此逗留，所图必是劫船便于逃亡，过程中难免会留下线索。但流云渡作为仙舟对外的关口，封锁前旅客所留之物何止百千，难不成得一件件翻看吗？
E: No one could ingress or egress the Xianzhou ship without a starskiff. A wanted person would only linger here to hijack a starskiff to escape, so he would have left behind clues. But as the only Xianzhou opening to the cast expanse, Cloudford contains more than thousands of belongings of visitors. You can't check them out one by one, can you?

C: 十王司判官请求你们将她护送至星槎渡口。横生的建木枝蔓，失控的魔阴身与孽物…想必这一路定然不可能一帆风顺。
E: The Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission requested you to escort her to the Starskiff Jetty, with overgrown Ambrosial Arbor Vines and uncontrolled mara-struck individuals and abominations along the way... It is nearly impossible for the journey there to be smooth sailing.

C: 你常看到类似的新闻，为了找回走失者，寻找的人也迷了路。很遗憾，今天你注定要成为这样一个故事的主角。渐渐的，你连藿藿都不知去向。在一面奇怪的铜镜前打量了片刻功夫，你居然被拉进了一处幻境中。此处三步一墙，五步一门，直教人原地打转，不知何去何从。\n按你看过的某些仙舟话本故事所说，等你离开此处，世间已过去百余年之久——你可不想在一个迷宫里度过余生，快些找到出口吧！
E: You often see similar news stories about a person getting lost while trying to find another missing person. Unfortunately, today's the day you are destined to be the protagonist of such a story. Gradually, you manage to lose track of even Huohuo. After sizing up a strange bronze mirror for a moment, you are somehow pulled into a realm of illusion. There's walls and doors everywhere, sending you round in circles and disorienting you.\nAccording to some of the Xianzhou folk tales you've heard, the outside world will have passed hundreds of years by the time you leave here — you don't want to spend the rest of your life lost in a maze, so find the exit pronto!

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 这场奇妙的梦境终于结束了。爱德华医生似乎想听听你的感受，和他聊聊吧。哦对了，别忘了黑天鹅最开始的叮嘱：「这段记忆的性质有些特殊，为了其他顾客的梦境体验，还请不要向任何人透露它的结局。」
E: This wonderful dream has finally come to an end. Dr. Edward would like to hear your thoughts — go and talk with him. Oh, don't forget what Black Swan told you at the start: "The nature of this memory is special. Don't ruin the dreamscape experience for anyone else by spoiling the ending."

C:
事情告一段落，来自卡勒瓦拉的使节打算在金人巷中找出一处地点纪念英雄，作为故事见证者，你也一起去看看吧。

「飘零他乡，身殒在即，幸不辱天职。」
「若有过客见怜，请携碣前黄土一抔，归葬罗浮。」
E:
Now that the case has come to an end, the Kalevalan envoy intends to erect a memorial somewhere along Aurum Alley to commemorate the hero. Seeing as how the story unfolded before you, maybe you should join him too.

"On this foreign land I pass into history, bringing no disgrace to my duty."
"Take me home as kind condolence, will you? Bury some of this soil on the Luofu."

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。\n深入幽囚狱中，你们渐渐察觉到个中之事的诡谲。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.\nDeep in The Shackling Prison, the abyssal treachery of the conspiracy gradually dawned upon you.

C: 姬莲小姐是莱斯利•迪恩的狂热粉丝。\n你和莱斯利必须直面由她捏造出的虚影，戳破那些不切实际的、狂热的幻想。
E: Jillian is an ardent admirer of Lesley Dean.\nYou and Lesley must confront the unrealistic fantasies she has created and unveil the truth.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 去和费歇尔聊聊，看能不能帮上什么忙。
E: Go chat with Fischer to see whether that can help.

C: 现在，你已经是白日梦酒店的临时大堂经理了。\n万事俱备，开工吧！
E: You are now the interim lobby manager of the Reverie.\nNow that everything is ready, it is time to work!

C: 青雀发来消息，她在梦境中似乎遭遇了一些…不测。\n你来到了梦境酒店，打算一探究竟，看看青雀到底摊上了什么大事。
E: Qingque has sent you a message, and it seems she has got herself into some... trouble in the Dreamscape.\nYou have arrived at the hotel in the Dreamscape, ready to uncover the trouble Qingque has got herself into this time.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n在过去的悬锋城中，记忆的主人却不见踪影，看来你又要来一次轰轰烈烈的劫狱作战了。
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nIn this past version of Castrum Kremnos, the master of this memory is nowhere to be seen... Looks like you have another explosive jailbreak battle ahead of you.

C: 法政科的创始人古恩有事找你，他想让你来教导一名特殊的学生，授课的内容令你咂舌……
E: Gunn, the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, comes to you. He wants you to teach a special student, and you're going to teach her some unique lessons...

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n在那之前，他希望你能去花店为他的女儿选一束花——至于要选什么种类的花，决定权在你。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nBefore that, he wants you to buy a bouquet for his daughter at the florist's — It's up to you to decide what kind of flower to buy.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望你能去帮他打探一下教育部的题库储备。\n去上层区找到贝洛伯格教育部的官员，看看对方有没有本事把你这个天才难住。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, wants you to test the Ministry of Education's question bank reserves.\nGo to the Overworld to find officials of the Belobog Ministry of Education and see if they are able to have you stumped.

C: 配音演员塞琳似乎在为什么事感到苦恼。\n找她聊聊，看看你能如何帮到她。
E: Celine, the voice actress, seems to be distressed about something.\nSpeak with her and see if there is anything you can help her with.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n她委托你去上层区的书店观察她的言谈举止。\n真是一位有事业心的小演员，尽你所能帮她的忙吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nShe asked you to observe Tamila's behavior at the Overworld's bookstore.\nWhat an ambitious aspiring actress. Help her to the best of your abilities.

C: 在漫天风雪中，隐隐约约出现一个神秘的虚影，需要再靠近点才能看清楚。
E: A faint and mysterious shadow has appeared amidst the blizzard. You need to get closer for a better look.

C: 你凭借着自己的智慧给出了最优解。\n去「棋鬼」旁边领取宝箱奖励吧。
E: You provided the optimal solution with your superior intellect.\nClaim your treasure chest reward next to the Chess Ghost.

C: 浮烟喜欢以「棋子」喻人、以「棋局」喻势…而你需要做的便是在棋坪之上击败它。
E: Cirrus likes to use analogies such as "pawns" and "chess" to describe people and situations... And what you need to do is to defeat it on the chessboard.

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 小贩口中最坚固的盾牌，究竟是真是假？亲自试试吧！
E: The merchant claims this is the most robust shield. Is that for real? Try smashing it!

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。\n但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。
E: You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request.\nAside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...

C: 在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。\n但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。
E: You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request.\nAside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...

C: 现在，继续深入黎明云崖、向负世泰坦的所在进发吧。
E: Now, proceed further into Dawncloud toward the Worldbearing Titan.

C: 咳咳…你花费了太多口水，好在孩子们相信了这次扮演，现在悄悄离开吧。
E: Ahem... You sure talked their ears off, but at least the kids bought your act. Now, quietly slip away.

C: 你找到了遇难的飞行士。此时她正被困在一群孽物之间，情况万分危急。快去救人吧。
E: You find the crashed pilot. She is trapped among a group of abominations, and her situation is extremely dire. Quickly, save her!

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据藏宝图找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on a treasure map.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据藏宝图找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on a treasure map.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 龙尊造像希望你帮它找出丹枫藏在此处的宝藏…怎么又是寻宝故事？算了，西衍先生开心就好。
E: The Statue of the High Elder wishes you can help it find the treasure Dan Feng hid here... why is this an adventure treasure seeking story again? Never mind. As long as it makes Mr. Xiyan happy.

C: 白露打算带你去长乐天金人巷到处吃喝，她自愿成为免费导游，这样的好事哪里能找到喔！\n既然白露都这样说了，你就勉为其难地跟在她身后好好逛一逛金人巷吧……
E: Bailu has plans to show you around the food establishments at Aurum Alley over in Exalting Sanctum. It's a rare and fine thing to have someone willing to serve as a free guide!\nSince Bailu already made up her mind, you should make an effort to follow her and browse the stores in Aurum Alley...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「美馔阁」与商会建立合作关系。但「美馔阁」的老板矮阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Short Auntie, owner of Delicacy Pavilion, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Short Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 模拟宇宙的内存竟比黑塔想的还有限！数据封装已近上限，它快要停止运行了。黑塔准备跟你一起最后做个总结，赶紧把之前的星神数据都存储起来。给这次的测试成果收个尾——再次遍历祂们的光辉吧。
E: The Simulated Universe's storage was more limited than Herta expected! The data packs are at their limit and soon, the entire thing is going to stop working. Herta is prepared to see this thing through to the end by your side. Hurry and save all the previous Aeon data and ensure a proper end to this test before experiencing THEIR glory once more.

C: 天才的到访在空间站留下了神秘的「阮•梅」造物，艾丝妲委托你前去培育这些古怪的小生命。她与螺丝咕姆甚至为你准备了「生命烘焙箱」与「保姆机器人」。\n到底要怎么培育呢？还是先咨询一下保姆机器人吧。
E: The genius' visit left behind mysterious creations from Ruan Mei on the space station. Asta has tasked you with nurturing these weird little lifeforms, and she's even prepared a Lifeform Oven and Helper Robot for you with Screwllum.\nHow exactly do you nurture creations? Let's ask the Helper Robot first.

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 终于结束了工作，是时候和这个房间说再见了。
E: Finally done with work. It's time to bid this room farewell.

C: 艾弥尔有点受不了这迷宫了，还是先出去歇歇吧。
E: Aymille is struggling with the maze. Maybe you should leave and take a break.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 前往终点，前方或许就有答案。
E: Head to the finish line. Answers may lie ahead.

C: 前往终点，前方或许就有答案。
E: Head to the finish line. Answers may lie ahead.

C: 十五日约定的时间已经到了，无论剑法好坏，既然彦卿师父、云璃师父说了三月七可以一战，你也大可相信她有作为胜者的能耐。\n看起来，三月七还没能在战斗中使出全力，你可以再尝试一次。
E: The day of the duel has arrived. Putting aside March 7th's aptitude in swordplay, you believe she has the capability to emerge victorious, especially since both of her mentors — Yanqing and Yunli — agreed to let her go to battle.\nLooks like March 7th didn't manage to use all she has learned in the duel. You could... try again?

C: 完成「枘凿六合」困难模式III
E: Complete Hexanexus Hard Mode III

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n万事俱备，该前往此行的「战场」了！
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nAll is ready. It's time to head to the battlefield!

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n万事俱备，该前往此行的「战场」了！
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nAll is ready. It's time to head to the battlefield!

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n详细看看这只「阮•梅」造物的情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nCarefully examine this creation of Ruan Mei.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到垃圾桶组合的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the trashcan group's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到广告牌的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the billboard's beats. Help Rappa collect inspiration to help with composing.

C: 追逐之间你被吸入城市沙盘，误打误撞激发了新的灵感。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: During the chase, you were pulled into the City Sandpit, and by a stroke of luck, it sparked new inspiration.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 达米亚诺斯说他很有经验，只要跟着他前进就好。
E: Damionis says he has plenty of experience, and you just need to follow him.

C: 虽说有点突然，但波提欧这人还怪好的，居然把他的赛车就这么托付给了你。来都来了，干脆就用他的赛车试训看看吧，说不定你有赛车的天赋呢？
E: It's rather abrupt, but Boothill is a pretty nice guy. He entrusted his own race car to you. Since we're already here, we might as well use his race car for training. Who knows, you might have a talent for racing!

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

E: Go to bed

E: When you are ready, talk to Gepard to open the gate

E: Talk to Gallagher and have him prepare a drink for you

E: Defeat the ape fiendlings summoned by the monkey

E: Shoot the breeze with Robin before going into the Slumbernana Association

E: Continue pursuing the Slumbernana Monkey

E: The Ultimate Hunt! In the quest for Profnana Primon!

E: Search for Verax Leo to try calm the storm

E: Meet up with Mydei

E: Discuss a plan with Aglaea

E: Use Prophecy Tablet to open the way

E: Use the Oronyx Orb to open up the path

E: Assist the Stellaron Hunters

E: Enter Castrum Kremnos

E: Pass the deep wall and obtain Golden Bough of Vows

E: Head to the "Murmuring Woods" Grove of Epiphany and continue your adventure

E: Keep hunting for the next trove!

E: Follow Hysilens to greet Imperator Cerydra

E: Continue to track Silver Wolf's infiltration pathway

E: Go to Herta's Office

E: Track the escaped infernal fire

E: Talk to Jingliu and Jing Yuan
