E: Solve the Fragmentum echoes' predicaments and release them from their problems.

C: 去鳞渊境海滩巡逻
E: Patrol the Scalegorge Waterscape's beach

C: 输入指令，引导机巧走出迷宫
E: Enter commands and guide the ingenium to leave the maze

C: 向虎克请教
E: Inquire from Hook

C: 与奥列格交谈
E: Talk to Oleg

C: 前往积玉坊，寻找扑满
E: Look for the Trotters at the Trove of Verdure

C: 前往钟表小子广场，帮W找到阿然。
E: Go to Clockie Plaza and help "W" find Ran.

C: 询问哈托努斯关于宁芙的下落
E: Ask Chartonus about Nympha's whereabouts

C: 和饲养员先生碰头，想想解决办法
E: Meet with the caretaker and try to come up with a solution

C: 寻找海瑟音的司祭
E: Search for Hysilens's priest

C: 操纵机巧鸟寻找遇难者
E: Use the cycrane to search for the victim

C: 消灭被困者周围的丰饶孽物
E: Eliminate the Abominations of Abundance surrounding the trapped victim

C: （可选）离开卡芙卡
E: (Optional) Leave Kafka alone

C: 向于尔丹汇报
E: Report to Uldan

C: 根据照片寻找并拍摄目标
E: Find and capture the subjects based on the photos

C: 协助商会完成储值金目标<unbreak>300000</unbreak>
E: Assist the merchant guild to attain their funding goal of <unbreak>300,000</unbreak>

C: 通过「寰宇蝗灾：第一位面」
E: Complete Swarm Disaster: First Plane

C: 前往另一个试炼区域
E: Head to the other trial area

C: 与景元一同去见彦卿
E: Accompany Jing Yuan to meet Yanqing

C: 再打开十个箱子
E: Open another ten chests

C: 前往星穹列车，与三月七对话
E: Go to the Astral Express and speak with March 7th

C: 与黑塔交谈
E: Talk to Herta

C: 找到藏于丰厚战利品中的线索
E: Find the clues within the Bountiful Treasure

C: 离开错乱的空间，见证调查的结果
E: Leave the chaotic space and witness the outcomes of your investigation

C: 离开混乱的迷宫
E: Leave the chaotic maze

C: 准备迎接最终挑战
E: Prepare to face the final challenge

C: 前往终点
E: Head to the finish line

C: 打开街机附带的地图，获得第一台街机的信息
E: Open the map that comes with the arcade machine and obtain information about the first arcade machine

C: 前往流梦礁
E: Go to Dreamflux Reef

C: 前往藏品展台
E: Go to the exhibit booth

C: 前往金人巷，与斯科特交谈
E: Go to Aurum Alley and talk to Skott

C: 回到竞锋舰，与卡美丽道别
E: Return to the Skysplitter and bid farewell with Carmella

C: 请灵砂为卢卡进行诊断
E: Ask Lingsha to diagnose Luka

C: 为台上的乐队成员加油
E: Cheer for the band members on the stage

C: 和达凡绮在校园里碰面
E: Meet up with Dafanchy on campus

C: 前往舞台，听听蒙塔娜的新发现
E: Head to the stage and learn about Montana's recent discoveries

C: 向黑塔了解研究的进度
E: Learn about research progress from Herta

C: 抓住睡蕉小猴
E: Capture the Slumbernana Monkey

C: 结束操控，继续前进
E: End control and continue forward

C: 前往古玩店「岁月遗珍」
E: Head to the Treasure of Ages antique store

C: 帮妖精们布置餐桌
E: Help the fairies set the table

C: 招待客人
E: Welcome the guests

C: 灵敏训练
E: Dexterity Training

C: 训练效率+<unbreak>30%</unbreak>
E: Training Efficiency +<unbreak>30%</unbreak>

C: <color=#f29e38ff>感知训练</color>的效率提高#1%
E: Increases <color=#f29e38ff>Acuity Training</color> efficiency by #1%

C: 安排至少2次坚韧训练：本日所有行动额外提高#1点坚韧
E: Plan at least 2 sessions of Tenacity Training: All actions today additionally increases Tenacity by #1

C: 感知逃课法
E: Acuity-Build Strat

C: 银狼
E: Silver Wolf

C: 关键在于腰腹和大腿正确发力，姿势不重要，重要的是灵活地利用惯性……
E: The key is using your core, waist, and leg muscles. It's not your stance that matters, but your ability to ride the inertia...

C: …你认识他？
E: ...Do you know him?

C: 祝你一路顺风。
E: Best of luck.

C: 不过，开拓者的道路和目标，都要由开拓者自己选择。这是阿基维利大人的信条。
E: Still, a Trailblazer should choose their goal and the road they take to get there themselves. That's the creed of the great Akivili.

C: 联盟的仙舟共有六艘，「罗浮」只是其中之一。
E: The Alliance is made up of six ships — the Luofu is only one of them.

C: 哈哈，那就拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Haha, much appreciated, {NICKNAME}.

C: 哈哈，当然了。看你们在雅利洛-Ⅵ大展拳脚，我也跃跃欲试哪。
E: Haha, you better believe it. You guys really put on a show for Jarilo-VI — I'm eager to join in myself.

C: 哈…我说过了，那时我不知道是他……
E: Hahhhh... I told you already. I didn't know it was him...

C: 这提示一点用处也没有呀。
E: Now, this hint is useless.

C: 不知道是哪位科员还在使用受损的屏幕进行工作呢？
E: I wonder who here has to work with a damaged screen?

C: 如遇外露的电线设施，请勿触碰，及时避行并通知防卫科。有条件的科员可就地设置简易路障，避免他人触碰。
E: Please do not touch exposed electrical wires. Avoid the route and notify the Security Department. Researchers who are in a position to do so can set up simple barricades around the area to prevent others from approaching.

C: 取得出来么？
E: Can you get it?

C: 我们很快会把入侵者消灭掉的，不用担心。
E: We'll take those invaders out soon, don't worry.

C: …既然密钥找到了就赶快开始吧，电梯的权限用那边的操作台就能解锁。
E: ...Now that we found the key, we should get going. We can use that console over there to unlock the elevator.

C: 也就是说，列车怎么行动都听她的。
E: In other words, she's in charge of where the Express goes.

C: 怎么了？{NICKNAME}，你好像很好奇哦？
E: What's the matter, {NICKNAME}? You seem to have something on your mind.

C: 佩佩？
E: Peppy?

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着波提欧：「<unbreak>44</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Boothill: "<unbreak>44</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 这小鬼还挺有经济头脑，我蛮中意的。
E: This little twerp's pretty financially motivated. I like it.

C: 你别太欺负人家了。
E: Alright, give the poor child a break, Herta.

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 但如果你要在空间站工作，长期居住，「星核」可能会让空间站的「裂界」化更加严重…作为站长，我不能冒这个险。
E: But if you're going to work in the space station long-term, the Stellaron may have some serious effects on the station's Fragmentum. As the lead researcher, that's a risk I cannot take.

C: 黑塔女士会批休假吗？
E: Will Madam Herta let you take a vacation?

C: 偶尔回来看看就好，空间站永远欢迎你——尽量别待太久。
E: Just come back once in a while. You will always be welcome at the space station — just don't stay for too long.

C: 那就好，看来你的体质真的很特别。
E: Great. Looks like your stamina is really quite special.

C: 不过的确，从内饰来看，「开拓」的品位还挺不错的。
E: You are right, though. Looking at the interior decoration, you can tell that trailblazers have quite good taste.

C: 丹恒乘客的房间？哦，你说的是资料室帕。
E: Dan Heng's room? Oh, you mean the archives.

C: 很好，很有精神嘛！
E: That's the spirit!

C: 至于它的制造过程，和停留的原因，都已不得而知了。
E: As for how it was built and how it was damaged, I do not have an answer.

C: 陨落的星神，逝去的「开拓」——祂的离开是一个谜，但在所有已知的星神里，阿基维利是最接近人类的一位。
E: The fallen Aeon, deceased Trailblaze — THEIR passing is still a mystery, but of all the known Aeons, Akivili was the closest to mankind.

C: 三月七的床，几张照片随便地躺在被子上边。
E: March 7th's bed. Several photos are casually strewn on the duvet.

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: Got some questions?

C: 好像不那么冷了耶。
E: ...Hey, it feels like it got a bit warmer!

C: 这就是克里珀堡，贝洛伯格的心脏，筑城者的总部。
E: This is Qlipoth Fort, the heart of Belobog and headquarters of the Architects.

C: 喔…听上去真是位大人物啊。
E: Whoa... she sounds like a big deal.

C: 不过是沾了点雪，没人会注意到的。
E: You've got some snow in your hair, but no one will notice.

C: 玩够了，休息吧。
E: That's enough fun for today. Time to rest.

C: 有种不祥的预感…
E: I've got a bad feeling...

C: 老伯，你还是死了这条心吧。边缘通路现在很危险，我们这也是为了你的安全考虑。
E: Please try to understand, sir. Backwater Pass has become very dangerous. We're just here for your safety.

C: 跟他说话得靠技巧，要说服他，恐怕还得我出马才行——不过我现在还没想好策略。
E: You need to choose your words carefully if you want to persuade him of something. It might be best if I talk to him... though I'd need a strategy first.

C: 不说晦气话了，快告诉我发生了什么吧。
E: Anyway, enough ifs. Please tell me what happened.

C: 「造物引擎」？那是什么？我好像只在技术部的档案里瞟到过一眼……
E: Engine of Creation? What is that? I think I may have once seen it in the Technology Division's archives...

C: 彻底独立可是很难的。
E: Total independence is hard to achieve.

C: 我们会找到根除裂界的方法。
E: We will find a way to root out the Fragmentum.

C: …我可以假装没听见。
E: ...I'll let that slip.

C: 啊，地髓！可惜老爹不在，否则肯定能把它卖出个好价钱！
E: Ah, Geomarrow! It's a shame daddy isn't here — He'd find a buyer for it and sell it for big bucks!

C: 不过放心吧，我不会深究的。布洛妮娅既然选择了这套说辞，证明她肯定已经充分考虑过了。
E: *sigh* Don't worry, I won't dig too deep. I know Bronya must have thought long and hard before deciding what to make public.

C: 可可利亚大人究竟…
E: But Madam Cocolia...

C: 时候不早了，我们准备动身吧。或者，你还想聊些什么吗？
E: It's getting late, let's get ready to move. Is there something else you wanted to talk about?

C: 出发吧。
E: Alrighty.

C: 我们接下来做什么？
E: What should we do now?

C: 这座走廊灯底部装有加热系统，设计非常聪明。
E: This hallway light has a very clever design and is equipped with a heating system at the bottom.

C: 不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 在某些世界，未成年人是不允许开车的；你相信为了安全，这里也一定如此。
E: In some worlds, minors are not allowed to drive. It must be the same here for safety reasons, you think.

C: 错了！椰子壳虽然是果皮废料，但它质地坚硬，不易粉碎，不能当作湿垃圾处理！
E: Nope! Although coconut husk counts as fruit waste, it's hard and doesn't crumble easily. As such, it doesn't go in the wet garbage!

C: 想问有关地下的事…
E: I want to ask about the Underworld...

C: 我是医生耶，可不是情报贩子…算了算了，你问吧。
E: ...I'm a doctor, not an informant! Very well, what's the question?

C: 喂，你要去哪呀？
E: Hey, where are you going?

C: 原来我没说过么？唔，那长话短说：
E: Didn't I tell you? *sigh* Long story short —

C: 如你们所见，地底的情况真的…很艰难。如果方便的话，希望你们帮帮地下的百姓吧。
E: As you've all seen, the situation down here is... strained. If you can, we really would appreciate you helping the people.

C: 有那么老吗？看着还挺新的。
E: Is he really that old? He looks pretty new.

C: 明白了，你加油啊。
E: I get it. Well, best of luck.

C: …虽然很火大但确实没法反驳——{NICKNAME}，要不你来帮我吧！
E: ...Ugh, so what if I am! {NICKNAME}, why don't you help me, huh!?

C: 唔…总觉得有哪里不对……
E: Hmm... something's not right...

C: 啊，对哦，「史瓦罗大佬的机器人」！这个史瓦罗是什么来头？
E: Oh! Boss Svarog's robots! What's his deal?

C: 笨不笨，去抢矿工啊！我亲眼看见的，他们已经把一些地髓装袋了，正是下手的好机会。
E: You idiot — we'll just steal off the miners! Look, I saw with my own eyes — they managed to bag some Geomarrow. This is a perfect opportunity.

C: 其实我做了好几次梦…
E: Actually, I've been having some dreams...

C: …好，我明白了。你清楚自己想干什么，我再怎么反对也是白费力气。你就给我记住一件事——要是你碰上了什么危险，我拼了命也会去救你的。
E: ...Okay, I understand. You've made up your mind, and there's nothing I can say that will change it. But remember this — if you run into trouble, I will come to save you, no matter what.

C: …那也怪吵的，我打赌虎克吵不赢列车长。
E: ...Huh, that's weird. I bet the conductor won, right?

C: 铁卫！把布洛妮娅——
E: Guards! Take Bronya—

C: 对啊，有什么问题吗？
E: Yeah, what's the problem?

C: 虎克打碎了很多诊所的东西，有点不好意思向老巫婆开口……
E: ...Oh, I've broken a thing or two in the clinic, you see... I'm too embarrassed to ask for help from the old witch...

C: 批评了。
E: She did.

C: 哼！现在的年轻人，一点亏都吃不得…以后的路还长，你这样斤斤计较，以后可是走不远的。
E: Hmph! Young people these days. If it's not to their benefit, count them out... Life is a long journey. You won't make it far if you're this fussy about everything.

C: 还要怎么考虑？照你的话说，这对你不是小菜一碟吗？
E: Think about it? According to you, wouldn't they be a piece of cake for you?

C: …这怪物的盔甲吓到了不少人，也赚了不少钱。
E: This monster armor scared a lot of people and made a lot of money.

C: 我检测过了，这些结晶物和裂界里的碎屑物质成分相似度很高。我见过一些受裂界侵蚀影响的患者，你现在的症状和他们很像。
E: I have checked, and these crystals are very similar in composition to the detritus in the Fragmentum. I've seen some patients affected by Fragmentum corrosion and your current symptoms are similar to theirs.

C: 我会把科鲁泽先生的事告诉孩子们。希望他们能成为跟他一样坚强又善良的大人。
E: I'll tell the kids about Mr. Kluzer. I hope they can grow up to be adults as strong and kind as he was.

C: 真能立刻安排吗？
E: Can it be arranged now?

C: 在座的各位里又有谁能想到，如此高深莫测的古代格斗术，竟然有被「外来者」破解的一天？真是令人惊奇无比的场面！
E: Who would have thought that such an unfathomable ancient martial art would be cracked by an Outsider one day? What a spectacular showdown!

C: 换句话说，分数越高的拳手实力越强，您和对手皆是如此。这也意味着随着您胜利的次数增加，战斗强度也会随之增大——不过这点我猜您早有准备，对吧？
E: In other words, the higher the points, the stronger the boxer, for both you and your opponent. It also means that the more you win, the harder it gets. But I guess you're ready for that, right?

C: 所以，下层区此前感受到的剧烈震动，就是那场战斗导致的，对吗？
E: So the massive tremors we felt earlier were a result of the battle, right?

C: 先去通知歌蒂吧。
E: Let's start with Gertie.

C: 感觉…周围人看我们的眼神，不是很友善啊。
E: ...Feels like we're not getting many friendly looks, huh.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}给了我这么多东西，我也得给你点什么，这样吧，我想把这本《冒险鼹鼠队》送给你。
E: You've given me so much stuff, {M#mister}{F#miss}. I have to give you something too — well, how about this copy of The Adventurous Moles?

C: 你看到一只可怜的铁皮桶，它的腰部分明遭受过重击。似乎有人路过时，将澎湃的情感宣泄在这无辜的垃圾桶上。
E: You see a pitiful trashcan made of tin, with a torso clearly dented from trauma. It seems like someone took their pent-up emotions on it whilst passing by.

C: 我要打开它，我说了算。
E: I still want to open it, I've made up my mind.

C: 不会，仙舟联盟不至于如此失礼。但这位驭空接见我们时，一定会问出一连串问题——
E: No, the Xianzhou Alliance is better than that. But Madam Yukong will definitely have a string of difficult questions for us...

C: …哈哈，别误会。仙舟不会虐待嫌犯，问讯情报也未必要倚靠暴力手段。
E: ...Haha, don't misunderstand me. The Xianzhou does not engage in torture. Retrieving intel does not necessarily involve the use of violence.

C: 想通了这一节，也许我们开始接近事件的核心了。
E: Now that we've figured that out, perhaps we can get closer to the core of what's happening here.

C: 刚接见就住宿？又来一次？
E: A hotel? Again?

C: 前面的区域……不是，前方区域目前正在接受封锁排查，暂时禁止通行。
E: How about we explore the area ahea... I mean, the area ahead is currently under lockdown and inspection. This route is closed for the time being.

C: 人犯当然要寸步不离地跟着我，这是景元的命令。
E: The prisoner must follow me every step of the way. This is Jing Yuan's order.

C: 我已指派了一位门人在「长乐天」广场前等候，一旦内务整顿完成，便传令让接引人带各位进入太卜司，还请各位耐心逗留。
E: I have appointed someone to wait for you in front of Exalting Sanctum Plaza. Once we've consolidated our internal affairs, you will be brought into the Divination Commission. Please be patient.

C: 就好像沉默只是你的保护机制是吧？
E: Like how you're always pretending to be quiet?

C: 符玄会不会出尔反尔？
E: Will Fu Xuan go back on her word?

C: 有些个卜者和观星士逃出了洞天。其中一些人害怕地嚷嚷什么「植物」、「根须」之类的话…也不知道其中究竟发生了什么可怕的事情。
E: Some diviners and stargazers managed to escape the delve. Many of them were terrified — they were muttering about "plants" and "roots..." Something terrible must have happened there.

C: 能否劳烦您，为我用语言描述一下那番景象？
E: That's why I'd love you to describe it to me.

C: 那你妈妈呢？
E: Uh — what about your mom?

C: 你和这个罗刹之前认识吗？
E: Do you know this man, Luocha?

C: 这都什么时候了……
E: Uh, not the best time...?

C: 没想到又来了客人，想吃些什么？我这边推荐来一份缘虾饼如何？
E: More customers? You're a sight for sore eyes these days. So, what do you have in mind? I'd recommend our prawn crackers.

C: 这儿是典当铺，专供周转济急之用。不过您要找的人嘛……
E: Well, we're a pawn shop — we see plenty of customers. But let me see if I can recall the lady you're looking for...

C: 唔，似乎是见过，但又好像没见过？您容我想想……
E: Yeah! Oh, wait, um... maybe not. Hmm, let me uh... search my memory for a moment...

C: 你的一举一动，早在法眼占测之内。
E: Your every move has been foreseen.

C: 罪？如果我所为有罪，那末仙舟的先祖将与我同罪！是他们接受了「丰饶」之赐，将后裔转化成了长生种……
E: Crimes? If I am guilty, then all of our Xianzhou ancestors are also guilty! They were the ones who accepted the blessings of the Abundance and turned their descendants into long-life species...

C: 「药王秘传」只是走在他们曾经走过的道路上，追求超脱，何罪之有？
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are only walking on the road our ancestors once took. How is it a crime to seek ascendance?

C: 还没有…
E: Not yet...

C: 今天你谁也杀不了，通缉犯，因为你得跟我走。
E: You're not murdering anyone today, fugitive. You're coming with me.

C: 「建木」，最大的异象就在那里。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor — that's her focus.

C: 解开禁制吧，你身负的力量便是打开通往「建木」之路的钥匙。
E: Release your full potential — the power you carry is the key to opening a way through to the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 事后云骑会展开调查，当务之急要先瓦解幻胧的图谋。
E: The Cloud Knights will carry out an investigation, but for now our most pressing matter is to put a stop to Phantylia's scheme.

C: 将军的位子关系重大，这是我应尽的责任，哼哼……
E: Generalship is no trifling matter — it is a duty one must bear.

C: （我看她其实很享受……）
E: (I think she actually really enjoys it...)

C: 提交联盟的文书报告，本座心里已有计较。关于各位的部分亦不会少，但为了景元着想，涉及仙舟内务的部分，只好隐去各位的名字不提，还望海涵。
E: I'm submitting my written report to the Alliance, and I've already got a plan in mind. All of you will feature in the report, but for the sake of Jing Yuan, anything related to Xianzhou internal affairs will have names redacted — I hope you can forgive me.

C: 我想看看那个盒子…
E: I want to take a look in that box...

C: 哈哈哈，真是难为她的用心了。她那样娇滴滴的人儿，竟然真送了我一柄菜刀。
E: Hahaha, what a precious person she is. A sweet thing like her, gifting me a kitchen knife.

C: 唉，我本想为将军分忧，谁知这一次却弄巧成拙。我也该好好反省一下了。
E: *sigh* I wanted to help the general, but things didn't turn out how I wanted them to be. I've learned my lesson.

C: 如果旅途中有需要支应补充的物资，也请不要客气。
E: If you require resupplying during your journey, you can always count on us.

C: 再见了，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Goodbye, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

C: …哎呀，糟了！先前下单的分装瓶还没送到呢。不过听说匹诺康尼的度假酒店超级高档，洗护用品想必也差不了吧？
E: ...Ahh, drat! The travel bottles I ordered haven't arrived. Although, I hear that Penacony's resort hotel is pretty luxurious. I'm guessing their toiletries should be just as fancy.

C: 此时此刻，你我偶然分享了同一片梦境，出现在彼此的思绪中，这便是「梦想之地」对我们最初的问候。
E: Right this moment, you and I have coincidentally shared the same dreamscape, and appeared in each other's minds. This is the Land of Dreams's inaugural welcome for us.

C: 我会放弃——开拓并非我的本意。
E: I would abandon it — Trailblazing was never my intent.

C: 多么有趣啊。方才那一瞬间，仿佛有千百万个相似而不相同的你，给出了截然不同的回答。
E: How interesting. For a split second, it felt like countless versions of you, alike yet distinct, gave entirely different responses.

C: 愿各位在梦中度过一段美妙的时光。
E: May your dreams be beautiful and pleasant.

C: 好深奥的问题！也许不是所有的梦都是虚假的…至少匹诺康尼的梦不是。应该这样说，它…是另一种现实。
E: A good question! Maybe not all dreams are false... Well, at least the ones in Penacony aren't. Or perhaps should I say they are... another reality.

C: 你为黄泉指明了路，她向你再三道谢。
E: You show Acheron the way, she thanks you again and again.

C: 啊，您来了！太好了！
E: Ah, you're here! Wonderful!

C: 我是。
E: Yes.

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
E: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

C: 那么，你，和其他乘客，是否承认对以下恶性事件负责——
E: Do you, as well as the other passengers, take responsibility for the following malicious conduct?

C: 诶嘿～
E: *Tweet*

C: 原来我还能跳啊…
E: I can actually jump in this world!? Color me surprised!

C: 你听起来有些悲伤…为什么？
E: You sound a bit sad...?

C: 看来进不去啊。
E: Seems like we can't go in.

C: 另外，你的人物设定不允许你这么做。你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: Additionally, your character design will not permit such an action from you. Right now, you can only emit a cool *grunt* as a response.

C: 哦，该死！我讨厌我的嘴巴，它泄露了秘密！
E: Argh! I hate my mouth for revealing my secret!

C: 还挺有意思。
E: It was quite fun.

C: 倒也没那么好…
E: It's not as great as you think...

C: 没什么，不重要。
E: Nothing. It's inconsequential.

C: 滴答！这样我们就是*一心同体*了，有没有感觉力量在体内流动！
E: Tick-tock! Now, our minds have merged into one. Can you feel an energy surging through your body?

C: 是、是！
E: S—Sure!

C: 我…不知道。
E: I... don't know.

C: 而且，你醒来时也注意到了吧，遍布四周的时钟和滴答声…直觉告诉我，藏在这里的秘密恐怕也和那位神秘的「钟表匠」有关。
E: And, you probably noticed it when you woke up as well — the ticking of clocks all around us... My gut tells me that the secret hidden here is also linked to that mysterious Watchmaker.

C: 藏好了吗？
E: Are you done hiding?

C: 告诉我呀，米哈伊尔…
E: Talk to me, Mikhail...

C: 幸会，深潜于梦中之人啊……
E: Nice to meet you, dream diver...

C: 条件？什么条件？
E: Deal? What deal?

C: 那就和我一起反抗塔塔洛夫。
E: Then stand with me against Tatalov.

C: 三个垃圾桶围在一起，似乎在为什么事争论不休……
E: Three trashcans stand around each other, arguing ceaselessly about a certain matter...

C: 不觉得这些风景和梦中的匹诺康尼相去甚远…却和黑天鹅小姐描述的梦境十分相似么？
E: Have you noticed? These landscapes seem quite distinct from that of Penacony's in your dream, yet strikingly similar to the Dreamscape described by Miss Black Swan.

C: 的确…初见时没放在心上，但回过头看，二者的共同点未免有些多了。
E: You're right... I didn't give it much thought at first, but in hindsight, the overlap is hard to ignore.

C: 对咯，我就喜欢这种大吃一惊的表情。
E: Right, I do enjoy seeing that shocked expression of yours.

C: 所以，朋友，该你做出选择了…你可以现在，立马，头也不回地离开这里，永远放弃接近真相的机会。
E: So, my friend, the choice is yours now... You can leave this place immediately, without looking back, and forever forsake the chance to get closer to the truth.

C: 与之相对地，你也可以接受我的邀请，并得知一个<color=#dbc291ff>事实</color>，一个足以颠覆匹诺康尼的事实。
E: Or, you can accept my invitation and learn a <color=#dbc291ff>truth</color>, a truth potent enough to upend everything in Penacony.

C: 她们已在各自的房间里醒来了。这下，你应该就能放宽心跟我来了吧？时间不等人，这就出发去大堂吧。
E: They're already awake in their rooms. Will you be comfortable in following me now? Time waits for no one. We must hurry to the lobby.

C: 可以相信黄泉。
E: We can trust Acheron.

C: 得心应手，不是么？{NICKNAME}，你很有「记忆」的天赋哦。
E: You're a natural, aren't you? You're a prodigy at Remembrance, {NICKNAME}.

C: …怎么回事？忆质中突然出现了少许…燥热？
E: ...What's going on? Why is it... getting hot in the memoria?

C: （没有忆者的帮助是无法离开这里的…先和黑天鹅聊聊吧。）
E: (There's no way outta here without the Memokeeper's help... Let's chat with Black Swan for now.)

C: 下雨了！是真的！那群外乡人没有骗我们，他们真的唤来了雨…妈妈，我们能离开这里了…我们能回家了…！
E: It is raining! It's true! Those outworlders weren't lying to us. They really did summon the rain... Mommy, we can leave here... We can go back home!

C: 这凶手真是个疯子…但不得不说，命案是个很好的突破口，可以指控家族渎职，让公司借这个由头介入。
E: This murderer is a psycho... but I have to say, the case does represent an opportunity. We can leverage The Family's malfeasance and let the IPC use this as a reason to intervene.

C: 我已经在这么做了。
E: Already on it.

C: 没事，尽管欺负我吧！
E: It's cool. You can bully me whenever!

C: 不不不，没有——毕竟有了他们才有了如今为所有人带来笑容的美梦嘛。只是，我感觉自己开始有点看不透他们了……
E: No no, after all they've brought everyone this sleepy dreamscape which everyone loves. I just feel like I'm starting to understand them less and less...

C: 他的目标一定是家族，但方法不得而知。「同谐」在匹诺康尼势力壮大，想正面与之抗衡非常困难。公司指派砂金前来，也说明了他们不打算依靠正常手段。
E: He's definitely going for The Family, and it's just a matter of how. The Harmony is strong in Penacony and almost impossible to take on head-to-head. The fact that the IPC dispatched Aventurine shows that they do not intend to simply play by the book here.

C: 你还是不愿说出自己的真实身份？
E: Still unwilling to reveal your true identity?

C: 没有，这有关系吗？
E: No. Does it matter?

C: 「你爱家人胜过爱你自己吗？」
E: "Do you love your family more than yourself?"

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 对、对！我们无可奉告，请回吧！
E: Th—That's right! We have nothing to report. Please leave!

C: 他们说这就足够，光怪陆离的梦境已是最好的报酬。
E: They say it will suffice. Experiencing the bizarre and motley Dreamscape is the best reward.

C: 他高高升起，只为来到太阳面前，那是没有任何人曾经到达的地方。他将因之融化，陨落大海，而在那之后……
E: He ascended to heights uncharted, only to come face to face with the sun — a place not visited by anyone before. His wings would melt because of it, only for him to fall into the sea, and after that...

C: 可以啊，是我低估你了。但那又有什么用呢？
E: Well done. I admit I underestimated you, but what difference would it make?

C: 嗐，单方面碾压罢了。
E: Nah, it turned out to be a landslide victory.

C: 到底为什么呢？为什么她就是不肯离开这里…这个冷清的破烂酒吧？
E: I just don't get why she won't leave this place... this run-down shack with no customers whatsoever.

C: 哈努兄弟的原型就是哈努努？
E: So, the character "Hanu" is based on a real-life person?

C: 既然没人招待，我们就自便吧。请尽量靠近我些，这样「白」也能覆盖到你。
E: Since no one's around to entertain us, let's make ourselves at home. Stay close to me so that my "White" can cover you, too.

C: 捉迷藏…真是甜美的童年回忆。
E: Hide-and-seek... What sweet childhood memories.

C: 所以，真正的「砂金石」呢？拿出来看看吧。
E: So, where's the real aventurine stone? Take it out. Let's have a look.

C: 把我和爸爸，妈妈，还有姐姐放在一起，就变成了一家人。
E: They put me, Papa, Mama and Big Sis together, turning us into one big family.

C: 「最后，我会颠覆这场美梦，创造<color=#dbc291ff>最盛大的死亡</color>」——这的确是你的主张，贯彻始终，从未改变。
E: "In the end, I'll ruin this beautiful dream and create <color=#dbc291ff>the grandest death</color>." — You've stuck to that, start to finish.

C: 如果一个幸运儿的奇迹，全部建立在所有他所爱之人、甚至更多人的不幸之上…如果你带来的每一场雨从不象征母神的宽恕和恩赐，而是一次又一次无意义的死亡……
E: If all your luck is built on the pain of someone you love, on the loss of dozens more — if these windfalls, these jackpots aren't a gift from Gaiathra — if all they are is a long string of meaningless deaths...

C: …也许等我抵达了那个终点，我们的困惑就能得到解答了。
E: Maybe... maybe when I get to where I'm going and look back, I'll know what the trip was all about.

C: 好厉害，希望我也能成为和你一样漂亮的大人。
E: Awesome, I hope I can become as good-looking as you when I grow up.

C: ——还有大名鼎鼎的，星穹列车的无名客！欢迎来到星际和平公司的秀场！
E: ...Also not forgetting the Nameless of the renowned Astral Express! Welcome to the Interastral Peace Corporation's live show!

C: 这片{RUBY_B#忆域}美梦{RUBY_E#}并非汪洋大海，而是一座孤岛。家族用「同谐」修筑堤岸高墙，隔绝外界，守护人们不会在大海中溺亡……
E: This {RUBY_B#Memory Zone}dream{RUBY_E#} of theirs isn't a boundless sea, it's a lonely island. The Family used the Harmony to build a high wall and isolate them from the vast and treacherous ocean of the outside world.

C: ——但它仍在那里。
E: But it is still there.

C: 「砂金石」的光芒…消失了。
E: The light of the aventurine stone... has disappeared.

C: 「我来觐见、我来添酒、我来占有。」
E: "Here I greet. Here I wine. Here I claim."

C: 家族尽可以想方设法来维护声誉，而作为宾客，我同样不想以自己的生命作为赌注。
E: The Family can try their best to protect their reputation, but as a guest, I don't wish to gamble with my life.

C: 我可以留在这里。但请记住，宾客来到匹诺康尼是为了享受梦境，不希望被牵扯进家族和公司的纠葛，别再让多余的事发生了。
E: I could stay here. But keep in mind, guests come to Penacony to enjoy the Dreamscapes. They do not wish to be entangled in a conflict between The Family and the IPC so, let's not have any more unnecessary incidents.

C: 我只是觉得，你已经二十个系统时没睡了…没问题吗？
E: I'm just thinking, you haven't slept in twenty system hours... Are you sure you're okay?

C: 我本打算在你们面前唤来「死亡」，用更直接的手段揭示谜底，邀请你们入局。但事与愿违，我无法违背「剧本」，甚至来不及开口向你说明。
E: I intended to call upon "Death" before you arrived, to solve the riddle using more direct means, and then invite you to join. However, contrary to my wishes, I couldn't defy the script, and I didn't get a chance to explain it to you.

C: 黄泉斩下的一刀…
E: Acheron's blade slash...

C: 十个系统时后，流梦礁将不复存在！犹如冰山消融，一切都将土崩瓦解，和空洞那边的美梦碎块融为一体！
E: After ten system hours, the Dreamflux Reef will cease to exist! It will disintegrate like a melting glacier and then fuse with the sweet dream fragments on that side of the void!

C: 呵呵，说是坟墓，也只是几座象征意义的衣冠冢罢了。既然瓦尔特先生问起，我们不妨去实地看看。如果我没猜错，各位应该能在那里得到不小的收获。
E: Heh, they're actually just symbolic stones. But since you're curious, Mr. Yang, I'll take you there. I have a feeling you might find something of interest there.

C: …被家族用「死亡」名义掩盖的流放之地，埋藏了匹诺康尼过往的梦中之梦。
E: ...The land of the exiles, concealed by The Family under the guise of "Death," a dream within a dream where Penacony's past is buried.

C: 如此巨大的钟表小子…看来那位「钟表匠」也在流梦礁留下了浓墨重彩的一笔。
E: What a huge Clockie... Looks like the Watchmaker also left his mark on Dreamflux Reef.

C: 我们刚刚就是在这儿分开的…嗯，不远了！
E: This is where we split up... She can't be too far away!

C: 谐乐鸽的祖先太过弱小，无法在地面的生存斗争中胜出。为了免于被捕猎的命运，它们开始仰望天空，振翅跃起……
E: Their ancestors were too weak to survive on the ground. So, to escape predators, they started seeking new opportunities in the air...

C: 呵，我就知道你第一反应肯定是她。
E: Heh, I knew that was going to be the first thing you'd ask.

C: 当然，还有星穹列车和我。需要你给出解释的人…太多了。
E: And the Crew too. There are too many people who you owe... an explanation.

C: 你这家伙…哪有什么乱七八糟的称号啦！
E: What...? Hey, you can't just make up "titles" like that!

C: 赞美希佩。也感谢您，尊贵的代言人。
E: Praise Xipe. And thank you, esteemed advocate.

C: …我已恳请祂与我等同在，可以开始了。
E: ...I have sought THEIR presence with us. Let us proceed.

C: 美梦再怎么甜蜜，也是看不见摸不着的幻象，却被他当作生存的唯一选择，甚至为此放弃了现实中的未来…这根本算不得「生活」。
E: Even though sweet dreams are nice, they're just illusions. But for him, they're the only way to survive, even if it means giving up on reality... That's not really living at all.

C: 哈！这不是计划又有变了么。
E: Hah! Now the plans have changed again!

C: 他宝贝了个腿的…如果我没记错，那星期日不就是橡木家系的家主么？
E: Well I'll be forked... if I remember correctly, the head of the Oak Family is that Sunday guy, right?

C: 很快，安德森端上了两杯酒……
E: Soon, Anderson brings two cups of wine...

C: 不过你们人多。呵，倒是有机会输得慢点。
E: But you have the numbers, and in numbers comes strength. So that might just delay your inevitable a little more.

C: 你们在梦境的荒野上开着破旧的老爷车，喝着冷风、呛着黄沙、还被一只凶残的忆域迷因挡住了去路……
E: You're driving an old clunker through the wilderness of the Dreamscape, braving the cold wind, choking on the dust, and suddenly, a fierce Memory Zone Meme blocks your path...

C: 嗷——呜——汪！苏乐达™全部都是我们的！不要妄想夺走苏乐达™！
E: Aoo — Woo — Woof woof woof! All the SoulGlad™ is ours! Don't even think about plundering the SoulGlad™ from us!

C: 如果我有幸得胜，就请各位为我让出通向桂冠的阶梯，还要承认——
E: If I am fortunate enough to emerge victorious, kindly grant me passage to the crown of victory and recognize that...

C: <size=36>不像演的！</size>
E: <size=36>Beautiful!</size>

C: 两人依然如同往时般友好，仿佛时间和地位对他们不值一提！看到这样的结局，我心里也充满了希望。
E: Two people sharing a long-cherished friendship, as if time and status meant nothing to them! My heart brims with hope at the sight of such an ending.

C: 你知道吗？哈努兄弟心爱的火箭筒恰好就在那间储藏室里，快去吧！
E: Guess what? Hanu's favorite bazooka just so happens to be in that storage room! So get a move on!
Hmm...

C: 这是一种「调律」，效果更强，也更费神。{NICKNAME}此前经历过，{M#他}{F#她}应该能明白。
E: It's a "tuning" process, stronger in effect and more draining on the mind. {NICKNAME} has experienced it before, so {M#he}{F#she} should understand what it entails.

C: 答案稍后公布。现在，我希望各位做出选择——
E: I'll tell you the outcome soon. For now, I'd like you all to make a choice—

C: 我…是在这里诞生长大的。
E: I... I was born and raised here.

C: 这是…阿蒙森先生的帽子？为什么……
E: This is... Mr. Amundsen's hat? But why...?

C: 三、三月…你的背后…
E: M—March... b—behind you...

C: 咱们这是到什么地方了？
E: Where are we now?

C: 「感谢你们，外来的宾客！现在仆人都取回了自己的理性。」
E: "Thank you, dear outsiders! My servants have regained their sanity."

C: 各位，准备好。我们可能要面对一场恶战了。
E: Everyone, get ready. This could be a tough battle.

C: 你以「秩序」为天地万物万民定义——
E: Under the banner of the Order, you have defined all things in the Cosmos...

C: 这段台词怎么有点熟悉…
E: Why does that line sound so familiar...

C: {NICKNAME}，如何了？听说你始终不醒，身体可有不适？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you okay? I heard you couldn't wake up. Are you feeling unwell?

C: 是啊，你超厉害的。我以前认识非常多的战士，能像你一样成长的人，在我的故乡…至少要评为S级吧。
E: Yes, yes, you are. I've known many warriors in my time, and only a few achieve the kind of growth you have. Back home, where I'm from you'd be rated at least an S-tier.

C: 确实，尤其很难想象天才俱乐部的成员也会对俗世的研究感兴趣……
E: Agreed. It's hard to imagine members of the Genius Society taking an interest in such mundane research...

C: 看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是江户星了帕！
E: Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: Edo Star!

C: 现在不是做这个的时候……
E: Now is not a good time...

C: 凡人即便拥有命途的伟力，也无法如神一样创造完美无缺的世界。
E: For mortals, even if they possess the great power of a Path, they can't create a flawless world like Gods do.

C: 「齐响诗班」的力量与令使无异，终究需要以对等的力量与之对抗。颠覆美梦的最后一步…将由我来完成。
E: The Harmonious Choir possesses the power of an Emanator. To overcome it, you'll need the same level of power. The final step in destroying the sweet dream... will be my responsibility.

C: 没关系，你还有时间细细咀嚼此刻的心情。等准备好了，就直面最后的舞台吧。
E: That's alright. Take your time to contemplate this moment. Once you feel ready, let's step onto the final stage.

C: 没关系，你还有时间细细咀嚼此刻的心情。等准备好了，就直面最后的舞台吧。
E: That's alright. Take your time to contemplate this moment. Once you feel ready, let's step onto the final stage.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>…引领你归还清醒的世界。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>...guiding you back to the waking world.</color>

C: 看来暂时没有办法将此人唤醒——就连你的「钟表把戏」也不行。
E: Looks like there's no way to rouse this person from their slumber for now — not even with your "clockwork."

C: 最后一次和谈，就到此为止吧。
E: Now, our final talk has concluded.

C: 要是我赢了……
E: If I win...

C: 典当行你去过了吗？
E: Have you been to the pawnshop?

C: 哟，你也在这儿啊？好久不见，朋友。
E: Oh, you're here too? Long time no see, friend.

C: 生活还是那么精彩。
E: Life is as wonderful as ever.

C: 又见面了，我的挚友。你已在「纯美」之道上走出了比我更甚的风采，我由衷向你致意！
E: We meet again, my dear friend. Your journey of the Beauty is even more elegant than mine. My most sincere regards to you!

C: 我已听说了你带领众人击倒恶兆的壮举。尽管故事听来令人惋惜，但你毫无疑问地伸张了「纯美」和正义。愿伊德莉拉为你展露笑容。
E: I have heard of your valiant deed in leading others to vanquish the Omen of Evil. Though the tale bears a tinge of regret, you have undoubtedly championed Beauty and justice. May Idrila smile upon you.

C: 虽然那位星期日先生与「纯美」的道途并无交集，但他的行为已与恶兆无异。在向善的道路上迷误的可悲灵魂啊…真是令人扼腕叹息。
E: Although Mr. Sunday did not cross paths with the Path of Beauty, his actions were no different from the Omen of Evil. A lamentable soul lost on the path of righteousness... truly a matter of deep regret.

C: …希望列车上有剪刀。
E: ...Hopefully, there are scissors on the Express.

C: 我倒是想过这种可能性…不过，这种「如果」也未必能带给我想要的东西就是了。
E: I've also considered this possibility... But this kind of "what if" might not be able to bring me what I want.

C: 我们根本没有「快速等待」这种功能！但没关系，为了让你的等待过程不无聊，我可以为你演唱一首轻柔舒缓的歌曲！
E: We do not have this function called "Wait Around"! But it's no problem — to ease any boredom during your wait, I can play a soothing song for you!

C: 盯回去。
E: Stare back.

C: 米哈伊尔每年都会在这里放上两束花。他离开后，就变成了三束。
E: Mikhail would place two bunches of flowers here year after year. And, after he left, it became three.

C: 对我来说，因为见过他们生活的点点滴滴，会认为这些人是特别的。
E: To me, it's because we've seen every nook and cranny of their lives, we see these people as special.

C: 但在此之前，我们还有很长的路要一起走。
E: But before that, we still have a long way ahead of us together.

C: 但在此之前，在走向结局的路上，我们能做的事同样很多。
E: But before that, on the road towards the end, there are still many things that we can do.

C: 蕉，蕉，蕉，蕉——
E: Ba, na, na, na~

C: 唉，我怎么睡得着啊！
E: Uh, what do you mean I fell asleep!?

C: 差不多得了，赶紧跟我走！
E: Alright, that's enough. Come on, let's go!

C: 蕉——蕉蕉蕉！
E: Baaaananana!

C: 真是个响亮的名号——你好，<color=#dbc291ff>球棒•忍者</color>！
E: A strong name! Well met, <color=#dbc291ff>Baseball Bat Ninja</color>!

C: 感谢苦茶大师，弟子不胜荣幸。
E: Thank you, Master Kucha. This is my greatest honor.

C: 我遇到了一个忍者…
E: I met a ninja...

C: 我就说呢，还真是「睡蕉小猴」啊。
E: I knew you had to be talking about Slumbernana Monkey.

C: 折纸大学建立于「拓梦时代」，最早是筑梦师的培训基地，创始人是当时的隐夜鸫家主格拉克斯。
E: Paperfold University was established during the Pioneering Era. It was initially a training ground for Dreamweavers and was founded by Glaux, head of the Nightingale Family.

C: 吓我一跳！
E: That scared me!

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bananana!

C: 唉，不愧是匹诺康尼的盛会巨星，真羡慕你啊。
E: As expected of Penacony's Festive Superstar. I'm so jealous...

C: 嗯，酸酸甜甜的，还有种大自然的香气……
E: Mmm, it's sour and sweet and has the scent of nature.

C: 原来是各位股东的朋友啊，那倒是可以理解了。
E: So she's a friend of the shareholders. That explains her behavior.

C: 球棒•忍者，阁下的留影•忍法甚是精妙啊。
E: Baseball Bat Ninja, your Photo Ninjutsu is exquisite!

C: 口口声声说自己是睡蕉小猴的粉丝，但又一问三不知。
E: You say you're a Slumbernana Monkey fan, but you can't even answer any of my questions.

C: 欢迎欢迎，要来一只睡蕉小猴的玩偶吗？免费赠送，我亲手缝的！
E: Welcome, welcome! A Slumbernana Monkey toy for you, mister? I made it myself. Don't worry, I'm not taking any money for it!

C: 如果是知更鸟小姐，怎么也该破格招新呀！
E: If it's you, Miss Robin, then of course we must make an exception and let you in!

C: 我为各位准备了一份礼物，那是下一幕的「大纲」。等你揭开它时，自然就会明白。
E: I have prepared a big gift for all of you — The "outline" for the next act. You'll see once you open it.

C: 把这卷轴拿去吧。此乃缭乱•忍法的奥义所在，它能释放邪祟畏惧的异彩，将邪忍的阵法尽数破坏。
E: Take the scroll with you, for within its pages lie the secrets of Dazzling Ninjutsu. It shall cast a brilliance that makes fiendlings fear and destroy the evil ninja's intricate matrices.

C: 呵呵，我的意思是……
E: Of course. What I'm trying to say is...

C: 两位大佬，快跟她解释一下，我就是个勤工俭学的好学生，不是什么忍徒！
E: Oh! Hey! It's you! Please, help me talk some sense into her. I'm just a well-behaved student working to pay my tuition fees, not whatever "initiate" she thinks I am!

C: 再纠缠下去他也不会松口，不如跟上去看看吧。
E: I doubt he'll say anything more. Let's just follow him and see what we can learn.

C: 在你关闭它表盘的一瞬间，你似乎与它的快乐产生了共鸣，你看到了一封录取通知书，一个年轻人迈入校门的背影，还有一封塞了几张苜蓿币的信……
E: The moment you shut its dial, you seemed to resonate with its joy. You saw a college acceptance letter, a young person stepping through a campus gate, and a letter stuffed with a few Alfalfa credits...

C: 离这么近对视力不好！
E: Back up! Being this close is bad for eyesight!

C: 两只小猴聚在一起，发出深情的*蕉声*，你不忍心打断这父子团圆的温馨画面。
E: The two little monkeys gather together, making affectionate Banagibberish. You can't bring yourself to interrupt this heartwarming reunion between father and son.

C: 主演是睡蕉小猴，还能猫猫狗狗在叫？
E: Why, Slumbernana Monkey's our star! What else were you expecting? Meows and woofs?

C: 最后是反派「压力魔王」，我想…就交给你吧——{NICKNAME}演员！
E: And finally, we have the villain, the Devil of Stress. I'm confident you'll nail it, Superstar {NICKNAME}!

C: （到我的台词了，要想想「狂妄的话」……）
E: (I'm up next. I have to come up with something obnoxiously conceited...)

C: 赞成。
E: I agree.

C: 靠种子？
E: Through seeds?

C: 乱破？她什么时候跑前面去的。
E: Rappa? When did she get ahead of us?

C: 原来…果然是这样啊，不出所料。
E: Oh, I see... Uh-huh, exactly as we suspected.

C: 诸位的言语……
E: The words you speak...

C: 我从未战胜过这些邪祟，因为在下还是一介忍徒。
E: I have never won against these fiendlings, for I am still but a mere ninja initiate.

C: 三号，Ⅳ级实验通过…评级提高……
E: No. 3. Cleared experiment Tier IV... Rating increased...

C: 你们打算怎么处理这个家伙？
E: Have you decided on what to do with this guy?

C: 现在，我会将它所有的力量交予诸位「蕉师」与「助蕉」——
E: Now, I will hand over its power to all BananAdvisors and Assistananas...

C: 哼…我同意。
E: Hmm... I agree.

C: 今天，它也如期成为*我们*逃出生天的门径。
E: And now, it has turned into our passage to escape, just as anticipated.

C: 「拥有三重生命之人」——妈妈认为孩子的诞生是命运三泰坦的赐福，这个名字代表了她的感谢。
E: "The one with three lives." Mother believed our birth was blessed by the Three Titans of Fate. She named us thus to express her gratitude.

C: 一段时间后……
E: Some time later...

C: 好像听格奈乌斯提起过…
E: I think Gnaeus mentioned it before...

C: 说吧，阿格莱雅，下一步怎么走？
E: So, Aglaea, what should we do now?

C: 看来…我们的「开拓」之旅，意义愈发重大了啊。
E: It seems our trailblazing expedition is growing in significance...

C: 此人膀肘上的筋腱遭锋快的铜枪扎裂，垂着断臂，如破溃的酒壶般碎落在路边。
E: A sharp bronze spear had torn through the tendons in her arm, leaving it hanging lifelessly, like a shattered wine jug abandoned by the roadside.

C: …直到你确实嗅到了，一股来自冥河的寒意。不久前，你好像体会过这种感觉。该不会死神真的找上门了吧？
E: Yet, a chill from the River of Souls wafted by, a sensation hauntingly familiar. Could Death truly be at your door?

C: 缇安……
E: Trianne...

C: 那…交给你了？
E: I'll let you take it from here, then.

C: 可你没有胳膊，只有…肉垫。
E: But you don't have hands... Only paws.

C: 不过，这棵巨大的树究竟是……
E: What is this huge tree, though...?

C: 不行…人家什么也没看到。
E: It's no good... I didn't see anything.

C: 嗯，翁法罗斯的绝大多数门都是靠{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量封闭的。
E: Yes, most of the doors on Amphoreus are sealed using the power of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}.

C: 正常一点的办法。
E: Come up with a relatively normal idea.

C: 使出我的最大力气！
E: I'll use all of my strength!

C: <size=36>银河幻影究极超绝大口径全垒打！</size>
E: <size=36>Ultimate Extreme Galactic Phantom Heavy Caliber Home Run!</size>

C: 嗯…我同意。
E: Yes... I agree.

C: 蝴蝶纹丝不动。
E: The butterfly didn't even move one inch.

C: 吾觉着这道思想如此奇异，随黑潮白白消散实属可惜，便出手救了人子一命。
E: His way of thinking was so out-of-the-ordinary that I felt it would be a waste for him to meet his demise in the black tide. And so, I decided to save his life.

C: 记性不错。
E: You have a good memory.

C: 小敌。
E: De.

C: 可是不要妄图否定悬锋的传统…我们身在奥赫玛，但永远是「纷争」的子民。
E: But don't you ever dream of renouncing the traditions of Kremnos... We may reside in Okhema now, but we remain eternally bound to Strife by blood.

C: 谁是下一个？
E: Who's next?

C: 没什么——模仿你平时的样子罢了。
E: Nothing. I was just imitating your usual response.

C: 那…先前和{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}对决时，你们在奥赫玛上空张开的巨大「百界门」，岂不是……
E: In that case... when you opened that giant Century Gate above Okhema during the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}...

C: 还请小心。奥赫玛不是树庭，这里……
E: Please be careful. Okhema isn't the Grove. This place...

C: 如果只是以指尖轻触，或许还能解释。但当时的情况……
E: That might be the case if we only brushed the very tips of our fingers, but back then...

C: 克拉特鲁斯阁下并未用暴力伤害*我们*。*我们*能感受到，他的焦虑源于对族人前途的担忧。
E: Lord Krateros did not use violence to harm us. We can sense that his anxiety stems from his concern for his people's future.

C: 怎么了，缇里西庇俄丝，你好像不开心？
E: What's wrong, Tribios? You look unhappy.

C: 放上娃娃
E: Place the dolls

C: （我该…我该逃到哪里？）
E: (Where... can I go?)

C: 那我就再告诉你一件事。
E: I suppose I can tell you one more thing.

C: 他们是自发前来应战的？还是……
E: Did they come to fight on their own accord? Or...?

C: 我们保留随时抽身的权利。
E: We reserve the right to withdraw at any time.

C: 请替我照看白厄，人面对仇敌时，总会叫愤恨迷了双目，连沉重的命运都难以看清。
E: Please, look after Phainon for me. Humans are often so blinded by hate when their enemy is before them, thus have trouble seeing even the heavy weight of destiny.

C: 这是……
E: What is this...

C: 去履行我的诺言，回到我应回的地方。
E: To the place where I belong, to fulfill my promise.

C: 再努力些吧，遐蝶。去完成你必须完成的事，让你我这一路承受的磨难有所收获。
E: Work harder, Castorice. Go and do what you have to do, so that the trials we have endured may have meaning.

C: …对了。
E: ...Oh, right.

C: 但…传言是真的吗？{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}陨落了？
E: But... are the rumors true? Has {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} fallen?

C: 大家总有一天要知道真相，只是需要一个合适的机会……
E: They will eventually need to know the truth. We just need the right opportunity...

C: 什么…不许甩锅给我！
E: What...? Don't shift the blame on me!

C: 应该是*我们*当年的行李吧…咦，这是？
E: These should be our belongings... Huh? What's this?

C: 但妈妈会在那边等你，只要你做个勇敢、善良的孩子，我们就一定能在那片新天地重逢。
E: But I'll be waiting for you there. As long as you stay brave and kind, we'll meet again in that new world.

C: 嗯，约好了。
E: Mmm, pinky promise.

C: 不过，每次回想共同经历的冒险，有些细节总会变得模糊起来。这个叫做「圣杯」的奇物真是古怪。
E: However, every time I think back to our adventure, some details get a bit hazy. That so-called "Holy Grail" is such a bizarre Curio.

C: 「嚯嗬嗬嗬，论妆点晖长石号的装饰品，还有什么能比号称可以实现一切愿望的杯子更加气派！」
E: "Hohohoho! What better decoration for the Radiant Feldspar than a cup said to grant any wish? Talk about grandeur!"

C: 在浩瀚寰宇中，这样的传言比比皆是：追寻者们踏上重重苦旅，只为追求一个能化心愿为现实的奇迹。
E: Across the vast cosmos, such tales abound: seekers embarking on grueling journeys in pursuit of a miracle capable of turning their deepest desires into reality.

C: 干得好，Assassin。有这样方便的能力，我们一定能占得先机！
E: Well done, Assassin. With an ability like this, we're sure to stay ahead of the competition!

C: 我对「圣杯战争」确实感兴趣——但不是对圣杯本身，而是对那些会被「奇迹」打动，加入角逐的人。
E: I am interested in the Holy Grail War, but not in the Grail itself. What intrigues me are the people who'd join this War for a so-called "miracle."

C: 穿越平衡之轮出现吧，天秤的守护者！
E: Come forth from the circle of binding, Guardian of the Scales!

C: 我看起来像是吗？
E: Do I look like it?

C: 没关系，我对口味的要求本就不高。何况，饥饿就是最好的调味料。
E: Not at all. I've never been particular about taste. Besides, hunger is the best seasoning.

C: 喵！灰毛？！那是自己人啊，你爱{F#她}{M#他}干什么？
E: Fork! Gray hair!? That's one of ours! Why the heck were you fighting {M#him?}{F#her?}

C: 亲爱的客人，欢迎光临，想吃点什么？
E: My dear guests, welcome! What would you like to eat?

C: 哇，你长得这么严肃可靠，怎么会讲冷笑话！
E: Wow, you looked so serious and reliable, and yet you're now telling bad jokes!

C: 这不是地概科吗？
E: Isn't this the Department of Cosmic Geography?

C: 我们所目睹的星星虽然并非它们本来的样子，但光却不是谎言，它会照耀很久很久，直到照亮下一位英雄的道路。
E: The stars we see may not be their original forms, but their light isn't a lie. It will shine for ages, lighting the way for the next hero.

C: 行星衰亡观测。
E: Planetary Decline Observation.

C: 好好想想，你应该给出怎样的回答？
E: Think about it. What answer should you give?

C: 但…她错了。匹诺康尼很快变得面目全非。鸟儿所唱的歌曲，出演的电影，还有她自己的生活，全被关进了名为金钱的笼子里，成了商品。
E: But... she was wrong. Penacony soon became unrecognizable. The songs she sang, the films she starred in, and even her own life were all locked away in a cage called money, turned into mere commodities.

C: 我感到了一股类似魔力的强大力量，看来，圣杯的持有者已接近完成仪式了。
E: I sense a powerful force similar to magical energy... It seems the Holy Grail's holder is about to complete the ritual.

C: 所以，老奥帝先生，你该不会像我所知的那些魔术师一样，为了追寻一个抵达万物根源的可能，连生命和人性都可以放弃。
E: Mr. Oti, surely you wouldn't be like the mages I know, willing to forsake both life and humanity just to reach the root of all things?

C: 现在，我们已经站到你的面前了，精明的商人。
E: Now, we stand together before you, shrewd merchant.

C: 所以打一开始在这儿迎击我们的，就是老奥帝所召唤的从者吗？
E: So the person we've been talking to was Old Oti's Servant all along?

C: 喔，你们曾经是敌人吗？
E: Oh? Were you enemies once?

C: 用你的宝具为我带来胜利吧，Assassin！
E: Assassin! Use your Noble Phantasm to bring me victory!!!

C: 「身为主人公的你睁开眼，却发现自己正身处一场无法逃离的噩梦。现在，一位可怕的敌人已来到你的身旁。」
E: "As the protagonist, you open your eyes and find yourself trapped in a nightmare with no exit. And now... a terrifying enemy is standing right beside you."

C: 同谐的歌声，足以让所有生命心甘情愿地为我伴舞，成为我的使魔。至于你们，就在糖浆里溺死吧。
E: The voice of Harmony will compel all life to dance to my tune and become my familiars. And you? You'll drown in syrupy oblivion.

C: 老对手，你来得正是时候！快帮我一把，打败这该死的恶灵。
E: Old foe, you've arrived just in time! Help me! Together we can crush this blasted evil spirit.

C: 一阵难以言喻的情绪攫住你的心灵，它并非钟表把戏四种情绪中的一种。而是一种更阴郁，更沉闷的东西，宛如无言的泥沼。
E: A feeling beyond words clutches at your mind — not one of Clockwork's four different emotions. This is darker, heavier, like a silent quagmire.

C: 对自己自信些吧，导演先生。在偶然看过你的第一部电影后，出于好奇，我曾经翻阅过葛瑞迪影业的历史资料。
E: Have more confidence in yourself, Mr. Grady. After I stumbled upon your first movie, curiosity led me to dig through the archives of Grady Films.

C: 我先歇一会儿。
E: Give me a moment.

C: 这次的失败只是意外，我已经掌握诀窍了。下部电影，我会证明自己的！
E: This was just a mistake. An accident! I know how to improve now. I... I'll prove myself with my next film!

C: 电影理论、拍摄技巧…我都学了，为什么还是拍不出那样的作品！
E: Film theory, cinematography... I've learned them all! Why can I still not make a film like that!?

C: <size=36>要是当初我没有放弃专利就好了。</size>
E: <size=36>If only... I never gave up my copyright...</size>

C: 有你在，多半不会有问题。退一步说，即便「同谐」的伪装被人识破，我们也有办法逃离。
E: We shouldn't run into any problems with you around. Even if they see through the Harmony's power of disguise, there'll be a way for us to escape.

C: 因为你妹妹叫「知更鸟」？
E: Did you make this rule because your sister is named Robin?

C: 我得确保你的言语中没有暗含某种危险的吟诵。
E: I need to make sure your words aren't concealing any dangerous incantations.

C: 可惜俱乐部的会员往来甚少，大部分人也已死在寂静领主手上。我从未听说过「翁法罗斯」这个名字。
E: It's a pity we do not communicate much within the society, not to mention we've lost most of our members to the Lord of Silence. I have never heard of Amphoreus, however.

C: 这也是她本人的请求，希望能在回仙舟前找个站点稍作停泊，整顿心思，毕竟对联盟来说…她的身份有些特别。
E: It's her request. She hopes to make a brief stop somewhere to reframe her mindset before returning to the Xianzhou... considering her unique position with the Alliance.

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 这位万维克先生则是星期日的旧识。
E: Mr. Wonweek here is an old acquaintance of Sunday's.

C: 你好，美丽的女士。至于这位…更是重量级，就是你把这控制狂狠狠修理了一顿？
E: Pleased to meet you, fair lady. And you, of course... you're the heavyweight who pummeled this control freak?

C: 「你并非孤身一人。」
E: "You're not alone."

C: 我不是她，不理解背后的逻辑，但那位天才说可以…就一定能做到。
E: I'm not a genius, so I don't understand the logic behind it, but if she says it's possible, then it must be.

C: 各位恩人与我素未谋面，却助我于水火之中，此情此景，与那时有何不同？小女子本该以礼相待，却因忌惮那幻胧，反变得不像自己了。
E: We've never even met before, yet here you are, offering your help, just as before. I should've treated you with respect, but fear of Phantylia made me act like somebody else.

C: 那时，你还是能被我抱在怀里的年纪。
E: Back then, you were still young enough for me to carry.

C: 从未改变。
E: Never.

C: 这原本就不是你该承担的责任。你只是这场战争里一个无辜的幸存者。
E: But this shouldn't fall on your shoulders to begin with. You are simply an innocent survivor in this war.

C: 我们何曾见过真实的星空？
E: So, have we ever truly seen a real sky full of stars?

C: 因为重逢一定会到来，就在那高高的云端上。
E: Because I know we'll reunite one day, up there in the clouds.

C: 也许介于两者之间，这是一对折断的羽翼。
E: Maybe it's somewhere in between the two. It's a pair of broken wings.

C: 或者喜爱。我也想告诉她，我喜欢她的每一首歌。
E: Or my fondness. I want to tell her that I love all her songs.

C: 感谢您一路同行，瓦尔特先生。这段告别之旅到此为止了。
E: Thank you for accompanying me through all this, Mr. Yang. This farewell journey has come to an end.

C: 被她看穿了。
E: She can read our minds!

C: 没人想去洗车星吗？
E: No one wants to go to a Washtopia?

C: 这…这是？黑塔女士，没想到连这里都有你的人偶。
E: Wh—What's all this? I didn't think your puppets would be in here too, Madam Herta.

C: 在它之前的人偶全都一模一样，千篇一律，无聊得很。我记得很清楚，从#0988开始，我会随机往人偶里塞一些小惊喜……
E: Puppets before her were all as dull as brick walls, mundane and uninspired. I distinctly recall #0988 being the first puppet I imbued with... a magical surprise. Some other puppets that came later also got to enjoy similar privileges.

C: 好像有谁在你耳边大声喊：大胆动手吧！真是恶魔般的靡靡之音。你犹豫再三，终于俯下身……
E: It's as if someone is shouting in your ear: "JUST DO IT!" It's veritably the whispers of the devil. After much hesitation, you finally lean down and...

C: 嘘，有动静。
E: Shh. Someone's here.

C: 醒~醒，该按快门啦！
E: Hellooo~! Snap out of it and click the shutter already!

C: 拍摄断崖对岸的大门。
E: Photograph the cliffside gate.

C: 别误会，这是为了大家的安全。
E: I bear no harm. I just want everyone to be safe.

C: 大家的安全？
E: Everyone to be safe?

C: 也可以理解。我们来自天外，是降落在这个世界的「开拓者」。
E: I understand. We're Trailblazers from beyond the sky.

C: 你的回答也太简洁了……
E: Your answers are too concise...

C: 再坚持一会儿，马上就能离开了
E: Hang on, you'll be able to leave soon

C: *我们*是缇安！
E: We are Trianne!

C: 哈托努斯！
E: Chartonus!

C: 不也挺奇怪？
E: Is that not also strange?

C: 来——拔剑！
E: Come, to arms!

C: 坚持住！回想你的信仰，珍视的一切——如果做不到，就想象死亡吧，那反而能让你活下来！
E: Stay strong! Recall your convictions and everything you hold dear... If you can't do that, then think of death, for doing so might actually keep you alive!
Beacon... of the Trailblaze...

C: 又要闭眼吗？
E: Close my eyes again?

C: 照做。
E: (Do as she says.)

C: 这个世界的确有些奇怪。封闭如雅利洛-Ⅵ，当地人也对太空有着基本的认识，甚至知道命途和星神。
E: Something is definitely off about this world. Even on a planet as isolated as Jarilo-VI, the people still had an understanding of space, and even Paths and Aeons.

C: 唉，这样啊…我还以为终于能证明「天外之界」的存在了呢。
E: Oh, is that so... I... I'd thought that I had finally found proof that a world beyond the sky exists.

C: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
E: Have you seen Damionis?

C: 什么声音？
E: What's that commotion?

C: 公民！冷静，别做傻事！
E: Citizen! Calm down. Don't do anything foolish!

C: 要来看看我手里的商品吗？瞧瞧，刚好有一幅热乎的画作——《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》！
E: Would you like to check out my merch? Look, I have this very popular artwork — {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden!

C: 这是什么装饰物？面具吗？
E: What kind of decoration is this? A mask?

C: 这就是真言狮口？居然真的是个狮子…的脑袋？
E: This is Verax Leo? It really is a lion's... head?

C: 翁法罗斯的地貌十分壮丽，这里过去一定是个如仙境般美丽的世界。
E: The landscape of Amphoreus is breathtaking. In the past, this place must have been a beautiful paradise.

C: 不知从何处传来了吟游诗人的歌声。你听不清歌谣的辞藻，却依旧从旋律中读到了一丝对往昔的追忆与怀念。
E: From somewhere, a bard's song drifts through the air. Though the words are unclear, the melody still conveys a tinge of nostalgia and longing for the past.

C: 接受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的邀请，进入你的「过去」
E: Accept {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s invitation and enter your "past"

C: 阳台
E: Balcony

C: 半分诚实，半分掩饰。但规则没有妥协的余地。记作一步。
E: A half-truth that still conceals some facts. Yet, the rules leave no room for compromise. A step will be recorded.

C: 为了把这里搅个天翻地覆！
E: To turn this place upside down!

C: 想离开涡心的话，只要再重复一遍灵水盆前的仪式就好。
E: To leave the Vortex, simply repeat the same ritual in front of the spirit basin.

C: 看来不是噩梦。但小心了，那也可能是蛊惑你的手段。
E: So, it wasn't a nightmare. But be careful, that might be its means of luring you in.

C: 让我见识见识悬锋城最盛大的搏杀竞技项目，也给眼前这场征伐多镀上一层荣耀的金边。<color=#dbc291ff>看看谁能干掉更多发疯的眷属</color>——如何？
E: Show me what the grandest fighting competition in Castrum Kremnos was like. Let's gild this expedition with another layer of glory and <color=#dbc291ff>compete to see who can kill the most crazed Titankin</color>. How about it?

C: 为什么要分两路走？
E: Why go on separate paths?

C: 楼上也有——也可以想办法把它弄下来。
E: There's one upstairs. Maybe we can figure out a way to get it down.

C: 不愧是悬锋城的「王储」，对这些繁文缛节还真是重视啊。
E: I guess being the crown prince of Kremnos makes you obsessed with all this ceremonial stuff.

C: 说话了，它说话了！
E: He... He speaks!

C: …好，相信一次你们的判断。但愿我们不会被推进悔恨的深渊。
E: ...Alright, I'll trust your judgment this time. Let's hope we don't end up in an abyss of regrets.

C: 嗯？这家伙…刚才是面对着我们的吗？
E: Hmm? Was it facing us the whole time?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>遐蝶小姐能解译泰坦的语言</color>——这也是此行必须有她在场的原因。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Miss Castorice can understand the Titans' words</color>. That's exactly why we need her on this trip.

C: 你将炎枪和球棍放在了天秤的托盘上……
E: You place the flaming lance and the bat on the scale's tray...

C: 把三月的相机给我，{NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}, hand me March's camera.

C: 的确，对翁法罗斯人而言，「世界的命运」实在是过于沉重的砝码。
E: Indeed, for the people of Amphoreus, the fate of the world is a weight that is far too heavy.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 记忆，偏差？无误。真实。
E: Memories, discrepancies? Correct. Truth.

C: 卡芙卡…
E: Kafka...

C: 再见了，不存在的记忆。
E: Farewell, nonexistent memory.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>收集。过去…复现。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Collect. Past... Reappear.</color>

C: （伸出手臂。）
E: (Hold out your arms.)

C: 再见，巴特鲁斯——别忘了替我给赛飞儿递话。
E: Farewell, Bartholos. Be sure to get my message to Cipher.

C: 还是从你们手中。
E: Or yours.

C: 它…缄口不言。它仿佛知道答案…却不想在这一时刻同我们分享。
E: It... remains silent, seemingly cognizant of the outcome... though it's unwilling to let us in on the answer just yet.

C: 但迈德漠斯确实是我们之中最强大的战士…如今他也选择了离开，我们还能追随谁？
E: But Mydeimos is undoubtedly the mightiest warrior among us... Who else can we turn to now that he's gone?

C: 如此一来，前方的道路就畅通了。
E: The way ahead is now clear.

C: …现在。
E: ...Now.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，我们一起通过考验吧。
E: Let's clear this trial together, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 我没事…{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: I'm fine... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 斗士……
E: Warrior...

C: 留在这里，战士…不要离开你的死亡女神。此处的鲜血芬芳只为你而盛开……
E: Stay here, warrior... Do not leave your Goddess of Death. The enticing scent of blood here is meant for you, and only you...

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「荣耀」——
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Honor...

C: 难道……
E: Could it be...

C: 记住，这不是祭司们亘古不变的仪式。无人知晓凡人需要付出多大的代价，才能接下「纷争」的神权，你的前路仍充满变数。
E: Remember, this is unlike the unchanging rites our priests perform. No one knows the true cost a mortal must pay to accept Strife's divine authority. Your road ahead is still full of uncertainty.

C: 恶心心！
E: Ew, phooey!

C: 我也休息一会儿吧…
E: I'll take a break too...

C: 刚刚，我在两位半神面前撒谎了——我告诉她们，如今我心中所想只有黄金裔的使命——不知道这次能不能瞒得过阿格莱雅的金线。
E: I lied to the two demigods just now. I told them the duty of the Chrysos Heirs is all I think about now. Do you think I managed to slip by Aglaea's golden threads this time?

C: 可能是它自己偷吃了。
E: More like they snuck food themself.

C: …没事，不用费心思翻译了。直觉告诉我，它没说什么有营养的话。
E: ...Forget it. You can skip the translation. I can somehow tell that none of that chatter's meaningful.

C: 如果他失败了呢？
E: What if he fails?

C: 嘻嘻…真有干劲呀。那我们走吧……
E: Heehee! Look at how excited that got you. Let's go then.

C: 你战胜了不死的诅咒啊…那陨灭便是对你的奖赏！
E: Since you've overcome the curse of immortality... destruction shall be your reward!

C: 悲伤的女王请来一位炼金术士，用龙的血肉复活了公主。可她却失去了生前的记忆，化作另一头四处为恶的「龙」…繁荣的斯缇科西亚也因此覆灭。
E: Overwhelmed by grief, the queen hired an alchemist to resurrect the princess using the dragon's flesh and blood. However, having lost memories of her previous life, the resurrected princess turned into an evil dragon herself and wreaked havoc on the city... As a result, the prosperous Styxia met its demise.

C: {NICKNAME}，还有迷迷，谢谢你们。
E: {NICKNAME}, and Mem, thank you.

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

C: （此时此刻，只想闭上双眼…）
E: (At this moment, I just want to close my eyes...)

C: 人子啊……
E: Child of humanity...

C: 呵呵，哪里的话，吾当然是觉得有趣咯？
E: Heheh, of course I find such stylistic devices interesting.

C: 这…莫非就是汝研究「炼金」的开端？
E: This... Could this be the inception of your research into alchemy?

C: 以「神礼观众」之名，我见到：「金织」阿格莱雅阁下正动身前来黎明云崖。
E: As the Theoros, I have observed the following: Lady Aglaea, the Goldweaver, is currently on her way to Dawncloud.

C: 先走吧，只要能看到更多，听到更多故事……
E: Let's just keep going. As long as I take in more sights and hear more stories...

C: 喔…那就是胜利在望的意思了！
E: Oh... that means victory is around the corner!

C: 毕竟「拥抱」的意义就是传递温暖，而阿蝶…是最温柔的黄金裔呀。
E: Because we embrace others to comfort them, and Cas... you're the kindest Chrysos Heir we know.

C: 咦，可是阁下的魂息，并没有飘离身体……
E: Huh? But I can still sense your soul here...?

C: 可命运却要告诉我，不是「死亡」的诅咒终于可以治愈……
E: Fate declared to me: It wasn't that the curse of "Death" had finally been lifted...

C: {RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的硬币，还有这块石板……
E: The coin of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}, and a slate...

C: 阁下，我们先按石板上说的，找到赛飞儿阁下吧。
E: Let's just do as the slate says and look for Lady Cipher.

C: 两根黄金短矛
E: Two Golden Short Spears

C: 不过，听我最后一句劝：斯缇科西亚可不是什么观光圣地。那地里埋着的玩意，就连十个…不，五十个阿格莱雅都拿不出手——
E: But listen to me: Styxia is no tourist destination. Sure, the treasures buried in there are ten... No, fifty times richer than Aglaea's vault —

C: ——天高路远，先睡个好觉吧，两位。
E: It's gonna be a long ride, so have a good rest!

C: 她似乎…解脱了。
E: She seems... free.

C: 身为母亲，请你为这女孩赐下姓名…在我被冥河卷走以前，至少让我知道，在来世应当如何呼唤她吧。
E: As her mother, please bless this child with a name... Before I am swept away by the River of Souls, please let me know how I should address her in my next life.

C: 原来…他的战场不止在生者的世界。
E: It seems... his battlefield is not limited to the world of the living.

C: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳…托斯……{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Tha... natos...{RUBY_E#}

C: 悬锋城是不是也有这个…
E: Didn't Castrum Kremnos also have this...?

C: 这样的机关…我熟悉。
E: I'm familiar... with this kind of mechanism.

C: 依照那位炼金术士的话语，最后的材料应当就是我自己……
E: According to that alchemist, the final piece is supposed to be me...

C: …永远这么一针见血啊。
E: ...Nothing ever escapes you.

C: 但无论你们得出了什么样的答案，最终将手中的陶片投给了谁…你们都不必有后顾之忧。
E: Yet, no matter what your answer is, and no matter who your vote goes to... rest assured that you have nothing to fear.

C: 为什么没人敢举手回答？非要我点名不成？
E: No one? Must I pick somebody to answer?

C: …三言两语难以言明。
E: ...It's hard to explain.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我和您一样，也曾沐浴「智识」的瞥视，</color>并以尊严向您保证，在极端情境下，我们的毁灭互有保证。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Just like you, I have basked in the gaze of the Erudition.</color> I stake my honor and assure you that in the worst-case scenario, our mutual destruction will be inevitable.

C: 计划一波三折，但万敌以「纷争」半神之姿归来，协助众人成功夺回火种。不久后，他成功说服子民放下对宿仇的成见，便与众人告别，返回家乡，踏上对抗黑潮的前线。
E: The plan suffers multiple setbacks, but Mydei returns as the demigod of Strife and helps everyone reclaim the Coreflame. Not long after, he successfully persuades his people to let go of their prejudices against Okhema. He says goodbye to everyone and returns home to join the frontline against the black tide.

C: …汝真是位严师哪。
E: You truly are a strict teacher.

C: 没意思。
E: How boring.

C: 这…似乎有些无礼。
E: That... doesn't seem like a nice thing to do.

C: 不，从事后的反应来看，现状应该在老师预料之外。可能他也没想到{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}会做出相似的决定。
E: No. Judging from how he reacted after the event, the results came as a surprise. Maybe he failed to consider the possibility that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} would make a similar decision.

C: 你应当听说过斯缇科西亚人的故事：他们面对汹涌进犯的大海，并没有坐以待毙，而是修建了匹敌怒涛的堤坝，为癫狂的{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}套上了枷锁。
E: I'm sure you're familiar with the story of the Styxians. When the raging waves threatened to swallow them, they didn't just give up and become sitting ducks. No, they constructed a dam that kept the roaring tide at bay, chaining down the mad {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}.

C: 可吾也说了，吾从未有过如此记忆。那怕是汝死前眼中臆造的幻象。
E: And I've told you that I have no recollection of such an event. That was likely just an illusion conjured up by the mind of a dying man.

C: 她手底下见不得光的走狗，在城中出没得愈发频繁了，甚至还有策反悬锋人的倾向……
E: Those lackeys she keeps undercover have been going in and out of the city a lot more frequently these days. Some even seem to be getting Kremnoans to defect to the Council...

C: 很简单：我们将有机会消除世间「死亡」，令翁法罗斯回到万物永生的时代…一个与「逐火之旅」完全不同的崭新未来！
E: The answer is simple: We will have a chance to rid the world of "death" and bring Amphoreus back to an era when all beings live forever... We'll usher in a new future that will be entirely different from "the Flame-Chase Journey"!

C: 元老院议员们发出*群情激昂的欢呼声*。
E: The members of the Council of Elders are cheering in excitement.

C: 你听说过吗？
E: Have you heard of this tale before?

C: 依吾看，这所谓「炼金」乃是后人牵强附会。毕竟，想来你们从未听过故乡有炼金的传承罢？
E: I think that this so-called "alchemy" was a tenuous analogy added to the story by future generations. After all, you've never heard of a tradition of alchemy in your hometown before, have you?

C: 汝…会为珍重之人加以运用，令之起死回生么？
E: Would you use it to resurrect someone you loved?

C: 我…才无法完成试炼吧。
E: I... am unable to complete the trial.

C: 拜托你了，小姑娘，为我的陨落作见证。卡吕普索阁下，「裂魂仪式」就由你主持了。
E: Please, young lady, witness my fall and demise. Lady Calypso, you shall host the soul-rending ceremony.

C: 离别和死亡，本就并蒂双生…凡人怎能轻易和解呢？
E: Separation and death are two sides of the same coin... Reconciling this doesn't come easily for a mortal.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将凋零，令逝者自残余中发芽，一同死去的火新生」……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall wither, and through that, the dead will sprout again from the remains, and be reborn with the dead flame"...</color>

C: 那该不会是……
E: Could that be...

C: 如果这是她选择的道路，那我和先祖们…我们究竟在守望谁的夙愿？！
E: If this was the path she chose, then whose wish have my ancestors and I been guarding all this time!?

C: 她目之所及皆是人犯下的罪恶——但我们会让她明白，那不是人的全部。
E: She sees only the sins we've committed, but we will make her understand that it's not all we are.

C: 阿提…卡斯？你为何…不回应……
E: Atti...cus? Why aren't you... responding...?

C: 不过，要论神力的运用…我也不差，哈！
E: As for using divine powers... I'm no slouch myself!

C: 嗐，反正我该做的都已经做了。接下来，就只等救世小子他们……
E: Well, I've done everything I could. Now it's in the hands of the Deliverer and his crew...

C: 是不是，重要吗？反正你永远猜不出我的话是真是假。
E: Does it even matter? You'll never guess whether I'm lying or telling the truth.

C: *那就是我要为诸位带来的喜报！伟大的负世泰坦陷入缄默以前，它在我的恩师耳边留下的话语…现在，我要将它传予翁法罗斯的全部世人！*
E: And that brings me to the joyous news I share with you today! Before the great Worldbearing Titan fell silent, they spoke one final message to my revered mentor. And now, I shall share those words with every soul in Amphoreus!

C: 其实…我并不是对事事都有自信哦，克莱门汀。
E: Honestly... I'm not confident about everything, Clementine.

C: 即便我们是那虚假传说的源头，你还是给我们带来了解脱。
E: Even though we were the source of that false legend, you still brought us freedom.

C: 人心中的黑暗…遮蔽了我的耳目……
E: The darkness in the human heart... clouded my judgment...

C: 所以，我无法替他们原谅你，塞涅俄丝大人……
E: That's why I cannot forgive you on their behalf, Lady Seliose...

C: 现在不是感伤的时候。
E: Now's not the time to feel down.

C: 小心翼翼地……
E: Careful... Careful...

C: 奥赫玛人尊重智慧，渴望知识。若满城公民都知晓了二位的来历，想必会有更多人对「开拓」产生兴致——可惜对「天外之界」的探讨至今仍是禁忌。
E: Okhemans hold wisdom and knowledge in high esteem. If the citizens knew of your origins, I'm sure more would be intrigued by "the Trailblaze." Sadly, discussions about the "world beyond the sky" remain taboo.

C: 哈，「惊喜」么…有人也对我说过类似的话，她特别擅长观星和占卜，尤其是用卡牌——喏，就是你在看的这套。
E: Ha, a "surprise," huh? Someone else used to tell me the same. She was really good at stargazing and divination, especially with cards — yeah, just like the ones you're looking at.

C: 匕首并非抵在你的脖颈上，而是……
E: The dagger isn't at your throat, but...

C: 可不是嘛，那就太让人伤心了！果然逃跑才是理智的做法，桀桀桀……
E: Indeed, that would be heartbreaking! Clearly, running away is the sensible choice, hehe...

C: 扎格列斯之手，我的宝贝儿——启动！
E: Hand of Zagreus, my darling — activate!

C: 唷，裁缝女！你的手段越来越卑鄙了，真以为我发现不了你挂在我身边的小耳朵？
E: Well, well, seamstress! Getting sneaky, aren't we? Did you think I wouldn't notice your little spies lurking around me?

C: 真是不好意思哪，那么厉害的一群家伙里，居然也会出现我这种穷人、小偷、骗子！不如我在身上再划一道口子，把这黄色的玩意全都放干……
E: Well, I am sorry to disappoint! Who knew that group of amazing people would include me! A pauper, thief, con artist! Maybe I should just make another cut to drain all this yellow stuff out of me and-

C: 你…不怕我会给这里带来坏名声？你不怕我偷偷顺走你贵重的衣服，拿去外面倒卖？
E: Aren't you... worried I'll ruin this place's reputation? Or that I might sneak off with your precious clothes and sell them?

C: 我们听克拉特鲁斯说了。你…还好么？
E: We heard from Krateros. Are you... alright?

C: 哪怕只是在你的想象中…我也不擅表露自己脆弱的一面啊。
E: Even in your imagination... I'm not one to show my vulnerable side.

C: 阿…阿格莱雅……
E: A–Aglaea...

C: 只是，在某些时候…它的确可以比坦诚高贵。
E: But sometimes... they can be more noble than the truth.

C: 在支付等价的报酬以前，你们可别先死了哪。
E: Need to make sure you don't die before you pay me.

C: 回想起自己一字一板的模样…还真让人难为情呀。
E: Ah... I'm getting embarrassed from remembering how I said all that.
...Doot.

C: 我们的血脉和使命…一直延续到了这遥远的年代啊。
E: So, our bloodline and duty have continued to this distant age...

C: 正好，我要去把飞儿送的礼物好好收起来——创世涡心就先让给你啦。
E: It's the perfect opportunity for me to go and tuck Ciphy's gift away somewhere safe. The Vortex of Genesis is all yours.

C: 您没猜错，我是昏光庭院的雅辛忒丝，天空一族逐火使命的继承者。
E: Yes. I am Hyacinthia of the Twilight Courtyard, the successor of the Sky people's Flame-Chase duty.

C: …很遗憾，她最近才离开了我们。但您说对了一部分…她的确仍在指引着黄金裔们前行。
E: ...Unfortunately, she has recently left us. But you're right — she was indeed still guiding the Chrysos Heirs forward.

C: 你的…祖母？
E: Your... grandmother?

C: 那时…你吟诵着稚嫩的祷词，为那枚不起眼的吊坠引来了一抹微光……
E: You spoke an innocent little prayer, infusing a faint thread of light to that modest pendant...

C: 你对兵戈武技兴致寥寥，性格中也全然不见我们一族中的刚强跟硬朗。
E: You never had much interest in swords or battle, and had no relation to that fiery determination and strength in our blood.

C: 风堇姐姐！愿迈德漠斯捍卫你！
E: Miss Hyacine! May Mydeimos protect you!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>伟大的艾格勒已在金色的云朵间留下了它的化身印记……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The great Aquila has already left a mark of their manifestation among the golden clouds...</color>

C: 你们的品格同信仰一般脆弱…去找一个不受烈日眷顾的角落，躲在阴影里孤自落泪吧——你们唯一能做到的事，就是暗自哭泣！
E: Your character is as weak as your faith... Go seek out a corner untouched by the sun, and weep solitary tears in the shadows. That's all you lot know how to do anyway — cry in silence!

C: 英雄塞涅俄丝…她又是如何看待晖之民和雨之民的世仇的？传说将笔墨聚焦在她征伐神明的事迹上，却对天空子民的下落含混不清。
E: The hero Seliose... How did she view the ancient feud between the Sunfolk and Rainfolk? The legends focus on her god-slaying expedition, but are hazy on the fall of the Sky denizens.

C: 现在还无法确定。无论如何，我们先乘升降梯上到晨昏之眼的核心吧。
E: We can't be sure of that yet. Let's take the elevator up to the Eye of Twilight's core first.

C: 风堇，当心——
E: Hyacine, watch out!

C: 而我们具备的力量，你刚才已经见识过了。
E: You've already witnessed our combined strength.

C: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
E: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

C: 那它一定有必须被粉饰为谎言的理由…对吗？
E: Then there must be a reason behind its falsehood... right?

C: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝启——
E: Dear Seliose,

C: 从你的字里行间透露出来的激烈情感，让*我们*有些担心…会不会你所说的对于族人的爱，与*我们*对折纸的爱有些相似呢？
E: Your intense emotions make us wonder... Is your love for your people similar to our love for origami?

C: 「侵晨」在我手中越发轻盈……
E: Dawnmaker feels lighter and lighter in my hands...

C: 我们…无论谁都无法逃脱……
E: None of us... no one can escape...

C: 「担负世界的全知之父，请将你那慈悲的目光分我一瞥。」
E: "All-Knowing Father who bears the world, please share a glimpse of your merciful gaze with me."

C: 啊，千钧一发……
E: Phew, that was really close...

C: 虽然…我也不知道该把他们送到哪去。
E: Though... I also don't know where to shelter them.

C: 我有权见证这场开拓的结局。
E: I have the right to witness the ending of this Trailblaze.

C: {NICKNAME}——帮我们争取时间吧！
E: {NICKNAME}! Help buy us some time!

C: 不知是哪位半神为我们降下了奇迹…两位，请跟我们走吧！
E: I don't know which demigod graced us with this miracle... Please, come with us!

C: {NICKNAME}，别贸然接近它！
E: {NICKNAME}, don't get too close!

C: 这样…真的算「开拓」吗？
E: Is this... really what Trailblazing is supposed to be?

C: …谁！谁在那边？！
E: ...Who's there!?

C: 呵呵，实不相瞒，我也怀抱着同样的想法而来。
E: As it happens, I find myself thinking the exact same thing.

C: …这是发生在久远过去、无人知晓，甚至连诸位天才都不曾听闻的轶事。
E: ...This is a tale from the distant past, unknown to all, even unheard by the greatest geniuses.

C: （…来古士？）
E: (...Lygus?)

C: 知道，衣服被弄脏就不好了，让我来吧。
E: I know, I know. We wouldn't want your clothes getting dirty. Leave the dirty work to me.

C: 已经装在眼睛里啦，去到哪里都会珍藏，包括…童年的伙伴哦！
E: I've captured it all in my heart. This view, and most precious of all... my childhood friends!

C: 啊！对，入口就在那边，那个树洞——
E: There it is! The entrance — that hollow in the tree—

C: 不管怎么说，先挑战一下树洞？
E: Regardless, how about we try getting through the hollow first?

C: 嗯～算啦，没什么。如果命运果真开始流转…到时再请你听听我的请求吧♪
E: Ah~ forget it. If the wheels do begin to turn... that's when I'll make my request♪

C: 真是开门见山啊，伙伴。先听听多哆啦迷怎么说吧。
E: How about we hear what the chief has to say first, my impatient friend?

C: 但你瞳孔中的怒意，又像极了书中描写的骄傲王族…这份心愿，我记下了。
E: Still... those eyes burn with the noble pride I've read about. This wish, I shall not forget.

C: 只剩三个小时了啊……
E: That only leaves three hours...

C: 不用再和我确认决心啦，白厄。
E: I don't need another pep talk, Phainon.

C: 少废话，快走！
E: Just shut up and get out of here!

C: 啧啧，到处是水。这地方永远都湿漉漉、黏糊糊的，连尾巴都变得很重……
E: Ugh, there's water everywhere. This place is always all wet and sticky, even my tail's getting heavy...

C: 这一次，在{M#他}{F#她}的指引下，英雄将作出如何抉择，全世命运又将流向何方？还有，翁法罗斯一切的终极本质又是什么？……
E: And this time, under {M#his}{F#her} guidance, what choice shall the hero make? Whither shall the fate of the world flow? And what is the ultimate truth of the nature of Amphoreus...?

C: 就是在世界尽头，成为供奉给<color=#dbc291ff>它</color>的祭品？
E: We become nothing more than sacrificial offerings at the end of everything?

C: 不必妄自菲薄。比起数字，我更愿意将你们比作「柴薪」。若无薪火，便没有明日的朝阳。
E: Don't sell yourselves short. I'd say, rather than numbers, you're more like "fuel for the fire." And without fire, there can be no sunrise tomorrow.

C: 你知道，这里只是记忆的一角，真正的哀丽秘榭……
E: You know, this is just a corner of the memory. The real Aedes Elysiae...

C: 而我，也会投身自己的本源——「毁灭」——以这力量反抗它的造主，为席卷世间的黑暗，带去无尽的怒火。
E: And I will embrace my origin — Destruction — and with this power, I will rebel against its creator, bringing endless fury to the darkness sweeping the world.

C: 那么，*我们*从神谕中读到的预言，你知晓多少呢？
E: So, how much do you know about what we read from the prophecy?

C: 即使王朝仅余一人，悬锋祭典也将如常。朕，悬锋众军之王，就在这竞技场中心摆设最后一场盛宴，奖赏便是「纷争」的烈火。
E: Even though the dynasty is left with just one, the Kremnos Festival will continue as usual. I, the king of the Kremnoan legion, will host the final feast in the center of this arena, and the prize will be the flames of "Strife."

C: 相比炽盛的神火，人性的部分…实在微小。
E: My humanity is indeed just a flicker compared to the blazing fire of divinity.

C: 这便是世界的终结，也是下一个世界的起点……
E: This was the end of the world... and the start of the next...

C: 嘻，有惊无险…开溜咯！
E: Phew, that was close... I'm outta here!

C: 你、你去哪儿？
E: Where... Where are you going?

C: 如果走进那扇门，最坏的情况，你会变成他们的棋子，再也无法掌控自己的命运。
E: If you go through that door, the worst case scenario is you'll become their pawn, losing control over your own fate forever.

C: 别让坏人骗走你的信任呀……
E: Don't let those bad people deceive you...

C: 「铁墓」的降临近在眼前，而我们还有机会…改变这一切。
E: The descent of Irontomb may be looming over the horizon... but we still have a chance to change everything.

C: 但今天不同，对吗？我们要联系的，不是遥不可及的神，而是真实存在的，来自其他世界的人类。
E: But today's different, isn't it? We aren't trying to contact unreachable gods, but humans from other worlds, real people.

C: 我是说，「救世主」。
E: No, not "little one." "Deliverer."

C: 你试着触碰这面屏幕，一股诡异的感觉瞬间流遍全身……
E: As you reach out to touch the screen, an eerie sensation instantly courses through your entire body...

C: 「愤怒的人民随她汇成巨浪，汹涌澎湃。千万敌军如死水枯涸，灰灭无余。」
E: "The people full of wrath surged with her, forming a colossal wave, and the enemy hordes, drained of life, vanished into nothing."

C: 刻律德菈一定是这么想的…但对我们来说，就不太方便啦。
E: I'm sure that's what Cerydra thinks, but it's inconvenient for us.

C: 这也是凯撒大人的毕生所求。你们的到来，更是印证了这一点呀。
E: This is also what the Great Imperator has been striving for all her life. Your arrival further confirms everything.

C: {M#他们}{F#她们}好像确实没有流言中的那么…可怕。
E: They're not as frightening as the rumors claimed.

C: 呵呵，诸位想象中的奥赫玛已经是过去式了。在凯撒的治理下，这座城邦已经迎来新生，成为名副其实的「世界之都」。
E: Hehe, the Okhema you imagined is long gone. Under the Imperator, this city has been reborn as the "Capital of the World."

C: 其余更多，我身为臣子不便妄议。
E: As merely a humble subject, I cannot say more beyond this.

C: 在这里的黄金裔，皆是逐火军中的佼佼者——
E: The Chrysos Heirs here constitute the elite among the Flame-Chase Army...

C: 方才的会议犹如闹剧，见笑了。
E: I apologize for that farce of a meeting.

C: 很高兴再见到你们，「曳石爵」、「吟风爵」！两位还真是形影不离呢。
E: It's a pleasure to see you again, Dux Helkolithist and Dux Carminum! You two are inseparable, aren't you?

C: 我什么都没看见！
E: I didn't see anything!

C: 为什么？因为拉冬人不愿为逐火贡献军力，还是…单单因为他们冒犯了凯撒？
E: Why? Is it because the Ladonians refused to contribute troops to the Flame-Chase Journey, or... just because they offended the Imperator?

C: 凯撒的「律法」是否能够引领鱼群，引领我们游向一片真正自由的大海…就让我们共同拭目以待吧。
E: Whether the Imperator's "Law" can guide the schools of fish and lead us to a truly free ocean... let us wait and see.

C: 正如她熟谙纺车如何颤动，我也能从潮湿的空气中嗅出细微的变化。至于是否能谈得上熟悉…在她仍是孩子时，我便已与她共游。大部分时候，我能读懂她心里的泡泡就是了。
E: Just as she knows how the spinning wheel trembles, I can sense the smallest changes in the damp air. As for whether we know each other well... I've swum beside her since she was a child. Most of the time, I can understand the whispers in her heart.

C: 哟，拉比努斯，我从地窖里搞到了学者们私藏的蜜酿，来品品？
E: Hey, Labienus! I managed to get some honey brew that the scholars hid in the cellar. Wanna try it?

C: 哈哈…「冬霖爵」主动找我小酌，我当然不好推辞。
E: Hahaha... I'd never refuse to share a drink with Dux Brumalis, especially if she seeks me out first.

C: 来古士！他果然在这里。
E: Lygus! I knew he'd be here!

C: 记忆的结晶必须要用凸透镜观看……
E: Memory Crystals must be examined with a convex lens...

C: 凯撒——凯撒驾到！
E: The Imperator! The Imperator has arrived!

C: 是啊，我们当中竟有人违弃誓言，酝酿着{M#他们}{F#她们}邪恶的阴谋！现在，听好了：这群叛徒就在光天化日之下，就在这场盛宴当中——
E: Yes... Some among us have discarded their vows in order to foment vile conspiracies. Now, listen! These traitors are standing right here in broad daylight...

C: 因为你做不到。第一次斩下你的头颅时，我便早有预料：出于{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>终极协议</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「律法」</color>{RUBY_E#}，黄金裔无法将你彻底消灭，反之亦然。
E: You, in fact, cannot kill me. I guessed it the first time I beheaded you: Because of the {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Ultimate Protocol</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"Law,"</color>{RUBY_E#} you cannot be completely destroyed, and the same is true of the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 看来，你二人就是救世主索求「律法」神权的原因，{M#他}{F#她}口中的天外盟友。
E: So you two are the allies from beyond the sky the Deliverer spoke of, and why {F#s}he demanded the divine authority of "Law."

C: （那是…黑塔的声音？）
E: (Is that... Herta's voice?)

C: 「在缇里西庇俄丝、赛法利娅两位半神庇护下，奥赫玛挺过连番施压，但也逐渐难以为继。遐蝶决定将斯缇科西亚作为最后手段，遂完成『死亡』试炼，令淤滞的冥河尽数退去。」
E: "With the protection of the demigods Tribios and Cifera, Okhema endured wave after wave of warfare, though just barely. Castorice chose Styxia as the last resort and completed the Trial of Death, causing the stagnant waters in the River of Souls to recede."

C: 所以，你的术式到底有什么效果？
E: So what exactly does your formula do?

C: 她的真名是「海列屈拉」——那是过去的她，在不甘中回望的残影。
E: Her true name is Helektra. This is a reflection of her former self, clinging to the past with aching defiance.

C: 高贵的骑士，你是一颗滚烫的火星，能与你共飨盛宴，可谓是我的荣幸。
E: Noble knight, you are truly a blazing spark. It's my honor to share this banquet with you.

C: 海列屈拉！我的尾被恶鬼啃啮，再也无法游向远方……
E: Helektra! The fiends have gnawed my tail! I can no longer swim to the far seas...

C: 但是…我可能…也没法前进了……
E: But... I think... I can't go any further...

C: 但你为何不等我归来…为何要让先锋军贸然出击，让他们白白牺牲？！
E: So why didn't you wait for me to return!? Why send the vanguard ahead and let them die in vain!?

C: 它记录了我们所有人的抗争和牺牲。但愿你能看到，这跨越千年的漫长接力，翁法罗斯为你的归来谱写的前奏。
E: It holds the story of all of our struggles and sacrifices. May you see it one day, the prelude Amphoreus wrote for your return, carried forward through a thousand-year relay.

C: 可惜，囚徒始终为囚徒，连自己被囚禁的事实都无法洞见。
E: Alas, prisoners will always be prisoners, blind to the very chains that bind them.

C: 喔，这么快就理解了？
E: Oh? You caught on quick.
