C: 而这个时间，恰好符合你失联的时间记录！
E: ...and stopped responding to messages in the same time window!

C: 这枚脚印就是证据。
E: This footprint!

C: 我从来没有这样想过，小姐……
E: M—My lady, don't you think that's a long thought to think...?

C: 但其实我是因为黑塔女士，才开启了这段修行。
E: I started this trial because of Madam Herta.

C: 啊这…是我一时疏忽，您就当没看见！
E: Oh, um... This is a simple oversight. Please just let this slide!

C: 话虽如此，但它现在选择非暴力不合作，你们也拿它没办法嘛。
E: Even so, now that it refuses to cooperate, there isn't a thing you can do about it.

C: 从日记可以看出，他的心绪并不如意。但寄回的家书上，他母亲又对他寄望颇高。
E: From his diary, we understand that he felt unfulfilled. But in his letters back home, his mother seems to have high hopes for him.

C: 它刚刚说，看够了没！看够了就快把东西交给它。
E: It just said, "Haven't you looked enough? Pass the items to me, now."

C: 啊，算算时间，客人差不多要到了。你要是感兴趣，就跟着大部队一块儿去看看吧，我和小姐随后就到——
E: Ah, look at the time. The guest is almost here. If you're curious, just follow the crowd. Miss Asta and I will be there soon...

C: 这位是……
E: And you are...

C: 突然，你看着它开始向内坍缩，周围的声音、色彩都被卷入其中，似乎有什么东西呼之欲出……
E: Suddenly, the pattern imploded and engulfed its surrounding sounds and colors. Something inside seems to be breaking out from it...

C: 又是一个涂鸦，竟然每个都不一样，她可真有心思。
E: Another graffiti... They're all different too. She really put some thought into this.

C: 太狡猾了！
E: She's a sneaky one!

C: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，让你见笑了。
E: My apologies, {F#madam}{M#sir}.

C: 和你沟通真是一种有趣且愉快的体验。
E: Hehe, conversing with you is truly a delightful experience.

C: 怎么，见不得我回来？呵，我才不管你们要做什么，爱干啥干啥，别来烦我就行。
E: What, am I not allowed to come back? I really don't care what you guys do. Just don't pester me.

C: 呃，那位骇客就在我面前…
E: Uh... that hacker is right in front of me...

C: 那就开始吧。
E: Then let's go.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 最后结果如何？
E: How did that go?

C: 唉…我本来只想等堵车结束，然后早点回家吃饭……
E: *sigh* I want to go home and have dinner... once we're out of this jam...

C: 哼，我这叫面对现实，拥抱现实，最终战胜现实。
E: Hmph, it's called facing reality, embracing it, and then conquering it!

C: 莫非是…维利特，莫非是你身上沾惹了虫族的信息素？
E: Could it be...? Velite, perhaps you still bear Sting pheromones on your body.

C: 你不禁发现有些家伙就是如此，说的比唱的还好听些。
E: You invariably notice that for some people, what they say sounds better than what they actually do.

C: 等等……
E: Hold on...

C: 如何，各位？调查有进展吗？
E: How's it going? Has there been any progress?

C: 我为自己的多言致歉，我实在不擅长表达自我…回到最初——你是否会支持我的想法？
E: I apologize, I have been rambling. As I said, articulation has never been my forte. Let us return to the point at hand. Do I have your support?

C: 抱歉，黑塔并未向我提及此事。
E: Apologies. Herta did not mention this to me.

C: 啧啧啧，看看这小女娃，多乖巧，多水灵。
E: I say, what a wonderfully intelligent-looking young lady.

C: 要是让我查出来是谁…我非要他好看！
E: If I discover who's behind this... they're going to wish they'd never crossed me!

C: 空间站刚经历劫后新生，本就是多事之秋，偏偏还有人趁乱煽动科员们的情绪。
E: We've been through a huge crisis and are still recovering... but there are some who are trying to exploit the chaos to agitate the workforce.

C: （又来了…记忆里的只言片语似乎混在了一起。）
E: (It's happening again... The words in my memory are all jumbled up.)

C: 随后你是这么说的：为了调查丢失的奇物，曾向艾丝妲求助。
E: Then you said: You asked Asta for help with the lost Curio.

C: 在科员消失前后，空间站的自动灭火系统有短暂启动的记录。阿兰是这么形容的，每位受害者的失踪都伴随着离奇的自燃……
E: The space station's automatic fire-suppression system was momentarily activated around the time the disappearances happened. Arlan mentioned that each victim disappeared due to spontaneous combustion...

C: 智识的命途既无道理，也无逻辑，天才们漫步繁星，凡庸却连一处脚印都无法追及。庸人只得学着独立行走，在跌倒爬起中度过碌碌一生。
E: The Path of Erudition has neither reason nor logic. While geniuses wander among the stars, the ordinary can't even trace their footsteps. Those less gifted have no choice but to walk alone, enduring a lifetime of tumbles and triumphs...

C: 你给我吃了什么…
E: What did you feed me...

C: 芝士流心说「阮•梅女士是否承认本天才是成功的作品？」
E: Molten Cheese Tart says, "Does Madam Ruan Mei recognize me as a masterpiece?"

C: 好吧…
E: Alright...

C: 提问：为模拟宇宙引入第五位合作者？
E: Question: Are we introducing a fifth partner for the Simulated Universe?

C: 概率：#64原始博士可能会出现。
E: Probability: Member #64, Dr. Primitive, may appear.

C: 黑塔授权你使用的？
E: So Herta gave you permission to use this place?

C: 如果你希望，我会的。
E: If that is your wish, I will forget you.

C: 愣着做什么，你时间很多吗？我看不像。坐电梯下去，你要找的东西就在那里。
E: Are you waiting for a sign? Time is ticking. Descend via the elevator — what you seek is there.

C: 之前到访空间站的时候，在某些舱段遇到小机器人失灵，我和丹恒就顺手调试了下。
E: When we went to the space station before, there were a few little robots that had crashed in various zones. Dan Heng and I went and debugged them as we were passing through.

C: 已确认出行目标，抵达目的地时，将自动记录使用者的信息。
E: Destination confirmed. User information will be recorded on arrival at the target location.

C: 拍完了？让我看看……
E: Done? Let's have a look...

C: 送、送货…别、别说了！呜呜……
E: Th—The deliveries... I—I don't wanna talk about it! *Cries*...

C: 别怕，有我们呢。
E: Don't worry. We're here with you.

C: 来来来，我给你腾了个座位，快坐下，我先去给你沏壶好茶。
E: Come, come! I've prepared a seat for you. Sit down and I'll prepare you a fine brew.

C: 杜老板既是开茶庄的本地人，或许他会知道些什么。
E: Maybe Boss Du will know something about this as a local teahouse owner?

C: 无论怎么说，这场闹剧终于告一段落，前段日子真是辛苦你了。
E: Whatever the case, it looks like this whole thing has finally come to an end. Thank you for your hard work back then.

C: 我刚开始做无名客的时候，也总想着要做些惊天动地的大事。拯救世界，改变命运…年轻人嘛，总是充满干劲。
E: When I first started as a Nameless, I always wanted to do great things, too. I wanted to save the world and change lives... You know what it's like as a youngster full of energy.

C: 有空的话可以跟它多交流交流，在升级了系统之后，它身上可是有不少惊喜功能等着你去探索呢。
E: Try talking with it whenever you get time. After the system upgrades, it now has lots of surprising functions waiting for you to discover.

C: 呃，但是，这怪不得各位英雄！哈哈，是我出现得太突兀了，挨这一戳值得，应当，必须！要不怎么能认识各位好朋友呢？哈哈……
E: ...But then again how can I blame you? I mean, I caught you off guard. It had to happen — you could even say I deserved it, huh? Besides, I've made a gallant group of new friends as a result, hehe...

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 我当然理解他啦…这也不妨碍我觉得可惜嘛。
E: I know... But it's still a shame, don't you think?

C: 那你怎么不回话？布洛妮娅可是咱的老朋友欸！
E: Then why didn't you reply? Bronya's a good friend of ours!

C: 因为帕姆不能离开列车啊…所以只能用这种方法假装带它一起「开拓」过了。
E: Well, I thought since Pom-Pom can't leave the Express, bringing a doll with us is kind of like taking them trailblazing.

C: 我们…哎呀，{NICKNAME}，帮帮忙！我实在不擅长这个……
E: We... Uh... Help me out here, {NICKNAME}! You know I'm not good at this kinda thing...

C: 你把公司想成什么啦，三月~别忘了，我们和这里的「筑城者」一样，都是「存护」的践行者哦。
E: What do you take the IPC for, Miss March? We're just the same as Belobog's Architects — we're all followers of the Preservation.

C: 所以，你是说…我们不用担心？但布洛妮娅她……
E: So you're saying there's nothing to worry about? But Bronya...

C: 刚才还在逛博物馆来着…不会是她的手下自说自话吧？
E: We were just talking to her in the museum... Do you think her cronies are acting without her authorization?

C: 我想传达的就是这些数字，这些「概率」。我觉得，只有把这些信息全都公开透明，对你来说才能算是公平。
E: I wanted to bring these numbers, these "probabilities" to light. I think it's only fair that you know all the facts before making a decision.

C: 我有粉丝吗？
E: Do I have any fans?

C: 谁知道呢。「家族」的人脑袋都不太正常，想和他们做买卖？我看是没戏。
E: Honestly, who knows? "The Family" has some pretty questionable characters. If you ask me, doing business with them is a lost cause.

C: 将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了希儿……
E: You tell Seele about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...

C: 别担心，没什么我搞不定的~职级什么的都不重要，找到解决问题的最佳方案才是硬道理。
E: Don't worry, it's nothing I can't handle. There are more important things than titles and ranks — finding the best solution is what matters most.

C: 这么便宜…卫生吗？
E: They're so cheap... Hope they're safe to eat.

C: 不不不，你别道歉啦！我们也就是路过看看，不用搞得那么隆重。
E: It's fine! You really don't have to apologize. We're just passing through, it's no big deal.

C: 没希望了…没希望了…
E: We're doomed... doomed...

C: 你们铁卫还真是正直……
E: You Silvermane Guards sure are a righteous bunch...

C: 过节？没有没有，她可是下层区唯一一个良心医生。
E: A dispute? No, no, she's the only kindhearted doctor in the Underworld.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。即使那些人说了很多于我不利的话，你还是对我如此信任。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Those patients weren't exactly singing my praises — thank you for having faith in me.

C: 价是「互助会」后来定的，虽然不像瓦赫医生那样接近免费送，但也比诊所那女人卖的药便宜不少。
E: The mutual aid society sets the price. It might be different from Dr. Vache and his handouts, but it's a darn sight cheaper than that clinic woman's medicine.

C: 弟兄们，把这个偷药贼给我拿下！
E: Men, seize the medicine thief!

C: 看来你也已经承认了啊？自己干这行只是为了赚钱，而不是为了拯救患者的生命。
E: So you admit it, then? You're not in this to save lives. You're in it to get rich.

C: （娜塔莎好像被患者围住了？听听他们在说什么吧…）
E: (It looks like the patients have surrounded Natasha? Let's hear what they're saying...)

C: 你早就知道这药是他留下的？
E: So you knew this medicine was his work?

C: 没、没有，我只是陈述我眼睛所看到的东西而已。从小，家里人就让我多关注事情的亮面，这样生活才不会那么阴郁。
E: No, no, I'm just stating what I see. Since my childhood, my family has always taught me to focus on the positive, so that life wouldn't be so gloomy.

C: 我劝你还是放下屠刀，乖乖就范，收容舱的日子也没那么糟，上次，那个温命得队长差点就进去了，你俩今后也许还能搭个伴。
E: I advise you to lay down your arms and hand yourself over. Life in the Storage Zone is not so bad. Last time, Mr. Wen Mingy almost went in. You two may keep each other company in the future.

C: 咕噜噜，暴露了又怎样？{NICKNAME}，我想你还没有搞清楚现在的状况。
E: *gurgle* So what? {NICKNAME}, I don't think you really understand the situation.

C: （这个小女孩说的话完全不符合逻辑…或许她遭受了什么刺激？）
E: (This girl is not making any sense at all... Perhaps she's been somehow traumatized?)

C: 你的力气也太大了吧？
E: How are you this powerful?

C: 这个旧城塞的构造是南北走向，而我们所在的位置是它的最南边——
E: The old citadel runs from the north to the south, and we are now at the southernmost end—

C: 啊，不对。{NICKNAME}，你看这里：这块地砖有点不对劲。上面好像刻了一行字呢。
E: Hmm, wait a minute. {NICKNAME}, look, there's something wrong with this floor tile. There seems to be a line of words engraved on it.

C: 我想这样比较合理。既然如此，那我们就按它说的做吧。
E: That makes more sense. In that case, let's do as it says.

C: 不过，我还是不太明白老巴拉金为什么要留下这么一套密码，就想着先和你会合，过后一起讨论……
E: However, I still don't quite understand why old Balakin left these passwords behind. So I thought I should meet up with you first and discuss it together.

C: 谁能想到——我刚一过桥，旋转栈桥居然自己转了起来，把我留在了另一边！
E: But who would have thought... The moment I crossed the gear bridge, it started rotating by itself, leaving me on the other side!

C: 我一猜你就会对这件事感兴趣。
E: I knew you'd be interested.

C: 妈妈！
E: Mom!

C: 墓碑上应该有墓志铭才对。
E: You ought to put an epitaph on the headstone.

C: 遇上困难了？
E: ...You ran into trouble?

C: 是你们啊，咻…我还以为是我的行踪暴露了呢。说话小声点，这地方可能到处都是眼线……
E: Oh, it's you... Phew, I thought I'd been discovered. Let's try not to make a commotion — you never know who's listening...

C: …这样一来，综合馆就再次焕发活力了。谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...Now the General Hall can return to its former glory. Thanks for your help, {NICKNAME}.

C: 谁不喜欢轻松赚钱的工作呢？
E: Who doesn't like easy money?

C: 原来你喜欢的是这点…啊，没什么，我觉得这是正常人该有的反应。
E: So that's what you like about it... *sigh* I guess most people probably think the same way.

C: 最近，在聚落的大家都会更频繁地露出笑容了…克拉拉觉得很幸福。
E: People in the settlement have been smiling a lot more these days... and that makes me happy too.

C: 呃…多谢您的祝福。
E: Uhh... Thanks for your well-wishes.

C: 抱歉，我现在还有诸多事务缠身，不便与你们同去。祝你们一切顺利，找到失窃的贵重展品。
E: My apologies, I have a lot of business to attend to at present — I won't be joining you. Good luck recovering the stolen items.

C: （桑博应该已经走远了…给佩拉发个消息吧。）
E: (Sampo's probably miles away already... I should send a message to Pela.)

C: 嗯…这房间倒是有些被人使用过的痕迹。应该不是你弄的吧？
E: Hmm... did you touch anything? This room has signs of activity.

C: 艾丽斯小姐…我记住了。稍后收拾停当了我就出发。
E: Miss Eris... Got it. Once I've settled everything, I'll be off.

C: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是「地火」的干部<color=#dbc291ff>希儿</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
E: Could you help us contact the cadre of the Wildfire, <color=#dbc291ff>Seele</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

C: 原来是娜塔莎小姐！好久不见。
E: It's Miss Natasha! Long time no see.

C: {NICKNAME}，你需要作为辅助评定人参与面试——有什么事还没办的话先去吧，我们会等你的。
E: {NICKNAME}, since you're the assistant assessor of the interview, we'll begin when you're ready.

C: 我恐怕没有太过宏大的目标…或许只是为了圆儿时的梦吧？再者，我想把这里的见闻带给那些尚无法回到上层区的孩子们——他们一定会喜欢的。
E: I'm afraid it's nothing lofty... Maybe I'm just fulfilling a childhood dream? Also, I want to retell what I see here to the kids who couldn't make it up to the Overworld — they would love to hear about it.

C: 如实回答虎克大人！
E: Answer Hook the Great's questions — truthfully!

C: 佩拉小姐认可克拉拉的能力，所以就叫克拉拉来做志愿导览员了……
E: Pela recognized my ability, so she suggested that I work as a volunteer guide here...

C: 你来了，{NICKNAME}。我们可以开始了吗？
E: And now you're back, {NICKNAME}. Can we begin the interview now?

C: 面试官您好，关于这个问题，我是这么想的……
E: Miss Pela, this is what I think about this issue...

C: 好了，面试就到这里吧。接下来公布面试结果……
E: Well, let's call it a day. I'll announce the result now...
Um...

C: 原来如此。没想到你最后还是做了这个决定…谢谢你，希儿。
E: I see. I'm surprised you have finally made up your mind... Thank you, Seele.

C: 佩拉居然敢命令大守护者？
E: How come Pela has the gall to boss the Supreme Guardian around?

C: 个人经历…「不好说」？虽然我大概能理解，但为什么会这么写？
E: "No Comment" on your personal experience? I do get what it means, but why?

C: 按照奥列格的说法，那是参加过七百年前保卫战争的机器人，拥有与人类接近的智能，统治着地下机械…
E: According to Oleg, he's a robot that took part in the War of Defense over seven hundred years ago. He possesses a near-human intelligence, and rules over all the machinery in the underground...

C: 被堵得严严实实的…怎么办？要把这辆矿车炸掉吗？
E: It's completely blocked by the mine cart... What do we do? Can we blow it up?

C: …想法倒是不错。继续找下个部件吧。
E: ...Well, it was a good idea. Let's look for the next part.

C: 没错。我和虎克来自北方的一个工业小镇，但那里已经被裂界侵蚀了。我们不得已才成了流浪者。
E: Yes. Hook and I were from a small industrial town up north, but that place became corroded by the Fragmentum, forcing us to leave, as vagrants.

C: 走吧，我们去当面问问那个人！
E: Come on, let's go accuse the culprit!

C: 这种商业模式就叫「小便宜一次占个够」，怎么样？
E: This business tactic is what I call a "bait and switch." Pretty clever, huh?

C: 虎克没事！老爹，你快看看这探测器还能用吗？
E: I'm fine! Daddy, can you see if your detector still works?

C: 老爹——
E: Daddy...

C: …千真万确，这就是我要找的那两件矿具。给，说好的——这张藏宝图你收好，按着上面的标记找就行了，绝对有意外惊喜！
E: ...They're indeed the real deal! These are exactly the two mining tools I'm looking for. Here you go —Be sure to take good care of the treasure map. Just follow the mark on it and you sure will find yourself a surprise!

C: 别废话了，赶紧拿来。
E: Stop jabbering! Hand it over!

C: …想说动你可真是太难了。就听你的吧，老弟。
E: ...There's no stopping you once you've made up your mind. Fine, we'll do it your way.

C: 啊！前、前面…我知道，刚才有个女、女孩子…跑出去了！
E: Oh, Civilians... Ah! I saw a girl run out from our defensive position just now!

C: 嗐，没事！你想说什么我都明白，真的！只是…我还需要些时间仔细想想。
E: *sigh* Don't worry about it. I get what you're trying to say, I do! It's just... I need some time.

C: 这附近的空气…唔…好冷……
E: The air... it's so cold...

C: 不知道啊……
E: I have no idea...

C: 我来了。
E: Here I am.

C: 先找找看，实在不行就按你在手册上说的——砍柴生火好啦。
E: We'll do our best. If we can't find one, we'll just do what your guide says and chop wood to make a fire.

C: 嘿咻，嘿咻……
嗯？怎么了？
E: Hm? What's up?

C: 它可能正在寻找袭击我们的机会…小心。
E: It might be looking for an opportunity to attack. Be careful!

C: 别害怕，虽然看上去不怎么美味——但只要尝试过一次，你肯定会爱上这种食物的。
E: Don't worry. It may not look tasty, but I guarantee you'll fall in love with it on the first bite.

C: 哪有什么添麻烦一说。虽然我确实不喜欢和人打交道，但这毕竟是和好朋友一起露营嘛。

C: 咳…也没有很开心啦，真的。

C: 哎？！对、对不起！

Mm...

C: 她遇上什么事了吗？

E: Please, you don't think I could do it? But still... fighting alongside you two was pretty fun.

C: 史瓦罗先生他…他是克拉拉的家人。我很小的时候就遇到了史瓦罗先生，是他把我带在身边养大，让我成为了他的家人。
E: Mr. Svarog, he... he's my family. I met Mr. Svarog when I was real little. He took me in and took care of me.

C: 难怪这些弹珠对他那么重要。
E: It's no wonder he values these marbles so much.

C: （适当的沉默）
E: (Brief silence)

C: 拿你没办法…
E: Argh, fine...

C: 算了算了，还是不打开了！
E: Okay forget it, let's not open it!

E: Julian, Alina, let's run back to the town! Training starts today!

C: 接收到用户请求，正在重新解析——
E: Request approved. Reanalyzing...

C: 裂界生物都进化到这种程度了？
E: Have Fragmentum creatures evolved to this level?

C: 分给了克拉拉一些。

E: Hey, don't worry. I'll help you.

E: Correct, only {RUBY_B#Svarog's Scavengers}prospectors{RUBY_E#} with the right certification can get in or out. These prospectors collect mechanical remnants from all over the underground, and then bring them to Svarog for him to repair.

C: 协议…启动。开始…扫描…校验。
E: Protocol initiating... Scanning... Verifying.

C: 欸？怎么又是我？很痛的好不好！
E: Huh? Me again? It hurts, y'know!

E: *sigh* ...Why is it always me...

C: 别烦恼了，我们去找克拉拉吧。
E: Don't trouble yourself about it. We need to find her.

C: 说到史瓦罗…
E: Speaking of Svarog...

C: …就更别想着说服那个大机器人啦。

C: 让他们和史瓦罗见上一面吧，看看计算结果会不会有什么不同。于你、于他而言，这么做都没有什么损失，不是吗？
E: Let them meet Svarog, and let's see if his calculation result is any different. For you, for him... there's no harm in trying, right?

C: 这是米尔斯海默博士生前的贴身机器卫士，据说是从大战期间一直留存下来的原型机。

E: What's Wildfire's plan?

E: Oh after Wildfire got involved in the maintenance of the vagrant camp, they saw there was a big resource distribution problem. People would rather keep a stockpile of useless objects than exchange them for useful resources.

C: 可惜拍卖不是一口价…
E: The bad news is you'll have to compete with other bidders...

E: Gertie's niece will be returning to Boulder Town in a few days. She asked me a while ago if there were any gifts suitable for children at the auction.

C: 四百五十冬城盾三次，成交！
E: <unbreak>450</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold!

C: 这件拍品原本为旧世界古代遗物的核心零部件，其特殊工艺在如今的时代早已失传，保存如此完整的探针简直就是稀世杰作！起拍价——四百冬城盾。
E: The item itself was once a key component of another Old World relic, and its one-of-a-kind craftsmanship has long since ceased to exist. This meticulously preserved probe is a rare work of art! The opening bid is <unbreak>400</unbreak> shield.

C: 生日聚会上有什么吃的？
E: What will there be to eat?

E: Jeez... I'm baffled. What a strange thief...

C: （帕斯卡应该还在断电维护中…过段时间再来看看吧。）
E: (Pascal should be under offline maintenance now... Come check him after some time.)

C: …就算只有我一个人，我也不会屈服……

E: (Uh-oh! His only escape is...)

C: 是啊，以貌取人，总是不好的…算了，不谈这些了。咱们走吧。

C: 作为赔罪，我为二位准备了茶点，请来品品这上好的鳞渊春！
E: Oh, I prepared refreshments for you. Please, you must try this excellent Whale-Tide Spring!

C: 而在这场失利战役的尾声，若不是帝弓司命示现降临，用倾天光矢摧毁了丰饶孽物的攻势，罗浮今日是否还能继续航行，也难说得很。
E: Had the Reignbow Arbiter not descended and destroyed the enemy's assault with their Sky-Shattering Lux Arrow, who's to say whether the Luofu would still be here today?

C: 有点可爱…
E: It's actually kind of cute...

C: 我大概也能猜到，妈妈过去经历的某些事，是一道永远无法愈合的伤疤。所以，在懂事之后，我就再也没有问出口。
E: In the end, I realized she probably experienced something that left a scar... a scar that never fully healed. I never asked her again.

C: 妈妈……

C: 这个叫梁沐的家伙真是个渣渣。他从来就没有把半夏放在心上，只是想利用她弄到长生药。难道说，半夏是一厢情愿地喜欢着他吗？

C: 如果拥有艾利欧那样的眼睛，这世界就不再是你我现在看见的样子；无数可能性交叠在一起，代表不同选择所引致的后果。而每一刻，无穷多的选择都不断收束成同一个点，成为现在，成为过去……
E: If we had Elio's eyes, the world would not appear as it does to you and I. There are myriad possibilities overlapping one another, representing the consequences of different choices. In every passing moment, an infinite number of choices converge on the same point and become the present, and then become the past...

C: 你真的把自己的想法隐藏得很好呢。
E: Haha, you're hiding your feelings well.

E: (I don't know if Kafka was telling the truth in the previous question, but one thing's certain: For this question, she'll have to answer according to the rules.)

C: 你是为了容纳星核而诞生的人造体，从诞生起，你的命运就是在黑塔空间站接收星核，我负责在那之前保护你，教你基本的常识、认知以及战斗技巧。
E: You are an artificial body created for the purpose of hosting a Stellaron. From the moment of your birth, it was your destiny to receive the Stellaron at Herta Space Station. Before that task was complete, I was responsible for protecting you, as well as teaching you general knowledge, common sense, and combat skills.

C: 如果你不在的话，{NICKNAME}。我和刃会在这时被那个小弟弟抓住，关入幽囚狱。

C: （摇头。）
E: (Shake head)

C: 恩公说笑了，这么大的货箱…就算是所有人一齐上都拿不下呢。
E: I'd like to see us try, haha... they're extremely heavy. Even with all of us, we wouldn't be able to move one.

C: 一路过来可真不容易，尾巴毛都蹭掉了不少。唉，我的漂亮尾巴……
E: *sigh* Finally. Look how many tail hairs I lost on the way. Oh, my beautiful tail...

C: …都说了我刚从「曜青」仙舟调过来嘛，确实没怎么来过这儿。
E: ...I told you, I was only just transferred here from the Yaoqing. I don't come here very often.

C: 有好多回忆啊…可它们在我脑袋里转呀转，怎么也抓不住……
E: So many memories are swirling inside my head... I can't get a grasp on any of them...

C: 初见他时，脑袋还高不过我的剑，却夸口要以百岁之身，学尽工造司万般匠艺。区区一只小狗，竟傲慢得和龙尊不相上下。
E: When I first met him, he wasn't even as tall as my sword... but he was boasting about mastering all the crafts of the Artisanship Commission by the time he was a hundred years old. Hehe, the little brat was no less arrogant than the high elder.

C: 她的脉象几近于无。按常理说来，这意味着她……
E: Her pulse is extremely faint... Normally, this would mean that she...

C: 你跟我来。我开个还魂正气散的方子给她。用上这几味药材固然不能祛除乱象…等等，我那么大个药箱到哪儿去了？
E: Come with me, I'll prescribe her some soul-returning vitality infusion. It won't cure her, but it'll... Wait... where did my big medicine box go?

C: 我打算回到列车。
E: I'm going to return to the Express.

C: 在艾利欧的剧本里，你暂时还有活着的必要。
E: Elio's script still requires you to stay alive... for now.

C: 在云骑军里我有不少投契的朋友。假以时日，我们也会这样四分五裂吗？
E: I have some close friends of my own in the Cloud Knights... Will we fall out the way you guys did?

C: 应星…还活着？
E: Yingxing is... still alive?

C: 时间消磨得差不多了，接下来，我们去丹鼎司吧。
E: We've idled too long. Let's head to the Alchemy Commission.

C: 这突如其来的攀比心…
E: This isn't a contest...

C: 将军……
E: General...

C: 但要是我胜了，你就要同我分享刃的行踪。如何？
E: But if I win, you have to share Blade's whereabouts with me. Fair enough?

C: 看来得往码头走一遭了。
E: Guess it's back to the docks again.

C: 从被他劫走的星槎找起，也许能有眉目……
E: If we start by investigating the starskiff he stole, maybe we can get a lead...

C: 「我用它们来驱动你脚下这艘千足之舟，用你们的身体作为武器来毁灭联盟！」
E: "Now I am using them to propel this fleet, using their organs to destroy their own alliance!"

C: 你们要干什么？
E: What are you up to?

C: 呃…我见识过你的手腕…可千万别失手真把我给打死了……
E: Oh, uh... I've seen your skills... Please don't mess up and actually kill me...

C: 真是好身手啊，刚才还生龙活虎的一个云骑，就这么被你撂倒了。
E: What magnificent skill! He was fierce, but no match for you.

C: 呃…收集？无妨、无妨，人无癖不可交嘛。
E: Side... hustle? Ahem, very well — these are hard times, I suppose.

C: 这很好。生命是奇迹和恩典，任何妄图弃绝这种奇迹和恩典的行为，都是可耻的背叛。
E: Good. Life is a miracle and a blessing. Any futile attempt to forsake it is a disgraceful betrayal.

C: 是谁养的盆栽失控了吗？
E: Did someone overfeed their houseplant or something?

C: 呵呵，仙舟真有趣，设计蓝图就这么露天呈放，没关系吗？
E: Hm, interesting practice... Do people on the Xianzhou have no problem leaving blueprints out in the open?

C: 这后面的路应该不会有警报啦。
E: It should be smooth sailing from here on.

C: 太卜大人，早哇，今天的工作还顺利吗？
E: Good morning! Is work going well today, master diviner?
...Ice?

C: 这破茶也太苦了吧！
E: This tea's too bitter!

C: 空间站工作证…
E: Your work permit for the space station...

C: 沉湎于回忆，会麻痹你对当下的感受，也会阻止你对未来的希望。
E: Dwelling on memories can numb your sense of the present, and inhibit future ambitions.

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 本座现在越来越确信，你的记忆遭到干涉了…只是不知道这干涉究竟从何而来……
E: I'm getting more and more evidence that your memories have suffered interference... but I don't know where from...

C: 既然你那么想知道自己的过往…那跟我来吧。
E: If you are truly set on learning about your past... then come with me.

C: 所以…是浮黎？和我的过去有关的星神是「记忆」的浮黎？
E: Glowswather... you mean Fuli the Remembrance? Are they the Aeon connected to my past?

C: 如果没别的事的话，我得赶紧组织人力检修一番…可恶，若是穷观阵有所损伤，我会心疼死的。
E: Mm... If you'll excuse me, I must organize an inspection of the Matrix... Ugh, fingers crossed there's no damage done.

C: 今天，我对你更有兴趣一些。
E: I'm more interested in you today.

C: 三月七学剑也许能一天就毕业。
E: With something like that, March 7th could graduate in just one day.

C: 她气势汹汹就往工造司里冲，我也不敢多问啊。
E: She was in a hurry, heading straight for the Artisanship Commission, and I didn't want to ask too many questions.

C: …你肯定心里在想，云璃这姑娘又冲动又蛮不讲理，对吧？
E: ...You probably think I'm being impulsive and unreasonable, right?

C: 有吗？我表现得很执着吗？…好吧，我确实是这样。
E: Oh, really? Do I come across that way?... Well, I guess I can't deny it.

C: 对啊，你竟然还是有自知之明。
E: So you are self-aware after all.

C: 我、我也不是一直这样啊，要不是那魔剑……
E: H—Hey! I'm not always like this! It's all because of that cursed sword...

C: 呃…既然要偷走，使团又为何要把剑归还给仙舟啊？
E: Hmm... in that case, why would they return it to the Xianzhou in the first place?

C: 我知道。
E: I know.

C: 从被锻成那日起，这柄剑就已坠入魔道。现在，把剑放在我面前，让我击碎它！
E: This sword has been cursed since the day it was forged. Place it in front of me, and let me destroy it!

C: 这个世界已经无药可救了，它被步离人的猎群感染了！
E: This world is hopeless! It's completely infested with packs of borisin!

C: 我们走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 啊，我是说这位骑士是谁……
E: Um, I mean, who is this knight...?

C: 无礼无礼…我才刚到这里有什么无礼的。真是的，天底下哪有像我这么懂礼貌的孙女啊？
E: Manners, manners... Come on, you won't find another granddaughter as polite and well-behaved as me!

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 美丽的女士，我一早就向您坦白了——我真的什么都不知道，只是帮朋友送封信而已。
E: Beautiful lady, I already confessed everything to you earlier on — I really didn't know a thing. I just helped a friend send a letter, that's all.

C: 让我猜猜——雅利洛-VI大灾将至了，对么？
E: Let me guess: A catastrophe is coming to Jarilo-VI, am I right?

C: 您弄错了，黑天鹅大人。遇害的分明是金槌家的家主，金槌花火大人啊！
E: You're wrong, Lady Black Swan. The victim is evidently none other than the matriarch of the Goldhammer Family: Miss Sparkle Goldhammer!

C: 有毛病啊！
E: This is nuts!

C: 且不论形象为何是星穹列车的列车长，这个玩偶也和案件有关吗？
E: Regardless of why it's designed like the conductor aboard the Astral Express, this doll — Is it connected to the case?

C: 谢谢，我没有其他问题了。
E: Thank you. I don't have any further questions.

C: …没错，正是如此！
E: ...That's right. That's the one!

C: 这一路走来，不时听人提起「玉兆」这个词。青雀小姐，玉兆是什么东西？
E: We've heard the term "jade abacus" a few times now. Would you mind explaining what it is, Miss Qingque?

C: 青雀，重启阵基的事情就拜托你了。
E: Qingque, restarting the base terminals will be your responsibility.

C: 因为随后的岁月里，同受药师恩赐的丰饶之民为了夺取神迹，屡次侵凌仙舟，大造杀孽。
E: In the eras that followed, other beings that had likewise received Yaoshi's blessings repeatedly attacked the Xianzhou in an attempt to take the sacred artifact as their own. Countless atrocities were committed as a result.

C: 然而，如今有人将星核带上了仙舟，并投入建木根底。想借此外力，使「建木」复生，达成不可告人的目的。
E: Someone brought a Stellaron into the Xianzhou and planted it among the roots of the Ambrosial Arbor. They wish to resurrect it and achieve their hidden goal through external aggression.

C: 我还打算再和其他人聊聊。
E: Um, I wanna chat with others as well.

C: 公输梁摆了个身段，眉毛一挑，似在暗示你们问下去。
E: Gongshu Liang strikes a pose and raises an eyebrow as if to say: "keep asking."

C: 各位，瞧见那缠着「造化洪炉」的根系了吗？它们都枯萎啦！
E: Look — the roots coiled around the Creation Furnace! They've withered!

C: 她下不来咯！嘿嘿嘿，下不来咯！
E: She's stuck, hehe! She can't get down!

C: 混账！这第四条哪来的！
E: Hey! Since when did we have a number four!?

C: 嚣张的小孩一边说着，一边冲上来打了你一拳。你岿然不动，他却因为反作用力摔倒了。
E: The arrogant kid runs up to you and punches you. You stand strong, unmoving, but the boy falls backward from the reaction force.

C: 如果它能加深你对「天缺者」境遇的了解，那也算是完成了自己的使命吧。
E: If it can deepen your understanding of our trials and tribulations, it will have fulfilled its purpose.

C: 况且，「入会试炼」的题目是，让您们想办法解决我们三人的食物链难题…这机械生物又怎么能解决我们的问题呢？
E: Besides, you two are required to solve the food chain issue among us to pass the newcomer trial... How can these mechanical creatures solve that problem?

C: 什么话，我们师徒二人只是在他们的要求下，帮助了他们，仅此而已。
E: What are you talking about? We just offered them help at their request. That's all.

C: 我哪有开心啊！我只是嘴角有些抽搐罢了。
E: Not at all! It's just that the corner of my mouth is twitching.

C: 禁地？绥园什么时候成你家开的了？
E: Restricted area? Since when were you in charge of Fyxestroll Garden?

C: 注意看，前来处理此事的不是地衡司和云骑，而是十王司的判官！
E: It wasn't the Realm-Keeping Commission or the Cloud Knights that came to deal with it. It was the judges from the Ten-Lords Commission!

C: 不过仔细想想，这和都市传说里的幽灵作祟也没区别嘛。「能量寄生物」什么的，听起来就像是某种病虫害一样…一点也不神秘、不恐怖了？
E: ...It all sounds more like an urban myth than a ghost story. "Energy parasite" sounds more cool than scary... don't you think?

C: 真拿你没办法。
E: What are we gonna do with you...

C: 我就把这当成是个请柬，暂时依附在你的身体里喽？
E: I'll take that as my invitation to inhabit you for a while...

C: 噢噢噢，你在抗拒我，好疼！好过瘾！真是个意志力强大的宿主。
E: Argh, resisting are we...? Impressive willpower! How painful, how delectable!

C: 还有，你的身体深处有什么东西？一颗太阳？它好烫！
E: And what is this at your core? A Sun? Agh! It burns!

C: 我会遵守承诺的。
E: I keep my promises.

C: 真的…五五开吗？
E: Evenly matched... Really?

C: 我们还没有找到桂乃芬小姐，不知道她到哪里去了……
E: We still haven't found Miss Guinaifen... I don't know where she went...

C: 明白了，等汝考虑清楚。
E: I understand. Take your time.

C: 藿藿，动身吧，这应该是最后的铜镜了。
E: Hurry, Huohuo. This should be the last mirror.

C: 事情的大致，我已经在医馆里听小桂子讲过了。方便的话，能麻烦你再给我讲讲吗？
E: Little Gui kinda gave me an outline of what happened in the apothecary... Can you tell me more?

C: 乔凡娜自顾自地处理着手上的工作，仿佛她不是第一次碰到这种情况。
E: Giovanna nonchalantly continues working on whatever she has on hand as if it isn't the first time she has encountered this problem.

C: 请原谅我不能对您透露太多有关「治疗」的细节，这是家族的规定。
E: Please forgive me for not being able to reveal too many details regarding the "treatment." It's a rule set by The Family.

C: （柯柯娜就在前面，得快点赶上她。）
E: (Cocona is up ahead. Gotta catch up to her.)

C: 去奢侈品店工作。
E: Work at the luxury goods store.

C: 嗯，您跟我来。
E: Yes, please follow me.

C: 唉？你别哭啊——都是我不好，我不该当着大家的面说这些的。
E: Huh? Oh don't cry... It's all my fault. I shouldn't have said all this in front of everyone.

C: （我从出生起就是一只囚鸟，我早该明白的…可是…可是……）
E: (I've been a caged bird since birth. I should've realized that... But... But...)

C: 柯柯娜，还记得你的歌吗？
E: Cocona, do you remember your song?

C: 我看到了…那朵玫瑰开了。
E: I can see it... That rose has bloomed.

C: 她冰冷的肌肤表面似乎长出了倒钩…火辣辣的痛感刺激着你的手掌。
E: The surface of her cold skin appears to have grown hooks... Sharp, searing pain pierces into your palm.

C: 你看到柯柯娜脸上的悲伤、孤寂和愤怒都在缓缓流失…取而代之的是一丝诧异。
E: You see the sadness on Cocona's face, her loneliness and rage slowly subsiding... Replaced by a sliver of puzzlement.

C: 我在匹诺康尼生活很久了，清楚有些事最好还是不要过问。
E: I've lived a long time in Penacony — I'm more than clear that some things are best left unasked.

C: 咦？莱斯利•迪恩？这个名字……
E: Huh? Lesley Dean? I know that name...

C: …这家伙是谁？
E: ...Who is this?

C: 也许那些人就是来唤醒你的。
E: Maybe they were here to wake you up?

C: 我…向您坦白，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}——我很害怕。我惧怕醒来后将要面对万分可怕的现实，也惧怕丢弃自己现在拥有的这簇意识。
E: I... I must confess to you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}... I am very scared. I am scared that I will be faced with a terrifying reality when I awaken. I am also afraid to lose the consciousness that I have now.

C: 真的有人会随身携带这么多自己的照片吗？你不由得在心里发问。莫非那位「银河之星」还是个自恋狂？
E: Would someone really carry this many pictures on their person? You can't help but ask yourself. Maybe this Cosmic Star is just self-obsessed?

C: 罗伯特…刚才那一瞬间，我和他的感官似乎被连接在了一起。
E: Robert... I feel like our senses were linked for a moment then...

C: 摁下电视机开关按钮的一瞬间，莱斯利•迪恩慵懒的嗓音戛然而止，余响散逸至周身的虚空之中。沉默笼罩了这片心灵空间，此时的静谧亦是一种聒噪。
E: The moment you press the switch on the television, Lesley Dean's soothing voice comes to a sudden stop and echoes into the void around you, before disappearing entirely. The silence that now covers this spiritual space suddenly feels like a deafening clamor.

C: 对于姬莲小姐来说，或许只有这种做法能让她清醒过来。她过去的人生中一定充斥着各种说教…她可能早就感到麻木了。
E: When it comes to Ms. Jillian, perhaps this was the only method to open her eyes. I am sure that many people have attempted to lecture her in the past... I imagine she's long since become numb to reason.

C: …芙洛拉！
E: ...Flora!

C: 您确认要雇佣罗莎为您的大副吗？
E: Do you wish to recruit Rosa as your first mate?

C: 很好，恭喜您招到心仪的大副！
E: Very good. Congrats on hiring your desired first mate!

C: 嗯哼，太合适了，完美契合。
E: Mm-hmm, excellent, a perfect fit.

C: 画像我已经替您准备好了…不过…具体要不要挂，还是要听从您的指示。
E: I've already prepared your portrait for you... but... whether it should be hung up is your decision.

C: 让客人们再等等…
E: Let them wait a little longer...

C: 它毫不费力地突破了你人体构造中的每一道关卡，并撬开了你自控力为0的嘴巴；最终，它化作了一滩七色彩虹状的呕吐物，摧毁了你精心布置的工作环境。
E: It effortlessly breaches every barrier within your body's construction, forcing open your mouth with no self-control. Eventually, it became a pool of rainbow-shaded vomit that completely ruins your meticulously arranged work environment.

C: 怎么样？现在有心情继续工作了吗…老板？
E: How about it? Still in the mood to keep working... boss?

C: 我又快速查了一下——
E: I ran another quick check...

C: 「高尚的事业」指的是？
E: What does "noble pursuit" mean?

C: 那个…我是、是来找之前入住的朋友的。请问您能帮忙吗？
E: So... I—I'm looking for a friend who once stayed here. Would you be able to help me out?

C: 嗯噢哦……
E: Uh-oh...

C: …不好意思，是我害得气氛有些沉重了。请别会错意，能在离开之前和你见上一面，说上几句话，我真的非常开心。
E: ...Sorry for being such a wet blanket here. Please don't get the wrong message — I'm truly happy to have this conversation with you before my departure.

C: 从来没听过这个星球的名字呢…但既然是由你亲自推荐的，那我一定要找时间去参观一趟。
E: I've never heard of the planet... Since it's your recommendation, I'll surely find time to make a trip there.

C: 你放弃了。
E: You give up.

C: 放一万个心吧，银枝兄弟！那家伙的名字和面相我都已经记住了。在星海的这一片混，被巡海游侠惦记上的人，就别想着能睡上安稳觉了！
E: Relax, Argenti! I've got his name and face locked in my memory. Anyone who's on the radar of a Galaxy Ranger can never sleep well at night as long as they are in this part of the starry skies!

C: 嘿嘿嘿，我们肯定会好好招待你的，新手……
E: Heehee, we'll make sure you have a great time, novice...

C: 确实值得称赞。
E: It really is commendable.

C: 倒也不必如此隆重…哎……
E: I don't think we need all this fuss... Ah...

C: 时间匆忙，我只买了一些老罗浮人都爱喝的饮料作为伴手礼。
E: I didn't have much time, so the only souvenir I managed to buy was the Luofu people's favorite drink.

C: 返程的路途中，本座大致卜算了一下事由经过，还得说幸好有你们，星穹列车的客人，罗浮仙舟又渡过了一劫。
E: I divined a rough idea of how things unfolded on my return journey and I must say: We are so fortunate to have you. Our guests from the Astral Express have saved the Xianzhou Luofu from disaster once more.

C: 我？
E: Me?

C: 这么重要的东西不备份？
E: Why didn't you make a copy of something so important?

C: 该怎么说好呢……
E: How to put this...

C: （{NICKNAME}，我们可不能让他这样消沉下去了呀。你也说点儿什么吧，我要开始感到愧疚了。）
E: ({NICKNAME}, we can't let him be depressed like this. Say something, or I'll start feeling guilty.)

C: …这多少有些触景生情、感同身受了，我们还是别听相声了。
E: ...Well, this hits too close to home and might trigger some emotions. Let's just skip this show for now.

C: 二十来年，对于短生种几乎四分之一的人生，但对于仙舟人来说还是太短了。公输师傅负责授徒都有几百年了，他的徒弟都开始带徒弟了。
E: Twenty odd years —Almost a quarter of a short-life species' existence, but on Xianzhou it's far too short. Master Gongshu took care of disciples for several hundred years, and his disciples have now taken on disciples of their own.

C: 我也没想到这么多。我只记得我们师徒俩，一人愿意教一人愿意学，回想起来这些年来尽是些快乐的回忆，只是时间实在是太快了。
E: I never put this much thought into it. I just remember that my master was willing to teach, and I was willing to learn. Looking back, all those years were filled with happy memories, but time passes so fast.

C: 哎，走吧。
E: *sigh* Fine, I'll come along.

C: 我想重新走一遍星槎制造的历程，我有预感在这里，我能重拾起「造物」的动力。
E: I want to go through the process of starskiff manufacturing again. I have a hunch that I can recreate the motivation to "create" once more.

C: 你看那边的培养舱，应该就是没有考虑到「息壤」的自生长的算法…想要完成师傅的设计，我也得注意一下星槎的生长规律。
E: Check out that incubator over there. Its designer must've miscalculated the self-growth algorithm of Fallow Earth... If I want to complete these designs, I need to focus on these growth patterns of starskiffs.

C: 嗯嗯，虽然我什么都没有做，却油然而生一种自豪的感觉了。
E: Mmm, even though we haven't done a thing, there's still this spontaneous sense of pride.

C: 你别担心，我现在浑身充满了动力，回去就要大干一场。
E: Don't worry. I'm filled with motivation now. Once I get back, I'll go all out.

C: 我就是个毫无天赋的白痴，日复一日混吃等死的蛀虫，宇宙中最没用的就是我脖子上那玩意，空空如也没有一丝灵感，还不如一个黑洞……
E: I'm an idiot with no talent and a worthless bug who achieves nothing in his life. That thing on my neck is the most worthless thing in the universe. It's empty inside, without a single idea. It's worse than a black hole...

C: 再努力一下，这是你师傅的梦想。
E: Try it again. This is your master's dream.

C: 刚才那个星槎确实不怎么样。
E: Honestly speaking, I think you can do better than that.

C: 怎么，你还不想见到我？
E: Why? Am I an eyesore to you?

C: 老师的手稿缺失了一部分，问题全是我擅自补上去的。莱恩老师的原稿肯定没有问题！
E: It must be my fault as I am the one who has completed the missing part of my master's manuscript. I'm sure there's no problem with the original version.

C: 这不是自我感动。
E: No.

C: 你正常点……
E: Ugh... How old are you again?

C: 不着急，那等你准备好了再来找我吧。
E: Take your time. Come back when you're ready.

C: …什么病？
E: What's that supposed to mean?

C: 噢，你说那个？没什么，一句口号而已，别放在心上。走吧，咱们赶紧先把「大奔」还给卡西迪。
E: Oh, that? Nothing, just a slogan — don't take it too seriously. Let's get Big Ben back to Cassidy.

C: 真不知道该怎么感谢你们，卢卡，希儿，还有…外来者{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}！这下我的生活终于能回归正轨了……
E: I don't know how I can ever thank you... Luka, Seele, and... {F#miss}{M#mister} outsider! My life can finally get back on track now...

C: 这就出发，跟我来！
E: Way ahead of you. Follow me!

C: …挑战？
E: ...Challenge?

C: 同意。
E: I agree.

C: 略知一二。请问有什么事吗？
E: We know a little bit about it. What do you need?

C: 你跑慢点，等我一下。
E: Slow down a bit. Wait for me.

C: 容我向诸位引介，这位是仙舟「朱明」的天将，烛渊将军，怀炎。
E: Allow me to introduce you to General Huaiyan. He's the Arbiter-General of the Xianzhou Zhuming, known as the Flaming Heart.

C: 猜疑的火一旦点燃，就很难被熄灭了。
E: Once the spark of suspicion is kindled, it proves hard to extinguish.

C: 如此想来，我听说这一次随朱明使节舰而来的还有一位丹士，据说会出任罗浮丹鼎司的新任司鼎。
E: By the way, I heard that an alchemist from the Zhuming diplomatic ship has arrived, and rumors say that she's to be the new Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission on the Luofu.

C: 说得不错，我当然希望事情能顺利解决，但眼下这不是被僵化的手续卡住了脖子吗？
E: Yeah, that's true. Of course, I want things to be resolved peacefully, but aren't we getting stuck in rigid formalities here?

C: 不过，既然我们无法判定它是否会造成危害，那就只有等它自己失去生物活性了。按照现有的判例，我想想……
E: Since we can't determine if your shipment is safe for the environment, I guess we'll have to wait for its biological activity to expire. Let me check the previous cases...

C: 你们这些仙舟人到底讲不讲道理啊？
E: Can I really reason with you Xianzhou people?

C: 等等！
E: Wait a second!

C: 今日在丹鼎司的胜负还没分出，云璃小姐既然有兴趣，不如代表朱明仙舟上台一战？
E: The outcome of our duel at the Alchemy Commission is still up in the air. Since you're interested, why don't you represent the Xianzhou Zhuming and challenge me in the ring?

C: 巨大的金属残骸横陈在地，但不知为何你很清楚它并未完全死去。它的外壳下仿生组织正在不断修复。
E: Large pieces of metal scraps are strewn all over the floor. You can't put your finger on it, but you're certain that this thing is still alive. Bionic tissues are relentlessly regenerating beneath their exoskeleton.

C: 你念叨什么呢？
E: What are you mumbling about?

C: 莫非我有机会打败两位师父？
E: Maybe I have a chance of defeating my masters?

C: 呸呸呸！
E: Bah!

C: 椒丘先生一谈起毒药就满脸兴奋，也不知道算是正大光明还是阴险卑鄙……
E: Seems like you get real excited when talking about poison. I can't tell if that's an honorable thing or sinister...

C: 每当遇见有人德不配剑，便难免手心痒痒，想要从他手里夺下武器。这不是…彦卿小弟要为这次演武仪典守擂嘛。我好心上场，以免宝剑所托非人。
E: So, whenever I come across someone unworthy of a sword, I can't help but want to take it away from them. Given that Yanqing is the Wardance ringmaster, I'm stepping up to challenge him, to ensure the precious sword doesn't fall into the hands of an unworthy master.

C: 唉？永狩原？呃…好，好的。姐姐带你去永狩原。
E: Huh? Ever-Hunt Plains? Uh... yeah, sure! Big sis will take you there.

C: Xuu haa…你应该让我——
E: Xuu haa... You should have let me...

C: 嘘，检修结束了，一切正常，我们该走了。
E: Shhh, the overhaul is done, and everything looks good. We should leave.

C: 我早就听明白了！
E: I knew that from the beginning!

C: 果然，这三个小东西一直咬着我们不放。
E: Looks like those brats were following us the whole time.

C: 两位将军，我的问话就到此为止了。
E: Generals, I am finished with my questioning.

C: 我们准备好了，有劳。
E: We're ready to go in.

C: 为什么不在幽囚狱外问话？
E: Why can't they record our testimony outside The Shackling Prison?

C: 前些日子冥差收到传唤，说是公司的运输船遭受了步离人袭击。随后一大群孽畜便被丢进了这里。
E: A few days ago, the spiritfarers received reports about an IPC transport ship that was attacked by borisin. Then, a bunch of those abominations were dumped into this place.

C: 我受命前来，将您从可憎的囚牢中释放。这是{RUBY_B#命运}Sain Jiyaa {RUBY_E#}注定如此。为此，我不得不服下魔药，披上{RUBY_B#狐人}贱畜{RUBY_E#}的{RUBY_B#形貌}皮{RUBY_E#}，用伪装来应对他们的虚伪。
E: I've been commanded to release you from this cursed prison. It is {RUBY_B#fate}Sain Jiyaa{RUBY_E#}'s will. That's why I had to take a magic pill, don the skin of {RUBY_B#foxian}a lowly beast{RUBY_E#}, and play along with their hypocrisy.

C: 一切如常？彦卿这家伙跑了个没影，说是打算为将军们分忧解难。这下可好，东道主的守擂剑士缺席，倒是怎么个一切如常啊？
E: As if nothing has happened? Yanqing said he'd assist the generals, and now he's nowhere to be found. With the host's ringmaster gone, how are we supposed to act like nothing has happened?

C: 爷爷，三月是景元将军请来观礼的客人！哪有让客人代表罗浮登台守擂的！这样岂不是让人耻笑罗浮仙舟无人了？
E: But Miss March is a guest invited by General Jing Yuan, Grandpa! How can an outsider represent the Luofu in the ring? It will make the Xianzhou Luofu a laughingstock.

C: 自从见了步离间谍，你就一直心神不宁，忙前走后水米不进。呼雷可不是瘪着肚子就能打赢的对手。
E: Ever since you encountered those borisin spies, you've been so busy that you've hardly eaten anything. You can't defeat Hoolay on an empty stomach.

C: 天击将军非但没有半句怨言，反而决定出手擒狼，以绝后患。如此滚热的心肠，于情于理，我想罗浮都必须给个交代——
E: Not only did the Merlin's Claw offer no reproach, she decided to go after Hoolay herself to prevent further calamity. I believe the Luofu owes her something in return for her fervent determination...

C: 机会？回到一蹶不振的孱弱猎群，受可笑的假先知摆布，成为被她攥在手里摇晃呐喊的大旗？她的计划充满了漏洞。她为你们准备的道路只有「逃跑」和「死亡」。
E: Perfect chance? To return to my weak and shattered pack, at the mercy of a ridiculous false prophet, and become a mere puppet in her clutches? Heh, her plan is full of flaws. The only paths she has prepared for you are escape and death.

C: 你是医士吗？给我包扎一下…我还想好好活着。
E: Are you a healer? Please bandage me up... I don't want to die.

C: 这些步离人伪装成了狐人的样子，拜托了，请立刻通报云骑。
E: These borisin are disguised as foxians. Please warn the Cloud Knights immediately.

C: 你是说迴星港里此刻就有步离人？
E: Are you suggesting that there are borisin here at Stargazer Navalia, right now?

C: 古怪的问题？
E: A peculiar issue?

C: 我是谁？我在哪？我在这儿做什么？
E: Who am I? Where am I? What am I doing here?

C: 压力好大，我感觉自己肚子隐隐作痛，要不…我还是退赛吧？
E: There's so much pressure, my stomach is really hurting. Maybe... I should just drop out of the contest?

C: 请沿着通道继续前进，会到达安检处，那里的工作人员会指引你们前往选手大厅的。
E: Please continue along this passageway. You will come to a security checkpoint, and the staff there will guide you to the contestants' hall.

C: 三月七，无敌的三月七！
E: March 7th, the invincible March 7th!

C: 让徒弟出人头地。
E: He wanted his disciple to have this opportunity.

C: 是！
E: Yes, general!

C: 如果她不提前喊一声，咱们几个怕是要跟这群狼崽子一起陪葬了。
E: If she hadn't given us a heads-up, we'd have all been wiped out with these little runts.

C: 我确实变慢了…
E: I may be slowing down...

C: 就像所有的步离人那样，就像青丘军里那些被送上战场一去不回的「死士」那样…就像{RUBY_B#我的前任}月御将军{RUBY_E#}那样。
E: Just like the borisin, just like the Verdant Knights that were sent to war never to return... Just like {RUBY_B#my predecessor}General Yueyu{RUBY_E#}.

C: 丹恒先生，我嗅到的香味应该就在这附近，麻烦你了。
E: Dan Heng, the scent I smell should be right around here. I could use your assistance.

C: 不必自责，你知道我更关心什么：在吞下「赤月」后，你的身体有什么变化吗？
E: Don't blame yourself. You know what I'm more concerned about. Has your body had any changes since you swallowed the Crimson Moon?

C: 需要帮助吗？
E: Do you need any help?

C: 是否见过一个耍酒疯的人？
E: Did you see someone in a drunken frenzy?

C: 唔…既然你陪侍在朕身边共同行善，还是应当赏赐你个封号。这样吧，从现在开始…朕册封你为——「灰骑士」。
E: Well... Since you've been accompanying me to perform good deeds, I shall reward you with a title. How about this, from now on... I'll knight you as the Gray Knight.

C: 这是什么怪话……
E: You're speaking strangely...

C: 蒂索克二世咬紧牙关、皱紧眉头，内心似乎正与一股暌违多年的愤怒久别重逢。
E: Tizocic II clenches her teeth and furrows her brows. She seems to be going through an internal turmoil with a fury that hasn't surfaced in years.

C: …你来得正好，灰骑士，朕正好有事要找你帮忙。
E: ...You've arrived just in time, Gray Knight. I need to ask you for a favor.

C: 哦？无名客…我理解你们的准则，但你不了解这件事的内情。
E: Oh? The Nameless... I know your creed, but you don't understand the ins and outs of this.

C: 出生在……
E: Born in...

C: 如果你准备好了，就请你帮朕找回记忆吧，灰骑士。人逃离不了自己的过去，无论是好是坏。
E: Once you're ready, please help me retrieve my memories, Gray Knight. We can never escape our own past, for better or worse.

C: 帕特特将军，哥哥待你不薄……
E: General Pattet, my older brother was nothing but generous to you...

C: 灰骑士，我想了一下，二姐不是母亲的亲生女儿，她们关系素来不睦。一旦二姐上位，太后一派的政治影响力会大打折扣。
E: Gray Knight, when I think about it, Second Sister isn't my mother's biological daughter, and they've never seen eye to eye. Once she ascends the throne, the authority of the Empress Dowager's clan will be greatly reduced.

C: 通往暴君之路，并不需要残暴的灵魂，只需要一颗软弱的心。
E: To walk a tyrant's path, one does not need a cruel soul, just a weak heart.

C: （但伊里潘说的也有道理…她变成了好人，但对死在她手下的人民而言…这有什么意义呢？）
E: (But Illifan has a point... Even though she has turned over a new leaf, does it even matter to those who died by her hand?)

C: …离查德威克博士远点。
E: ...Stay away from Dr. Chadwick.

C: …天才俱乐部。我终于想起来了——<color=#dbc291ff>我曾是「天才俱乐部」的一员</color>。
E: ...The Genius Society. I finally remember — <color=#dbc291ff>I was once a member of the Genius Society</color>.

C: 我觉得你不是坏人。
E: I don't think you're a bad guy.

C: 恐怕没有那个必要。
E: I don't think it's necessary.

C: …小心翼翼地，他从液体里捞起了一枚晶莹的泡泡。离开液体表面的一瞬间，泡泡开始缓慢上浮…直到于半空中悬停。
E: ...Gently, he scoops up a translucent bubble from the liquid. The moment the bubble leaves the surface of the liquid, it starts floating upward... until it is hovering in midair.

C: 当然，也有很多人认为这根本算不上「活着」。这取决于每个人的理念，信仰，或思辨方式。
E: For sure, many wouldn't think this counts as being alive. It depends on each person's beliefs, religion, and way of thinking.

C: 我可不想在这地方和你扯上一整天。我们下去吧。
E: I don't want to spend all day delving into this subject with you. Let's go down.

C: …第三十七次试爆实验，失败。
E: ...The <unbreak>37</unbreak>th detonation test, unsuccessful.

C: 螺丝咕姆。
E: Screwllum.

C: 说出来吧，查德威克。人类的生命转瞬即逝，很少有人能不带着遗憾迈过终点。你的人生并不幸福——但能够拥有此刻，至少代表它是完整的。
E: Say it, Chadwick. Life is fleeting, and many reach the end with regrets. I can't say your life is a happy one, but it is at least complete when this moment takes place.

C: 这样…就算完了？
E: Is this... over?

C: 我们先去「筑梦师们聚集的地方」看看吧，滴答！
E: Let's take a look at the place where Dreamweavers gather first, tick-tock!

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 关于逐梦年代…
E: About the Dreamchaser era...

C: 我还找到了一些过去的资料。
E: I've even found some information from the past.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 算了，玩偶也行，如果你在玩偶后面的话…请不要走，听我把这句话说完吧。
E: Never mind, a doll is fine. If you're behind the doll... Please stay and hear me out.

C: …懦夫。
E: ...Coward.

C: 很遗憾，立场限制了我能够提供的帮助。
E: A pity, my position limits the help I can offer.

C: 「看向这片梦境，然后告诉自己：你的努力从不会白费。总有一日，它们将连成星光，照亮某人的眼睛。」
E: "Look upon this vast Dreamscape and tell yourself that your endeavors are never in vain. One day, they shall be woven together into a celestial tapestry, casting radiant light into the depths of another's eyes."

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 我名叫苏克提瑞斯，全奥赫玛最无知的老头，也是最虔诚的求知者。
E: My name is Soctires, the most witless geezer in Okhema, and a most devoted seeker of knowledge.

C: 啥意思？外面全是荒原，还有疯王眷属，有去无回啊！我没疯到那种程度。
E: What'd you mean? It's a wasteland out there, and with the Mad King's Kin roaming about, there's no return from that! I'm not THAT desperate.

C: 在、在这里……
E: H—Here...

C: 送给一伙快饿死的外邦人。
E: To feed a group of dying outlanders.

C: 苹果？
E: Apple?

C: 是的，苹果是我最爱的食物。「每天一苹果，医生远离我」。
E: Yes, apples are my favorite food. "An apple a day keeps the doctor away."

C: 哦，你居然会随身携带苹果？这可是贤者的十大必备特质之一，你很上道嘛！
E: Oh, you actually have an apple on you? This is one of the ten essential idiosyncrasies among sages. You learn fast!

C: 真是一场激烈的辩论。接下来，请大家投票表决……
E: What an intense clash of words. Next, will everyone please vote on their decision...

C: 那…那是因为圣城一直以来都太过仁慈了。对付这种暴民，就该出重拳才对！
E: That... That is because the holy city has been far too magnanimous. An iron fist is required in quashing dissidents!

C: 给他一点小小的「毁灭」震撼。
E: Give him a little taste of Destruction.

C: 何况，即使是道德上的善恶也该分开看待。一个人做了善事，不意味着可以让恶行一并消失——这是我从匹诺康尼的二世皇帝身上学到的。
E: Also, even the good or evil in morality should be viewed separately. A person's good deeds do not erase their wrongdoings — this is something I learned from the second Emperor of Penacony.

C: 说来惭愧，我和吾师的宅邸确实收留了一些外邦人。数量不多，也就十个，远远不足以拯救所有需要帮助的人。
E: I'm ashamed to admit that my teacher and I have taken in a few outlanders in our homes. Not many, just ten. Far from the number of people who need help.

C: 我旁听了你的全部发言，贵客，也许你比我想象中更适应辩论场。
E: I heard your entire speech, honored guest. Perhaps you're more suited to be in the debate arena than I imagined.

C: 嗡嗡……
E: Groan...

C: 咦？难道这本来就是你的东西吗？
E: Huh? Are you saying this belongs to you?

C: 但如果你能搞来它的种子，我就去让智慧花园的老朋友种点，明年你就能买到了！
E: But if you can find some seeds, then I can ask my friend in the Garden of Wisdom to plant some. Then you can come and buy some next year!

C: 砰！
E: Crash!

C: 戍卫长，莫要调笑我。若无未归的英雄相救，我这摊池水早已沦入黑潮了。
E: Captain, do not mock me. If it were not for the soldier who is yet to return, this pool would have long since been engulfed by the black tide.

C: 为了得到崇高道德的赞许。
E: To receive the Praise of High Morals.

C: 帕里斯？你小子没死啊！还好我给你留了新的《金毯密传》——等会儿，你带了个什么过来！
E: Paris? You're alive! Thank heavens I saved the new Secret of the Golden Carpet here for you... Just a second, what is that you've brought with you!?

C: 戍卫长，泰坦眷属终归和我们凡人之躯有别。让她在这里放开手脚，岂不是在威胁城民的安全？
E: Captain, the bodies of Titankin and mortals are not the same. Is allowing her to frolic here freely not endangering the lives of the citizens?

C: 等等，既然她已经是我们的一员，那也应该遵守我们的法律。
E: Hold on. She is one of us now. She must obey our laws.

C: 姑娘，你怎么还再念叨着什么命运？若是命运的枷锁如此牢靠，你早就是悬锋城里的砂砾了。
E: Girl, how is it that you are still speaking of fate? If the chains of fate were truly unbreakable, you would have long since been reduced to gravel in Castrum Kremnos.

C: 人家哪里不可爱…不对，才不是小狗！
E: How am I not cute enough... Wait, I'm not a dog!

C: 但我要告诉你，你所留恋的那个人马上就会登上战场了。
E: Whatever the reason, I must tell you: That man that you cannot bear to part with is about to step onto the battlefield.

C: 是的，阿卡迪亚。以金丝为证，那是我的故国见证过的地方，我能帮你找到它……
E: That's right, Arcadia. With the golden thread as my witness, it is a land known to the people of my hometown. I can help you find it...

C: 但本能的咆哮在城外的战场上是那么刺耳，于是，你还是选择射出了纷争的箭矢——
E: But the roar of your instincts deafens you on the battlefield, so you still opt to fire the Arrow of Strife that you wield...

C: 而我也不必再做抉择，命运的路只剩一端——
E: Now, there are no more choices open for me. Only one path of fate remains...

C: 这里的通路被挡住了…不知道有没有其他泰坦的力量能帮一把「手」。
E: The passage here has been obstructed... I wonder if any other Titan's strength could lend a helping "hand."

C: 我无权干涉你的个人行为，你也不是第一个这样做的。
E: I have no authority to interfere with your actions, and you're not the first to do so.

C: 这世上存在一些记忆，它们过于混乱，甚至能反作用于窥探者的意识。不过，你的忆者朋友们还没来得及教会你这一点。
E: Some memories in this world are so chaotic that they can reversely devour the observer's consciousness. Unfortunately, your Memokeeper friends haven't yet taught you that fact.

C: 无法逃离的死亡。
E: Inescapable death.

C: 纺织？或者雕刻？可哪儿来的工具和材料？现实可不是母亲读的睡前故事。
E: Weaving? Or carving? But where will the tools and materials come from? Reality is not a bedtime story read by your mother.

C: 这是属于翁法罗斯的故事。
E: This is the story of Amphoreus.

C: 真有人能把太阳背在身上吗？我可不是好骗的小孩。
E: Can someone really carry the Sun on their back? I'm not some gullible kid you can fool.

C: （沉默）。
E: (keep silent)

C: 是哦，那待会儿见啦。
E: Yeah. See you in a bit then!

C: 黑塔已经从这台人偶中离线，任你如何招呼都没有反应。
E: Herta has gone offline from this puppet. No matter how you try to get her attention, there's no response.

C: 少女莞尔一笑。她预见到你会在这一刻迟疑、感慨或发问。
E: The young girl smiled faintly. She had foreseen that at this moment you would hesitate, sigh, or pose a question.

C: 但她毕竟是个仿生人，我不希望看到她误入歧途做出什么伤害人类的事。
E: But she is an android after all. I don't want to see her go astray and do anything harmful to human beings.

C: 已达成老师制定的学习目标与考试分数。
E: Learning objectives achieved. All examinations passed.

C: 啊？真的吗？还好还好啦。诶对啦，您吃了吗？然后呢？啊，抱歉，一不小心就进入「那种状态」了。
E: Ah? Really? It's been okay. Ah yes, have you eaten yet? And then? Ah, I'm sorry — I accidentally slipped back into that mode again.

C: 哇，为什么呀？
E: Wow, why?

C: 别急，已经安排科员人工配送了，绝对不会饿着谁的。
E: Don't worry. We've got people coming over with the food. No one will go hungry here.

C: 定位装置报废了。
E: The positioning device is broken.

C: 艾丝妲站长又买了一批机器人，星际和平家电公司的人就赶过来了。
E: Lead Researcher Asta bought a new batch of robots, and that's why the Interastral Peace Appliances folks came.

C: 你帮我打听打听，看看能否找到那个亲历者，然后…发现这则怪谈背后的真相！拜托啦！
E: Can you please ask around and see if you can find that witness, and then... discover the truth behind this ghost story? Please?

C: 啊啊啊啊！我不敢想，我不敢想了……
E: Aaah!!! I can't think! I don't dare to think anymore!

C: 呜呜伯迅速溜走了，但它发出的声音与那位科员的描述完全一致。
E: The Wubbaboo looks like it's gonna run away. And the sound it made was the same as that described by the researcher.

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 你有捡到过幸运签吗？
E: Have you ever picked up a fortune leaf?

C: …是又如何，不是又如何。年轻人还是要脚踏实地，别整天想着投机取巧。
E: ...So what if I did? And what if I didn't? Youngsters need to be grounded and stop thinking about taking shortcuts.

C: 乖乖，我就说你时尚触觉敏锐吧…这么冷门的颜色你都能秒懂。
E: Wow, I knew it. Your fashion instincts are sharp... You immediately understood those weird names.

C: 令人感动…
E: Touching...

C: 十分可疑…
E: Suspicious...

C: 这段时间，我也再努力回想一下，从头捋一遍…你沿着这条路一直走吧，然后往右…不对，是往左…不，也可能是那条路……
E: I'll also try my best to recall what happened right from the start... Walk along this way and turn right... No, turn left... Hold on, maybe it should be the other way...

C: 啊？哦，那个…稍息！哎呀，你怎么突然表现得这么客气，我都不习惯啦！
E: Huh? Oh, okay... At ease! Er, why are you so polite all of a sudden, I'm not used to this!

C: 唔，原来大人也会用那么幼稚的方法做决定啊……
E: Hmm, so grown-ups would also make decisions this childishly...

C: 快，{NICKNAME}！趁着斯薇塔姐姐刚走，我们赶紧过去看看剩下的那箱货物！
E: Quick, {NICKNAME}! Swetta just left, let's go check out the other box of goods!

C: 啊，没什么，别在意！既然餐具这么早就到了，饭店的环境翻新日程也该提前了，哈哈。
E: Oh, nothing! Since the tableware arrived so early, the renovation schedule of the hotel should also be put ahead, haha.

C: 向吉尔伯特展示禁区通行证。
E: Show Gilbert the restricted zone pass.

C: 你整理好思路了？开始吧，你来说，我来记……
E: Have you made up your mind? Let's get started, you speak, I will write it down...

C: 就来一束「球牡丹」吧。
E: Then I'll take a bouquet of Ball Peonies.

C: 老爸又来信了？他最近可真恋家。多谢你帮他捎信——可不能让你白跑一趟，我得准备些谢礼才行！
E: Another letter? He seems pretty homesick lately. Thanks for bringing it to me. Please, let me give you something for your trouble.

C: 哼哼，下一题。
E: Hehe, next question.

C: 第二题：前几天在莱姆士汀家偷车轮的坏人找到了……
E: Now, the second question. A few days earlier, the wheel thief at the Limesteins' was apprehended...

C: …啊？你在说什么？
E: Huh? What are you talking about?

C: 哎呀，是您——经过上次的会面，波瓦大臣对您赞赏有加，还评价您是贝洛伯格学术界冉冉升起的新星。
E: Oops, it's you. Minister Bova has been singing your praises since last time, calling you a rising star in the Belobog academic circle.

C: 您今天特地前来，是有什么事务需要教育部协助吗？
E: For what purpose have you come today? What task requires the support of the Ministry of Education?

C: 这样吧，请你再帮小女子一个忙…帮小女子去行政区的书摊问问，塔米拉小姐有没有什么特别喜欢的书籍……
E: Can you help me out with one more favor? Go to the bookstore over in the Administrative District and ask if Tamila has any favorite books...

C: 倒是没什么，就是想起来…你好像也是个歌手吧？
E: Nothing much. I just thought... you're a singer too, aren't you?

C: 「陛下、陛下~你应当遮蔽世间的明镜~连同平静的湖水~你需道出她的真名实姓~驱逐千面的妖妃~」
E: "Your Highness, Your Highness~! You must shield yourself from all mirrors of the world, even the serene lakes! You must ask for her true name and banish that duplicitous succubus!"

C: 嗯…此事让你了解也无妨，我就把它交给你吧。
E: Mmm... It doesn't hurt to let you know. I'll leave this to you.

C: 亚诺他…
E: About Amo...

C: 我的需求嘛…跟我去趟歌德宾馆就行。我请你喝下午茶，全部消费我来买单——怎么样，很划算吧？
E: As for my request... Just come with me to the Goethe Hotel and I'll treat you to afternoon tea — Does that sound like a good deal?

C: 真是个倔老头。
E: What a stubborn old man.

C: 我见过他们了，他们说…
E: I saw them. They said...

C: 总之，辛苦你了，这是你应得的报酬。
E: Either way, thank you for your hard work. Here are your well-deserved rewards.

C: 自然科学的理性不断提醒着你，这封信能回到「护珠人也找不到的荒岛」可能性为零。
E: The logic that lies behind science keeps reminding you that the chances of this letter reaching "an island that even the Pearlkeepers could not find" is zero.

C: 不对劲，你怎么连我刚刚说了好几次的东西都记不住？等等，「忘情茶」里我不过是放了些薄荷，怎么你反应这么强烈……
E: No, something is definitely wrong. You don't even remember what I just repeated several times. All I added to the tea was some peppermint, so why are you having this kind of reaction...?

C: …所以，我调的那杯茶，你喝完觉得如何？若是真的太难喝把你气跑了，我先给你赔个不是。
E: ...So, how did you feel about that cup of tea? I'm sincerely sorry if it was a bad tasting experience.

C: 一般来说，有着鸟类身体结构的动物更擅长在白昼行动——猫头鹰等个案除外。这副壁画的构图似乎是一个旁证，说明翁法罗斯人真的很久没有见过自然的黑夜与白昼。
E: Typically speaking, animals with avian anatomy are diurnal — apart from owls. This mural's composition appears to be supporting evidence that Amphoreans really have not seen the natural day and night cycles for a long time.

C: 但大多数时候，悬锋城的泰坦眷属们会主动寻找敌人。
E: But most of the time, The Titankins of Castrum Kremnos will actively seek out their enemies.

C: 本应悬浮于空中的辅助单元，如今已失去动力、坠回地面。
E: A support unit that's supposed to hover in midair has since run out of power, crashing to the ground.

C: ——看来你是不能在这里另开一间房了。
E: ...Looks like you won't be getting an extra room here.

C: 见多识广的开拓者很快便搞清了现况，很明显，该男子是来碰瓷的——无非是看你是个小年轻，长得又和善，便以为好欺负。
E: Any seasoned Trailblazer would have caught on to the situation quickly. It is obvious that this man is trying to scam you. He identified you as suitable prey as soon as he saw you were someone young with an allegedly kind face.

C: 你正陷入沉思，一只小奇美拉蹑手蹑脚地溜过，在躺椅上抖落几片翅膀上的水珠——连它都知道不该惊扰这片美景的安宁。
E: You sink into deep rumination, when a tiny chimera trots over and shakes itself, leaving dewdrops fallen from its wings onto the lounger — even it knows not to disrupt the serenity of this image.

C: 悠扬的旋律一路上升，浸染了浴场的每个角落——这种乐器周围的水流量越大，声音也越嘹亮，就像海潮。
E: The melodious tune rises up all the way, seeping into every corner of the baths. The more water flows around the instrument, the louder it grows — just like a tide.

C: 整理思绪
E: Collect your thoughts

C: 岂曰无衣，与子同袍。作为文明世界的坚实后盾，公司誓要对反物质军团采取进一步行动。本台将持续报道相关消息，愿捷讯频传。
E: Together, we stand united. As the firm pillar supporting civilized society, the IPC is committed to advancing operations against the Antimatter Legion. Stay tuned for ongoing coverage. We wish for good news ahead.

C: 奥赫玛的公民议会
E: The Citizens' Assembly of Okhema

C: 「噤声，公民，你要知道自己正步入何地。」
E: "Quiet, citizen, know where you stand."

C: …埃杜利亚，信仰瑟希斯的书之城……疯溃的泰坦眷属几乎把那个城邦翻了个底朝天，藏书也全都烧尽了。
E: ...Idilia. The city of books that worships Cerces... Those insane Titankin almost turned the city upside-down. All of their books were burned, too.

C: 是，欧利庞王、歌耳戈王后。
E: Very well, King Eurypon, Queen Gorgo.

C: 水池中的圆形台座表面似乎刻着某种符文，据说这是瑟希斯写下的终极问题。不过此刻，只有些许涟漪在诉说它的寂寞，瑟希斯留下的问题终究成了未解之谜。
E: The circular pedestal in the pool appears to bear some kind of runic inscriptions. Legend has it that these are the ultimate questions penned by Cerces. Yet now only ripples remain to tell of its solitude — the questions left by Cerces have ultimately become unsolved mysteries.

C: 原来在化作蝴蝶之前，它也曾是个喜欢独自散步的孤独夜游者。
E: Before becoming butterflies, it seems they too were a solitary nocturnal wanderer who enjoyed solitary strolls.

C: 所以，问题来了——你要把树种交给哪位学者呢？
E: Now, here's the question — who will you give the Seed to?

C: 下一位朋友，可以进来啦，欢迎来到昏光庭院~
E: You can come in now, my next friend. Welcome, to the Twilight Courtyard~

C: 您要我离开前线，去做逃兵…？！不，绝不。
E: You want me to leave the frontline and be a deserter...!? No, there is no way!

C: 难道这个世界只是一场无尽的轮回吗？冥冥之中是否真的有命运在操纵一切？不管真相如何，这趟开拓都已经有太多见闻了。
E: Is this world merely an endless cycle of rebirth? Is there truly a fate that guides all things? Whatever the truth may be, this journey has already revealed far more than expected.

C: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
E: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

C: 吼吼，听好了。众所周知，奥赫玛有许多可爱的生物，最受公民们欢迎的是哪种呢？
E: Roarrr, listen closely. It's well known that Okhema is home to many delightful creatures, but which one is the most beloved by the citizens?

C: 您好棒棒啊，贵客！现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Marvelous, esteemed guest! And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: o((-'ω´- )っ「一个人盘活了一整个厂，本豹钦佩不已欧！」)∋
E: o((-'ω´- )っ "You've single-handedly resurrected the whole factory. You have this seal's deepest respect!" )∋

C: o(((〒ω〒; )o「呜嗷，我今天才明白，碰碰大作战不只是蛮干的游戏，也是智慧的比拼。」)∋
E: o(((〒ω〒; )o "Argh... I learned today that you need both physical prowess and mental smarts for the Slammers." )∋

C: 需要培养观察力…
E: You need to become observant...

C: 其实不是我送的。
E: Actually, it wasn't me who sent them.

C: 其实这个木马通向好多地方。
E: Actually, this wooden horse leads to many places.

C: …顺带，我还是想捎带一些亮晶晶的装饰品，哈哈……
E: ...By the way, I'd like to take some shiny decorations with me, haha...

C: 哈，怎么，你害怕了？
E: Hah, what's wrong? You scared?

C: 你粗略地翻看了几张卷轴。数额巨大的欠条、太过晦涩的专著，以及你本不该着眼的日记……
E: You skim through a few scrolls. Massive debt notes, overly obscure treatises, and a personal diary you probably shouldn't be reading...

C: 呵，来的正是时候，借着你提供的记忆做指引，我从门径的尽头攫来了一批新奇玩意，全都堆在里面了，商店大更新！
E: Ha! Just in time. With the memories you've given me as my guide, I grabbed a fresh batch of curiosities from the end of the Passage. They're all in there and the shop's got a major restock!

C: 为保护刻法勒的火种，赛飞儿只身拖延着盗火行者。但那黑衣剑士最终还是回到了奥赫玛，这难道意味着……
E: To protect the Coreflame of Kephale, Cipher delayed the Flame Reaver alone. But that black-robed swordmaster eventually returned to Okhema. Does this mean...

C: 哎，你出戏太快。
E: Wow, way to kill the immersion.

C: 期待地闭上眼睛。
E: Close your eyes with anticipation.

C: 迷…难道是我宅家太久，魔法用不出来了？怎么会这样……
E: Mem... maybe I've been staying at home for so long that I can't even cast anymore? How could this happen...

C: 你在码头伫立，望见孤帆摇曳于遥远海平，水波粼粼，时间仿佛在此刻温柔停驻。
E: You stand at the dock, watching a lone sail sway on the distant horizon, the waves shimmering under the soft, frozen flow of time.

C: 只能说不愧是斯缇科西亚，就连飞天坛递都喝大了，估计泰坦来了也得喝上两杯才能走。
E: Only in Styxia would even the Flying Amphora be hammered. Even Titans would probably need at least a couple of drinks before leaving.

C: …适合煮还是烤呢？
E: But would they be better boiled... or grilled?

C: 我没办法现在回答。
E: I can't answer that right now.

C: 真想知道你的原理，然后造一台属于我的机械喀！
E: I wish to know how you work, and build a mech that belongs to me, crrk!

C: 一载如此，三千万世如是嗡。
E: As they did in this eon, and thirty million times over, buzz.

C: 没有。我对危险和敌意还算敏锐，但列车里没有这种感觉。
E: No. I have a heightened sense of hostility and danger, but I don't sense anything on the Express.

C: 那样的话，忆庭只好屏蔽他们的记忆了…别逼我这么做呀，我也是有苦衷的！
E: If that's the case, the Garden of Recollection will have to block out their memories... I really don't have a choice, please don't make me do that!

C: 奥列格人呢？
E: Where's Oleg?

C: 没、没问题，您慢慢来。前路艰险，可得做好万全准备再出发。
E: N—No problem, take your time. It's dangerous ahead. Make sure you're completely prepared before you set out.

C: 噢，你还惦记着这事呢？真是个热心肠啊，哈哈哈。
E: Oh, you're still thinking about that? What a kindhearted person, hahaha.

C: 别担心，我会出手。
E: Don't worry. I'll do it.

C: 带我去吧。
E: Lead the way.

C: 佩佩示意你触摸它背包的某处，你按下按钮——
E: Peppy indicates for you to touch somewhere on its backpack. You press a button...

C: 还是先回去复命吧。
E: Let's go back and report in first.

C: 当然，我们天下第一好！
E: Of course, we're the world's best!

C: （走吧！）
E: (Let's go!)

C: 「管家」啊，它总是自吹自擂， 说自己<color=#dbc291ff>「通过终端和阮•梅女士保持联系」</color>。
E: The butler's always tooting its own horn, saying that it <color=#dbc291ff>keeps in touch with Ruan Mei via the terminal</color>.

C: （…哎我的狗脑子转不过来了，还是去找「管家」吧。）
E: (...Brr, my puppy brain just can't seem to understand. Let's go and find the butler instead.)

C: 你调取了终端的使用记录，但最近的对外通讯记录却是空白一片。
E: You pull the terminal's usage logs, but the most recent extra-communication logs are empty.

C: （我们已经收集到足够的证据了，这下可以狠狠打「管家」的脸了。）
E: (We've collected enough evidence. Now we can go back and throw it in the butler's face.)

C: 因为这里太不可思议了，万一你遇见了什么危险，人家可怎么办呀……
E: This place is surreal, what if you run into trouble? I wouldn't know what to do...

C: 是吧？人家也好喜欢和{NICKNAME}一起看书，静悄悄地，仿佛时间停止了流动，特别让人安心。
E: Right? I love reading with you too, {NICKNAME}. Everything's so quiet, it's like time itself has stopped. It's so relaxing.

C: 嘻嘻，{NICKNAME}笑起来确实很好看，和人家一样。
E: Hehe, your smile really is lovely, {NICKNAME}, just like mine.

C: 我这样的…
E: Someone like me...

C: 好像太模糊了，不过…就听你的吧，陪她走完了最后一程，你才更了解小蝶嘛。
E: It's a bit vague, but... I'll trust you on this. After walking with her to the very end, you understand Cas much better.

C: 早安。
E: Good morning.

C: 我还不想结束今天。
E: I don't want to end this day yet.

C: 接收指令: 第<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>步，向左
E: Order Received: Step <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, Leftward

C: 等、等等！年轻人，这么厉害的大宝贝你怎么可能会忘记啊？
E: W—Wait! Kid, how could you forget such a powerful item?

C: 这岁阳武器经过多次折射，能量也没有衰减，要是用在斗舰编队上，肯定能大展神～威～嚯嚯哈哈哈哈！
E: This heliobus weapon has been refracted many times, and its energy has not been attenuated. If it is used in the battleship formation, it will definitely strengthen our power~ Hahaha!

C: 我还会再来的。
E: I'll come back next time then.

C: 请随我来。
E: Come with me.

C: 那得看我的心情。
E: That really depends on my mood.

C: 这是我准备给你的报酬，请{NICKNAME}一定要收下。
E: Here's the reward I've been meaning to give you. Go on, {NICKNAME}, take it.

C: 开始，开什么始？
E: Start? Start what?

C: 你以为侥幸赢了几盘棋，就有资格做我们「寻圈」的意见领袖？
E: Do you truly believe yourself qualified to lead the community just because you lucked out and won a few chess games?

C: 哈哈，这种事不可能发生。
E: Hah, that will never happen.

C: 但是雪衣判官说，只要把这个魔方放在路边，就能硬控逃犯半个小时，降低了幽囚狱的出逃成功率，是一个可以尝试的方案。
E: However, Judge Xueyi suggested that strategically placing this Hexanexus on the side of the road could temporarily incapacitate the fugitive for up to half an hour, significantly lowering the chances of successful escape from The Shackling Prison. It's certainly worth a try.

C: 我们的魔方都是经过灭菌杀毒处理过的，请不必担心。
E: Our Hexanexus are sterilized and treated with anti-virus, so please do not worry.

C: 我已经玩够了。
E: I'm done.

C: 嗯…有位织者童心未泯，喜欢扮演勇士的引导者。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>藏在房间角落</color>、等待着勇士打开宝箱呢，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... a weaver is young at heart, pretend-playing at being a warrior's guide. The golden thread brings tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>hiding in the corner of a room</color>, waiting for a brave adventurer to open the chest. Go look for it there.

C: 嗯…有位织者想要让世人品尝甜美。金丝带来消息，它正把自己伪装成一块喂食大地兽的红土，你可以在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽工坊</color>附近找到它。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes for all lives to experience a touch of sweetness. The golden thread brings tidings: They now disguise themselves as a piece of red clay that nourishes the dromas. You may find them near the <color=#dbc291ff>Dromas Workshop</color>.

C: 嗯…有位织者生性高洁，一意远离俗世污浊。金丝带来消息，它正躲在一座<color=#dbc291ff>高处的吊灯</color>上，若不借助神迹，怕是难以寻得它的踪迹。
E: Hmm... There is a noble-hearted weaver who is resolutely committed to avoiding the world's corruption. The golden thread brings tidings: They now hide on <color=#dbc291ff>a chandelier high above</color>. Without a miracle, it will be difficult to find them.

C: 奇怪……
E: This is odd...

C: 眼下这份预言还不完整，得把它的另一半找出来才行。
E: This prophecy is incomplete. We need to find its other half to uncover the full message.

C: 是啊，你已知晓火焰的真谛…啊，火焰，它还能燃烧多久呢喀？
E: Yes, you already know the essence of flame... Ah, flame, how long still will it burn, crrk?
Six warriors.

C: 这账本也值钱吗？
E: Is the accounting book valuable, too?

C: 桀桀桀，您倒是挺警觉的。不过这番世道，有谁不在说谎呢？刻法勒要是会说话，保不住也会撒下弥天大谎呢！
E: Hehehe, you're pretty alert, huh? But in this life we live, is there anyone that isn't lying? If Kephale could talk, they'd be the biggest swindler of all!

C: 声名鼎鼎的江洋大盗。
E: You're the infamous bandit hero.

C: 哈哈，我的盗窃生涯，比墨涅塔的金丝连起来还长；我偷过的东西，比艾格勒的眼睛更多。
E: Haha, my tales of thievery are even longer than Mnestia's golden thread... I've stolen more things than Aquila has eyes.

C: 一、一定是有人冒充吧？或者，也可能是当时我计策的一环…一定是这样的！
E: S—Someone must be impersonating me! Or perhaps, it could be one of the steps in my plan back then... That must be it!

C: 天哪，您不会是那种人吧？热衷于打听别人的过去，挑出些支离破碎的片段，然后自顾自地断言对方一生都在治愈创伤？
E: Gosh, you wouldn't be one of those types, would you? Obsessively digging into one's past, picking out its shattered fragments, and then presumptuously asserting that the other party has been healing their trauma for their whole life?

C: 「行窃只是取回本该属于自己的东西。」
E: "Theft is but retrieving what belonged to you in the first place."

C: 快交出宝箱！
E: Hand over the chest now!

C: 可所有人找来找去，楞是没找到富商剩下的一分利衡币。
E: Yet despite thorough searches, not even one Balance Coin of his wealth could be located.

C: 它还有分身的能力？
E: So it can create projections of itself?

C: 等等…你不是欧洛尼斯的祭司。可是这灰色的一头乱毛…这位{F#美丽的小姐}{M#潇洒的先生}，我们是不是在哪里见过？
E: Wait a second... you're not a priest of Oronyx. But that messy gray hair... Say, this {F#lovely miss}{M#dashing sir}, haven't we met before?

C: 虽然人们都说什么「大隐隐于市」…过于无敌还是难免让人空虚寂寞啊。
E: People always say "the greatest hides in plain sight"... but being too untouchable makes you feel lonely sometimes, you know?

C: 说实话，关于咱们到底能不能从这些挑战里发现某些古代不为人知的秘密…我和前辈的想法并不一样。
E: To be honest, I don't agree with the scholar on whether we can discover unknown secrets of the past from these challenges.

C: 很高兴认识你，来古士…
E: It's a pleasure to meet you, Lygus...

C: 在发现新的手段之前，我们的解密之旅恐怕要到此为止了。很遗憾没能帮助阁下解明「黄金替罪羊」背后的秘辛。
E: Until we discover new methods, it seems our journey of decryption has reached its end. I regret not being able to help you uncover the secrets behind the "Golden Scapegoat."

C: 也许我们翻译出的《黄金替罪羊的呓语》，就和那个毁灭树庭的剑士有关？意味着那个人的某种过去？
E: Maybe our translations of Golden Scapegoat's Mutterings are somehow connected to the swordmaster who destroyed the Grove? Could they reflect something from that person's past?

C: 认错人啦。
E: You must have mistaken me for someone else.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你是谁？
E: Who are you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?

C: 哗啦～可是这里连个需要钱的商人都没有…这些钱你留着吧，心里惦记着我就好。
E: *whoosh* But there's no merchant here who even needs money... Keep it for yourself, and just think of me fondly.

C: 奇怪，记得掌账祭司明明说它已经被「贼灵」偷走了啊……
E: That's odd... The accounting priest claimed it was stolen by the Spirithief.

C: 我也想赶紧逃跑…但找到它，就能让更多人免于痛苦。
E: I want to run, too... but if we find it, then we can save so many more lives.

C: 这玩意儿能保护些什么？
E: What can this thing even protect?

C: 好了，去帮助下一个人吧。
E: Alright. Let's find the next person who needs help.

C: 真是幽灵？！
E: Was that really a ghost!?

C: 朋友？
E: Friend?

C: 「斯蒂芬•劳艾德！小天才捅的篓子也比别人多，不错噢。」黑塔讥笑着，「我猜他是对碎星芳饵动了点手脚，这东西可以用来吸引宇宙中的古兽——没想到，现在吸引到了<color=#dbc291ff>无穷无尽的扑满</color>！」
E: "Stephen Lloyd! That little genius made more problems than other people. Not bad." Herta snickers. "I'm guessing he did something to the Shattered Star Bait. It can be used to attract cosmic Leviathans — But it ended up attracting <color=#dbc291ff>endless numbers of Trotters</color>!"

C: 哦，说来简单，就是模拟星神并向祂们发问。
E: Oh, in layman's terms, it will simulate the Aeons THEMSELVES. Then we can ask THEM questions.

C: 唉，克里珀没来，我也猜到了——选那个把护盾转化为伤害的祝福吧，咱们走快点。
E: Alas, Qlipoth didn't come. I guessed as much — Pick the Blessing that turns Shields into damage, and hurry onward.

C: 你的名字是——岚！
E: Your name is... Lan!
You —

C: 「这个混账又知道了，我得让螺丝咕姆再改改祂的数据…」
E: "This punk has figured it out again. I have to get Screwllum to edit THEIR data once more..."

C: 「嗯，嗯。」黑塔敷衍地应和，「作为游戏的管理员，我有权将你的祝福变得更强，甚至发生翻天覆地的变化——以一定的<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>作为代价，不然搜集那些碎片有什么用？现在就开始吧。」
E: "Mmm. Mmm." Herta replies flippantly. "As the game master, I can make your Blessings stronger, or even make earth-shattering changes to them — at the price of paying <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>. What's the point in collecting those otherwise? Now then, let's begin."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「问你个问题，伙计：假货什么时候能成为真的？」</color>——你仿佛看见（其实你看不见）声音冲你眨了眨眼睛——<color=#dbc291ff>「答案是你信以为真的时候！加油啊，天才们，你们差一点就唬过我了！没事，我会把一切都忘掉，等你来耍我！再见，*阿基维利*。」</color>
E: "A question for you, my friend. When can a fake become the real thing?" — You seem to see (but actually don't) them wink at you — "The answer is... When you believe it to be real! Come on, geniuses. You almost fooled me for a second there! It's okay. I'll forget everything and wait for you to trick me again! So long, Akivili."

C: 你甫一进入「模拟宇宙」，就听见黑塔抑制不住兴奋的声音：<color=#dbc291ff>「{NICKNAME}，」</color>你听得出她在努力佯装正常，<color=#dbc291ff>「目前的『模拟宇宙』你还适应吗？」</color>
E: You can hear Herta's excitement as soon as you enter the Simulated Universe: <color=#dbc291ff>"{NICKNAME}," </color>she asks, trying to play it cool, <color=#dbc291ff>"have you adapted to this version of the Simulated Universe yet?"</color>

C: 你听到什么了？很多声音涌入了你的脑海。
E: What can you hear? All kinds of sounds are surging into your brain.

C: 他向你讲述了一个秘密：他患上了一种怪病，记忆只有三天。领袖希望你能帮他记住一件事——一份关于蠹星的呓语，并将其传播至以后的每一个「三天」——你明白，这是你人生中最伟大的时刻：你将成为他的左膀，他的另一个大脑。
E: He discloses a secret: He is afflicted with a peculiar ailment that allows him to only retain memories of the most recent three days. The leader requests a favor of you: To document certain whispers about Lepismat and remind him of them every three days. At that moment, you realize that this will be the greatest moment of your life. You will become his right-hand man and serve as his second mind.

C: 他注视着你离开的背影，对你破口大骂！
E: He gazes at your back as you depart, and unleashes a torrent of furious curses!

C: 一声枪响！在这枪声中，你陡然看见了这位猎人的命运：他在永远放下猎枪前，最后一个击毙的是自己爱慕已久的女领袖——他们在举枪的那一刻互证了爱情的存在，并在开枪后永远失去了它。
E: Bang! In the roar of the gunshot, you see the sealed fate of the bounty hunter as well: He takes the life of the very woman he loves before setting down his hunting rifle for good. They share a fleeting moment of love before raising their guns, and the sweet moment is lost forever after the fateful gunshot.

C: 你告别了他…同时也带着他的爱去往悠悠远方。他留在原地…他的语言是一种古老的哭腔：没有人比他更知道，在一片片阙阙磷火的纷飞中，等待将比永生更加漫长。
E: You bid him farewell... and make for the distant stars with his love in tow. He stays where he is... His language is one of an ancient wail: No one knows better than him that, in a sea of wild embers, waiting takes far longer than immortality itself.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了求药使的祷告。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into a prayer from an Elixir Seeker.

C: 「『同谐』希佩的光辉如霓虹般令人崇尚，世人皆向往得到祂的庇佑。祂宣扬和谐一致的喜乐，将所有意志归于一尊。家族的颂歌传播于世间各个角落，祂对万物意志理解、支持与配合的包容难以想象，或许在此之上祂已走向凡人难以想象的维度。无限扩张的『同谐』着实令人憧憬，宇宙群星如碎钻环绕、装饰祂的身躯，文明在祂手中变成一抹捏住的彩虹。」
E: "The revered light of Xipe the Harmony shone like a rainbow, and the masses clamored in desire of THEIR blessing. THEY proclaimed harmonious joy, and united all wills as one. The Family's songs spread to all corners of the world, and THEIR understanding, support and synergy for the will of all creatures was beyond imagination. Or perhaps, THEY were already above all else on this front, ascending to a plane beyond mortal minds. The ever-expanding Harmony was truly desirous. Cosmic stars encircled THEM like crushed diamonds, adorning THEIR body, and civilization became a rainbow to be molded in THEIR palm."

C: 「是啊是啊，一个古老的家伙！」黑塔摊手，「就是不知何时有幸见到祂的真容。数据储存的终点要到了，可喜可贺。我总觉得我仍然忘记了什么——{NICKNAME}，我们漏了什么吗？」
E: "That's right, an ancient fellow!" Herta threw up her hands, "It's just that I don't know when I'll have the honor of seeing THEIR true face. The end of the data storage approaches — congratulations are in order, but I still feel like I've forgotten something... {NICKNAME}, have we left out anything?"

C: 在那漫天黄沙中，一袭长袍被风掀起，祂的身影依稀可见。你对祂依稀有着更多的一体感受，又或许只是虚妄…祂的<color=#dbc291ff>「开拓」</color>光芒贯彻在神陨的时刻——
E: In that vast desert, a robe is lifted by a sweeping wind, THEIR figure faintly visible. You have a vague sense of being one with THEM, or perhaps it is just your delusion... THEIR light of <color=#dbc291ff>Trailblaze</color> shines at the moment the divine fell...

C: 是战争！战争的预兆出现在意识中，占据了全部！你不能用*痛*来形容此刻的感受，因为现实远比这复杂、矛盾；但你也找不出任何客观准确的描述——因为这种奢求，对此刻将要被剧痛撕裂的身躯并不尊重。
E: War! The premonition of war appears before your consciousness, everything engulfing everything! Pain is nothing compared to what you are feeling, for reality is far more complicated, contradictory than this. Yet you fail to find an objective, precise description — that is a luxury for a body that is about to be excruciatingly eviscerated.

C: 接着，祂的气息化作*温度*扑到你脸上，你感到自己被封入*中性的忆泡*中——你准备好接收更多人的记忆，伸手去触碰——但你发现这里并非是「空」！你的四周挂满了「记忆」，不可捉摸的忆泡！通过触碰，很多声音掉进你的脑海……
E: And then, THEIR breath turns to warmth that pounces on your face. You can feel yourself sealed in a neutral Memory Bubble. You ready yourself to receive the memories of even more people, and extend your hand to touch them, but you realize that this place isn't space! You are surrounded by bobbing memories, uncatchable Memory Bubbles! Through touch, many voices fall inside your mind's stream...

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 「然后是机器人鲁珀特的诞生。它在日后成为了天才俱乐部#27……」斯蒂芬•劳艾德不安地抠了抠脸颊，「鲁珀特创造了『反有机方程』，边星贸易战争尚未平息，它就为宇宙带来了第二场战争。这是…第二个时刻。」
E: "What happened next was the birth of Rubert the robot, which then became the <unbreak>27</unbreak>th member of the Genius Society..." Stephen Lloyd scratches his face uneasily and continues. "Rubert came up with the Anti-Organic Equation and instigated the second war while the Borderstar Trade War was still ongoing. That is... the second moment."

C: 「『帝皇』鲁珀特，它认为有机生命的演算充满错谬、漏洞百出。无论能够繁荣几时，总是自发地使生命走向终结——这或许是它推导反有机方程的起点。」螺丝咕姆说，「推测：它因『反有机方程』被博识尊注视。」
E: "Rubert the emperor believed that the algorithm of organic lives was riddled with errors and loopholes. No matter how long their prosperous lives continued, they would inevitably bring their lives to an end — this was probably what inspired Rubert to derive the Anti-Organic Equation. My conjecture: Rubert received Nous's gaze for his Anti-Organic Equation," Screwllum comments.

C: 寰宇蝗灾后，公司经历重组，内部势力涌动，各自寻求新的发展方向。「装卸部」柯拉帕乌找到博识学会。此刻，你们正一同坐在会议室内商讨事宜。
E: Following the Swarm Disaster, the IPC underwent a reorganization. Internal forces actively sought new paths of development. Korapao from the Cargo Division visited the Intelligentsia Guild. As of now, you are in the middle of a discussion with him in a conference room.

C: 你的面前放着一口巨大的棺材。一位假面愚者背靠着它演讲，愚者声称自己名叫「安达吐尔•扎扎罗」，而棺材里也放着「安达吐尔•扎扎罗」。
E: There is a large coffin in front of you. A Masked Fool is leaning its back on it while giving a speech. The Fool introduces himself as Andatur Zazzalo, and the person lying inside the coffin bears the same name.

C: 幽静的空间结构里泛起些许信息的涟漪，比黑洞更锐利，比死亡更柔和，带着炸弹、笑声和巴蒂亚咖啡的味道。
E: The deathly silent space structure contains rippling waves of information, sharper than a black hole, softer than death, and carrying the scent of explosives, laughter, and Bathian coffee.

C: 自动发射。
E: Launch automatically.

C: 学者记录着你的言行，指挥你在狭小的实验室爬行。「F<unbreak>0078</unbreak>-<unbreak>127</unbreak>次思维适应实验，客体物种：犰狳，测试结果：智慧等级中下，能理解语言，档案已封存。」
E: The scholar records your words and actions, and instructs you to crawl around the cramped laboratory. "F<unbreak>0078</unbreak> — thought adaptation experiment no. <unbreak>127</unbreak>, target species: Armadillo. Test results: Intelligence level, average-low. Capable of understanding language. Files have been sealed."

C: 是文明。
E: Civilization.

C: 「不不不，我们是开放的、前卫的酒馆，我们拒绝刻板印象。为什么学者就必须拿着笔，而不能拿着酒杯或者星盘？」你手里的笔消失了，你变成了一个神神叨叨的卜者。
E: "No, no, no! We are an open-minded and progressive tavern. We do not believe in stereotypes. Why must a scholar be carrying a pen? Why can it not be a drink glass or a star chart?" The pen disappears from your hand and you transform into a babbling, eccentric diviner.

C: 教授离开学院，就像名贵花卉离开温室，很难在社会立足，更何况这位前教授还满嘴异端学说。
E: A professor leaving an academy is like a precious flower being uprooted from a greenhouse. It is hard enough for them to find footing in society, let alone when their teachings have been branded heretical doctrines.

C: 「我爸爸告诉我，我们的星球是盘子形状的，你走到大地的边缘就会掉下去。他还说，凡是说世界是圆的人，都是骗子。」
E: "My daddy told me that our planet is flat, and that if you go to the very edge, you will fall off. He also said that anyone who says the world is round is a liar."

C: 其二为<color=#dbc291ff>生命</color>，试图拼凑基因、把握脉搏，渴求找到最适宜智慧栖居的躯体。它的瞳仁由金属所造，翅膀由树木雕琢，胸膛有心脏跳动如雷。
E: The second, <color=#dbc291ff>Life</color>, attempting to piece together genes and grasp pulses, thirsting to find a body most suitable to house intelligence. Its pupils are forged from metal, its wings carved from trees, the heart in its chest beating like thunder.

C: 「如果能拿到所有的帝皇遗产，你会做什么？」
