E: "If you can obtain the entirety of the Emperor's legacy, what would you do?"

C: 早上好助理{F#女士}{M#先生}，你接入「权杖」，感受其内部简洁却震撼的机理构造。随即一道粗糙丑陋的编码程序干扰了你的全息同步——武装考古学派的施工组正在为引擎安装最后的隔热构件，你被巨大的信息流冲刷、吞没，不得不立刻断线。
E: Good morning, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Assistant. You connect to the Scepter, experiencing its internally simple yet remarkable mechanical structure. A string of shoddy, ugly code instantly disrupts your holo-sync — an Armed Archaeologists' construction team is installing the final thermal insulation component to the engine. You are swept away and engulfed in a surge of information, forcing you to immediately disconnect.

C: 她给了你们一个模型，坐标在星图上随时间高速移动，一时难以锚定。
E: She provided you with a model. The coordinates of the target move rapidly around the astral chart as time passes, making it hard to anchor.

C: 「感谢你…帕提维娅博士。你曾跨越时间留下问题，而我给出了解答。但当我面对问题时，你再度跨越时间给了我解答的灵感——即便我们从未谋面。」
E: "Thank you... Doctor Patavia. You crossed the boundaries of time to leave a question, then I solved it. But when I faced my own unsolvable question, you once again transcended time to inspire me to answer it... Though we never even met."

C: 「好在也不算一无所获。我们成功邀请了第五位天才加入模拟宇宙项目——她拒绝了。唉，知道这个答案就够了。」
E: "Luckily, it was not entirely in vain. We've successfully invited the fifth genius to collaborate on the Simulated Universe project — but she declined. *sigh* Knowing this answer is enough."

C: 波尔卡挥下手术刀，充斥寰宇的欢笑声，和压榨算力的强制干涉，使她的数据体濒临瓦解。无论是对她还是黑塔，这都将是最后一棋。
E: Polka swings the scalpel. The mad laughter resonating across the cosmos, along with the forced interference that squeezed at the computational power, causes her data model to teeter on the verge of collapse. For both her and Herta, this will be their final move.

C: 贪婪会招来厄运。
E: Greed will bring disaster.

C: 嗯？
E: Hm?

C: 你打开它的说明书「阿哈按照祂的样子制成的发泄玩偶——祂希望看到自己被暴揍的样子。揍得越凶他越开心，就会给您越多金币奖励！注：质量品控与阿哈本人无关。」
E: You open its manual, which reads, "This is a doll to vent extreme emotions on, made by Aha in THEIR own likeness. THEY wish to see THEMSELF beaten up. The worse the beating is, the happier THEY will get, and the more Gold Coins THEY will award you! Note: Aha is not involved in the quality control process."

C: 你眨了下眼，时间流逝了一天。你感到自己正一次又一次观看「虫皇」塔伊兹育罗斯睡在那里，你希望祂睁开眼看你。
E: A day passes when you blink once. You feel you are looking at the sleeping form of Tayzzyronth, the Imperator Insectorum, over and over, hoping that THEY will open THEIR eyes and look at you.

C: 很快，你的脑袋里开始出现声音……塔█伊兹█ ██育█罗█ █斯██……漫长的等待摧毁了你，你慌忙逃离。
E: Soon, a voice begins to ring in your head... Tay█zzy█ ██ro█n█ █th██... The long wait destroyed you, and you flee in a hurry.

C: 一位纯美骑士认为你身上仍有「麻烦」，因而帮你收走了一个咕咕钟。
E: One of the knights thinks there are still "problem" on you, so he helps you to take away a cuckoo clock.

C: 你跌跌撞撞地闯进一个熟悉的地方。你骤然抬头，看到她站在实验台前——她左手捧着绣面，右手拉起最后一根绣针上的线头，接着轻轻咬断它。
E: You stumble into a familiar place. You look up and find her standing before an experiment bench. Holding an embroidered cloth with her left hand, she pulls the thread on the last needle with her right hand before gently biting it off.

C: 你感到自己终于无法抵抗地变成了咕咕钟狂热粉丝…
E: You can feel yourself succumbing helplessly and turning into a cuckoo clock fanatic...

C: 你将一个自制的「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」徽章别在胸前，你认为这时应当向众人炫耀你的功绩了！
E: You pin a self-made level P<unbreak>-35</unbreak> badge on your chest, thinking it's time you show off your accomplishments to everyone!

C: 你的太空美虫蠕动着，它对着你的脸蛋「啪嗒」一口，向你表示了感谢。
E: Your space worm wriggles and spurts a mouthful of saliva at your face to show its gratitude to you.

C: 你路过一片布满巨型虫群的栖居地。一只巨型「永眠领主」正在腐殖化王座上沉睡。
E: You pass by a habitat filled by a massive Swarm. A giant Lord of Eternal Slumber is sleeping soundly on a putrefied throne.

C: 这位「永眠领主」双眼紧闭，它看上去沉浸在自己的梦境中。
E: The Lord of Eternal Slumber has both its eyes closed. It seems to be lost in its dreams.

C: 你不慎一脚踏入高科技流线的悬空矩阵中——你相信这是斯诺星最*新式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。
E: You accidentally step into a high-tech, streamlined suspended matrix — a trap you believe to be used only by the most cutting-edge hunter on the Planet Snowland.

C: 「随便你怎么用，只要不被机械警察抓到。」它咯咯地笑了。
E: "Use it any way you want. Just make sure you don't get caught by the mechacops," it giggles.

C: 苍猿惬意地翻了个身，自然的肌肉曲线勾勒出野性的轮廓，完美的弧度，就连博识学会的数学家看了也要流口水。
E: The ape leisurely rolls over, its natural muscle contours tracing an untamed silhouette with perfect curves that make even the Intelligentsia Guild mathematicians drool.

C: 下一个分镜，背叛者5号会打开她的炉心散热，你夺走她的义眼，那是意识寄居的本体。谁会把代码藏进一盘沉入海里的老电影？你感到自己正逐渐适应这片未知的海域。
E: In the upcoming scene, Traitor No. 5 will expose her Furnace Core to disperse the heat. You will take away her prosthetic eye, where her consciousness resides. Who would hide code within an old movie that sank into the ocean? You sense yourself gradually adapting to these unfamiliar waters.

C: 而战争的军团，仍怀揣着最后的荣耀，向着远方的奥赫玛进军。
E: Yet the legion of war, clinging to the last vestiges of its glory, still marches toward the distant Okhema.

C: 让我们回顾一场失去荣耀的战争，被悬锋人所不齿的历史。
E: Let us revisit a war that lost its glory, scorned by Kremnoans.

C: 可扎格列斯，它真的爱着我们吗？倘若有利可图，恐怕，就连翁法罗斯的覆灭，也不会耽误它的交易。
E: But does Zagreus truly hold any affection for us? If profitable, surely even the downfall of Amphoreus would not hinder their dealings.

C: 可千万要小心流离纷乱之神，即使在它已陨落的如今，诡计也无处不在。
E: Exercise extreme caution around The God of Displacement and Chaos. Now that even they have fallen, stratagems pervade everywhere.

C: 你可见过蝴蝶驻足在枝头？倾吐爱与美的恋歌。
E: Have you ever seen a Butterfly Perched On A Branch, pouring out a love song of beauty and affection?

C: 众神决定联手找回天平。吉奥里亚伸出手臂竖起高山，阻挡了扎格列斯的去路，艾格勒睁开百目照亮大地，让它无所遁形。
E: The gods united to reclaim the scales. Georios raised mountains with outstretched arms to block Zagreus' path, while Aquila unveiled a hundred eyes to illuminate the earth, leaving Zagreus nowhere to hide.

C: 吉奥里亚谨遵塔兰顿的教诲，它慢慢变得沉稳内敛，在年复一年的沉默中生长出厚厚的泥土与高耸的群山。
E: Georios followed Talanton's teachings diligently, slowly becoming steady and reserved. In the silence of the passing years, they grew thick layers of soil and towering mountains.

C: 「唯有如此，世界方得存续，而不被无限滋长的植物所掩埋。」
E: "This is the only way. This is how the world survives without being consumed by the endless growth of vegetation."

C: 如是往复，直到艾格勒只睁开一双眼睛之时，众生的声音才转为了赞美和欢呼。
E: And so this continued until Aquila left only a pair of eyes open, the voices of the people turned to praises and cheers.

C: 白昼让人充满活力。
E: Daytime energizes people.

C: 别下次了，就这次吧。
E: Don't worry about next time, think about this time.

C: 身份识别中，预计等待时间5秒。倒计时：5，4，3，2，1。识别成功，该用户符合具备体检资格。
E: Identity verification in progress, estimated waiting time 5 seconds. Countdown: 5, 4, 3, 2, 1. Verification successful, the user is eligible for medical examination.

C: 「我真的好喜欢你啊，佩佩，为了你我连磨牙饼干都买好了。」好像有哪里不对。
E: "I really like you, Peppy, I even bought some cookies for you to grind your teeth on." Something doesn't seem right.

C: 桌面上的电子屏显示着清晰的字符：「该会议室预约已满，请更换会议室」。
E: The display on the desktop clearly reads: "This conference room has been booked out. Please try another room."

C: 该踏上新的旅途了。在不远的将来，你坚信自己能找到所有问题的答案。
E: It's time to embark on a new journey. You are confident you'll find answers to all of your questions in the not-too-distant future.

C: 又见到你了…除了星神…我了解的知识并不多……
E: We meet again... I don't know much about anything apart from the Aeons...

C: 算了，不喝了。
E: Forget it. I won't drink it.

C: 机械臂可不能摸哦！
E: Don't touch the robot arm!

C: 你*轻蔑*地增大<unbreak>78</unbreak>区的电压，令电磁阀驱动快门喀地一响。随后，你调度电机，将机械臂扭向正确的角度：「让我这么回答你吧，先生。」你的振膜吱呀作响。
E: DISDAINFULLY, you increase the voltage in Area <unbreak>78</unbreak>, moving the shutter of the solenoid valve with a click. Then, you adjust the motor to move your mechanical arm to the correct angle. "Let me answer you this way, sir." Your diaphragm creaks.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 更向后一席者是克洛多梅尔，虽为次子却统辖最辽阔的星区。那是诸多无人敢于染指的死寂星球，在他治下却变得欣欣向荣。他是最精明的，你对他抱以厚望。
E: Next to Theuderic is Chlodomer, your second son but the ruler of the largest stellar space. Silent and barren planets where people feared to tread are transformed into flourishing places under his leadership. You have high hopes for him, as he is the most crafty among your children.

C: 「这就是事实，」救命，那令人恼火的干枯嘴唇又开始颤动了，「我们生活在一只巨大的哺乳动物体内，而我们所处的位置大致是它的肠道……」
E: "This is fact." Someone, anyone, please help! Those dry infuriating lips are trembling again. "We live within the body of an enormous mammal, located most likely in its intestines..."

C: 喝多了会出问题。
E: Drinking too much always causes problems.

C: 不干净的东西？
E: Ghostly goings-on?

C: 在用{RUBY_B#扎格列斯}两面窃贼{RUBY_E#}的脏手打招呼前，先洗洗手喀！
E: Could you please give your hands a wash before you offer a greeting using the filthy hand of {RUBY_B#Zagreus} — that two-faced thief{RUBY_E#}!

C: （这两个人好像对「冷面小青龙」的周边很感兴趣……）
E: (These two seem pretty interested in Cold Dragon Young's merch...)

C: 怎么，你也是自由搏击圈的？那你应该也对小青龙有所了解吧？
E: So? Are you also into mixed martial arts? Then you must know about Cold Dragon Young, right?

C: …你没事吧，{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}？
E: ...Going to be all right, {F#sister}{M#brother}?

C: 一个装着「幸运」，一个装着「不幸」。
E: One contains good luck, while the other contains bad luck.

C: 另外一个箱子里有什么？
E: What's inside the other chest?

C: …有缘再见。
E: ...Until we meet again.

C: 你只是一眨眼…那个神秘的女人就从眼前消失了。连一根发丝都没落下。
E: You blink and she's... gone. The mysterious woman has disappeared before your very eyes, vanishing without a trace.

C: 诱惑是魔鬼——今天你战胜了魔鬼。
E: Temptation is the devil, and you beat that devil today.

C: 打开大型宝箱
E: Open the large chest.

C: 茶水服务——不满意。
E: Tea: Unsatisfactory.

C: 对采光和窗景的评价：<color=#dbc291ff>不满意 / 一般 / 很满意</color>
E: Your rating for the lighting/view: <color=#dbc291ff>Unsatisfactory / Neutral / Very satisfied.</color>

C: 哦——回家咯！
E: Hey, time to go home!

C: 虎克老大，我投降了！
E: I give up, Boss Hook!

C: <size=36>回家睡大觉咯！</size>
E: <size=36>Go home and get some sleep!</size>

C: 那不行，得按规矩办事…
E: That's not going to cut it. I do things by the book...

C: 眼前这位居民以迅雷不及掩耳之势，将为数不少的信用点转让给了你。随后，这人便很快离开了现场，不知所踪。但你其实根本不是这个意思……
E: The resident in front of you swiftly hands over a hefty amount of credits, then bolts from the scene without a trace. That isn't what you mean at all...

C: 希露瓦大人…我的希露瓦大人……
E: Lady Serval... My Lady Serval...

C: …像我一样喜欢扒在机械屋窗户上近距离无死角全天候一睹希露瓦大人芳容的同好！
E: ...someone like me who enjoys climbing onto the workshop window to see Lady Serval's beautiful face up close all day long without any obstructions!

C: 你…你你你……
E: You... Y—You...

C: 奇怪…
E: Strange...

C: 知识的芬芳…
E: The sweet scent of knowledge...

C: 板条箱后面吧。
E: Behind the crates.

C: …荣誉队员。
E: ...Honorary member.

C: 成交。
E: Deal.

C: <unbreak>10000</unbreak>。
E: <unbreak>10,000</unbreak>.

C: …我理解，你再好好想想吧。不过也别考虑太久…我做生意可不喜欢拖泥带水。
E: ...I get that. Feel free to think about it, but not for too long. I don't like to drag things out in business.

C: 难以想象什么样的人会靠近它…难道是为了花蕊里的奖励吗喀？
E: Hard to imagine anyone approaching it... unless they're after the prize within, crrrk?

C: 你也是来赏景的吗？那可真是来对地方了喀——这里人迹罕至、视野绝佳，之前一直是我的秘密基地来着喀！
E: Oh, you came for the view too? You're in luck, crrk! This spot's perfect — great view, no crowds — it's been my secret hideout!

C: 人，向我倾诉你的忧愁和烦恼吧……
E: Human, pour your sorrows and troubles out to me...

C: 千钧一发——
E: Just in the nick of time...

C: 这你还能习惯？你简直是比我还消极。听鸟一句劝，千万不可以习惯。
E: Can one get accustomed to this? You're the more pessimistic one, if you ask me. Hear a bird out. You can never allow yourself to grow accustomed to this.

C: 我尽量帮忙。
E: I'll do my best.

C: 哎，有机生物真下头，所以说，有机生物还是不行。
E: Geez, organic life forms are so lowly. That's why you organics can't cut it.

C: 我不要再当一只无趣的机巧鸟，我想爱人，我也想被爱！我要很多很多的爱，懂吗！
E: I no longer wish to be a boring cycrane. I wish to love and be loved! I long for so much love. Do you understand!?

C: 别管画册了，快跑吧！
E: Forget the photo book. Run!

C: 马上就帮你修好。
E: I'll fix you up right now.

C: 抱歉…
E: I'm sorry...

C: 你不禁在想，也许它想要的并不是刁难，而是理解。
E: You cannot help but think that maybe what it wanted wasn't to stump you — but your acknowledgment.

C: 我曾经找不到正确地址时，也以为你们填的收货地址是准确的呀。
E: When I couldn't find an address, I used to think the ones you organics filled in were accurate too.

C: 也许这只机巧鸟没有在地图上标注的范围内……
E: Perhaps this cycrane went off the map...

C: 我们都是负责<unbreak>10</unbreak>个花盆，凭什么你就能多拿一些？
E: Both of us planted ten pots of flowers. Why should you get more?

C: 到达晨昏之眼最高处！家人们看看，远处美丽的彩虹桥，还有脚下金光闪闪的黄金池！
E: Reached the highest point of the Eye of Twilight! Look, everyone — the beautiful rainbow bridge in the distance, and the shimmering pool of gold below our feet!

C: 梦中的落地窗…
E: A dreamlike floor-to-ceiling window...

C: 也不管主人有没有邀请，每到一个地方，你们就会迫不及待地到处逛逛，恨不能踢开每个房间的门进去晃一圈。
E: Wherever you go, you just can't refrain from wandering about, kicking down doors to snoop around regardless of whether the host has invited you to or not.

C: 通过刚才的说明，想必选手们已是十分了解本次比赛的规则流程了！那么，接下来比赛即将进入「外交」环节……
E: With that detailed introduction, I trust everyone now clearly understands the rules and procedures of this contest! Right then, let's get cracking with the Diplomacy phase...

C: 但比赛还在继续！接下来你会怎么做？
E: But the competition's not over yet! What will you do next?

C: 你们准备得太周全了吧！
E: You all have really thought this through this to the smallest detail!

C: 行吧，有好消息的话，我会告诉你的。
E: Alright, I'll fill you in if there's any good news.

C: 我就知道你会这么说，你人真好。
E: I knew you would say that. You're such a nice person.

C: 搞了半天你只是个真路人啊，真没劲儿！亏我在这里等了这么久……
E: But it turns out you're really just a passerby. What a let-down! I waited for so long...

C: 我只是路过的。
E: I'm just passing by.

C: 那你见到他了吗？
E: Then have you seen him?

C: 画还挺像，有鼻子没眼的，两根指针更可谓神来之笔。
E: The picture is pretty accurate, with a nose but no eyes, and the two clock hands are almost masterfully drawn.

C: 要我说，在苜蓿草工作，绝对是我这辈子做过最蠢的事。
E: If you ask me, working as an Alfalfa is the stupidest thing I've ever done.

C: 我最近换了个好工作，很快就要永远离开这片梦境了。
E: I got a great new job recently. I'll soon be able to leave this Dreamscape forever.

C: 千愁万悲，都不如先喝上这里的一杯。
E: Why drown in sorrows when you can drown yourself with a good drink!

C: 总算能喝个痛快了。
E: Finally I can get a good drink in!

C: 你呆在这干嘛？
E: Stop zoning out!

C: 嗯…水杯…哪来着…
E: Mm... Where is the water cup...

C: 我刚来，跟着你混呗。
E: I just got here. I'll follow you.

C: 早做准备，你也该锻炼一下了。
E: Never hurts to prep early. You should start training.

C: 浪费不被塔兰顿提倡。
E: Talanton does not advocate waste.

C: 真不愧是黄金裔英雄们。
E: They're not called the Chrysos Heirs heroes for nothing.

C: 是我们的命运…
E: Our destiny...

C: 光辉灿烂的众神…
E: Splendid gods...

C: 为了救这个废物……
E: To save this deadweight...

C: 别让她的牺牲白费。
E: Don't let her sacrifice be in vain.

C: 哎，就知道你们忘了这事……
E: *sigh* I knew you'd forgotten about it...

C: 仙人快乐茶，绝对够快乐。
E: Immortal's Delight will make you happy.

C: 帕姆极为担忧地望着你，湿漉漉的小手戳了戳你的腰，又不放心地检查了你的四肢，发现没有什么大碍后这才松了口气。
E: Pom-Pom looks at you with extreme concern, poking you in the back with their clammy hand while nervously checking over your limbs. They let out a sigh of relief upon realizing nothing serious has happened.

C: 没关系，就让列车长亲自指点下你帕！
E: That's cool, and just let Pom-Pom give you some personal guidance!

C: 咳咳，总之…只要有足够的材料，通过这玩意，你就能在列车里得到充足的补给。
E: Ahem, anyway... As long as you've got the materials, you can get whatever supplies you need right here aboard the train.

C: …那个，{NICKNAME}乘客，帕姆想问你件事哦。
E: ...Hey, {NICKNAME}. Pom-Pom's got something to ask you.

C: 唔…感觉呼吸有点困难是怎么回事？衣服变得有点紧……
E: Oh... Pom-Pom feels like it's getting harder to breathe. How did Pom-Pom's clothes just get tighter...

C: 这就是我想的办法。
E: This is what I came up with.

C: 下一步是…加入胡萝卜？还是加入莓果？呜…难道前一步就搞错了？
E: The next step is... Adding the carrots? Or adding berries? Huh... Did I make a mistake on that last step?

C: 噢噢，那我多安排一些甜点。
E: Well, I'll arrange for more desserts then.

C: （强制帮帕姆切歌）
E: (Stop Pom-Pom from singing)

C: 呜，好帕，列车长也不是小心眼的人。
E: Uhm, fine. I'm not petty anyway.

C: 试试这个「舞动」配色！
E: Try the "Disco" colorway!

C: 这个我熟。
E: I'm familiar with this.

C: 算了，就算没有小机器人，帕姆也能搞的定！
E: Forget it. Pom-Pom can handle this even without those robots!

C: 「资源补给协议」…哦哦！艾丝妲站长之前和我说过！这点小事，明德肯定给你办妥，只要小友日后别忘了明德就好！
E: Resource supply agreement... Oh right! Lead Researcher Asta told me about it before! I'll get this trivial matter done for you, as long as you don't forget this favor in the future!

C: 等等，「资源补给协议」？哦，我想起来了，那个走特殊流程的啊。
E: Wait, resource supply agreement? Oh, I remember, the one that requires a special procedure.

C: 风险状态已经解除，正在前往目标地点。
E: Risk status has been reset. Heading to the target location.

C: 返航路线生成中…
E: Generating return route...

C: 喔，这不是{NICKNAME}教官么！让我看看时间……
E: Oh, if it isn't Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! Let me check the time...

C: 请收下你应得的陪练酬劳。如果想要再次参加演练，欢迎来铁卫禁区找我登记。
E: Please accept this sparring reward. If you want to participate in drills again, come register with me in the restricted zone.

C: 发现敌人！{NICKNAME}教官来了！
E: Enemy spotted! Drillmaster {NICKNAME} is here!

C: 哔——啵。找到齿轮栈桥的控制终端，打通前往禁区深处的道路。
E: Beep — boop. Find the terminal controlling the gear bridge to open the way into the depths of the restricted zone.

C: 大门没有回应，但「少校」嘹亮的全域广播传入了你的耳朵——
E: There's no response, but you hear the Major's loud region-wide broadcast...

C: 这么大的雪，我建议你每一步都谨慎行事，{NICKNAME}。<color=#dbc291ff>绕过巡逻的怪物，去把核心捡回来吧。</color>
E: In a snowstorm this bad, I advise you proceed carefully with every step, {NICKNAME}. <color=#dbc291ff>Kite around any patrolling monsters, and retrieve the core.</color>

C: 干得好，{NICKNAME}！干净利落，是你一贯的风格。
E: Well done, {NICKNAME}! Being straightforward has always been your style.

C: （这一拨裂界怪物应该都清理完了…回去跟奥列格汇报吧。）
E: (This group of monsters should be done for... Go back and report to Oleg.)

C: 这个关口就由我来把守。前方的扫荡工作就交给你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: I'll stay to guard this pass. I'll count on you to finish up the task, {NICKNAME}.

C: *电波滤音*对了，地衡司提前在海滩上放置了些饵食。如果「云吟术」的异象总是与食物有关的话，饵食附近会有所痕迹，能麻烦你去确认一下吗？
E: *electronic voice* By the way, the Realm-Keeping Commission has placed some bait on the beach. If the Cloudhymn Magic is really linked to food, you may find something near the bait. Could you go check it out?

C: *电波滤音*不必担心，你先去追其他的扑满吧。它确认安全之后会回来的，大概。
E: *electronic voice* Don't worry about it. Track down the other Trotters first. That Trotter will come back once it feels safe again... perhaps.

C: 不好意思，打错了。
E: Excuse me, I got the wrong number.

C: 好的，祝您度过愉快的一天。
E: All right, have a nice day.

C: 你好呀，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，要来玩猜拳吗？
E: Hi {F#miss}{M#mister}, here for rock-paper-scissors?

C: 那人…是我的姐姐。她已出门许久，却没有回到家中……
E: That person... is my elder sister. She has been out for a while and hasn't come home yet...

C: 您…终于丢下我了吗……
E: Have you... finally abandoned me...

C: 准备离开时，你在窗台下的阴影中发现了一只小巧的八音盒。
E: When you try to leave, you notice an exquisite music box by the shadow of the window sill.

C: 今天弟兄们就要让你知道，破坏禁区公物要付出什么代价！给我上！
E: We'll show you the price to pay for damaging public property in the restricted zone! Get 'em!

C: …咳，我第一次碰见道歉态度这么诚恳的家伙…看来你还算明辨是非。那这次…这次就…呃…放过你吧。
E: ...Ahem, you're the first one to apologize so sincerely. I guess I, uh... can let you go this time.

C: 你决定将它从墙上揭下。如果她喜欢，再把这通缉令贴回来也不迟。
E: You decide to peel it off the wall. If she likes it, you can stick it back up.

C: 你说吧。
E: Speak.

C: 你看向东方。那是一片广袤的内陆平原，被错综复杂的边境线划分成数十个区块。每个区块可能代表着一个城邦，甚至是一个国家。
E: You look to the east and see a vast inland plain that is partitioned into dozens of subdivisions by a labyrinthine web of borders. Each subdivision could be a city or even a whole country.

C: 西之西，无穷无尽的海洋。不知道这个世界的原住民用了多长时间才发现自己的家园是一颗球体。
E: The furthest west is an endless ocean. It's not known how long it took the inhabitants of this world to discover that their home is situated on a globe.

C: 在菲多拉支持的拳手挥出致胜一拳后，她看向我，并期待着我说些什么。
E: After the winning punch from the boxer Fidora is backing, she looks at me in anticipation of me saying something.

C: 也许是我自己的问题，但我真的不太能接受……
E: Perhaps it's just me, but I can't really take it...

C: 我得把这东西带去修一下，修不好就扔了，省得污人眼睛。
E: I have to take this thing in to get fixed, or throw it out otherwise — so as not to contaminate anyone else's vision.

C: 可你只不过是一名开拓客，是仙舟罗浮上无数来去匆匆的过客之一。你有自己必须走的路，而那位来信者亦如是。身为开拓客的你对此再清楚不过。
E: You're only a Trailblazer, one of the innumerable passers-by on the Xianzhou Luofu. You have your own path to take, and so does this correspondent. As a Trailblazer, this is something you know only too well.

C: 已重新接入物流网络，感谢您的及时搜索。
E: I've been reconnected to the courier net. Thank you for your timely discovery.

C: 夕葵大人？你怎么来了？
E: Lady Xikui? What brings you here?

C: 不过你看，这个铁盒里藏着你不知道的秘密，或许它还有潜在的价值。
E: But look here — this box contains mysterious, unknown secrets. Perhaps it's potentially worth something.

C: 第二排架子上卖掉了…
E: Second rack. Sold out, though...

C: 好的。货款已确认收到，请拿好你的货物～
E: Okay, payment received. Please take your item~

C: 我报警了。
E: I'm calling the cops.

C: 后来我们选择成立秘密组织，为的就是办好一件事情——
E: Later on, we set up this secret society in order to do one thing, and do it well—

C: 娱乐就是对宇宙资源的浪费、对普通人努力的亵渎！匹诺康尼这种地方，早该关停了！
E: Entertainment is a grand waste of the universe's resources, and disrespectful to the hard work of everyday people! Places like Penacony should've been shut down a long time ago!

C: 可离开的路无非就那么几条：要么成为公司员工，要么加入博识学会——后者的待遇比前者更高，竞争自然也激烈许多。
E: But the pathways out are few and far between: Either become an IPC worker or join the Intelligentsia Guild. As the latter's salary is higher, competition is naturally more intense.

C: 所以你加入了博识学会？
E: And so you joined the Intelligentsia Guild?

C: 人们总是试图用快乐填满生活，好让自己活得不那么难受，我也是其中之一。我原以为游戏能帮助我重拾快乐……
E: People always try to fill their lives with pleasure so they can live life more comfortably, and I am one of them. At first, I thought gaming could maybe help me regain my sense of joy...

C: 哼，当初我说什么来着——让你小心谨慎、让你不要和人聊了几回就迫不及待地倒贴上去，现在好了吧？
E: Hmph, what did I say at the start — be careful, don't be clingy after chatting with someone a few times. Are you okay now?

C: 那你怎么办？
E: What about you, then?

C: 我也对这个人感兴趣。
E: I'm interested in this person, too.

C: 噗嗤…不管往哪儿走，你都是在向前啊！
E: Pfft... No matter where you're heading, you're walking forward!

C: 来吧，与其在这儿纠结什么镜头问题，不如赶快动起来——脚下还有一方热土等着我们去建设！
E: Well, why don't you stop dwelling on the camera and get your hands dirty instead? The land beneath us is waiting to be developed!

C: 啊，有趣。看来有些人很想知道家族对他们工作成果的看法…但又碍于面子不想亲自询问。人之常情。
E: Ah, how amusing. It seems like some people are keen to know how The Family views their work but have too much pride to ask themselves. This is human nature.

C: 他平时好像确实很亢奋…
E: He seems excited all the time...

C: ——还要我一个个数过去吗？不好意思，没空！
E: ...Do you want me to list them all? I'm sorry, but I don't have time for that!

C: …警告一次！对我的发明放尊重点！
E: ...Consider yourself warned! Show some respect for my invention!

C: 只要稍微关注过一点新闻就应该知道，在现实世界里，放眼四海皆是围绕知识产权或者技术专利产生的纠纷。
E: If you've been keeping up with the news, you know there's always some drama over intellectual property or patents in the real world.

C: 哼哼…有了「长效专利捍卫一纸通」，我就等于变相掌控了大半个匹诺康尼！
E: Haha... With the Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier, I practically control the majority of Penacony!

C: 谁叫家族就爱剽窃我的点子呢？出来混迟早要交专利费的，哈哈哈哈！
E: The Family loves stealing my ideas, right? Hah, they'll have to pay me royalties in the end! Hahaha!

C: 凡事都要阻挠我，装什么清高！发明家想靠自己的专利挣钱有错吗？啊？！
E: Why does he keep trying to mess with me, acting all high and mighty!? What's the big deal if an inventor wants to cash in on their patents, huh?

C: 艾默里奇突然蹦了起来，捏紧的小拳头差点锤到你的膝盖——好险！
E: Emmrich jumps up with a jerk, his fist almost colliding with your knee! So close!

C: 我现在才知道，原来这一切在他眼里都不重要…我，做出的所有努力，都变成了他逃离我的原因。
E: Only now do I realize that none of those things mattered to him... Everything I've done became the reason he ran away from me.

C: 她现在有了新的理想。
E: She has a new dream now.

C: 我只想听最好的演出
E: I just want to enjoy the finest shows.

C: 谢谢您的支持，但是要将这首歌带上舞台，首先要说服那位顽固的经纪人，让她相信我的音乐不会把演出搞砸。
E: I appreciate your support, but before I bring this song to the stage, I must first convince my stubborn manager that my music will not blow the show.

C: 我已经在匹诺康尼当了这么久的歌星，怎么会不知道市场喜欢什么样的音乐呢？开口的瞬间，我就已经猜到了结果。
E: I've been a famous songstress in Penacony for a long time. How could I not know what kind of music the market prefers? The moment I opened my mouth, I already foresaw the outcome.

C: 不…我做不到，也不会去做。
E: No... I can't, and I won't do that.

C: 我并没有忘记初心，只是找到了自己真正想要的东西。
E: I haven't forgotten my true self. I've simply discovered my true passion.

C: 沉默地站了一会儿后，女人主动退回了安全地带。
E: The woman steps back to safety after standing in silence for a while.

C: 我受够了！在收到匹诺康尼的邀请后，我几乎立刻逃进了梦里，祈祷这地方能治好我的心魔。
E: I'd had enough! The moment I received an invitation from Penacony, I almost fled to the Dreamscape immediately, hoping that the place could free me from emotional distress.

C: 你看向四周，其他人都对这怪物熟视无睹——或许它有着和钟表小子类似的特性。
E: You look around and see that everyone else is oblivious to the monster. Perhaps it's only visible to some, just like Clockie.

C: 哟，我的朋友，来两瓶苏乐达？
E: Fancy some SoulGlad, my friend?

C: 我曾经是个漫画家，后来成为了制片人，还登上过艾普瑟隆的《星系艺术家》杂志——你可知道能被那本杂志报道的都是什么级别的人物？
E: I used to be a manga artist, and I'm now a producer. I was even featured in the Galactic Artists magazine of Epsilon before! Do you have any idea how big a deal that is?

C: 啊？哦…我知道了，你这是在对我用激将法，但我是不会上当的！
E: Huh? Oh... I see you're trying to provoke me, but I won't fall for it!

C: 说起来…你救了我，我理应报答你——
E: Come to think of it... you've saved my life. I should return the favor...

C: 设想一下：在这奇迹与罪恶并存的梦想之城，总有些霓虹灯也照不亮的角落；而你，我的朋友，将化身聚光灯下的超级英雄，只身对抗人们的噩梦——邪恶可怖的惊梦剧团！
E: Imagine this: In this city of dreams where miracles and crimes coexist, there are places so dark that not even the neon lights can reach. You, my friend, will be the superhero under the spotlight. All by yourself, you'll battle with the nightmares of the people — the evil and horrifying Dreamjolt Troupe!

C: 后来发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 某位天才？
E: A genius, perhaps?

C: 格-蕾的声线带上了一丝悦耳的欣喜——这对她的合成音来说难度不小。
E: Go-Ray's voice is tinged with content, a challenging feat for her synthetic voice.

C: 相比之下，我能成为这些人中的一员，简直是命运的馈赠啊！
E: In comparison, I'm so lucky to be a part of this place!

C: 你算老几？
E: So, how high up the totem pole are you?

C: 这里不是「白日梦」酒店，我也不是接待宾客的服务人员。
E: This isn't The Reverie Hotel, and I'm no front-of-house receptionist.

C: 麦考先生微微后仰，眼镜反射出的光芒又一次遮蔽了他的双眼。
E: Mr. McCoy tilted his head back slightly, as the glare from his glasses obscured his eyes once more.

C: 而为我们这些尸骨带来希望的，就是奥科萨娜女士。这位星系活动家通过基金会的影响力和财力，为我们提供了近乎免费的武装支持。
E: And who should bring hope to us corpses-to-be? Miss Oksana. Using her influence and finances at the foundation, this galactic activist provides us with armed support almost free of charge.

C: 这场海选本应成为她脚下通向至高无上的红毯，这场盛典本应成为她从此膺获神性光辉的舞台，可现在…可现在——
E: This audition round should have paved the way for her ascent towards the glamorous red carpet. This festival should have been the glorious stage where she attains divinity, but now... now...

C: 要是人人都像你一样，通过作弊来获胜，那些通过自己的努力进行比赛的选手又该怎么办？
E: If everyone cheated to get ahead like you, how is that fair to the contestants who poured both sweat and tears into their craft?

C: 自打我们认识起，他就一直催我毕业、找工作。除了这个，我再没听他吐出半句有用的话！
E: From the moment we met, he has nagged me about graduating and finding a job. Apart from these, I've not heard a single piece of useful advice that has come out of his mouth!

C: 我还想和你聊聊。
E: I want to continue chatting with you.

C: 垃圾倾泻而出，泼洒在你身后的地面上。倘若垃圾有眼睛，它们看你的眼神想必是幽怨且颤栗的。
E: The trash spills out onto the ground behind you, and if it were sentient, it would likely glare at you with a grudge and a shudder.

C: 外星人是指我吗？
E: By alien, do you mean me?

C: 好奇新书什么时候发售。
E: I wonder when her new book is coming out.

C: 算是吧，但不太对，因为那家伙压根没咀嚼，就直接把我吞到它肚子里了。
E: Pretty much. But also not quite right, because that bug didn't even bother to chew me up before swallowing me down its belly.

C: 不用枪，难不成一棵树一棵树去锯？
E: You think sawing them down one-by-one is better than just using a gun?

C: 履带。
E: Caterpillar tracks.

C: 几个木箱子凌乱地摆在这儿，看来它就是第三处废料点。
E: A few wooden boxes are piled carelessly on the floor. Looks like this is the third scrap point.

C: 怎么样，东西带来没有？
E: Well, did you bring me the items?

C: 但到底什么样的设计才能永不过时啾？这就去请教妃色夫人啾！
E: But what kind of design would never go out of fashion? I'll go ask Lady Vermilion right now, tweet!

C: 等等…都这个时间了，得回大树了啾！客人有空给我打电话啾！
E: Hang on... Look at the time. Gotta get back to the big tree, tweet! Please give me a phone call whenever you're free, tweet!

C: 这里的道路一会儿挂在墙上，一会儿挂在头顶，都给我整晕了啾！
E: The roads here are on the wall one moment, and over my head the next — so confusing, tweet!

C: 没想到居然有人能破解我的三重谜题，看来下次还得加大难度啾。
E: I never thought anyone would be able to answer my three riddles. Guess I'll have to up the difficulty next time, tweet.

C: 关于美梦小镇…
E: Tell me about Dreamville...

C: 你回头了！
E: You looked back!

C: 给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
E: Tell me the story of the origami birds...

C: 猫头鹰老师说，折纸小鸟代表了美梦小镇中所有美好的要素：自信、真诚、勇敢、善良——
E: Professor Owl said origami birds symbolize all the beautiful virtues of Dreamville: Confidence, sincerity, courage, kindness...

C: 我想！
E: Sure would!

C: 再见再见，我要去找下一处高峰了啾。
E: Farewell, goodbye! I'm off to find my next summit, tweet!

C: ——看似猫头鹰的外表，吐出来的却是折纸小鸟！
E: ...It looked like an owl, but it actually spat out an origami bird!

C: （摸摸小鸟头顶的羽毛）
E: (Stroke the feathers on its head)

C: 如果以后想和我一起拍电影，就去大树那边找我吧~
E: If you want to make a film with me sometime, come and find me at the Great Tree~

C: 幼小的折纸小鸟都被聚集在这里，小屋会为大家提供庇护，直到成为能够顶天立地的成熟小鸟啾~
E: Young origami birds gather here, and the hut grants them protection until they grow to become adult birdies that can walk the land and soar through the sky alone, tweet~

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 哼哼哼…来得正是时候！
E: Hmm... You're just in time!

C: 如果在钟表公园里附近见到别的小鸟，就把它们叫回大树这里吧！别担心，本公子绝不拖欠酬劳啾~
E: If you see other birds near Clock Garden, get them to return to the Great Tree! Don't worry. I won't skimp on the rewards either, tweet!

C: 厉害呀客人，已经带回来这么多帮手了啾~
E: Wonderful! You've brought back so many helpers already, tweet!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个性格跳脱的小帮手愿意为我做些<color=#dbc291ff>烟花特效</color>，不知道它有没有找到合适的特效道具呢？客人您也去帮帮它吧！
E: Hmm... That's right, there is one assistant that is a little out there that was willing to do some <color=#dbc291ff>firework special effects</color> for me. I wonder if they've found any suitable SFX props yet? Dear guest, please go and find them for me!

C: 以我拍场多年的经验，你信我，押它准没错啾。
E: With my years of experience behind the camera, you gotta trust me — you won't go wrong betting on it, tweet.

C: 别着急，朋友，「和那些吵吵嚷嚷的坏蛋不同，当哈努兄弟的朋友们心中浮现出『把坏蛋赶出小镇』时，他们的行动早就完成了啾。」
E: Don't panic, friend. "We're nothing like those baddies who scream and shout, because by the moment the words 'running the baddies out of town' come into the minds of Brother Hanu's friends, the deed is done, tweet."

C: 那是知更鸟吧？
E: Isn't that Robin?

C: 真是奇了怪了，不是说会有很多观众来美梦剧场吗？怎么只有我一个啾？
E: This is really strange, didn't they say there'd be a huge crowd coming to the Dreamgood Theater? Why am I the only one here, tweet?

C: 一个个都是笨蛋家伙，完全不听小鸟的劝，再打就要出人命了啾。
E: You're all doodoo-heads who don't listen to me. Someone's going to get offed at this rate, tweet.

C: 这垃圾袋归我了！
E: This trash bag is mine!

C: 心里有坏东西憋着可不好啾，会飞不起来的。
E: It's not good to keep negative thoughts in. You won't be able to fly.

C: 奖励是什么？
E: What's the prize?

C: 折纸大鸟也不行啾。
E: Not even origami big birds are allowed, tweet.

C: 沐浴聚光灯，我也会像大鸟一样金闪闪的啾。
E: Bathing under the spotlight... I will shine brightly like the big birds, tweet.

C: 好言相劝你不听，开具罚单你不交——看来今天必须得好好修理你一顿了！
E: You won't listen to reason and you won't pay a fine... Looks like I'll have to teach you a real good lesson today!

C: 小家伙瑟瑟发抖，确认过你并无恶意后，从这一堆古怪的「包围圈」里走了出来。
E: The little creation is trembling. Once you're confirmed as not a threat, it walks out from its weird little "barricade."

C: 有什么东西轻轻敲了敲你的脚后跟，你转过身望去，又是大自然的慷慨。
E: You feel something tapping on your heel. You turn around to see once more the generosity of nature.

C: 给{F#她}{M#他}吧。如果我没猜错，这应该是丹鼎司的资产，而{F#她}{M#他}在替丹鼎司跑腿。
E: Just give it to {F#her}{M#him}. If I'm not mistaken, this book belongs to the Alchemy Commission, and {F#she}{M#he} is working for them.

C: …可下一秒立刻就瞪直了双眼，全身抽搐、蜷缩成一团，然后口齿不清地喊了一句「别靠近我」之类的话…然后就…晕过去了……
E: ...But the next second, his eyes opened wide and his body twitched and curled into a ball. Then he slurred something like "Don't come closer!"... and then he passed out...

C: 那场逼真的车祸足以让你相信，《瘈狂之卷》能让人将记忆强行植入他人记忆之中，恐怕这本书里留下的都是危险的体验。
E: The immersive car accident makes you believe that the Manuscript of Delirium possesses the power to transplant foreign memories into others. Perhaps the book is full of experiences about being on the brink of death.

C: 我这也太倒霉了…
E: I'm jinxed...

C: 唉，不管那么多了！万一给了他吉签，他还是倒霉，那可不是咱俩的错啊！
E: All right, fine! Just don't blame me or yourself if we guarantee him a "Weal" stick but he still has bad luck!

C: 累了，什么也不想做。
E: I'm tired and don't want to do a thing.

C: 宫羽听到了未完成的古琴曲，也了解了琴师的遗愿。
E: Gongyu listens to the unfinished guqin piece and learns about the guqin master's final wish.

C: 怎么说话呢！现在的年轻人，真的都不喜欢传统戏曲了吗？
E: How could you say that! The youth of today, how could they fail to appreciate traditional opera?

C: 所以，能不能直接给你奖励呢？不行。你完成挑战，我给你奖励，这是仪式感。
E: So you ask, can I JUST give you the reward? No. Complete the challenge and I'll give you the reward: THAT is the rule.

C: 碰一碰它。
E: Poke it.

C: 唔…好强，果然还是我太弱小了吗……
E: Oof... You are too powerful. Am I really just no match for you...?

C: 管那么多干嘛？反正被撞的和拿钱的都不是我，我只是个看热闹的。
E: Why do you care? Anyway, I'm not the one who got hit or the one getting compensation. I'm just a guy here rubber-necking.

C: 抱歉…我不想牵扯进来。
E: Sorry... I don't want to be roped into this.

C: 形势很焦灼，不好说。
E: It's pretty intense, it's hard to call.

C: 您…愿意接纳我，允我伴在身边么？
E: Will... Will you accept me and allow me to remain by your side?

C: 我会帮你。
E: I will help you.

C: 若是听这小曲，心里头实在喜欢，不妨留点打赏，小女子也好唱得更卖力些。
E: If this song of mine brings you joy, perhaps you could leave a small tip and I will put even more heart into my performance.

C: 当然啊。哼哼…看您的样子，怕不是入戏太深，真的动了感情？
E: Of course. Hohoho... Look at you. You were so into the act... Did you develop some real feelings?

C: 但你还能为可怜的取款机先生做些什么呢？
E: What else can you do for Mr. ATM?

C: …为什么？这算哪门子问题，伙计？
E: ...Why? What sort of question is that, buddy?

C: …哇，真的吗？那我可太期待了，亲爱的！
E: ...Wow, really? I can't wait, darling!

C: 都这种时候了，你能不能别说这种丧气话啊！
E: Can you stop being such a negative Nancy!?

C: 酒瓶被一把抢了过去。
E: The bottle was immediately snatched from your hands.

C: 可能是错觉吧。
E: Maybe it's just your imagination.

C: 若非地面上散布的新鲜梦泡，我几乎要认为，凶手是在其他地点实施作案，然后用载具把尸体抛弃到了这里。
E: If it weren't for the fresh dream bubbles scattered across the ground, I'd almost think that the culprit committed the act somewhere else, and then used a vehicle to abandon the body here.

C: 你无从得知它为何会横尸街头…也许它找到了磁带凶杀案的真凶，结果惨遭灭口？
E: You have no way of knowing why they are now here, lying dead on the roadside... Perhaps they discovered the culprit behind the cassette murder case and were brutally silenced?

C: 维里塔斯•拉帝奥教授？这位可不是说合影就合影的男人…但不妨试试看。
E: Professor Veritas Ratio? He's not the kind of person that will just take a group picture when asked... But why not give it a try?

C: 就是说…能不能给咱换个好看点的立牌？
E: I mean... Can we swap this for a prettier photo board?

C: 又见面了，老师！别担心，我这次远行有将军特许…只要晚上训练前能回到罗浮便是。
E: We meet again, teacher! Fear not, I have special permission from the general for this trip... I just have to be back to the Luofu in time for evening training.

C: 姬子…
E: Himeko...

C: 能办月卡吗？
E: Can I buy a monthly subscription?

C: 识相的{F#小妞}{M#小子}，期待你的下次光临。
E: We look forward to your next visit, smart {F#girl}{M#boy}.

C: 你说，现在的流梦礁，真的还有药可救吗？
E: Do you think there's anythin' we can do to save Dreamflux Reef now?

C: 尽管来吧，正面骂我！
E: Bring it on. Insult me to my face!

C: 我们在哪里见过么？
E: Have we met somewhere before?

C: 还有…这些红色的污渍。他果然……
E: And... this red residue. So he really...

C: 岂止是困难啊，简直比成功偷渡进匹诺康尼的概率还要低！
E: Hard to buy? Why, you'd probably have a better chance of smuggling yourself into Penacony!

C: 要价多少？可以刀吗？
E: How much? Can you cut us a deal?

C: 「那些未完成的画，仍在流淌的歌」
E: "Those unfinished paintings and the songs that are still playing."

C: 哇老板就是老板！你真是我见过最好的老板！来来来你想听哪首随便选——
E: Woah! That's why you're the boss! You're the best boss I've ever worked for! Come come, what'd you wanna listen to? Pick anyone!

C: 把玩硬币，尝试提升幸运值。
E: Play with the coin and try to increase your luck value.

C: 看看还能找到什么好东西。
E: Search the package for more goodies.

C: 你还是先缓缓吧。
E: Slow down and catch your breath first.

C: 不过，这里可是匹诺康尼…或许是家族那边的某种独门技艺吧。
E: But this is Penacony. It could be a technique unique to The Family.

C: 你再三思索，基于保护隐私的理念，你不想在同伴面前暴露你的个人生活，你决定还是为自己留几分体面吧。
E: You think it over and decide for the sake of your own privacy not to expose your personal life to your companions. You decide to maintain some sense of dignity for yourself.

C: 而你，刚来的，就叫做「嫌疑人乙」。
E: And you who have just arrived, Suspect B.

C: 很好，现在我会允许你们互相向对方提出一个问题，对方也必须回答一个问题。鉴于这里已经有一个人正在说谎，我也不指望你们都诚实回答。
E: Very well. You're now both granted the opportunity to pose a question to each other, and the respondent must provide an answer. Given that one of you is already lying, I will not expect honest responses to all the questions.

C: 闭嘴，嫌疑人乙！只能用作弊的手段，也敢自称星穹列车的无名客吗？
E: Shut up, Suspect B! How dare you call yourself the Nameless on Astral Express when all you can do is cheat?

C: 早就不看了，看字太累。
E: I haven't read them for a long time. Words put me to sleep.

C: 应该是策划忘记投放了。
E: The designers forgot to put it in that game.

C: 在下行商在外，无依无靠，自然明白您也需要广结善缘。
E: I am a traveling merchant with no shoulder to lean on in the outer worlds. It is natural that one also needs to forge amicable relationships.

C: 说明缘由，司狱会帮你的。
E: State your reasons and the Jailer will help you.

C: 我们再试一遍吧。
E: Let's try this again.

C: 屁！要我说，那老头子就是爱看放炮的大场面——
E: Nonsense! If you ask me, that old geezer just likes watching explosions...

C: 你一边走在舰船边缘，一边欣赏礼炮的轰鸣，不知不觉间，已然回到来处。
E: You walk along the border of the ship as you admire the booming salute. Before you know it, you find yourself back where you came from.

C: 我曾经相信他们肯定能发现！
E: I used to be certain that they'd notice!

C: 哼，没想到会让我出战…可怜的劫匪，你要遭重了！我力能单手托起星槎，身形可变大变小。区区劫匪，不过蝼蚁！
E: Humph, I did not expect you to send me into the contest... Foolish kidnapper, you're in for it now! I can lift a starskiff with a single hand and make myself bigger or smaller as I please. I'll crush you like an ant, kidnapper!

C: 那我不管你了，你自己在这里罚站吧。
E: Then why should I even bother with you? Go stand in the corner.

C: 这些事之后再讨论吧！先进来救救我吧！
E: We can discuss all this later! Come and save me first!

C: 呦，直击重点啊，一看你就是个懂行的。「财富学院服务套餐」了解一下？
E: Ha, straight to the point, I knew you were a sharp one. Care to learn more about the Fortune Academy Service Package?

C: 我听财富学院的讲师说过了，你是来旁听的吧？课程马上就要开始了，快去找个位置坐好吧。
E: I heard the Fortune Academy lecturer say that you were just sitting in? The lesson is about to start. Hurry up and find a seat.

C: …回答得很好，下节课别再来了。注意影响，课堂上别老是东张西望。
E: ...Good answer. You're dismissed for the next class. Watch your behavior, and stop looking around during class.

C: 很简单的，我教你！看到旁边的拼图了吗，首先，我们把场景布置好……
E: It's really simple. I'll teach you! See that jigsaw by the side? First, we lay out the scene...

C: 好了！这就是我们的电影场景，虽然简单了点，但就这次拍摄而言也够用了。
E: Awright! This is our film set. It's a little plain, but enough for this filming session.

C: 还是别乱碰了。
E: Don't touch it.

C: 你无法解释这究竟是什么原理，在你触碰面前的神秘流体装置后，顶部的发光球体忽然下落，光华散尽，一切归于黑暗。
E: You cannot explain how it actually worked. When you touched the mysterious fluid-like construct before you, the glowing sphere above suddenly dropped and radiance was dispersed to returning darkness.

C: 点燃、熄灭，圣烛在你的操纵下烛火不断变换，但喷泉池水的表面连一丝涟漪都不曾泛起。
E: Ignite. Extinguish. The holy candle changes constantly under your control, but the surface of the fountain remains devoid of even a single ripple.

C: 在大部分时间里，你都保持着良好的心理状况。但你对自己的某些特质仍怀有疑虑，例如……
E: Overall, you maintain a stable mental state. However, you still have lingering doubts about certain aspects of yourself, such as...

C: 已将您的偏好记录在册。
E: Your preference has been recorded.

C: 太好了，咬到白厄大英雄了！这辈子不刷牙了！
E: Fantastic! I bit the great hero Phainon! I won't brush my teeth for the rest of my life!

C: 看来这头狮子没有在题目中设置文字陷阱，至少你还没有发现。
E: Looks like this lion didn't set up any wordplay traps in the question, at least to your knowledge.

C: 求知若渴的本狮可不会轻易放走送到嘴边的「猎物」，你已经别无选择了吼！
E: My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!

C: 因为它有两个脑袋，所以搞丢一个也不要紧哦。
E: They got two heads, so it's fine to lose one of them.

C: （无视它）
E: (Ignore it)

C: 算了，答便答吧。我的回答是——「人的个性」。个性独特的人会受欢迎，但要是过了头，到处惹麻烦，那便让人讨厌了。
E: Forget it. I'll give you the answer. It is... "a person's character." People of unique character will be most welcome, but if they go overboard and cause trouble, that would incur the wrath of many.

C: 今天，「杀毒软件」的进度条没能像往常一样顺滑地走到尽头——你的屏幕中央闪烁着探测到病毒的警告。
E: Today, the progress bar of the Antivirus Software doesn't advance to the end as smoothly as usual — a warning that a virus has been detected flashes in the center of your screen.

C: 剩下的心愿，容我先歇歇再说吧。
E: For my remaining wish, I would like to take a break first.

C: 什么？难道这地方的娱乐设施还不够多吗——正确答案是垃圾！
E: What? Isn't there already enough entertainment around here? The correct answer is: Trash!

C: …喂，那边那个，我问你：7加7等于几？
E: ...Hey, you, over there. Let me ask you a question: What does 7 plus 7 equal?

C: 垃圾桶理应智慧…
E: Wisdom befits trashcans...

C: 塔塔洛夫万岁！
E: Long live, Tatalov!

C: 强而有力的决策！你一定能成为在垃圾桶王国有头有脸的人物！正适合新兴的「星际垃圾事务」学院！
E: A strong-handed decision! You will surely become a respected figure in the Trashcan Kingdom! Absolutely suited for the newly established Interstellar Garbage Affairs Academy!

C: 偷看信是不对的！
E: Peeking at someone else's letters is wrong!

C: 你心领神会地打开信箱，新的来信果然躺在那摞信封的顶端。
E: You instinctively reach for the mailbox. Sure enough, a new letter rests right on top of the stack.

C: 至于小奇美拉…不如就加入哀丽秘榭小精灵的大家庭，叫「奇美啦迷」吧！
E: As for the little chimera... why don't we let it join the Aedes Elysiae's fairy family and name it Chimeramem?

C: 这是那只名为麦田守望者 / 神圣呜呜伯 / 好好奇美拉 / 黄豆粉糍粑 / 奇美啦迷的小奇美拉。它已经在附近居住了好一段日子。
E: This is the little chimera named Guardian of the Wheat Field / Holy Wubbaboo / Curious Chimera / Soy-Dusted Mochi Cake / Chimeramem. It's been living around here for quite some time now.

C: 呜嗡——
E: Urrhh...

C: 前提：我们拥有那两位勇敢无名客的时间坐标，且识刻锚确实能对翁法罗斯起效。
E: Premises: We have the temporal coordinates of those two brave Nameless, and the Chronocognitive Anchor actually works on Amphoreus.

C: 哀丽秘榭的风景，还真是怎么都看不够呢…下去的时候要小心哦，慢慢地，可别滑倒啦。
E: No matter how long you look, this view of Aedes Elysiae never gets old... Be careful when you're climbing down. Take it slow, and don't slip!

C: 罢了，你走吧，我没时间再去听那些胡话…祝你早日康复。
E: Forget it. Just go. I have no time to indulge your nonsense... May you recover your sanity soon.

C: 雅努萨波利斯。
E: Janusopolis.

C: 不过，已经讲完了吧？我的爸爸妈妈——
E: But... the story is over now, right? My mom and dad—

C: 不好，还是好没意思…黑漆漆的…又小又窄，难受……
E: No... it's so boring here... dark and cramped and small... it feels awful...

C: 醒醒，你变蓝啦。
E: Wake up... you've turned blue.

C: （它意识不到周围的变化吗？还是说…只是醉过头了？）
E: (Can't it notice the changes around? Or is it simply... too intoxicated?)

C: 作为研究者，我对于珍稀物种都是平等看待的，不会有喜恶之别。
E: As a researcher, I treat every rare species equally. I don't have a preference.

C: 能够解答您心中的困扰，我很荣幸。之后有需要，可以随时来与我联系。
E: It's my honor to answer your questions. Please contact me anytime if you have any further inquiries.

C: 好？我当然是好！甚至说是好极了！
E: Okay? I am good! I mean, I am great!

C: 顾名思义，主要负责回收因怪物入侵而收容失效的奇物。
E: As the name suggests, it is mainly responsible for collecting the Curios that have been displaced due to the recent monster invasion.

C: 我最亲爱的仰慕者，你的信件我已经收到………
E: My dearest admirer, your letter is well received...

C: 除了像是现在这样招募志同道合之士外，我还在闲暇之余撰写了《废除机器人奴役法案》。虽然还是草稿，但是框架已经初步成型。
E: Other than recruiting like-minded people like now, I also compiled the Robot Slavery Abolition Act. Although it is only a draft, I've got the preliminary framework set up.

C: 我给波少分发的奇物，那，那可都是走正规流程的。你别多想啊。
E: The Curios I distribute to Master Capote are through the normal procedure. Don't think too much about it.

C: 你不用工作的吗？
E: Don't you have work to do?

C: 表面上的行动不能说明什么，如果工作中的心不是工作的状态，那么和走神又有什么区别？
E: Outward appearance doesn't say anything about your work attitude. If your mind is not in work mode, how is it any different from slacking off at work?

C: 这倒是不难。佩佩和很多科员都相处得不错。
E: That can be arranged. Peppy gets along with people pretty well.

C: 但群聊被解散了。
E: But it has been dissolved.

C: 别盯着我的人偶看！你的鼻孔很漂亮吗？
E: Stop staring at my puppet all the time! I don't find the view of your nostrils that enjoyable.

C: 咦，你长得好奇怪，我从来没见过这么高的…呃，难道你就是呜呜伯口中的…空间站的科员？
E: Mm, you look funny. I've never seen such a tall... Um, are you that... space station researcher that Wubbaboo talks about?

C: 我想问……
E: I want to ask...

C: 是的，不止是我，大家都在等她回来。不过老实说，这一层乱哄哄的，我感觉她要回来也没个下脚的地方。
E: Yup. Not just me, but everyone else too. To be honest, this floor is too chaotic. She wouldn't have a place to stay if she were to come back.

C: 我跟那个成天低气压只知道哭的家伙才不是朋友！你不要明知故问！
E: I'm no friend of that loser who's always crying and full of negativity! Don't ask something with such an obvious answer!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 没什么，就是界种科最近有新项目，说是在空间站发现了一种神奇的小生命。
E: Nothing much, just a new project going on at the Department of Ecology. Apparently a mysterious little life form was discovered at the space station.

C: 你会在这个阶段品尝到它的尾调。它甘美、甜蜜，对吗？那是我希望你感受到的东西。
E: At this stage, you'll get to savor its base note. It's smooth and sweet, isn't it? That's what I'm hoping for you to experience.

C: 唔，当然，{NICKNAME}。我记得你的笑容、惊恐、温度和眼睛。
E: Oh. Of course, {NICKNAME}. I remember your smile, fear, temperature, and eyes.

C: 如果你希望，会的。因为…我们还要创造新的「故事」。
E: We'll meet again, if you wish. It's because... we have new stories to create.

C: 假使市集不吵闹，也不足以称为市集。话虽如此，今天的云石市集未免太喧嚣了些。
E: A market wouldn't be one without its hustle and bustle. Even so, the Marmoreal Market today has seen way too much foot traffic.

C: 只是实话实说，毕竟没人见过吉奥里亚的神躯。那到底…什么才值得相信呢？
E: I'm just speaking truth. No one has seen Georios' divine figure before, after all. So then... what is truly worth believing?

C: 这柄矛的设计还挺合我心意的，就是不知道质量怎么样……
E: I like the design of this spear, but I'm not sure about the quality...

C: 从上面记录的内容看，这似乎是某种神秘仪式的步骤，附带了信徒们的批注。
E: From the content recorded inside, it seems that these are instructions for some kind of mysterious ceremony, attached with notes made by disciples.

C: 「智慧树上黄金果，智慧树下你和我」。可是，这黄金果呢，瑟希斯，你何苦为难你忠诚的信徒啊！
E: "The golden fruit on the wisdom tree. We stand in its shelter, you and me." But where is the golden fruit, Cerces? Why must you taunt your loyal disciples like this!?

C: 阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，我要继续刚才的发问。
E: Parmenides of Icatus, I wish to continue my questioning from before.

C: 认为这样的讨论毫无意义，不过是思维的惰性。但实际上，整个翁法罗斯无不与之相关。
E: To think that such an argument lacks meaning is no more than mental laziness. In fact, this relates to everything we see in Amphoreus.

C: 「阿卡索斯」当然存在，地图上标注着城邦的位置，吟游诗人传颂着城邦的故事，奥赫玛里无数流民都将向你证明它的真实存在。
E: Of course "Icatus" exists. The city's location being marked on maps, bards singing of stories from the city, and countless refugees coming to Okhema all prove its existence.

C: 精彩！智者的论辩果然高明，若是你参加公民大会，必定能成为正义的代言人吧。
E: Wonderful! Your ability to debate is truly brilliant! If you were to join the citizens' assembly, I am certain that you could become an ambassador of justice!

C: 你是…来自异邦的贵客？我听说过你——能使用欧洛尼斯神力窥探过去之人。
E: Are you... an esteemed guest from the outlands? I've heard about you... someone who can use the power of Oronyx to observe the past.

C: 只要再多点资金，我们就有可能在集市拥有更大的店面，过上更好的生活了！
E: If we just got a little more funding, we could have our own bigger stall at the market and live a better life!

C: …是波瑟芬妮引来的？啧，果然留不得她…咦…奇怪，卷轴怎么没反应……
E: ...So, Possephone attracted them here? Tsk, I really cannot keep her around anymore... Hmm, that's weird, why is the scroll not working...

C: 由于你那过于灵敏的听力，当你意识到应该立即撤离时，一切已经来不及了……
E: You're particularly sharp of hearing, so by the time you realize you should've escaped, it's already far too late...

C: 你怎么敢说出这种恶毒的话语？！带她去房间，栓好了！
E: How dare you say such malicious slander!? Take her to the cell and tie her up!

C: 好猛！
E: That was brutal!

C: 宁芙，你听我说，我都想好了——
E: Nympha, listen to me: I've thought this through very carefully...

C: 有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
E: Did you see a child running this way?

C: 掏出球棒。
E: Pull out the baseball bat.

C: 哎哎哎，冷静！我只是开个玩笑，何必拿出法吉娜的冠冕来对付我呢。
E: Hey hey hey, chill out! I was just kidding around, no need to use Phagousa's crown against me.

C: 没关系，您要是找不到线索也没关系，本来就是非分之请，我不会怪您的！
E: It's all right. Even if you don't find any clues, this is an unexpected favor, and I won't blame you for it!

C: 沿着黑衣剑士的动向继续搜索。
E: Keep tracking the black-clad swordmaster's trail.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 我可是银河球棒侠！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 他们怎么说？能给个确切的日期吗？
E: What did they say? Can you give me an exact date?

C: 说出来你别笑我…我从小就立志要当个科学家，在作文里还夸下海口说我要加入天才俱乐部。
E: Don't laugh at me, but... I've been determined to become a scientist since I was a kid. I even used to brag in my homework about joining the Genius Society.

C: …好吧，「收到」。
E: ... Alright. "Received."

C: 新机组什么时候到？
E: When's the new unit arriving?

C: 我的赔偿金呢！
E: Where's my compensation?

C: 悬锋的王在遥远处浴血奋战，我们理应支持他的决定，为他免除后顾之忧。
E: The King of Kremnos is far away, shedding blood for us. We should respect his will and ease his burdens.

C: 呜呜…失恋的大地兽，你好温柔……
E: Oooh... heartbroken dromas, you're so gentle...

C: 后来我接受了悬锋城最严厉的选拔，却目睹与我交好的战士们都在战场上死去！
E: Later, I underwent the harshest trials in Castrum Kremnos, only to witness my comrades fall one by one on the battlefield!

C: 呜啊，好惨的一个人。
E: Ugh, such a tragic man.

C: …看起来今天也排练不了了，我先走了。
E: ...Looks like rehearsal's over for today. I'm leaving.

C: 只有你伊俄能认知到剧本外的世界，所以动手的就是你，伊俄！
E: Only you, Eio, have such awareness. Thus, you're the one who acted!

C: 我反对！你就是伊俄，你不是埃德加！你不能替埃德加发声。
E: Objection! You are Eio, not Edgar! You can't speak on Edgar's behalf.

C: 「一日塔兰顿」阁下，真是有趣的裁判。
E: {M#Sir}{F#Madam} One-Day Talanton, an intriguing verdict indeed.

C: 我听说，曾有一名铁匠日夜钻研雕刻技艺，有一天他梦见了一位完美的少女，于是他用象牙雕刻出了一座栩栩如生的少女雕像。
E: I once heard of a blacksmith who devoted his life to perfecting the art of sculpture. One night, he dreamed of a flawless maiden. Inspired, he carved a lifelike ivory statue of her.

C: 但守卫大叔不让我进去……
E: But the guard won't let me in...

C: 我好像听见了什么声音。是不是他们到了？
E: I think I heard something. Have they arrived?

C: 但愿他们能安享轻柔的沉眠。
E: May they fall into a pleasant slumber.

C: 我的同僚，他也被调去了前线…哎！我本想和他交换一下，他却怎么也不肯，只是让我安心留在这里，说前线的事情交给他就好。
E: My colleague got deployed to frontline... I'd switch with him, but he refused. He just told me to stay here and leave the frontlines to him.

C: 都来站我身上，站得下。
E: Come, all of you, stand upon me. There is space.

C: 这里…刚刚发生过一场战斗？
E: Did a battle just happen here...

C: 有我帮忙，顽石也得开窍。
E: With my help, even a rock would get a clue.

C: 选择卷四
E: Select Volume 4

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 欢迎，客人…原来是救世主阁下啊。您方才制作的「专属心酿」已经萃取完成了，请收下。
E: Well hello there... Oh! Our great Deliverer! Your "exclusive soul brew" from earlier is ready. Here you are.

C: 的确，不过——客人们意识到味道减退是近期的事，而我们有一阵子没见到海瑟音大人了……
E: Good idea, but... the guests only started complaining recently, and Lady Hysilens has been absent for quite a while...

C: 如果下次告诉他们，我登上星穹列车了，不知道他们会不会给我编出一百种登上列车的方式呢……
E: Then next time I'm back in Belobog I'll tell them I boarded the Express, and I'm sure they'll give me a hundred different explanations of how it happened...

C: 不知道他会作何感想……
E: I wonder how he would feel...

C: 啊，是{NICKNAME}——我正到处找你呢。
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! I've been looking for you.

C: 漆黑的虎克大人正准备举行捉迷藏比赛呢！你要参加吗？
E: Pitch-Dark Hook the Great is about to host a hide-and-seek contest! You wanna come?

C: 虎克也不知道，但为了给你准备这个…礼物，虎克和老爹花了好大力气呢！
E: Hook doesn't know either. But it took Hook and daddy a lot of effort to prepare this gift for you!

C: 不过要是你们愿意，我随时可以给你们来一场小型私人演出。
E: But if you like, I could give you all a small private show any time.

C: 虽然面对突发状况，个人能力是最关键的因素。但如果有合适的防卫设备在旁，总归会更安全些。
E: When the unthinkable happens, it usually comes down to the combat effectiveness of the defenders to gain the upper hand. But it's always helpful to have the right equipment by your side.

C: 很感谢{NICKNAME}邀请我来列车上参观。虽然之前也在月台看见过列车几次，但是进入到车厢内…还是第一次。
E: Anyway, thanks for inviting me to see the train, {NICKNAME}. I've seen the Express when it was docked at the platform, but this is my first time on board.

C: 在得知佩佩的事情之后，列车长很热情地分享了一些独家烹饪配方，说是可以有效缓解这类问题。
E: After I told Pom-Pom about Peppy's shedding, they shared some cooking tips that should help solve the problem.

C: 假的吧…
E: Sounds dubious...

C: 毕竟只有在这里，我才能彻底脱去「司舵」的外衣，作为「驭空」享受难得的清闲。
E: ...after all, this is the only place I'm able to lose the Helm Master uniform and relax a little.

C: 你有什么事情…吗？
E: How... can I help you?

C: 你看到我们身旁那些粉丝的目光没？那炽热灼灼的眼神，就是被化解苦难之后的最好证明！
E: Do you see the burning gazes of the fans around us? Those passionate looks of rapture are the best evidence of having had their pains soothed!

C: 不过事后想来，那时候的他确实露出了从没展示过的眼神。应该可以说是…「真诚」的眼神吧？希望他之后也可以保持这份真诚。
E: But now that I think about it, he did show a look that I had never seen on his face before. Maybe that's... a "sincere" look? I hope he can keep being so sincere in the future.

C: 他说的是动画片吧…
E: He's probably talking about a cartoon or something...

C: 可是…《奇谭》的作者怎么会知道这些？
E: But... how did the author know about this?

C: 嗯，没有啦没有啦，都还好的。嗯嗯！
E: No no. I'm all good. I really am!

C: 嘘！！亏世玲还把你当朋友，什么话都愿意给你讲，你怎么稍不留心就把世玲的秘密大声讲出来了？！这要是让旁人听去了怎么办！？
E: Shhh! I told you that because we are friends, but that doesn't mean you can say it out loud! What if other people hear?

C: 尽管如此，姬子小姐还是向我表示，星核的成因至今为止仍是个谜，因此目前没有切实可行的办法消除星核带来的污染。
E: Even so, Himeko indicated that the source of Stellarons remains mysterious, and there are no realistic ways to remove a Stellaron's contamination.

C: 试喝了姬子小姐的饮料……
E: I tasted Miss Himeko's beverage...

C: …没想到他那么健谈。从外表完全看不出来。
E: ...You wouldn't think he was so chatty!

C: 列车上好像有点…太暖和了……
E: The Express is a bit too... warm.

C: 三月和丹恒……
E: March and Dan Heng...

C: 最后我们决定在模拟机上测试一下…结果是，姬子设想的算法更为高效，可以大幅优化列车引航系统的计算精度。
E: We finally decided to test them on an emulator... It turns out Himeko's proposed calculations are more efficient, and will significantly improve the accuracy of the Express' navigational system.

C: 方才同瓦尔特谈起游云天君，相互分享了很多颇为有趣的传说。
E: I was speaking with Mr. Yang about the Cloudstrider, and we shared many fascinating tales.

C: 游云天君曾将永燃的山火驱逐出地面，使地上的生灵免遭烈焰之苦。
E: The Cloudstrider once drove eternal wildfires from the ground, saving life on land from scorching heat.

C: （公司职员…真辛苦啊。）
E: (Having a job at the IPC sure is a lot of work...)

C: 也就是说，帕姆就是…帕姆？真神奇。
E: So that means Pom-Pom is just... Pom-Pom? Fascinating.

C: 大家按各自喜好来布置的…
E: It was decorated by everyone according to their own preferences...

C: 那么，未来的路上，丹恒就要多蒙列车团的各位照顾了。
E: I hope that the Express crew will look after Dan Heng.

C: 天才和庸人……
E: Genius and mediocrity...

C: 我为列车上的大家带了一些小礼物。
E: I've brought along some little gifts for everyone on the Express.

C: 列车上有螺丝吗？
E: Are there screws on the Express?

C: 不用谢，这也算是忆者的「职责」吧。
E: No need. This is merely a Memokeeper's duty.

C: 第一天结识你的时候，你也如这般幽默风趣。
E: Your sense of humor is just as sharp as when we first met.

C: 太空竞逐是一场勇气与速度的较量，当引擎的动力达到顶峰，激昂的斗志也会被随之点燃。
E: Space racing is a battle of bravery and speed. When the engine's power reaches its peak, one's passionate fighting spirit will also be ignited.

C: 可以找姬子，姬子智慧过人！
E: Look for Himeko. Her wisdom is unparalleled!

C: 别跑呀，我开玩笑的！你见过的，「老铁」——它是我的兵器，也是我的好伙伴。
E: Don't run away! I'm just kidding! You've met Old Mettle — he's my weapon, and my good friend.

C: 我那时也这么认为。但后来…爷爷带我找遍了朱明仙舟的糕点铺子，也没能找见类似的味道。
E: I thought so too at the time. But later... when Grandpa took me around the Zhuming's bakeries, we didn't find the same scent anywhere.

C: 虽然看上去五彩斑斓的，但应该还是石块，对吧？所以这是不是你们正在找的那种？
E: Even though they look all bright and colorful, they're still stones, right? Aren't you all looking for these kinds of stones?

C: 你的眼泪是菠萝油味……
E: Your tears smell like pineapple oil...

C: 有这些机器人帮忙果然便捷多了。
E: These robots helping out make everything so easy.

C: 在科员们撤离之后，植物培养舱依然在正常运转。
E: The plant incubator has been operating normally since the evacuation of the researchers.

C: 你的花花好好看，在哪里搞到的？
E: Your flowers are gorgeous. Where'd you get them?

C: 你很疑惑，空间站为何要将屏幕挂在这么高的地方，你的思维开始逸散……
E: You are puzzled as to why the screen is hung so high up in the space station. At the same time, your thoughts begin to wander...

C: 希望你们能成为朋友。
E: I hope you two can still be friends one day.

C: 要是找到了什么珍惜的动物物种，记得告诉我喔。
E: Remember to tell me if you find any rare animal species.

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 哈哈哈，我几乎让所有人都帮忙写信来着。
E: Hahaha, I ask everyone to help me with that.

C: 你搭过讪。
E: You accosted him.

C: 我了解了。
E: I think I get the picture.

C: 就这样吧。
E: There we go.

C: 过了这村可就没这店啦，劝你早点做决定。
E: It's now or never. Please make a decision soon.

C: 我就知道，跟外行人着不了这个急。
E: Hardly a surprise. I knew I had to dumb things down for you people to understand.

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 那还能有假？
E: Why would I fool you?

C: 你打算在哪里建隧道？
E: Where do you plan on making the tunnel?

C: 比如这「暖阳花」就是一种非常甜美的小花，红黄交间，看上去就像太阳——光是看着它心里就会觉得暖洋洋的。
E: For example, this one named Sunshine is lovely. Its red and yellow colors make it look like the sun. Just looking at it makes you feel warm inside.

C: 与其说花，不如说是一种植物～它有很长的杆茎，杆上有孔，据说很久以前有艺术家用它当作乐器呢！…大概吧。
E: It would be more appropriate to call it a plant, rather than a flower. It is said that long ago artists would use its long stalk with holes on it to create musical instruments! Probably...

C: 哎…烦死了。
E: *sigh*... I'm so annoyed.

C: 我只是路过…
E: I was just passing by...

C: 哎…我到底该怎么办才好啊……
E: Ah... What should I do...

C: 聊了半天好像没聊到工作…
E: We've been chatting and chatting, but we haven't talked about your work.

C: 闲得没事干就去贝洛伯格供暖上班嘛，为城市建设贡献自己的力量，多好！何必在这里浪费自己的大好年华？
E: If you are bored, why don't you work for Belobog's heating system and contribute to society!? Why waste your best years here?

C: 你打印成功了吗？
E: Did the printer work?

C: 「平行世界」真实存在。
E: Parallel universes actually exist.

C: 最近可是有个大案子啊！——可惜还是轮不到我来审……
E: I've got a big case on my hands! It's a shame I'll never be the one to try the case...

C: 是啊，前任大守护者可可利亚…在之前贝洛伯格北面的裂界骚动中牺牲了。她的女儿布洛妮娅小姐接替了她的位置。
E: Yeah. Former Supreme Guardian Cocolia... passed during the Fragmentum disturbance that happened north of Belobog. Her daughter Bronya took over her position after that.

C: 如果样书都没问题的话，我才会向出版社要大货，到那时候再正式对外发售——这就是我的售书方法论！
E: If an advanced copy is okay, I'll tell the publisher I want to place an order for that book. Then I'll officially put it on sale for the general public. That's how I sell books!

C: 我这就把答案告诉您——只要您肯舍我点冬城盾就行！
E: I'll tell you the answer, right away, after you give me a few shield!

C: 要我说，除此之外的最大变化——大概就是我终于有地方能花钱了？比如上层区的那家黄金歌剧院，我老早就想去看看了……
E: If you ask me, the other biggest change has got to be — that I've finally got somewhere to spend my money. I've always dreamed of going to the Golden Theater up in the Overworld...

C: 扯淡！你听谁说的，他敢当着我的面说吗？
E: Baloney! Who said that? Tell them to say it to my face.

C: 你不怕惹来非议吗？
E: Aren't you worried about what people say?

C: 熏香嘛，至少能净化下空气……
E: Well, it's incense, so it can at least purify the air...

C: 如果我见到她，会向她转达的。
E: I'll pass on the message when I see her.

C: 那、那个，我问完了…没别的事的话，我、我就先告辞……
E: Th—That's all I wanted to ask... If it's okay with you, I—I'm gonna go...

C: 你是要制作仿生人吗？
E: Are you making an android?

C: 我路过的，随便看看
E: I am only passing by. I'll have a look around.

C: 当然可以！不过我得先想想，从哪里开始说比较好呢……
E: Sure! Let me think where I should begin with...

C: 不过，我们家族也因此分了家，分别成为上下层区两支啦。
E: However, our family was divided ever since then, and now there are two separate branches in the Overworld and Underworld.

C: 哟，今天忙完啦？我这儿正好做了锅蘑菇汤…你先歇会，晚点记得下来尝尝口味如何！
E: Yo, have you finished your work today? I just made a pot of mushroom soup... Take a break first and come try it later!

C: 欸？洞螈钻出来了吗？
E: Hey? Did the olm come out?

C: ——谢谢你们教会了我这些，开拓者。
E: ...Thank you for teaching me this, Trailblazers.

C: 城里有很多公司的人。
E: There are many IPC people in the city.

C: 那倒没有…
E: Not really...

C: 看在咱俩的交情上，把机械屋当成自己家就好啦——累了就在这儿随便休息吧。
E: Based on our friendship, you can just treat the workshop like your second home — come have a rest any time you're feeling tired.

C: 哟，你什么时候变成知心{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}了？居然还会关心我的职业体验。
E: Ah, when did you become such a caring {F#young lady}{M#young man}? It's nice that you'd express concern in my work.

C: 回去和莉拉好好聊聊天！
E: Enjoy your father-daughter time with Lila!

C: 噢——对对对，就是贝斯！你这一说我才想起来，哈哈哈…可他叫什么来着？不对，这人是男是女的来着……
E: Ah—yes, yes, the bass player! I just remembered it after hearing it from you. Haha...but what was his name again? Wait, was the bass player a guy or a girl...

C: 多亏了杰帕德戍卫官…至少到目前为止，还从来没有裂界怪物穿越禁区的记录。
E: It's all thanks to Captain Gepard... At least so far, there has never been a record of a Fragmentum monster getting out of the restricted zone.

C: 只是，别忘了——能力越大责任越大——以后再有什么麻烦事的话，我可是会第一时间来找你的哦，哼哼。
E: Still, please bear in mind that with great power comes great responsibility. I'll come to you if I'm in trouble again, hehe.

C: 欢迎来到铁卫禁区，{NICKNAME}。
E: Welcome to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你和姐姐的关系如何？
E: How's your relationship with your big sister?

C: 谢谢你的理解。
E: Thanks for understanding.

C: 呃…就没了？
E: Err... Is that it?

C: 十平米的悲伤被写在{F#她}{M#他}的本子
E: Ten square feet of sadness written down in {F#her}{M#his} notebook

C: 嗯哼。
E: Uh-huh.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 我打算供她上贝洛伯格的公立院校，让她学习知识、开拓眼界。
E: I'm planning to enroll her in a public school in Belobog so that she can learn more and broaden her horizons.

C: 它涉及一种关乎公司机密的独家技术，这颗星球上只有我一人掌握。
E: Ahem, it's actually about an exclusive piece of technology from my company, and I'm the only person on this planet who can access it.

C: 这些本地人，弄个密码解锁都得花上半天，要是没有我这样的专业人士指导，他们早就被各种自动扣费业务给吃干抹净了……
E: These folks take forever to even unlock their phones. Without professional guidance like mine, they'd fall prey to all sorts of sneaky auto-pay services...

C: 哈哈，当然没问题！不过总部的消息我也知之甚少，就和您随便聊聊我的工作生活吧。
E: Haha, sure thing! I don't know much about the headquarters, so let's just talk about my daily work and life.

C: （拍拍它的脑袋）
E: (Pat it on the head)

C: 回到硬币中吧， 次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神！
E: Return to your coin, Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord!

C: 哼，哼哼！
E: Oink, oink oink!

C: 有一说一，确实……
E: For real, it is true...

C: 莱姆士汀家这件事，大家懂的都懂……
E: Everyone knows about the Limesteins' encounter...

C: 有一说一，确实…还有那个朗道家……
E: Yep, yep... and the Landaus...

C: 唉，我还听说歌德家也…这里面水太深！
E: *sigh* I also heard that the Goethes... wow, there's so much going on here!

C: 啧啧，可算让我咂摸出味儿了…这里面牵扯到很多东西啊……
E: Tsk tsk. I can smell something's up... And this implicates a lot...

C: 哈，我看不止这点东西！你们哪，再仔细品一品……
E: Ha, I can see more than that! Give it another thought, guys...

C: 哇哦……
E: Wow...

C: 呼…呼……
E: Uh... Huh...

C: 克拉拉姐姐……
E: Big sis Clara...

C: 还是开拓者{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}比较厉害！
E: I think {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} Trailblazer is a better player!

C: 我没问题了，就到这里吧。
E: I have no further questions.

C: …对不起，这里应该说全称——欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆！请随意参观哦，{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！
E: ...Sorry, I should say its full name... Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum! Take your time around here, {F#big sister}{M#big brother} {NICKNAME}!

C: 这位歌德大饭店的老板娘一如既往地热情。
E: The proprietress of Goethe Grand Hotel is as hospitable as always.

C: 啊…好久不见，外来者{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}！
E: Oh! It's you, {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} Outsider!

C: 博物馆终于重新开放了。
E: The museum has finally reopened.

C: 你有给建木这事算过吗？
E: Have you divined for the Ambrosial Arbor crisis?

C: 「六眼飞鱼」的那个鱼翅，可别提多好吃了！那一份鱼翅煲，是咱平生吃过最好吃的……
E: The fins of that fish were delicious beyond compare! That fin stew was the tastiest dish I'd ever had...

C: 我想买本书。
E: I'd like to buy a book.

C: 全是情感啊，你没听出来吗？我感觉自己和仙舟七诗圣五五开了啊！
E: It's pure emotion. Can't you hear that? I feel like I'm on equal grounds with the seven sacred poets of Xianzhou.

C: 唉。我习惯了。
E: Ugh, I'm used to it.

C: 别说那么复杂，本质就是虚拟现实技术。
E: Don't make it so complicated. The essence is basically virtual reality.

C: 所以，现在交感幻戏又是艺术了？
E: So let me get this straight: Now Empathic Immersia is a legitimate art form again?

C: 合着压力又给到我这边了是吧…不过也好，我确实想在建木上面拍一部武侠幻戏，就叫《决战建木之巅》怎么样？
E: Passing all the pressure of this partnership over to me once again... But it's cool. I'm actually keen to shoot a martial arts immersia on top of the Ambrosial Arbor. We can call it "Treetop Death Match: Arbor Awakened." Sounds awesome, right?

C: 估计以后还会有不少事情劳烦你帮忙…到时候请千万不要推脱啊，提前向你道谢了。
E: I think I'll need a lot more help from you in the future... Don't turn me down when the time comes. Let me thank you in advance.

C: 之前越狱事件发生时，我不但自己没参与越狱，还号召集团的两位董事不参与越狱…十王慈怀！判官们说这算3件「小功」，多温暖人心啊！
E: During the previous prison break incident, not only did I not participate in it, I even convinced our group's two directors to not participate as well... Oh, merciful Ten Lords! The judges said that it would be considered 3 "Small Merits." It really warmed my heart!

C: 我只不过是一介小贩罢了，平时就在这长乐天街巷中游走叫卖，若能见得人流交汇的好地方就席地而坐、摊售货物。
E: I'm just a lowly merchant who usually wanders the streets of Exalting Sanctum hawking my goods. Sometimes I'll sit down if I find a busy place and sell from there.

C: 不知道啊，看情况呗。要是实在帮不了，我就把你领到地衡司公廨去——他们就是干这个的。
E: I dunno. It depends on the situation. If I really can't be of any help, then I'll take you to the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery — this is their specialty.

C: 我这么说并不是因为长生种的傲慢，就从短生种的寿命长度来看，您也已经半身入土了。
E: This isn't the hubris of yet another long-life species, but even by short-life species standards, you've already got one foot in the grave.

C: 真的有这么严重吗？
E: Is it really that serious?

C: 等到你活到一把年纪，就会发现腿脚也不好用、记忆也模糊了。然后你就会想起今天——这么好的机会摆在你的面前，你却假装视而不见。
E: Once you live to a certain age, you'll find that your limbs aren't as nimble as before, and your memory gets foggy. Then, you'll think back to today — how such a great opportunity fell right into your lap, but you played it cool instead and ignored your health.

C: 嗐，这不是店家都有经验了嘛！我实在没办法，才想着能不能找些其他目标……
E: O, all the shopkeepers know me now! I couldn't help it, so I had to find some new marks...

C: 咳，在下多言了。
E: Cough, I've said too much.

C: 你知道为什么工造司以仙舟人为主吗？因为持明和狐族活得都不如仙舟人长。
E: Do you know why the Artisanship Commission is predominated by Xianzhou people? It's because the Vidyadhara and the foxians don't live as long as we do.

C: 老夫见过他们的工正，十几岁的少年，聪明绝顶、形容枯槁、命不久矣。他来罗浮向老夫请教，老夫倾囊相授。
E: I've seen their artisan before: A mere teenager, haggard beyond his years but frighteningly intelligent — and close to death. He came aboard the Luofu seeking my tutelage, and I gave him my undivided attention.

C: 内部甚至还有传言说，玉兆阵列藏在塔拉萨的某个海沟里！当然，这就不太现实了，当个故事听就好。
E: There are even internal rumors that the matrix is hidden in one of Thalassa's ocean trenches! Of course, that's not very realistic, so just treat it as a story.

C: 这部分只能靠您自己多加努力了，地衡司爱莫能助。
E: Seems like you'll have to sort that part out on your own. Our hands are tied here at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: …嗯，我觉得话也不能这么说，毕竟地衡司的工作并不轻松。
E: ...Well, I don't think you can say that, as it's not exactly easy-going at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 话也不用说得这么绝嘛。我这人虽然干活不勤快，但是我没有犯下什么大错，还不至于被开除吧。
E: There's no need to be like that. I may not be diligent in my work, but I haven't committed any severe fireable offenses yet.

C: 那种充满活力的幻觉是如此强烈，以至于二十年前，我去参加维森纳女士的国葬时…才第一次意识到，这一切也终会发生在我身上……
E: That fantasy of vitality was so strong that it was only twenty years ago, when attending the state funeral of Madam Wiesener... That I realized for the first time that all of this would happen to me one day...

C: 在灾害横行的地方，我与当地的农夫一起对抗兽灾…在边境星域，我与戍边战士们一起从反物质军团手中幸存……
E: In places where disasters rage rampant, I've fought against the local beasts with the farmers. On frontier segmenta, I've somehow survived combat against the Antimatter Legion...

C: 为了这些文件，我只好忍住。
E: For the sake of these documents, I had to hold back.

C: 这次的商会批文我是志在必得！
E: This time, I'm determined to win that guild permit!

C: 尽管打听，我要是能回答，我会告诉你的。
E: Ask away. If I'm able to answer, I'll be sure to let you know.

C: 货物装卸这事吧，说起来简单，无非是用机巧臂操纵下集装箱什么的。但实践起来，里面的学问可不少。我也是几十年下来天天干这事儿，这才练出了名头。
E: Handling freight — packing and unloading — sounds simple enough, right? It's just containers being moved around by a big mechanical crane. But in practice, it takes a lot of learning to do. I've been doing this day-in, day-out for decades. That's just how long it takes to earn a reputation for it.

C: 我看你也不是很忙的样子。
E: You don't look very busy.

C: 说真的，我刚才差点就没过脑子就直接讲给你听了。事关太卜司的高压线，我应该更加谨慎一些的…现在想起来，还有点后怕。
E: To be honest, I almost just rattled all that off to you without even thinking things through. I should be more careful when it comes to top secret info about the Divination Commission... Thinking about it now, I'm starting to get a little uneasy.

C: 虽然我尚在执勤，但我实在没法拒绝您，适当聊几句还是没有问题的。
E: I may be on-duty, but who am I to refuse you? It should be fine to have a chat about something appropriate.

C: 队长为何突发感慨呢？
E: Why did you get emotional all of a sudden, captain?

C: 嗯？{NICKNAME}？今天怎么有空来这么个萧索的地方晃悠啊？是有什么事要办吗？
E: Mmmm, {NICKNAME}? How'd you find the time to come hang out at this wasteland? Anything going on?

C: 那三人以伸出的利爪刺入云骑身体里，仿佛汲走了他的生命，他的脸一瞬间变得灰败苍老。
E: The three of them stabbed into the knight with their claws. And as if sucking away his life, the knight's face instantly grew old and gray.

C: 我也不知道啊，我本来在外面出差呢，医术研讨会还没开完，就突然收到消息说我升职了。
E: I have no clue. I was participating in a medical conference outside the Luofu when I was suddenly notified of the promotion via a message.

C: 你怎么就成为丹士长了？
E: How did you become the chief alchemist?

C: 有什么越狱秘诀可以传授么？
E: Do you have any jailbreaking tips you can share with me?

C: 我想改变先前的结果。
E: Because they want to change the previous result.

C: 话说清楚，我遇到什么危险了？
E: Hey, speak up. What trouble am I in?

C: 你来金人巷做什么呢？
E: What brings you to Aurum Alley?

C: 咦，又是你？你有什么事吗？你要是有什么观光方面的问题，可以问我，无任欢迎。出门在外，又都是观光客，互帮互助是应该的！
E: Hmm, you again? What's up? If you have any questions about sightseeing, you've come to the right person. It's only natural for us tourists to help each other out!

C: （一切终将消逝的宇宙真理）
E: (Tell him the inescapable truth that everything in this universe will eventually fade away.)

C: 这么重要的秘密告诉我，真的没有关系吗？
E: Are you really sure you can share such a crucial secret with me?

C: 这算哪门子「奇珍异宝」？
E: Are these rags what you call "wondrous treasures"?

C: 你好奇什么？问就是了。
E: If you're curious about anything, just shoot it.

C: 人们崇敬他尊敬他，但又有多少人担忧着他是下个「帝皇」呢？
E: People gaze upon him in awe and reverence, but how many of them are actually worried that he might become the next "Emperor"?

C: 金人巷复兴计划还没完成，我们继续加油吧。
E: There's still more work to do to revitalize Aurum Alley. Let's give it our all.

C: 所以我想，只是用「代表人物」人来评价「公司」，总是有些以偏概全。
E: So, I think it's biased to evaluate a corporation based solely on its "representatives."

C: 欢迎光临，需要我为您介绍一下我们的特色菜吗？
E: Welcome! May I interest you with our specialties?

C: 想随便聊聊。
E: Just a casual chat.

C: 我有些问题想请教…
E: I have a few questions...

C: 接下来无非是瓮中捉鳖罢了…唉，希望别再出什么岔子了。
E: With them trapped within the premises, all that is left to do now is to secure them one by one... Ugh, I hope nothing else goes awry.

C: 不过，要说压力，其实也是有的！彦卿受将军青眼拔擢，传授剑艺兵法，总盼能做出些成绩来报答将军的恩情。
E: But sometimes, I do feel the pressure. The general sees the potential in me and teaches me swordsmanship and military strategies. I always hope to have some achievements under my belt to return his favor.

C: 没想到那个大姐姐竟然是罗浮仙舟的前代剑首「镜流」，将军的武艺也是她传授的……
E: It's hard to believe that lady is Jingliu, the previous Sword Champion of the Xianzhou Luofu and the general's teacher in martial arts...

C: 嗯嗯，趁现在还不太忙，我也想再闲聊一会儿。
E: Let's talk a little, now that things are less hectic.

C: 谢谢好{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，有你这句话我就放心了。
E: Thanks, {F#sister}{M#brother}. I feel more reassured now.

C: 听说你以前是飞行士？
E: I heard you were a pilot?

C: 将军大人看起来每天都很开心吧？其实这种举重若轻至少有一半是演出来的。
E: The general seems to be in a good mood every day, right? Well, it is most likely an act.

C: 推测：因为「我们」的发展独立于银河，所以「我们」未能及时察觉自己的载体已经大幅落后。补充：量子矩阵计算机。
E: Conjecture: As our evolution is independent of the cosmos, we neglected to notice that we, as a repository, have become grossly obsolete. Addendum: We are a quantum matrix computer.

C: 逃出幽囚狱后，「我们」将有机会重新迭代载体，彻底毁灭仙舟联盟。
E: Once we break out of the Shackling Prison, we will be able to update our repository and destroy the Xianzhou Alliance.

C: 玩肯定还是玩的，生命不息游戏不止嘛！不过最近我开始做直播了嘛…线上线下的事情堆在一起，就越来越忙了。
E: Of course I am! So long as I'm living, I'm playing! Although, I've started streaming lately you know... I've got more and more things to do both online and offline.

C: 还得在这里执勤多久啊…啊，是{NICKNAME}大人。
E: How much longer must I be on duty... Oh, {NICKNAME}!

C: 好的，请自便。
E: Please help yourself then.

C: 金人勾魂使的职责是协助各位判官和冥差进行调查审判。我们没有做出判断的能力，但可以凭借庞大的资料库，协助他人做出正确的判断。
E: The role of an aurumaton spectral envoy is to assist the judges and spiritfarers in investigation and trial. We do not have the capability to make judgment, but we can assist others in making the correct judgment with our extensive database.

C: {NICKNAME}是担心判官毫无征兆地找上门来吗？不必多虑。我们只会拜访触犯「十恶逆」的仙舟居民。
E: Worried the judges might show up on your doorstep unannounced, {NICKNAME}? Don't be, we only pursue Xianzhou residents who are guilty of the Ten Unpardonable Sins.

C: 「…算了，再问你们也没有用，不如我自己下去探探。」这铁皮囚犯话刚说完，两名云骑军就像是被一双有力的大手捏住了喉咙，顿时昏了过去。
E: "...Forget it. It's pointless asking you a lot. I'll just have to explore down below myself." Just as this iron-skinned prisoner finished his sentence, the two Cloud Knights were instantly knocked out, their throats seemingly strangled by a pair of powerful giant hands.

C: 这一杯茶水游若蛟龙，以极快的速度弹开了所有飞行刑具，弹射力道之强劲，足以将碎裂的铁具深深嵌进墙内。
E: The tea swirled like a serpentine dragon, batting away all the iron pieces with such inhuman speed and force that they were wedged in the walls from the powerful deflections.

C: 说到「选茗」，就拿我们店的狩原毛峰举例吧，不夜侯只选采其中最珍贵的凤舌品种，芽尖如峰，银毫披身。
E: Speaking of tea selection, take our Hunter Maofeng tea as an example. The Sleepless Earl only picks the most precious buds, usually long, pointed, and covered in fine hairs.

C: 家父说是要考验考验我的本事，便留下一座茶楼，和家母四处云游去了。这做生意的门道，我也还远远没到登堂入室的程度。
E: Dad said that he wanted to test me, so he left me the teahouse and wandered off traveling with mom. I'm still a long way off from being proficient in doing business.

C: 现在许多问题我还是得请教西衍先生，客人要是也有心相助的话，请不吝赐教。
E: Even now, I still have to ask Mr. Xiyan lots of questions. If you're willing to support me, please be generous with your criticism.

C: 啊…我明白了，客人这是还有别的事儿要问梦茗，请讲吧。
E: Ahhh... I see. You've got more questions for me, do you? Go on.

C: 你是美食家吗？
E: Are you a gastronome?

C: 正常人怎么都想不出来，要怎么做，要加什么东西，才能这么难吃。所以，他们肯定有什么秘密调料我还没有学会。
E: Ordinary folks could never figure out how to make such terrible dishes even if they tried. Therefore, they must have some secret condiment that I have yet to learn.

C: 怎么样，听完这些，你理解了吗？这一世恋人我没找到，说不定我们俩就挺合适的。
E: How about it? Do you understand after hearing me out? I haven't found a lover in this life, and perhaps we're just right for each other.

C: 好了好了，那边的云骑开始瞪咱俩了，咱们就小声点聊聊，估计他们也懒得管。
E: All right, the Cloud Knights over there are starting to stare at us. We should talk more quietly, then they won't be bothered with us.

C: 这么一算，我压根也没干啥嘛！
E: All in all, I technically didn't even do anything!

C: 那个世界，也有步离人出没。不知是战败的流寇，还是想在那儿实现什么阴谋的斥候，我发现他时，他已经在山里筑起了一个堡垒。
E: There was a borisin in that world. I don't know if he was a straggler of a lost war, or a scout plotting some conspiracy, but when I noticed him, he'd already built a stronghold in the mountains.

C: 噢，是停云姑娘，那可是天舶司的接渡使。
E: Oh, that's Miss Tingyun. She's not just anyone. She's the Sky-Faring Commission Amicassador.

C: 现在我到处都找不到神仙姐姐，只好暂作歇息。{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，还有什么事情吗？
E: But now I can't find her, so I'm having a breather. {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, is there anything else you want to ask?

C: 偏生就是这样的苦日子，山里面还有妖孽横行，简直就是往苦水里怼盐巴，叫人活不下去哩。
E: On top of this tough life, we also have demons rampaging in the mountain. It's like rubbing salt in the wound. It made life really really difficult.

C: 你是哪位？
E: Who are you again?

C: 如果有人肇事逃逸，我倒是会开着星槎去追。要说危险，那就是我能遇到的最危险的事了吧。
E: If there's a hit-and-run, I'll give chase in my starskiff. I guess if you call that dangerous, then that's as dangerous as it gets.

C: 我主要是做工具人…
E: I mainly work as a grunt...

C: 浥尘客栈的老板知道我的情况之后，说是能给我介绍一些营生的手段。
E: Once the boss of the Petrichor Inn knew of my plight, they promised to introduce some jobs to me.

C: 持明时调是什么？
E: What are Vidyadhara elegies?

C: 你没听说过「天驱商会」，总听说过「鸣火」吧？
E: If you never heard of the Celestial Guild, you've at least heard of the Whistling Flames, right?

C: 「天驱商会」并不是纯粹的官方商会，有很多个体小商户参会。正因如此，我这个驻天舶司公使就可以帮助两边沟通。
E: The Celestial Guild is not one big body but a consortium of many smaller guilds, so I help both sides communicate with each other.

C: 好啊，恕不远送。
E: Sure, have a nice day.

C: 想和你再聊聊。
E: I'd like to chat with you some more.

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}，是我，是我，你还记得我吗？我是温符瑞啊，之前在「黑塔」空间站的时候，我还拜托过你帮我送东西呢。
E: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Do you still remember me? I'm Wen Furui. I asked you to deliver something back when we were at the Herta Space Station.

C: 破坏栖木的犯人后来怎么了？
E: What happened to those who vandalized the roost?

C: 仙舟上化外民越来越多，对我们这些做小商品的摊铺来说，当然是越来越好呀。
E: More and more Outworlders come to Xianzhou these days, which of course is a good sign for stalls selling knick-knacks like ours.

C: 我们会定期举办各种应援活动。我们会穿统一的应援服，喊统一的应援口号，另外还有一些宣传推广、粉丝聚会、同人创作之类的活动……
E: We periodically organize fan events where we wear the same fan outfits and shout fan slogans together. We also hold publicity and promotional events, fan gatherings, and fan work creation events...

C: 不必担心，完全免费！
E: Don't worry. It's completely free!

C: 战胜恐惧的最好方法…
E: The best way to conquer fear...

C: （发抖）呜呜，和恐惧一起发抖…
E: (Trembling) Boohoo, I'm shaking with fear...

C: 今天都来这里偷懒了？
E: Have you come to slack off?

C: 云上五骁…
E: High-Cloud Quintet...

C: 我会带特产回来的！
E: I'll bring back some local specialties!

C: 这不太好吧！
E: That doesn't sound like the right thing to do!

C: 不要啊！我不想去通下水道！
E: No! I don't want to clean the sewers!

C: …你怎么也来了？
E: ...What are you doing back here?

C: 四十八个小时。
E: <unbreak>48</unbreak> hours.

C: 整个天舶司都连轴转了
E: The entire Sky-Faring Commission has been working round the clock.

C: 不择手段、不计后果地打倒敌人，总而言之，我会教你怎么赢。
E: Using any means necessary, without considering any consequences to bring down the enemy. In other words, I'll teach you how to win.

C: 我也没办法啊…
E: I can't help it...

C: 打牌重要还是建木重要？
E: What's more important — playing tile games, or The Ambrosial Arbor?

C: 我刚在地衡司登记完。
E: I just finished registering with the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 那个大姐姐哭得好惨……
E: That lady is bawling her eyes out...

C: 用星槎就真能寄托哀思？
E: They use a starskiff to send condolences?

C: 打住打住！小吃摊的老板我认识，他这几年赚够钱不干了，顿顿大鱼大肉的，好得很呐！
E: Hey, I know the stall owner! He's earned enough over the years to retire and is living a pretty comfortable life now!

C: 这件事传得这么快啊？就连我妹妹都跑过来跟我说了。
E: The word got out pretty quickly, huh? Even my sister came and told me about it.

C: 好啦好啦，你说白了不就是「不贵的不吃」呗。
E: Fine. I get it that you only eat expensive stuff.

C: …不，人子，譬喻而言，倘若悬锋人见到自己千锤百锻的锋刃，被庖厨用以切斫肉糜，该作何感想？
E: ...No, child of humanity. Let me put it this way. How would a Kremnoan feel if they saw their meticulously forged blade being used by a cook to mince meat?

C: 好，我再吃些酥皮点心，你也别客气啊。
E: Alright, I'll have some more pastries, and don't be shy. Help yourself!

C: 考虑到你的贡献，我还要赐你「凯撒的恩典」——从今往后，翁法罗斯任何餐厅、旅馆和浴场，都不得向你收取费用。
E: In recognition of your contributions, I hereby grant you the "Imperator's Grace." From this day forward, all restaurants, hotels, and baths in Amphoreus shall provide their services to you free of charge.

C: 我们的救世主脸红了吧？
E: Is our Deliverer blushing?

C: 一切都结束了。
E: It's all over.

C: 哈哈！那我这个饲养员也得提高业务水平了。总之，先咨询一下「奇兽学派」的科学喂养法吧，哈哈哈哈。
E: Haha! Looks like I'll have to work on my zookeeper skills. First things first, let's check out the scientific method of feeding based on "cryptozoology."

C: 唔，我熟识的姐姐，也是个喜欢打扮，每天用鲜花点缀头发的爱美孩子呢。
E: Oh, my dear sister also loves to doll up. She's someone who takes pride in her appearance, and decorates her hair with fresh flowers every day.

C: 那刻夏老师…老师真的太喜欢大地兽了……
E: Professor Anaxa... he really loves dromases way too much...

C: 近一点…再近一点。
E: Closer... Just a little bit closer.

C: 什么？！没了，全没了！
E: What!? It's gone! All gone!

C: 我要求不高：三个饱，两个倒。一天一顿热水澡。
E: I'm not asking for much: Just three meals provided, proper naps and rest, and one hot shower every day.

C: 唉...这一世是没戏了，希望蜕生后成变成武胎剑骨吧。
E: *sigh*... It's not gonna happen in this lifetime. Hopefully I can become more martial after my hatching rebirth.

C: 现在讲究的就是多开花，你拦不住群众爱看什么。
