E: It's all about being versatile these days. You can't stop the audience from voting with their wallet.

C: 怎么说，你也是？
E: You met scalpers as well?

C: 就此离开，没有人会受伤。
E: Leave now, and no one will get hurt.

C: 《双生》系列其一
E: Part one of the Twin Bond series

C: 成长的美感总是要划定在一定的界限内
E: The beauty of growth must always exist within a set limitation

C: 该名炼形者反复强调，自己并非药王信徒，只是药王秘传的试药志愿者…至于携带武器一事，他坚称这是身体的一部分。
E: This shapeshifter has repeatedly assured us that he is not a disciple of Sanctus Medicus, that he was merely a volunteer for a Disciples of Sanctus Medicus medical experiment... As for his weapons... he insists that they are part of his body.

C: 先拆掉炸弹，一了百了！
E: Disarm the bomb first, and solve the problem at its root.

C: 立即开火还击！绝不手软！
E: Open fire immediately and retaliate! Show no mercy!

C: 很可能是一只饭盒，但绝不是盲盒——至少不该是。
E: It might be a lunchbox, but never a mystery box — or at least it shouldn't be.

C: 一定是因为他们「自律」！
E: It must be because of their self-discipline!

C: 银枝大人武艺盖世无双！
E: Lord Argenti's martial arts are unparalleled!

C: 玉界门无凭无依地悬浮于不远处的天空中，那光线似乎有些刺眼。
E: Somewhere not far away, the Jade Gate hovers in the sky with nothing to support it. The light it radiates is somewhat glaring.

C: 画面中央的图案似乎描绘了某种怪异的生物组织突破收容的画面。星槎培育竟然如此恐怖吗？
E: The image in the center of the screen seems to illustrate the process of a bizarre biological tissue breaching its containment. Is the cultivation of a skarskiff such a terrifying process?

C: 星槎种子野蛮生长，终于还是冲破了培养舱。
E: The starskiff seed sprouts in all directions and grows beyond the incubator.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 这是蔷薇科李属的苍城梅，是仙舟苍城的本土物种。它随着苍城的毁灭一同灭绝，变成了如今发蓝光的样子。
E: The Cangcheng Plum Blossom, which belongs to the genus of Prunus and the family of Rosaceae, is a native species of the Xianzhou Cangcheng. It has become extinct following the destruction of the Cangcheng. Now, it has an appearance of a plant that gives out a bluish glow.

C: 不行，规矩就是规矩！
E: No, rules are rules!

C: 这是在践踏粉丝的爱！
E: This is trampling on the passion of the fans!

C: 「…所以连夜写下这篇同人作《凤求凤》，望编剧老师们不吝点评！」
E: "...So I've been writing my own fan fiction during the nights, "Untouchable Lovers" — and I hope you'll leave your comments on it!"

C: 丹鼎司附近出现了形似猿猴的邪恶孽物。要是这孽物不小心落进丹炉里，炼制七七四十九日，不定会闹出怎样的医疗事故。
E: An evil abomination that resembles an ape has been spotted near the Alchemy Commission lately. It would be a major medical mishap if the abomination fell into the elixir crucible by accident and went through the refining process for <unbreak>49</unbreak> days.

C: 人们聚在你身边试图帮助你，但你很清楚，受了这么重的伤，自己应该是要蜕生了。
E: People gather around you, trying to offer help. However, you know you are destined for a hatching rebirth after sustaining such a serious injury.

C: 我要把它送回孩子手里！
E: I must return this to the child!

C: 紧张…缭乱还能出场吗？
E: Gosh, I'm nervous... Will The Dazzling still have a show?

C: 继续念纸条上的字。
E: Keep reading.

C: 你仿佛站在一对情侣间，表情麻木地听他们数落生活中的对方令人厌恶的种种行为——哪怕这些行为根本微不足道。
E: It's as if you're trapped between a pair of lovers, paralyzed in shock as you hear them reel off the many things they have done to annoy each other — no matter how trivial these actions may be.

C: 仙人本为岁阳敌…
E: For millennia, the heliobi and Xianzhou fought endlessly as sworn enemy and foe...

C: 你以后少说「我小时候」。
E: Please stop saying "when I was young."

C: 为了捕获在逃岁阳…
E: In order to catch heliobi on the run...

C: 「今天的美好梦境，明天的难忘回忆。」
E: "Today's Dreamscape, tomorrow's memories."

C: 你敲了敲三月七的房门，里面毫无反应，可能她这会儿正在某个梦境时刻里四处拍照呢。
E: You knock on the door to March 7th's room, but no one responds. She's probably busy snapping photos in one of the Dreamscape moments.

C: 这才叫宴会——足够高调、足够热闹！而且…足够「嗨」！
E: This is what I call a party! It's high profile and lively enough, and it's definitely "high" enough!

C: 梦境里本就没有什么难事，只是人们都被自己的思维和想象力所局限，误以为事物在此仍要遵循「一分努力、一分收获」的法则。
E: Life in the Dreamscape has never been difficult, but everyone is fettered by their mindset and imagination, mistakenly believing that they still have to obey the laws of "no pain, no gain."

C: 但我不会煽动任何人去探求「钟表匠」的秘密。忘记他，或许你的梦境之行会更加美满。
E: Yet, I won't talk anyone into probing the secrets of the Watchmaker. Your journey in the Dreamscape might be more fulfilling if you forget about him.

C: 我跨越了几十个星系，只为找到一个伟大且纯净的灵魂，可结果……
E: I traveled across dozens of galaxies in search of a great and pure soul, but...

C: 你知道吗？我从小就是个特别敏感的孩子。虽然我也一直在努力学习用理性思考，但到了关键的时候，那个感性的自我总是会占到上风。
E: You know, I've been particularly sensitive since I was little. Although I've been trying hard to think rationally, my emotional side always gets the better of me at critical moments.

C: 然而即便是这玩意，比起此刻你带给我的安宁感…唉，要是能把你绑走、随时带在身边就好了。
E: And yet, what it provides is nothing compared to the feelings of calmness and security that you are making me feel right now... Alas, if only I could kidnap you and keep you next to me at all times.

C: 真正踏足这座城市以后，我明白了一个道理——肤浅的不是这座城市，而是那些对艺术一窍不通、被消费主义毒害甚深的游客……
E: After coming here, I've learned one thing — it's not the city that's shallow, but those guests who know nothing about art and are brainwashed by toxic consumerism...

C: 这个就……
E: This is...

C: 我不需要头衔，我只想要在餐桌上有个座位！想要在任何地方，都能大声说出自己的名字！想骄傲地，把刚认识的好朋友介绍给家里人！我、我……
E: I don't need titles. I just want a seat at the table! I want to go wherever I want and to yell out my own name loud and proud! I want to introduce my newfound friends to my family! I, I...

C: 不是怀疑您，只是最近冒充贵宾的人可太多了。瞧，猎犬家系的人正在那巡视呢，紧张兮兮的，怕是有什么大事要发生。
E: I do not doubt you, but there have been far too many imposters of late. Look, members of the Bloodhound Family are on patrol, anxiously on edge, as if something major is about to erupt.

C: 您…您身上不会刚好有些闲钱吧？您介意支持一下正义的调查事业吗？
E: You... Do you have any dispensable cash on you? Care to support righteous investigative journalism?

C: 感谢您支持我的事业…这点礼物不成心意，还请您收下。
E: Thank you for supporting my work... This token gift may not be much, but please take it.

C: …皮皮西人是全宇宙最聪明的种族。
E: ...The Pepeshi people are the smartest species in the universe.

C: 听上去很明智。
E: Sounds pretty sensible.

C: 但技巧永远只能是技巧，技巧没法给的作品创造好的立意，更没法赋予作品时代的厚重感。
E: But technique will only ever be technical — they cannot create concepts for work, nor embody any work with a sense of zeitgeist.

C: 要是面对一般人，他或许真能永远保持一颗愤怒的心，但对你不行——是时候让他见识下钟表把戏的厉害了。
E: If you're just an ordinary patron, maybe he can be mad at you forever. But not if it's you — time to show him the power of the Clockwork.

C: 想和你聊聊。
E: I'd like to have a chat with you.

C: 请拿着这个吧，希望你能对我的秘密…尤其是我的家庭，守口如瓶。
E: Please, take this. I hope you can keep this a secret... Especially don't mention a word to my family.

C: 夏洛特周边的空气似乎被染上了颜色，化作一抹愠怒的红。
E: The air surrounding Charlotte seems painted with colors, and it suddenly turns into an angry red.

C: 当然可以，您想问什么？
E: Of course! What do you want to know?

C: 这是我的谢礼，请您务必收下！
E: This is a gift from me. You must take it!

C: …我不感兴趣。
E: ...I'm not interested.

C: 哦对了，难得有人主动跟我搭话，这个送给你吧。这是一位橡木家系的朋友送给我的…但我不喜欢甜食。
E: Oh right, since it's rare that someone would bother to talk to me, I'll give this to you. A friend from the Oak Family gave it to me... but I don't have a sweet tooth.

C: 这帮家伙不感恩就罢了，还总要摆出一副嘴脸，好像我们上辈子欠了他们钱一样。
E: I'd tolerate these buffoons if they were ingrates, but those disapproving faces they make... It's like we owed them money in a past life.

C: 生意难做啊…再这么下去，我怕不是真的只能去跟人推销「豆汁儿口味苏乐达」了……
E: It's tough doing business here. If things keep up like this, I might end up hawking mung-bean-flavored SoulGlad to others...

C: 拿去吧，再多拿走点！在年轻人身上花的钱越多，我就越有活着的感觉……
E: Take it, take more of it, in fact! The more I spend on young people, the more alive I feel...

C: 自从发现了这件事以后，我就给了自己一个新的使命——将这些误入歧途的世界拉回正轨！让人们明白——只有活物演奏的音乐才叫音乐！
E: Ever since I discovered this, I've made it my life's mission to guide these errant worlds toward the right path! I have to make them understand that music is only music when it's played by the living!

C: 下次再聊…
E: Let's talk next time...

C: 昨天是销售冠军，今天的成交量眼看着也要登顶，真是要感谢每位愿意光顾的客人——就是您吧！您就是我的苏乐达，我的快乐之源！
E: Yesterday we were top in sales, and it looks like we're going to repeat that feat again today. It's all thanks to the customers who are willing to support us — that must be you! You really are my SoulGlad, my source of happiness!

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 创造这一切的「钟表匠」简直是大众灵魂的救星！
E: "The Watchmaker" that created this place, is truly the people's savior!

C: 常盘国的二次元创作已经逐渐形成了一套完整的规范…该写什么样的角色、什么样的世界观、什么样的故事，早就有了成熟的模板。
E: Anime works in Tokiwa have gradually formed a set of complete standards and norms... A well-formed template for what kinds of characters to write, what kinds of worldviews to feature and what kinds of stories to create has been set in place for a very long time.

C: 但雅利洛总共只有六颗行星……
E: But there are only six planets in Jarilo...

C: 「南安亚伯」？你出色的记忆力悄悄提醒你，她上次说的分明是「亚伯南安」……
E: Abenela? Your keen memory reminds you that her previous claim was "Abelane"...

C: 明明就连「忘记交谈对象的名字」这种事，都没能对她造成如此显而易见的影响——或许你真的在无意中戳中了她的痛处。
E: Clearly, even something significant as "forgetting the name of the person you're talking to" has a less noticeable impact on her. Perhaps you unintentionally hit a nerve.

C: 家族会为您提供最正规、最安全的服务，以及最完美的梦境体验。
E: The Family offers the most secure authorized service, along with a flawless dream experience.

C: 如果您在体验梦境时感受到头晕、恶心、呕吐等不适感，请及时脱离梦境，寻求护理师的帮助。
E: If you experience any discomfort such as dizziness, nausea, or vomiting, please leave the Dreamscape and seek assistance from your nurse.

C: 啊，是那个能找出我的人！
E: Oh, the perceptive individual who found me!

C: 恰巧您今天赶上了梦境贩售店的特别酬宾优惠，只要<unbreak>5600</unbreak>万苜蓿币，您就可以带走由爱德华医生亲自整理剪辑的「钟表匠传说」梦境全集！
E: By the way, there is a special offer available today. For only <unbreak>56</unbreak> million Alfalfa credits, you can get the entire compilation of "Legends of the Watchmaker" dreams, meticulously edited by Dr. Edward himself!

C: 人有五名，代价有……
E: Of five people... must pay the price...
...Huh?

C: 我有很多套一样的衣服。
E: I have many sets of the same outfit.

C: 哟，这位客人，还在用腿跑来跑去？多累啊！
E: Hey, there! Are you still moving around on foot? How tiring!

C: 够了够了，你想要啥？
E: That's enough. What do you want?

C: 疾风——力量！
E: Speed is power!

C: 你忘了说我的名字。
E: You forgot to say my name.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 你不禁开始思考：这台机器如此慷慨地发钱，还会有宾客因捉襟见肘离开梦境吗？
E: With this generous machine around, will anyone still be forced to leave the Dreamscape due to financial issues?

C: 滴答！为了向你证明，金表钞的确能提升我在美梦小镇里的影响力——下次和雕像互动的时候，你可要睁大眼睛仔细看好咯！
E: Tick-tock! Pay closer attention the next time you interact with the statue. You'll see how the Clock Credits can indeed make me more influential in Dreamville!

C: 据说、据说我的上一任还遇到过会说话的垃圾桶…！
E: I hear the person working there before me even met a talking trashcan!

C: 即使家族内部，也有不少人对梦中的混乱心存芥蒂，而这个问题在短时间内无法根治。
E: Even within The Family, there are many who bear resentment towards the chaos in the dreams, and this problem won't be resolved anytime soon.

C: 那可就多了，像什么帮客人拍照、跑腿，管理周边商品，修缮游乐设施之类的，偶尔还得照顾扮演动漫形象的同事。
E: Oh, I do plenty, like helping guests take photos, running errands, managing the merch, fixing rides and all that. Sometimes, I even have to take care of my coworkers who play the cartoon characters.

C: 我愿意等待那天的到来…换句话说，除了等待以外，我还能做些什么呢？
E: I'm willing to wait for that day to come... Rather, what else can I do besides wait for it?

C: 梦想啊…我的梦想是能有这么一天——当人们谈论起我的作品时，他们不谈销量、不论票房，而是认真解读、理性探讨，去挖掘、去理解作品的内容与内涵，以及隐藏在背后的真正的「我」……
E: Dream... My dream is to have such a day — when people talk about my works, they would not deliberate its sales nor discuss its box office, but to seriously analyze and rationally study it, to delve into it and understand its content and meaning, and to find the true "me" hidden within...

C: 说实话，我现在如果想要重新回到鸢尾花家系，其实也没那么难。即便最近的作品口碑暴跌，我的影响力和粉丝基数始终还在，比再去培养一个同样风格的新人性价比高多了。
E: Honestly, it wouldn't be that hard if I really wanted to return to the Iris Family fold. Even if my recent works were lambasted, my influence and fan base are still intact. I'm still more cost-effective than building up a newbie with a similar style.

C: 为了向他证明自己，我来到了匹诺康尼，成为一名梦境鼓励师。只可惜…时至今日我依旧没能找到合适的方式来解决我们之间的问题。或许我们之间的友谊…已经走到了尽头。
E: To prove myself to him, I ventured to Penacony and became a Dreamscape Motivator. Unfortunately... I still have yet to come up with any solutions that can help us mend fences to this day. Perhaps... our friendship is already over.

C: 嗯…基本都是我收养的流浪动物。最开始只有两三只，时间一长就多起来了……
E: Yup... They were stray animals that I took in. I only had a couple of them in the beginning, and got more as time went on...

C: 哦？嗨！你看起来…特别酷！这身行头在匹诺康尼很少见啊，可以冒昧问问你是从哪来的吗？
E: Oh? Hey! You look really cool! You never see outfits like that around Penacony. May I ask where you are from?

C: 星穹列车是我家！
E: The Astral Express is my home!

C: 你又怎么知道我没行动呢？
E: How do you know I haven't gotten moving?

C: 有机会再聊吧。
E: Let's talk another time.

C: …我有时会想，为什么我的父母偏偏是家族成员？为什么我从小就得学习「谐乐颂」，背诵那些其实根本就没人在乎的词句，只为了讨所谓的大人物开心？
E: ...I sometimes think, why did my parents have to be members of The Family? Why did I have to study the "Odes of Harmony" from such a young age? Memorizing and reciting all those words that no one cares about just to please these so-called "important figures"?

C: 时钟的指针丝毫不动。可能这就是「愿时光永驻此刻」的真正意涵。
E: The clock's hands are motionless. Perhaps this is the true meaning of "may this moment last forever."

C: 只要表演这个戏法，其他怪物都会笑出来。
E: Every time I pull off that trick, the other monsters will laugh out loud.

C: 他往所在的筑梦工事里创造了一枚自毁装置——别问，这当然不合法——他想以此来要挟家族，让我们为他划分出一块「秩序」的试验田，自己当国王，容纳所有信徒居住。
E: He created a self-destruction device in the dream construction project he belonged to — yes, that's illegal, I know — He wanted to use the explosive to extort The Family so that we'd give him a testing field for Order. He wanted a place where he could be king and get all the believers to live there.

C: 真可惜，我还说问问你的感受。
E: That's a shame. I was just about to ask your thoughts about the shows here.

C: 聊聊你的生活。
E: Let's talk about your life.

C: 说人话。
E: Speak human please.

C: 噢，就这样了？好吧，但如果你还有疑问，我随时可以效劳。
E: Oh, is that so? Fine, but if you have any other questions, I'm available any time to help.

C: 嗯…这次排练效果不错。家人们，记住这种感觉，把它带到舞台上。
E: Mmm... well, today's rehearsal went great. Remember this feeling, my Family, and bring it with you onto the stage.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?
Silver... hand?

C: 咦…真的吗？
E: Huh... really?

C: 嗨！你就是{NICKNAME}吧？我是你的粉丝，有空接受个短暂的采访吗？
E: Hi! Are you {NICKNAME}, right? I'm one of your fans. Have you got time for a quick interview?

C: …怎奈造化弄人！刚进克劳克影业的前两年，我老实得像个白痴，拍了很多老牌制片人丢过来的边角料剧本…我还以为那是正常新人「积攒经验」的过程。
E: ...but the fates make fools of even the best-laid plans! During my first two years at Clock Studios, I was so honest and naive to a fault, shooting all the scrap scripts that seasoned producers can't wait to wash their hands off of... I thought that's the normal process for rookies to build up experience.

C: 依我看，「自由」的反面是「秩序」…而匹诺康尼梦境的两种形态便是这类争论的延伸。
E: If you ask me, the opposite of freedom is order... The two forms of Penacony's Dreamscape are but an extension of this argument.

C: 之前跟踪我的人是你吗？
E: Were you following me just now?

C: 虽然不像筑梦师那么专业，但只要决心足够坚定，任何人都可以把梦境塑造成想要的样子。你得先这样，再这样……
E: Though we may not be as professional as Dreamweavers, all it takes is firm determination and anyone can mold the Dreamscape into the vision they desire. First you do this, then you do that...

C: 艺术能够帮助人们更好地面对生活中的种种苦难，但毕竟无法直接解决实际的生活问题。
E: Art can allow people to better face the various challenges of life, though it cannot directly solve our real-world problems.

C: 从始至终，我希望的从不是他们长成别人眼里的参天大树，而是他们能够拥有像普通人一样的生活，能够在悲伤的时候、喜悦的时候想起音乐，想起那些充满希望的事物——
E: From the very beginning, my aspiration was not for them to grow into what others see as vast, towering trees. It was for them to be able to enjoy the life of a normal person. That when they were happy or sad, they would be able to think of music and think of those moments full of hope...

C: 是我，银河球棒侠！
E: It's me, the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 即便那只是幻觉，每每回想起梦中的场景，我还是感到一阵幸福，好像她真的来到了我身边一样。
E: Even if it was just a hallucination, every time I recall the scene in my dream, I could still feel a surge of happiness as if she had come to me.

C: 要不要试试？或许你会喜欢这种味道。
E: Do you want to give it a try? Perhaps you will like it.

C: 早早预料到这一事实的人们，在文明死亡的最后，将所有的故事都刻到了芯片和石头上，用尽全力扔进太空。
E: The people who anticipated this fact early carved all their stories onto chips and stones at the passing of their civilization and cast these histories into space with all they had.

C: 我曾对你说过吧，乐坊的大家都有些坎坷的过往…比如手风琴小姐曾因梦境的侵蚀产生异变、长笛女士曾被合作多年的伙伴抛弃、圆号先生曾因人类孩童的恶作剧遭受严重的损伤……
E: I told you before that most of the band came from previously rough lives... like Miss Accordion, who was mutated by a corroded Dreamscape, Miss Flute, who was abandoned by her partner for years, or Mr. French Horn, who was grievously wounded by some humans playing a childish prank...

C: 提示？当然可以，我知道所有小鸟的位置啾。
E: A hint? Certainly, I know where all the birds are, tweet.

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，你见过恐龙吗？据说，那东西也是一种小鸟。<color=#dbc291ff>如果有只恐龙参加比赛</color>，周围肯定少不了观赛的小家伙啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: You've seen a dinosaur before? People say it's also a type of bird. <color=#dbc291ff>If a dinosaur joins the competition</color>, there'd be plenty of birds spectating, tweet.

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个小家伙兴冲冲的对我说，它要和钟表小子一起拍戏，依我看，无非就是藏在<color=#dbc291ff>钟表小子的广告牌</color>里啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: A lil' fella enthusiastically told me that it wanted to shoot a movie with Clockie. I think it's just hiding inside <color=#dbc291ff>Clockie's billboard</color>, tweet.

C: 客官您已经带回了这么多孩子吗？啾～
E: Oh wow, you've already brought back so many kids? Tweet!

C: 这么漂亮的剧场，怎么看都是给小鸟们唱歌的地方啾。
E: Any way you look at it, this magnificent theater is a place meant for birds to flock together to sing, tweet.

C: 人家最羡慕的就是音符小姐，只要她唱起歌来，小镇里的争吵全都会停下来，在教育小鸟们的事情上，她也帮了不少忙啾。
E: I envy Miss Note the most — when she sings, all the conflicts in town go silent. And she's helped out a lot in educating the birds, tweet.

C: 唔，虽然很想帮客官，但人家也想不起来它们去哪里了，啾……
E: Oh, I would love to help you, but I can't remember where they went either. Tweet...

C: 好棒的建议。
E: That's great advice.

C: 玩具，我的顾客，有趣的、精巧的、神奇的，能为你带来愉悦感的玩具。
E: Toys, dear customer. Interesting, intricate, and wondrous toys that can bequeath you with joy.

C: 您知道吗，我刚刚听说为宾客服务的梦境迷钟们开始失控了——您知道这是谁的功劳吗？
E: Did you know — I just heard that the Dream Tickers servicing the guests have started to malfunction. Do you know who's the genius behind this?

C: 他明晚也没空，阿姨你就不要再缠着人家了。莱斯特先生不喜欢你这个类型，要是实在不甘寂寞，你不如去问问旁边那位先生吧，你们瞧着倒是般配。
E: He's busy tomorrow night too. Old lady, why don't you give it a rest? Mr. Lester doesn't like women like you. If you're lonely, why don't you try that mister? You two look like a good match.

C: 或许这也是我之所以不喜欢匹诺康尼的原因。我的梦总是满载混乱与孤独，就像我迄今为止的人生一样。而这个人工构建的「美梦」……
E: Perhaps this is the reason why I dislike Penacony. My dreams are always full of chaos and loneliness, not unlike the life that I've lived thus far. As for this artificially designed "sweet dream"...

C: 我是现任家主，平日里负责打理家族名下的产业。说来，我听闻您是位无名客，对吧？
E: As the current family head, I manage the family's assets as part of my day-to-day work. Having said that, I've heard that you are a member of the Nameless, am I right?

C: 你注意到眼前的男子，他沉默不语，但脸上的表情却不时变化，似在苦苦思索着什么。
E: You notice that the facial expression of the man in front of you changes every so often despite his constant silence, as though he is thinking deeply about something.

C: 出自人手的梦境无论多么光怪陆离…也总有看厌的那一天啊。
E: Regardless of how bizarre and fantastical an artificial Dreamscape can be, one will ultimately grow tired of it.

C: ……我好像说多了。
E: ...I seem to have said too much.

C: 即使能来到这里的都是贵客，令人恼火的麻烦还是每天都见得到……
E: Even though the only people able to come here are esteemed guests, annoying incidents still happen every day...

C: 还有某位不知名的智者，据说他从一个从未有人到达过的地方取回了某种奥秘，成为了能在时间当中倒着生活的人。
E: Or perhaps you've heard of an obscure sage, who managed to retrieve some sort of mysterious secret from a place that no one else has been able to reach. By doing so, he gained the ability to live his life in reverse, against the normal flow of time...

C: 那么，在我已经完成基础的情况下，您来决定它的口味风格吧——
E: Right, now that I've finished preparing the base, you shall decide how it tastes...

C: 那么，请用吧，特辣草莓拌饭。
E: Well then, may I present Extra-Spicy Strawberry Mixed Rice. Please enjoy.

C: 我也曾听说过，在某颗遥远的异星，他们将自己禁卫军的领袖尊称为主厨，还有主锅和主勺一类的职阶。
E: I've also heard of a distant planet where the leader of the imperial guard is known as the head chef, and their ranks included titles such as Cauldron Major and First Ladle.

C: 这位朋友，站在高处的感觉如何？您也喜欢丈量万物的尺度吗？
E: How do you feel standing so high up, my friend? Do you also enjoy taking measure of the scale of the world?

C: 如果再来一次，我还卖这甲虫！这是为全银河的食客谋福利。
E: If I had the chance to do it all over again, I would still sell that beetle! It's for the benefit of food connoisseurs across the cosmos.

C: 上节目要演戏，讨生活也要演戏，习惯了就好。
E: For me, being on-screen and off is only about switching into different roles. Everything works out once I get accustomed to it.

C: 这艘空艇？简直是我的第二个家！顶级派对，各路名流，应有尽有——你永远不知道会在下一个转角遇见什么级别的大人物！
E: The airship? Oh, it's practically my second home! Think top-tier parties, everything you need at your fingertips, and elites from every field imaginable. You never know which bigshots you'll bump into around the corner!

C: 各种千奇百怪的案子我都接过，而我每一次都能让客户满意。当然…这就是为什么我的咨询费比其他同行高出一大截。
E: I've taken on all sorts of strange cases and every single time, my clients walk away satisfied. Of course, this explains why my consultation fees are a lot higher than other fellow lawyers.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个热爱健身的孩子喜欢在<color=#dbc291ff>天花板上</color>倒立，您可以多抬头看看啾~
E: Let me think... Oh right, there's a child who's passionate about fitness who loves hanging from the <color=#dbc291ff>ceiling</color>. Maybe you can find it by looking up, tweet~

C: 不知道您是给自己买还是给别人买？如果是选礼物给老人或小孩，记得查看配料表哦，汪！不同口味的含糖量也不同，汪。
E: Are you buying this for yourself or as a gift? Don't forget to check the ingredient list if you're getting it for the elderly or young children, woof! Different flavors also have different sugar contents, woof.

C: 如果是给宠物买——不行的，汪。宠物不能食这些东西，请注意不要让宠物吃到，汪。
E: If you're thinking of buying it for your pet, no go, woof! Pets can't have this, so make sure to keep them out of reach, woof.

C: 你这儿都卖些什么？
E: What have you got for sale here?

C: …我本该站在舞台上发光发热的，现在却困在这里…上班就是上刑，我明白了…什么时候我才能被无罪释放啊？！
E: ...I was meant to dazzle on stage, but here I am, trapped... I now know that having to work is punishment in itself. Gah, when can I be free from this misery!?

C: 您说吧，我听着呢。
E: Please go on. I'm listening.

C: 是啊，都是我家的…哎？！
E: That's right, we're all fam—Huh!?

C: 我选帕姆！
E: I'll go with Pom-Pom!

C: 归乡时，他的妻子已离开人世，女儿也白发苍苍，可他的时间只过了一年零两个月。
E: When the astronaut finally returned home, his wife had already passed away and his daughter was now an old lady with a head of gray hair. But to him, only fourteen months had passed.

C: 他只想利用我的正面形象愚弄公众，做他企业的代言人或者为他的公益项目站台，为的是替那些见不得人的生意洗刷嫌疑。
E: He only wanted to use my positive image to fool the public. By making me the ambassador of his businesses and engaging me to help him garner support for his charity programs, he could clear the suspicions regarding his shady businesses.

C: 这是我第一次见她参加派对，我太紧张了，傻愣了好久，久到派对都快结束了才回过神。
E: It was the first time I'd seen her at a party, and I was so nervous that I just froze. I didn't snap out of it until well after the event was over.

C: 她是筑梦学院的优秀学生，边远星球来的贫困户，背景薄得吓人，用大号字体都印不满一张纸…
E: She's a model student at Dreamweaver Academy, but she comes from a poor family from one of those faraway planets. She hardly has any background to speak of. Whatever information found on her doesn't take up a page, even with a <unbreak>20</unbreak>-point font...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 但我清楚，如果我在亮相的首场比赛内没有惊艳全场，他们就会抛弃我，转而寻找下一个商机。
E: But I knew full well that if I hadn't shocked everyone with my debut performance, they'd have abandoned me and gone straight after their next business opportunity.

C: 眼前的学生怒气冲冲，你开始犹豫起是否该继续搭话。
E: The student ahead of you is boiling with rage, you start to wonder if talking to them is a good idea.

C: …其实，还有一个原因。我已经到了该申请实习的时候，但简历上能写的实在是有些单薄。
E: ...Actually, there is another reason. It's time to start applying to internships, but I've realized that my resume is looking a little thin.

C: 你忙吧，不打扰了。
E: I'll let you get on.

C: 嗨！这位同学，能占用你一点时间吗？我希望能向你介绍一下我们的社团——「怪奇俱乐部」！
E: Hi! Fellow student, can I take a moment of your time? I was hoping to introduce you to our school club... the Strange Club!

C: 学院角落平平无奇的喷泉却是「迷路圣地」，有人说那是幽灵作祟，有人说那是筑梦BUG；知名教授众目睽睽之下化身气球，是人性的扭曲，还是道德的沦丧…等等等等！
E: An unremarkable water fountain in a corner of the university is actually a "shrine of the lost." Some say it's haunted by ghosts, others think it is a dreamweaving bug. A famous professor transformed into a balloon in front of a room full of witnesses. Is it a distortion of humanity or the loss of morality...! And that's just the beginning!

C: 「睡蕉小猴」知道吧——那玩意儿在前段时间火得离谱，也消失得突兀。
E: You've heard of Slumbernana Monkey, right? That thing was trending like crazy not long ago, but now it's vanished into thin air just as quickly.

C: 前阵子克劳克影城的怪事你知道吧——一场转瞬即逝的筹码雨之后，天空破开了个巨大的口子。
E: You've heard about the weird story that went down at Clock Studios Theme Park a while ago, right? A flood of chips started raining down, then a huge hole opened in the sky.

C: 神经病啊！自己不吃辣的，还得所有人陪你一起啃水煮白菜？
E: Is something wrong with you!? You think just because you can't handle spicy food that everyone around you would have to live on boiled cabbage?

C: 到那个时候…说不定我也能在电视上常驻露面，天啊…我都不敢想了！
E: When that time comes... who knows? I might be a regular on TV! Oh gee... I don't even dare to imagine that!

C: 那个地方不太适合你…
E: That place doesn't really suit you...

C: 所以，我也需要践行*我的忍道*。
E: And so, I also need to follow my way of the ninja.

C: 不如让我来当学院代表吧！
E: How about letting me be the representative instead!

C: 嗯呐，回见——对了，记得关注我哦！
E: Sure thing, see ya then. Oh yes, don't forget to follow me!

C: 气死我了！视频账号下面老是有黑粉，竟然说我念台词的语气像是AI生成的——开什么玩笑！他根本都就不懂表演！
E: Infuriating! A troll keeps showing up in the video channel comments saying that my diction sounds AI-generated — what a joke! He doesn't know the first thing about acting!

C: 你准备参与开拓之行吗？
E: Are you planning to join the trailblazing journey?

C: 智慧、财富、歌喉、舞技，拼尽你所拥有的一切，让世界为你让路。
E: You've got it all: Intelligence, wealth, singing and dancing skills. Let the world make way for you.

C: 被梦所滋养的花儿，永远都不会凋谢。
E: The flower nourished by dreams will never wilt.

C: *继续吹口哨*
E: *continue whistling*

C: 金币，金币，猫咪形状的金币，金币…扎格列斯的鬼脸？
E: Gold coins, gold coins, cat-shaped gold coins, gold coins... Zagreus's funny face?

C: 不知道该从哪逛起。
E: I don't know where to begin.

C: 因为路对面有个智械。
E: Because there was an Intellitron across the street.

C: 在身上装了绿灯。
E: Who put a green light on their body.

C: 人生逃不过的三件事——
E: There are three unavoidable things in life:

C: 我！今天！
E: Me! Today!

C: 明白，女士。
E: Understood, ma'am.

C: 为什么就是没有。
E: Why isn't there...

C: 这可是在梦里…
E: We're in a dream. Come on...

C: 不，你不想。
E: You. You're not thinking.

C: …不是，我在这儿挥手挥了有二十分钟了吧，怎么一辆愿意载我们的车都没有？
E: ...Seriously, I've been waving my hand here for about <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes. Why hasn't a single car stopped to offer us a ride?

C: 干脆把这张海报带回家吧。我要私藏这份美丽…不让其它任何人染指。
E: I'll just take this poster home... I'll keep her beauty all to myself... No one else should get their hands on it.

C: 你就累的走不动了。
E: You're already too tired to move?

C: 我去，我手机掉了！
E: Oh no, I dropped my phone!

C: 不可能，我看中的偶像比她强多了！
E: Impossible. My idol's much better than her!

C: 真是意犹未尽…
E: I want more...

C: 非常抱歉，剧院暂中止服务，请耐心等待。
E: My apologies. The theater has temporarily suspended its services, please have some patience.

C: 你也是知更鸟的粉丝？
E: Are you also a Robin fan?

C: 谁说得清呢？
E: Who knows?

C: 嘿嘿，就知道你和我是一伙的！
E: Hee-hee, I knew you were with me!

C: 不嘛，我还想玩！
E: Nooo, I still wanna play!

C: 啊？这事我怎么不知道。
E: Eh? Why wasn't I informed about this?

C: 一切都会好起来的…
E: Everything will get better...

C: 你看这星空，多美啊！
E: Look at this sky of stars. Magnificent!

C: 请勿相信任何私教…
E: Beware of personal trainers...

C: 仔细着点，好好检查…
E: Keep your eyes peeled and look very carefully...

C: 嘘——小心隔墙有耳…
E: Shhh, the walls have ears...

C: 害我们行程推迟！
E: You've caused us to have to push back our itinerary!

C: 那不是仙舟名产吗…呕…总得尝尝……
E: Isn't this a famous delicacy from the Xianzhou... Ugh... Gotta try it at least...

C: 酒店大堂钟表的设计图，解释了一切基于美学的设计思路细节，却从没提过这些离散的部件是靠什么浮在那里的。
E: The hotel lobby clock's blueprint explains all the theoretical details of aesthetic design but does not mention how the scattered parts are floating on their own.

C: 财富学院学生日常使用的储物柜，与其他学院不同的是，这套柜子设置了超时付费系统。时间观念不强的学生为此缴纳了巨额滞纳金，好消息是，财富学院近期推出了包月套餐。
E: A locker typically used by the Fortune Academy students. What makes it different from the other academies is its overtime fee mechanism. Students with a bad sense of time have paid hefty prices for this system. But the good news is, Fortune Academy has recently launched a monthly bundle.

C: 继续想象吧，你想要组建一个什么样的音乐社呢？
E: Keep going. What sort of music club would you like to form?

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 你右键查看「超智能病毒」的属性，发现它占用的存储空间大大增加了。
E: You right-click to check the properties of the Supersmart Virus and find that its storage space has significantly increased.

C: 金属桶盖手感冰凉又光滑…它不会是什么冷血动物吧？
E: The metal lid feels cold and smooth... It can't be a cold-blooded creature, can it?

C: 哎呀，这你可找对人了，那边工坊里的人都说我是「大地兽偶像制作人」，没有人比我更懂大地兽们的故事。你想听谁的？
E: You've found the dromas master! Down at the workshop, they all call me the Dromas Idol Producer! When it comes to those marvelous creatures, I'm your go-to person! Whose story catches your eye?

C: 哈哈，借您吉言。改天说不定还指望着您照顾生意呢，再会啊～
E: Thank you! Feel free to swing by and grab anything that catches your eye! Catch you later!

C: 手绘陶罐，奇珍古玩，价格不贵，随便看随便瞧。
E: Hand-painted pots and ancient artifacts, all at reasonable prices. Feel free to take a look around.

C: …她睡着了。
E: ...Or rather, she is sleeping.

C: 对他们而言，这样的用餐方式不仅有益身体健康——主要是有助于消化——还能表达对于吉奥里亚的崇敬与感激。
E: For them, this unique way of eating wasn't just about the health benefits like aiding digestion. It was a gesture of respect and gratitude towards Georios.

C: 以上仅代表「本我」自己的说法。
E: The above is just the "id's" own take.

C: …退化路线出现了分歧，需要你提前选择。
E: ...The regression path has diverged. You need to make a preemptive choice.

C: 但我要说，塞纳托斯实际上是一个好人——这家伙默默地承受了世人所讨厌的一切，还为那些不容于世的人们提供了绝佳的保护伞。
E: But in my eyes, Thanatos is actually a good person. That Titan quietly endures all the hatred of the world and even offers a sanctuary for those ostracized by society.

C: 唉，或许我应该把这个点子推销给云石市集里的哪位赚钱高手，拿去设计点拼图玩具什么的？不过隔行如隔山，这种主意可能在人家那里也不是什么好点子。
E: Perhaps I should share this idea with some smart vendor at the Marmoreal Market to turn it into producing jigsaws or puzzle toys? But then again, toy design is not my forte, and this whole concept might not click with them.

C: 实在抱歉，客人。刚刚我的思绪飘到了万径之门外面，绝非有意要无视您。
E: My sincerest apologies, good guest. My thoughts wandered out of the Gate of Infinity just now, I absolutely did not mean to ignore you.

C: 怎么每次见你都在发呆？
E: Why are you always in a daze when I see you?

C: …实话实说，其实云石天宫的浴场，一开始并不是免费的，采用的是后付费制。设计者或许有他的道理，但作为客人而言，会有种受到了欺骗的感觉。
E: ...Truth be told, Marmoreal Palace's bath was not meant to be free in the beginning — we employed the pay-as-you-go policy. The designer may have their reasons behind this but it felt more like a scam to our guests when they were asked to pay.

C: 嗯，如此不合算的买卖，您会拒绝也没办法，还请不要放在心上。看看其他的吗？
E: Mm, it is only natural that you refuse such a financial sham. Please do not take it to heart. Will you take a look at the others?

C: 啊，孩子，在我的庭院里过得还舒适吗？
E: Ah, child, are you doing well in my courtyard?

C: 神谕降临了？
E: Is this the moment of prophecy bestowal?

C: {NICKNAME}，你还好吗？你已经在浴池里待了超过两个时刻了。
E: {NICKNAME}, are you all right? You've been in the bath for more than two hours.

C: 你尚有前途漫漫，方才启程
E: Your journey has just begun, your path lies yonder ahead of you.

C: 如你所见，沐浴。虽然我少有疲惫的心境，但躯体因劳碌产生的沉重之感却会不断积累。定期前来浴场，正是为了将其纾解。
E: As you can see, I enjoy bathing. Although I rarely experience fatigue, the feeling of heaviness in my body from a busy life does accumulate endlessly. I come to the baths periodically to relieve this burden.

C: 下次再聊吧。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 后来机缘巧合下，我们与奥赫玛结为联盟，为「金织」主持的逐火之旅效力。期间，悬锋孤军战功赫赫，并在征途中杀回王城，令先王败而授首。
E: Later, we happened to ally ourselves with Okhema and offered our services to the Flame-Chase Journey led by the Goldweaver. During that time, this lone army of Kremnos achieved great military success. Along the expedition, we fought back into their home city and defeated the previous king.

C: 你最近感觉怎么样？
E: How have you been feeling lately?

C: 递给西塞罗。
E: Pass it to Cicero.

C: 哈哈哈，现在的年轻人可真是…但毕竟我也不是什么老顽固，能理解、能理解。
E: Hahaha! Youngsters these days... Though, I'm no stick in the mud. It's understandable. Very understandable.

C: 哦。这个简单。
E: Oh. That's easy.

C: 这样啊，抱歉，我还以为…唔，希望没打扰到你！
E: I see, sorry. I thought that... Well, I hope I didn't bug you there!

C: 瑟希斯在上，看在研究的份上，能不能让我进去啊...哎呀，是你啊！怎么，找我有什么事吗？还是说，是哪位好心的泰坦指引你前来帮我的？
E: For the love of Cerces... For the sake of my research, please let me in... Oh-ho, it's you! What's up, are you looking for me? Or did a kind-hearted Titan guide you to come and help me?

C: 因此，我正计划着系统采集不同浴池的泉水样本，并用它们灌溉我种植的泪葱，以观察不同泉水对作物生长的具体影响。
E: Therefore, I am devising a systematic collection of water samples from different baths, then use these samples to water my tear onions to observe how different spring waters impact plant growth.

C: 黑潮是什么样的？
E: What is the black tide like?

C: 「要么高举着它凯旋，要么躺在上面荣归。」很有气势的俗语。但那些战败后活着回来的战士同样值得尊敬。
E: "Return holding it high in triumph, or return with honor laid atop it." It is a powerful old saying. However, even those warriors who return alive after defeat deserve to be respected, too.

C: 「王翼冠军」克拉特鲁斯曾赠与我一面盾牌，鼓励我在战场上寻得荣耀…可这么多天过去了，我还是只能在这里站岗，没有机会离开城邦、征讨外敌。
E: Krateros of the King's Aegis, once gifted me a shield, encouraging me to garner glory on the battlefield... But many days have passed, and yet I remain still at this post — no opportunity to leave the city and quell enemy forces.

C: 要知道，军队在出征之前总会向尼卡多利祈求赐福。那可不是什么沐浴焚香、念诵祷文的仪式，而是一场大混战……
E: You must know that armies pray for Nikador's blessing before they deploy. It is not a ceremony of baths in fragrant oils and incense, nor is it solemn prayers from texts, but a melee of chaos...

C: 等他打完。
E: Wait for him to finish.

C: 山之民，跑得慢。所以最早，离开深山，我们蜷起四肢，轰隆隆，像滚石。
E: Slow, Mountain Dwellers run. Curled up, we did when leaving the mountains, like rolling stones.

C: 嘿，朋友。来找翻飞自如的好宝贝？
E: Hey friend. Looking for something that soars as easily as it breathes?

C: 有空聊聊吗？
E: Got a moment to chat?

C: 你这还有其他业务吗？
E: Do you have other businesses?

C: 停下，这里不是厕所啊——！！！
E: Stop, this isn't a toilet!!!

C: 最开始确实很不适应，第二天醒来总空落落的。但是不久以后，心绪就安宁下来了。我想母亲也会替我高兴吧。
E: It was hard to get used to at first. I would feel so empty when I woke up in the mornings. But my mind started to feel calm after a while. I imagine my mother would be happy to know that.

C: 你心中柔软的部分被有所触动……
E: The soft parts in your heart have been touched...

C: 但奥赫玛不需要新的历法。
E: But Okhema does not need a new calendar.

C: 好吧，现在你明白他们俩的主要工作是什么了。
E: Alright, now you know what their main jobs are.

C: 逻辑学同样如此。既然使用三段论来论证你的观点，难道你还要否认逻辑规律并不是知识吗？
E: The study of logic is much the same. As you have used syllogism to prove your point, surely you will not deny that the rules of logic are not true knowledge?

C: 离开在先的数，时间将无法被度量；离开作为参照的某物，空间将无法被衡量。那么，时空究竟是囊括所有事物的盒子，还是依附事物才有意义的东西？
E: Time cannot be measured without numbers preceding it. Space cannot be measured without an object to serve as a reference. So, does that mean that space-time is a giant box that encapsulates all things, or is it something that only has meaning by attaching itself to something else?

C: 门扉五♪，践行二♬，离愁堆一篮♪——
E: Five doors open wide, two steps in stride, a basket full of parting sighs—

C: 幸福总是转瞬即逝，不幸才是世间的永恒。就算现在每一天过得平稳安泰，可黑潮要是真的来了…缺胳膊断腿恐怕都是小事。
E: Happiness is fleeting, while misfortune endures. Even if days are peaceful now, should the black tide truly strike, losing a limb would be the least of our concerns.

C: 哦，这个最接近奥赫玛本身就有的活动！捷足战舞其实就是光脚跳舞…不过动作比较大开大阖，而且是穿戴好盔甲、全副武装地跳。
E: Oh, this is the activity most similar to what Okhema itself has! Swift-footed dancing is actually just barefoot dancing... but with much larger and more sweeping movements, and it's done while fully armored, armed to the teeth.

C: 你刚刚说义肢…
E: You just mentioned prosthetics...

C: 打探消息。
E: Seek information.

C: 怀着微妙的心情，你给这人简单讲了讲自己与某位「寒腿叔叔」的孽缘。当然，是翁法罗斯本地化版本。
E: With certain strange emotions, you briefly explained your relationship with a certain Mr. Cold Feet. Of course, you gave them the localized Amphoreus version.

C: 一股勇气涌上心头！
E: A surge of courage wells up within!

C: 不止这个原因…偷偷告诉你。每次壁画进行修缮，负责的艺术家都会添上一两笔自己的东西。你可能觉得没什么，但经不起积少成多。举个例子——
E: But that's not the only reason... I'll tell you a secret. Every time a mural is restored, the artist in charge adds a few strokes of their own. You might think it's nothing, but small changes add up over time. For example —

C: 要是不做这个奇美拉管理员，不完成生命花园的指标，我该怎么说服负责人放我随意使用浴池，还能领花园的津贴？
E: If I didn't take on this role as the chimera administrator and didn't meet the Garden of Life's quotas, how would I convince the person in charge to let me use the baths freely and still receive the Garden's allowance?

C: 玫瑰换个名字，也依然芬芳。
E: A rose by any other name would smell as sweet.

C: 哈哈，你可真幽默，我的朋友！
E: Haha, you're funny, friend!

C: 学者怎么老是待在浴池里？
E: Why do scholars always stay in the baths?

C: 她总说什么「控制经费」「缺乏实用性价值」。拜托！你想想艾格勒，它创造光明的时候，考虑过要解决奥赫玛的照明问题吗？
E: All she talks about is "controlling the budget" and "lacks a practical value proposition." Oh, puh-lease! Was Aquila even thinking of Okhema's illumination problem when it created light?

C: 咳咳，这位朋友...要种子吗？
E: Ahem, hello there, friend... Want some seeds?

C: 嗝…这么盛大的日子，当然要来一杯…嗝，鲜血蜜酿了。敬欧利庞王和他的勇士们！
E: *hic*... Such a momentous day, of course we must have a drink with... *hic* sanguine honey brew. Praise King Eurypon and his warriors!

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，可惜太忙了不然等你回空间站的时候，我请你喝下午茶！你都不知道，现在科室里的新人都说我温柔体贴...这还真得感谢你的特训呢！」
E: "{NICKNAME}, I wish I wasn't so slammed with work, I'd invite you for tea when you dock back at the space station. Believe it or not, all the rookies here think I'm super kind! Credit goes to your expert training!"

C: 「在几个月的争吵中，一半的社员决定与我们分道扬镳，至此我觉得正当权益会社也没什么存在的必要了，就此解散还能留个体面。所以…以后也不需要你来帮忙了，真的很感谢你，有空的话可以来我这儿喝个下午茶，我们再唠嗑唠嗑。」
E: "After months of debate, half of our members chose to go their separate ways. It seems The Rightful Rights Society has served its purpose, so we're thinking of disbanding to end on a dignified note. I won't need your help moving forward, but I'm deeply thankful for everything. If you're ever in the area, drop by for some tea and a chat."

C: 头两天有点不适应，天还没亮就起床了，还以为自己在前线，下意识的要去检查物资，结果被我老婆一顿笑话……
E: The first few days were tough. I kept waking up before dawn, as if I was still on the front lines, automatically checking supplies, only to be laughed at by my wife...

C: 唉，可惜我们不是生活在黄金世啊。
E: Ah, what a pity that we do not live in the Era Chrysea.

C: 嗯…这时代确实没有流民和骗子能够穿得这样华丽精致，也许是我误会你了。
E: Hmm... It is true that a refugee or scammer would not be draped in such extravagant finery. Perhaps there has been a misunderstanding on my part.

C: 是有什么事吗，还是说想吃点小甜饼？我刚把面团揉好放进烤炉，要不等一会儿？
E: Do you need something, or are you craving some sweets? I just put a fresh batch in the oven. Care to wait a bit?

C: 难以理解。
E: I'm struggling to understand this.

C: 如今孤身把守悬锋、将黑潮尽数拦截的迈德漠斯，在众人心目中，已然当得起翁法罗斯守护者一称。
E: Now remaining alone at Castrum Kremnos and holding back the entirety of the black tide, Mydeimos has undoubtedly earned the title of Guardian of Amphoreus in the hearts of the people.

C: 经过千年的积累，行走大地的医师们总结出了许多可靠的知识。如果要用最简洁的方式和灰宝阐述的话，那就是：轻者用药调养，重者手术治疗，危者施加祝福。
E: Over millennia, the healers wandering the land accumulated a wealth of reliable knowledge. If I were to summarize it for you, Grayie, it'd be something like: For minor ailments, we use medicine to nurse them back to health. For serious injuries, we perform surgeries. And for those in critical condition, we invoke blessings.

C: 不会是诈骗吧…
E: Sounds like a scam...

C: 讲讲撰写诗篇的诗人…
E: The poets who wrote great works...

C: 噢，又见面了，亲爱的民众。你是来寻求帮助的吗？
E: Oh, we meet again, dear citizen. Are you looking for help?

C: 他、他怎么样了？
E: How... how is he?

C: 我们都清楚彼此的决意，此时说什么都是多余的。
E: We both understood each other's resolve. At this moment, words were unnecessary.

C: 是吧？我就说他是最棒的！
E: Right? I knew it, he's the best!

C: 呃，你好？请问你有见过一个叫马尔库斯的人，是个傻大个儿，之前经常在这附近晃悠。
E: Uh, hello? Have you seen a guy named Marcus? He's a big, simpleminded guy, used to hang around here a lot.

C: 我觉得最有可能的情况是…抬头看这火烧的天空啊！仿佛下一秒，这火球就要将刻法勒的背脊折断，坠入人间。
E: I think the most likely scenario is... just look at this burning sky! It feels like the fireball will snap Kephale's back and fall to the ground at any moment.

C: （嗯，再见，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！愿刻法勒祝福你！）
E: (I will. Goodbye, {F#miss}{M#sir}! May Kephale bless you!)

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽！可预想中的迷醉之意并未到来……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go. But the expected intoxication doesn't hit...

C: 这…是我冒昧了，不过命运泰坦在前，我们也总该向前看嘛。
E: Well... I may be overstepping, but the Fate Titans are ahead, and we should always look forward.

C: 我们击败了艾格勒…
E: We defeated Aquila...

C: 那么，只余最后一颗火种有待诸位收回了。假使阿格莱雅大人能听见这个消息，一定会感到如释重负吧……
E: Now, only the last Coreflame remains to be taken. If Lady Aglaea hears this news, it will surely feel like a huge weight has been lifted from her shoulders...

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 要去秘境探险吗？别害怕，只要我们在一起，就什么都能做到。
E: Wanna go explore in the secret realm? No need to be scared. As long as we're together, we can do anything!

C: 白厄哥！这边——嘘，小点声……
E: Mr. Phainon! Over here — shhh, keep it down...

C: 要是之后我老爹问起来，你就说我在谷仓那边，反正我平时都往那躲。
E: If my dad asks, just say I'm by the granary. That's where I usually hide anyway.

C: 我还有事，先走啦。
E: I've got to do something else. Gotta get moving first.

C: 哼哼，现在还不能让你知道，不然就没有惊喜啦。
E: Heh heh, I can't show it to you yet, or it won't be a surprise.

C: 然后，等我长成大孩子，就带笨蛋披索一起冒险、拯救世界！
E: Then, when I'm a big kid, I'll drag that dummy Piso with me, and we'll go on adventures and save the world together!

C: 迷？这是…好陌生的味道。
E: Mem? This taste... it's unfamiliar.

C: 迷！任何人都不许质疑我专业的味蕾。菜里的每滴调料，我都能尝出来迷！
E: Memi! No one's allowed to question my professional palate! I can taste every single drop of seasoning in that stew, memi!

C: 但在此之前，必须勤加练习。
E: But before that... I need to practice, and practice hard.

C: 使出全力冲出泥巴，你们就能看到这个美丽的世界，还有我，一直守候在你们身边迷！
E: Push through the mud with everything you've got, and you'll see how beautiful the world is. And me, memi — I am right here, always waiting by your side!

C: 这身打扮…你是打算扮演故事里的冷酷骑士吧？没准你也可以角逐舞会的桂冠呢~
E: That outfit... are you dressed as a cold, mysterious knight from a story? You might even win the dance crown yourself~

C: 吓…吓我一跳！还好人家会飞，不然就要掉下去了嘤！
E: Y—you scared me! Good thing I can fly, or I'd have fallen, eep!

C: 好呀。人家会一直在这里。{NICKNAME}需要的时候，就来找我吧。
E: That's okay. I'll be waiting right here. Look for me whenever you need me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「海洋」力量塑造的幻境中，浮现着半神醉梦中的泡影……
E: In the illusion sculpted by the authority of Ocean, a bubble of a drunken demigod emerged...

C: 但我其实并不憎恨…相反，她收养了因黄金战争而流离失所的我，于我而言，她与母亲无异。
E: But I don't actually hate her... On the contrary, she adopted me, who was once homeless because of the Chrysos War. To me, she might as well be my mother.

C: 吼吼！强身健体，聪耳明目，提升道德水准，增强审美品味——以上几条通通没有吼。
E: Hoho! Strengthening the body, sharpening the mind, improving ethics and morality, refining one's sense of aesthetics — it does none of the above.

C: 看啊…我…在水里…游泳嘤…咕噜噜……
E: Look, I'm... swimming... in the water, eep... *gurgle*

C: 你你你别过来嘤！哎不对，我其实没有变慢？
E: D—D—Don't come near me, eep! Huh, wait, I wasn't slowed?

C: 怎么一直是你？
E: Why is it always you?

C: 你这漂亮的小脑袋瓜究竟怎么长的？里头不会比陶罐还空吧？
E: What's wrong with that pretty little head of yours? Don't tell me it's as hollow as a dolium inside?

C: 「在光历的第三个一百年中，人们在刻法勒脚下建立起聚落，由此诞生了奥赫玛的前身。」
E: "In the third century of the Light Calendar, people built settlements at the feet of Kephale. Thus was the precursor of Okhema founded."

C: 正是，我亲爱的学生。
E: That is correct, my dear student.

C: 我决定了。我将放弃成为辅祭的机会，离开这里，前往刻法勒的城邦——奥赫玛。
E: I've decided. I'll give up the chance to become an acolyte, leave here, and go to Kephale's city-state — Okhema.

C: 这不就是「机械降神」吗？我对奥赫玛的观众水平表示怀疑。
E: Wait, isn't this a literal "deus ex machina"? This makes me skeptical about the tastes of Okhemans.

C: 别招惹大地兽。
E: Don't aggravate the dromases.

C: 你作为星穹列车的宾客，应该待在更加安全的区域。
E: As a guest from the Astral Express, you should stay in a safer area.

C: 那个…
E: Um...

C: 这次入侵对你造成了什么影响？
E: How did the invasion affect your life?

C: 也难怪，种子岛那边的人嘴巴一天到晚叭叭不停，动不动就吹嘘什么「莱斯莉的十一杯畅饮咖啡」神话。
E: Why am I surprised? People on Seed Isle never shut up. They keep bragging about the legend of Lesley's <unbreak>11</unbreak> Cups of Coffee.

C: 她莱斯莉能做到的，我埃美丽也能做到，而且会做的比她更强、更好！
E: Whatever Lesley can do, I can do it too. And I will do it even better!

C: 你好…贵客，是你唤醒了我吗？
E: Greetings... honored guest. Was it you who awakened me?

C: 无论哪位，保佑我们平安…
E: Whoever's up there, keep us safe...

C: 什么？快让我瞧瞧——整天听老爹夸你，今天终于让我见到活的了！
E: Really? I wanna see! Dad never stops talking about you, and I finally get to see the real deal!

C: 这次宴会，我想准备些美味的吃食去分享，猎手小姐可以和我一起吗？
E: I was planning to bring some treats for everyone at the party. Would you mind helping me with the cooking, Miss Archer?

C: 真的会有人吃土吗？
E: Do people actually eat dirt?

C: 还是别理他们了，我知道这些秘酿傻瓜脑子里在想什么——「重要的是喝掉下一杯！」
E: Just ignore them. I know what these ambrosia fools have in mind — "All that matters is the next drink!"

C: …好吧，要费多少事我可不管了——算我一个。
E: ...Fine, I don't care how much trouble it'll be — count me in.

C: 恭喜。
E: Congratulations.

C: 坚持不懈，你就是最潮的肌肉美男！
E: Keep at it, and you'll be the hottest beefcake around!

C: 除了很可爱…真的很可爱…嗷呜……
E: This is not only adorable... but really... adorable, awoo...

C: 呜嗡！（好啊，但我还不是很熟练，表现形式会有点怪，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}看完可别骂我……）
E: Grumph! (Okay! But I'm still practicing, so it might look a little weird... {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, please don't be disappointed after seeing this...)

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 哼哼！我会代表正义再次出战！
E: Hmph! I shall fight again in the name of Justice!

C: 「摇光爵」？
E: Dux Lucens?

C: 每次那刻夏老师和阿格莱雅站在一起，就意味着奥赫玛要被闹得天翻地覆，哪怕是现在，我也不敢精神放松啊……
E: Every time Professor Anaxa and Aglaea stand together, it means Okhema is about to be turned upside down. Even now, I can't let my guard down...

C: 呵…有浪漫之处，亦有不便之处。
E: Heh... It has its romantic aspects, as well as its inconveniences.

C: 关于那本书，我可以说实话了吗——什么乱七八糟的，写的都什么玩意？
E: About that book, can I be honest now? What a complete mess. What on earth was that nonsense even about?

C: 听起来，气势倒是不输「歌耳戈之子，浴血代冠」，好，这份赞誉我收下了。
E: Well, that sounds just as grand as "The son of Gorgo will be crowned in blood." Very well, I'll accept this praise.

C: 古树…如此说来，这岂非是一种瑟希斯掌管的「大地」？
E: Ancient trees... In that case, could this be a form of "Earth" governed by Cerces?

C: 仪式剑…指的应当是欧洛尼斯仪式剑，我还记得它那月牙般的形状。可源头又该如何理解？
E: The ceremonial blade... must be referring to the Oronyx ceremonial blade. I still remember its crescent-moon shape. But how should we interpret the source?

C: 来自「灾厄」泰坦相关城邦的。
E: The ones from the city-state of the Calamity Titans.

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 又比如「天才俱乐部」：他们在「智识」的护佑下致力于科研，但其中也不乏黑塔女士那样的怪人。
E: Another example is the Genius Society: There is no shortage of eccentrics like Madam Herta who dedicate themselves to scientific research under the protection of Erudition.

C: 「开拓」是我们的使命，也是列车在银河间往来的力量之来源。
E: "Trailblaze" is our mission and the source of strength that powers the Express to travel across the galaxy.

C: 没什么，再见。
E: It's nothing. Goodbye.

C: 你想了解什么？我会尽力为你说明。
E: What do you want to know? I will do my best to answer your questions.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 既然{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}做了这么多事，我想把这本《冒险鼹鼠队》送给你。
E: Since you have done so much, I want to give you this copy of The Adventurous Moles.

C: 你不想看看整本书的故事吗？
E: Don't you want to read the whole book?

C: 这次也承蒙你照顾了。以后要是在下层区遇到了什么摆不平的麻烦，就尽管来找我吧。
E: Thanks for your help again. In the future, if you encounter any trouble in the Underworld that you can't handle, just come to me.

C: 好嘞，那我再歇会儿……
E: Alright, let me rest here for a while...

C: 滴答，好吧，做这行还是必须开口说话的。
E: Tick-tock, fine, I'll admit that talking is part of the job description in this line of work.

C: 滴、答…亲爱的宾客，我的工作就是为宾客创造《钟表小子》IP的场景化体验，实现克劳克影业产品的高效拉新，做精细化运营，向宇宙第一影业的目标发力！
E: Tick, tock... Dearest guest, it is my job to create scenario-based experiences of the Clockie IP for visitors, effectively pull in new customers for Clock Studios products and execute operation refinement to hit key target objects and make our studio the best in the universe!

C: 滴、答…你发现了我，你发现了即将毁灭这片梦境的魔王，真不容易。
E: Tick, tock... You found me, the demon that is about to destroy this Dreamscape. It was probably not easy.

C: 真羡慕那些巨星呀，他们一定从出生起就有着精彩的人生。不像我们，永远只是工具而已……
E: I really envy those superstars, they must have led exciting lives since their conception. Unlike us, forever stuck in roles as mere tools...

C: 哎呀，之前的事真是抱歉，现在的我也该回到正轨了。你想吃点什么吗？保证为你提供最美味、最安全的料理。
E: Ahh, I'm so sorry about what happened before. Now that I've regained my senses, is there anything that you want to eat? I guarantee I will provide you with the safest and most delicious dish.

C: 唉，滴答…你看这样子，我都不知道自己怎么撑到现在的。
E: *sigh* Tick-tock... Look at this, I wonder how I've been able to last this long.

C: 你以前是做什么的？
E: What was your job before?

C: 关于这起事件…
E: About this incident...

C: 那里盛产黑客，还有一帮人把现实当作大型沉浸式游戏，听着就是个人才济济的风水宝地，出个星核猎手不奇怪。
E: They're famous for their hackers, and some even regarded reality as a kind of immersive MMORPG. It's a world of promised land stacked with outstanding talent, so I'm not surprised they've produced a Stellaron Hunter there...

C: 理性分析。
E: Rational analysis.

C: 哈，你来了！你准备好了吗？
E: Ha, there you are! Are you ready?

C: 我才疏学浅…
E: I'm afraid I'm not up to the task

C: 重点描述「读书时的经历」吧。
E: Focus on her experience while studying.

C: 非常合适。
E: Very much so.

C: 这幅作品的气质很是清冷——和那片死寂的怪异空间如出一辙。
E: This piece of work is chilling — exactly what the dreary, strange space evokes.

C: 某位情报官曾介绍过纪念碑的设计理念。忘记了也没关系，就算没人介绍，优秀的艺术品也能自行传递其蕴含的价值。
E: A certain intelligence officer has introduced the monument's design concept. It doesn't matter if you forget, because even if no one introduces it, a good piece of art can convey the value it contains by its own virtue.

C: 尘封十余年的缆车在你们的努力下重新启动。它于上下层区间不倦地摆渡，老旧的缆绳重新联结起长别的人们。
E: With your effort, the cable car restarted its service after a decade of collecting dust. It travels between the Overworld and Underworld ceaselessly, and its rundown cable reconnecting the long-segregated people of Belobog.

C: 然而，在银鬃铁卫奋勇作战的同时，人们也始终未曾放弃挣扎——在高墙之底、岩盘之下，贝洛伯格的子民们于黑暗中紧握希望，终于迎来自由的天地。
E: However, whilst the Silvermane Guards battled for our safety, the citizens of Belobog never gave up on their own struggles — under the tall wall, beneath the stone disk, Belobogians held on tightly to hope in the darkness, and finally welcomed a future of freedom.

C: 你要是喜欢，还可以有后续。
E: If you like it, there's a follow-up story.

C: 结果就是，你看到了，我也看到了。但它又消失了。
E: In the end, you saw it, and I saw it too. But it disappeared.

C: 也许，岁阳从来没有基于善恶而决定行动。
E: Perhaps the heliobi never acted based on concepts such as good or evil.

C: 抱歉，空间站中有许多对外保密的研究，我需要检查一下你的照片。
E: Sorry, there's a lot of confidential research being undertaken aboard the space station. I'm going to have to check those photos.
...Huh?

C: 当时我整个人都懵了。我犹豫再三，一咬牙、一跺脚、狠狠心吃下去之后，发现这「貘馍卷」就是谷物小点心，什么嘛，差点被老板骗了。
E: I'll admit, I was hesitant to try it at first. But once I worked up the courage and took a bite, it turned out to be just another delicious snack.

C: 见过我？不不不，你没见过我…哎呀，你在这杵着就是为了想打听我的建议，对吧？
E: Me? No, no, no, no, no, we've never met... Oh, are you wondering what's good to eat around here?

C: …说实话，不太喜欢这里。
E: ...To be honest, not really.

C: 姑娘，这件事就交给我们金人巷商会来处理吧。
E: Please, miss, allow Aurum Alley Merchant Guild to take care of this matter.

C: 没关系的，您可以作为商会的顾问来参与此事。就算搞砸了也没关系…毕竟现在的状况已经很糟了呀，坏又能坏到哪儿去呢。
E: Don't worry, the situation is already bad as it is, so it's no big deal if things don't pan out. You can be on this project as our consultant.

C: 公司高调宣传自己将接管金人巷，并承诺会有「商铺补助」…我怀疑他们悄悄打过招呼，让商铺们别用码头物流。
E: The IPC said that they would handle operations at Aurum Alley and promised to give subsidies to the vendors... I suspect they secretly told all the vendors not to use the dock for logistics.

C: …确实是这个道理。
E: ...That's a good point.

C: 渐渐地，曜青的年轻一辈开始喜欢起公司娱乐部门生产的幻戏和玩具；穿上了剪裁贴身、设计时髦的公司服饰，都快分不清他们是仙舟人还是公司职员了。
E: Gradually, the Yaoqing's younger generations began to enjoy the immersia produced by the IPC's Entertainment Division. Once they started wearing IPC clothing lines, you could hardly tell if they were Xianzhou locals or IPC employees.

C: 怎么会，我劝劝你，不就算我为金人巷做出了贡献吗？
E: That's not true, I'm doing something right now — persuading you to help us! An admirable contribution.

C: 有困难尽管来找我就对了。
E: Anytime you need anything, come find me.

C: 你们闹了这一出，不给我道个歉，可就说不过去了。
E: After making a big scene like that, don't you owe me an apology?

C: 第一条，<color=#dbc291ff>「提前准备好底牌」</color>。就像云骑军上战场之前要备好武器，走上谈判桌之前，你也得确认好自己的底牌。
E: Rule one: <color=#dbc291ff>Prepare your ace card in advance</color>. Just as Cloud Knights ready their weapons before entering battle, you should have your ace card ready before you walk up to the negotiating table.

C: 我没有什么可说的，我什么都不知道。
E: I don't know anything. I don't have anything to say.

C: 我叫阿丰，是我将那个带有「浓云金蟾」的箱子带出来的。
E: My name's A-Feng — I was the one who brought out the box containing the Golden Cloud Toad.

C: 不好意思，把工作台搞乱了。
E: Sorry if I made a mess of your workbench.

C: 算了，你别再动就行了。
E: It's fine, just leave it as it is.

C: 你们没有经历过我所经历的时代，所以你们才不理解「我的坚持」。
E: You have not witnessed what I have seen, and so you fail to understand my insistence.

C: 霄翰是公司在长乐天的业务代表。
E: Xiaohan is the IPC's operation rep in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 尚滋味的燕翠师傅之前是「会长派」，现在她听了明曦的计划后打算和码头合作，是个好机会。
E: Chef Yancui used to be on the president's side. After she heard about Mingxi's plans, she decided to cooperate with the dock. It's a good opportunity.

C: 现在我们来谈谈你说的那个「金人巷商会•尚滋味」联动吧。
E: Now, would you mind giving me the low-down on this crossover event?

C: 这也太生硬了。
E: Meh, too generic...

C: 再帮我想一句宣传口号。
E: Gotta have another slogan for this one.

C: 前面就是司辰宫，你准备好了吗？
E: Palace of Astrum is up ahead. Ready?

C: 商会利用码头物流，不仅还上了租金，还筹集到了竞标资金，这足以看出码头的重要性。
E: By utilizing the dock, the guild managed to repay outstanding rents and also raised sufficient funding to stand at the bidding. That just goes to show how vital the dock is.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 您说的没有错。
E: You're right.

C: 现在去爆破公司还来得及吗？
E: Is it too late to blow up the IPC?

C: 我早知道了，想偷个懒而已。
E: I knew that all along. I just didn't care.

C: 我听说迴星港集装箱里有些豺狼，要是能做道菜，肯定是不错的，你能帮我猎些回来吗？
E: I heard rumors that some wolves were found in the containers at Stargazer Navalia. I bet I can come up with some new menu items with them. Can you bring back a few for me?

C: 大碗月华饭。
E: A large bowl of moonlight rice.

C: 小天老板<color=#dbc291ff>随便编一个病症</color>，只要看上去合情合理就没人会查的，上次就是这样。
E: Little Tian, you just need to <color=#dbc291ff>randomly make a disease up</color>. Nobody's going to check up on that — provided it looks reasonable. That's how it went down last time.

C: {NICKNAME}不会让公司得逞的。
E: {NICKNAME} won't let them succeed.

C: 这些云骑军一声不吭地站在店门口，吓得茶友们无人敢来，以为我这里出什么事了。
E: These Cloud Knights have been hanging around the front of my store, spooking all my customers who think something's happened in here.

C: 你站门口，别人没法做生意了。
E: People can't do their business with you standing right at their door.

C: 呜呜，大哥！
E: Way to stand up for the flock!

C: 这些岁阳找起来可麻烦了…
E: These heliobi sure are troublesome to find...

C: 这么随便没问题吗…
E: Is it okay to be this casual about research...

C: 除了样本材料之外…再带点<color=#dbc291ff>蛋白米</color>回来吧！哼哼…最后的课题报告，就围绕蛋白米与神秘生物之间的联系展开！
E: In addition to the sample material... bring back some <color=#dbc291ff>Protein Rice</color>! Hmph... The final project report revolves around the connection between Protein Rice and mysterious creatures!

C: 所以我需要找一位身手矫健，同时对科学也有一定了解的人替我去坐标所在地考察一下是否真的有「异常」。
E: So, I'm looking for someone athletic and who also has a good scientific background. They need to go to these coordinates and find out if there are actually any "anomalies."

C: 要是没线索呢？
E: What if there are no clues?

C: （这边人流量比较少，应该不会引起什么恐慌吧？）
E: (Not a lot of people are around, this wouldn't cause mass hysteria, would it?)

C: 似乎是每个人的家里都会有的长柜，只会在磨损程度上显示出细微的差异。
E: Seems like a long cabinet that can be found in any household, with only slight differences in wear and tear.

C: 这、这次也是真的？没想到「第<unbreak>223</unbreak>号感应仪」居然这么成功！
E: Th—This is real? I didn't think Sensor No. <unbreak>223</unbreak> is so successful!

C: 没听过。
E: No idea.

C: …稍微花点…点…点…时间给你科普……
E: ...I'll sh—show you s—s—some basics...

C: 新入手的冰镇苏乐达还没来得及喝就被抢走，咒骂与哀求声不绝于耳。
E: The sound of the prisoners cursing and begging can be heard all the time. Their nicely chilled SoulGlad is seized before they even manage to take a sip.

C: 囚犯们齐心协力。
E: The prisoners' joint effort.

C: 滴答，我们的工作是美梦剧团里最枯燥的，每天都要重复念一样的台词，几乎没有晋升空间和休息日…
E: Tick-tock, our jobs are the most mundane among the Sweet Dreams Troupe — we have to repeat the same lines every day, and there are almost no chances of promotion or days off...

C: 这里的客人对于所谓的真相根本毫不在意…我都快彻底放弃念想了。愿意来主动配合我一起调查的人，您还是头一个。
E: The guests here are ambivalent about uncovering this truth... I myself was about to abandon this mission. The first person who willingly answered my call to investigate was you.

C: 汪！等等我哇！
E: Woof! Wait for me!

C: 如何？我不在的这段时间，调饮师当得还开心吗？
E: How'd it go? Did you like being a drinksmith while I was away?

C: 酒吧还未恢复平静多久，不远处突然传来了呼救的声音。
E: Not long after the lounge had returned to calmness, cries for help suddenly came from nearby.

C: 你…是不是有事情瞒着我？
E: Are you... hiding something from me?

C: …你怎么在这？
E: ...What are you doing here?

C: 这些怪物没有攻击性，你们看，稍微吓吓就怕成那样，不会对宾客的安全造成威胁。
E: These monsters aren't aggressive at all. As you can see, a little scare is enough to frighten them. They won't pose a threat to the guests' safety.

C: 能具体和我讲讲吗？
E: Can you be specific?

C: 该死的哈努兄弟，别以为这就结束了，钢铁鳄鱼没你想得那么简单！
E: Darn it, Brother Hanu! This isn't over! The Steely Gator will be back for more!

C: 这是线索，请仔细阅读。
E: Here's the clue. Please read it carefully.

C: 听说入侵舞台的异界生物消失了，看来您已经找到一份隐藏起来的宝物了……
E: It seems like the alien creature that invaded the stage has disappeared. Looks like you've found a hidden treasure already...

C: 你看，这可是宾客的观点，客观真实。
E: Look, that's the guest's objective and genuine opinion.

C: 呸！真是一派胡言，没有了钟表小子的克劳克影业还有什么存在的意义！
E: Ugh! That's just baloney! There's no point in keeping Clock Studios if it means losing Clockie!

C: 呃…只是观众瞎猜的，您不要当真啊。
E: Um... It's just a wild speculation of the viewers. Please don't take it seriously.

C: 我是传说中的银河球棒侠。
E: I'm the legendary Galactic Baseballer.

C: 好啊，那你就继续给他卖命吧，等到发现自己被骗之后千万别后悔！
E: Well, you can keep working for him. Don't regret it when you realize you've been duped!

C: 呵呵，她还是像以前一样任性，如果「钟表匠」听到这个要求，应该会大声嘲笑这位老朋友吧？
E: Hehe, Maeven is still as capricious as ever. If the Watchmaker could hear this, I suppose he would laugh at this old friend of his.

C: …是啊，现在还不晚。
E: ...Yes, it's not too late.

C: 野狼睡去，巨木倾圮，钟表重转，惊醒湖中的鳄鱼…过去的故事已经完结，我很期待这部影片的未来。
E: The coyote has fallen asleep, the heavy logs have fallen, the clocks have re-winded, startling the crocodiles in the lake awake... The stories of the past have ended. I'm looking forward to the future of this movie.

C: 这不是{NICKNAME}吗，这片儿是你整的？真他宝贝的爱你！
E: {NICKNAME}? Is that you? You cooked up this film? Hot diggity fudge, that's some mighty fine work... absolute cinema!

C: 不过还真是奇怪，「钟表匠」在流梦礁没有留下任何钟表小子未来的手稿，克劳克影业今后可能真的要靠自己创作了。
E: But this is odd. The Watchmaker did not leave any manuscripts about Clockie's future in the Dreamflux Reef. It seems like Clock Studios may have to really create their own future.

C: 「无情的守卫在楼层中巡逻，他们不会放过任何一个入侵者。小心！哈努兄弟，真正的危险才刚要到来……」
E: "Ruthless guards are patrolling the floors. They won't spare any intruders. Be careful! Brother Hanu, the real danger has just reared its head..."

C: 噶！我们最爱的苏乐达要被抢走了！喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！
E: Gah! Our precious SoulGlad has been robbed from us! Grab this bottle of SoulGlad and make your dreams a blast!

C: 「想要获得折纸小鸟的帮助，就必须先得击溃梦境的捣乱分子——折纸小鸟的敌人！」
E: "To gain the help of the origami birds, these troublemakers of the Dreamscape — origami birds' enemies — must first be dealt with!"

C: 刚好，我就是来聊合作的。
E: What a coincidence. I'm here to talk about a partnership.

C: 滴答，其他苏乐达应该被石头老板放在了房间的更深处，我们快去找找看吧！
E: Tick-tock, the other SoulGlad must have been hidden by Boss Stone farther in the room. We have to find it quickly!

C: 我准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 下次再聊。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 暗中给小镇添乱。
E: Cause trouble for the town from the shadows.

C: 完了啾，万策尽了啾！导演大人，啾、救救啾！我完全没想好拍什么内容——
E: I'm dead meat, tweet. There's no way out! Director, save me! Tweet, I have no idea what I'm going to shoot...

C: 关于这点…无论是艾普瑟隆的版权保护条例、还是匹诺康尼的知识产权登记表中，我们都没有找到关于<color=#dbc291ff>「银河球棒侠」</color>的登记。
E: About that... we haven't been able to find any registration for <color=#dbc291ff>Galactic Baseballer</color> in either Epsilon's copyright protection ordinances or in the Penacony registry of IP.

C: 好了，百闻不如一见。说了这么多，不如亲手体验一把。
E: Alright, well, a picture paints a thousand words. I can talk all day, or you can experience it for yourself.

C: 祝你游玩愉快！
E: Happy gaming!

C: 你转过身，决绝地离开了，嘴里还念念有词——「英雄背井离家乡，来到美梦去开荒，美梦要是不留我，{F#老娘}{M#老子}投奔泯灭帮……」
E: You turn around, leaving resolutely, muttering under your breath — "The hero's quest started with a bang. For this dream I've toiled and sang. If the dream repays me in pang, then I, the {M#man}{F#woman}, will join the Annihilation Gang...."

C: 嘎呜…身可死，苏乐达™之名不可弃……
E: Grawwrr... The body withers, but the SoulGlad™ name shall not...

C: 终于集齐拼图了…快回去吧。
E: Finally, that's all the jigsaw pieces... Let's hurry back.

C: 现在…我们应该有办法对付那些坏蛋了。
E: Now... we should have a way of dealing with those baddies.

C: 不，「终末」令琥珀崩裂、永生枯败、旋律喑哑、光矢黯淡、黑日只余灰烬、酒馆落满灰尘——即使毁灭本身，亦不能免于毁灭。
E: No. Finality causes amber to rupture, immortality to wither, music to mute, light arrows to dim, the Dark Sun to be reduced to ashes, and the Tavern to be covered in dust. Even Destruction itself cannot be spared from destruction.

C: 然而「终末」并非一切的终点。万事万物将由此始发，前往下一场「终末」。
E: Yet, Finality isn't the end of everything. All things will originate from there and move on to the next Finality.

C: 师父师父，我的资质如何呢？
E: So, how'd I do, master?

C: 要是真能遇到就好了。
E: It'd be pretty awesome if that actually happened.

C: 如何抬手、如何抬脚，如何移动身体，无限制的信息不断涌入脑海之中…可惜人和岁阳不一样，海量的信息只会让人大脑过载而呆立原地、动弹不得。
E: How to raise your arms and legs, how to move your body, infinite information surging into your mind non-stop... A pity we're not like heliobi — such a massive magnitude of information will only overload our minds and render us immobile.

C: 既然三月七小姐恢复得差不多了，我也该回去封印岁阳了，两位，我们下次再见！
E: Now that you've recovered, I should be getting back to seal this heliobus. We'll meet again!

C: 瞧瞧，这不是我们女侠三月七吗？
E: Well, well, if it isn't our hero March 7th!

C: 真是父慈子孝啊！老子要看哭了。
E: Oh my, how moving. I think I might just cry...

C: 我们平时在公司也没机会聊这些嘛。
E: Yeah, we never get a chance to talk about this stuff at the office.

C: 斯科特，终于让老子找到了，这就是你的软肋！
E: Hahaha! Gotcha, Skott! I've found your weakness!

C: 对不起！我也撑不住了，真的要、要、要…
E: Sorry, but I can't hold it any longer! I really... really...

C: 星穹列车正在向外…奔跑…
E: The Astral Express is... racing away...

C: 一起商量击败斯科特的办法。
E: We can brainstorm ways to defeat Skott together.

C: 能不能分享一下你的思考成果。
E: Care to share your insights?

C: 青雀饶有兴致地听起斯科特事件相关的始末。
E: Qingque listens to the whole story of Skott's incident with great interest.

C: 斯科特必须向我这样的平凡人道歉。
E: Skott really needs to apologize to regular people like me.

C: 这已经是战斗麻雀了。
E: I guess not! Eagle sounds about right.

C: 我问你，公司是你家吗？
E: Let me ask you something. Do you consider the IPC to be your family?

C: …我在斯科特先生手下当孙子。
E: ...Mr. Skott bosses me around as if he owns me.

C: 你想想，你家的门有这么难进吗？
E: Think about it, is the entrance to your own home that hard to get through?

C: 幸会，银河球棒侠正是在下。
E: A pleasure. The Galactic Baseballer stands before you.

C: 据说吮吸赤龙之血，便能令人脱胎换骨，功力倍增。话已经说到这里了，我再向你透个底吧——罗浮丹鼎司内就藏着一条这样的赤龙……
E: It's said that by imbibing the blood of a Crimson Dragon, one can be born anew with boosted strength. Since I've already revealed this much, I'll give you all another tidbit — such a Crimson Dragon is stashed within the Alchemy Commission...

C: 她好像完全当作是游戏了……
E: She seems to completely treat this as a game...

C: 真是永远都不想成为大人呀…
E: I don't want to be a grown-up ever...

C: 想早一点成为受尊敬的大人…
E: I want to become a respectable adult soon...

C: 这不是青雀吗？我好像第一次见到青雀在认真工作！
E: Is that you, Qingque? I don't think I've ever seen you taking your work seriously before!

C: 你将三月七与公司的好事之徒约战的事细细道来。
E: You elaborate on the matter of the upcoming duel between March 7th and that IPC busybody.

C: 我在。
E: I'm here.

C: 可惜，我在剑谱里掌握的本事也在阅读过程里全部还回去了，什么也没有留下。
E: Unfortunately, I lost all the skills that I learned from the sword scroll while I was reading it backwards, I didn't learn anything.

C: 伦道夫说罢，将手机里面的照片与视频展示给你。影像里最初只是寻常的街景和人流。但人流中有个熟悉又违和的身影。
E: Having finished his explanation, Randolph pulls out his phone to show you some pictures and videos. At first, the images just seem to show regular street scenes and interactions. However, there is a familiar and unexpected figure among the crowd.

C: 当然是研究咯。我想通过离散忆质研究{RUBY_B#魔阴身}人格解体{RUBY_E#}的治疗方案。
E: For research, of course! I want to use my research on scattered memoria to find a treatment method for {RUBY_B#being mara-struck}de-humanization{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你能看见旁边这个会说话的…垃圾桶吗？他自称什么桶宝，说是来向我寻求「友谊魔法」的。我不会也是童心未泯，看到了什么卡通中的人物吧？
E: Can you see this... talking trashcan next to me? They call themselves Pody or something and they keep talking about looking for some Magic of Friendship from me. You don't think my childlike heart is making me imagine some cartoon character, do you?

C: 那是当然，咱俩一起什么大风大浪没经历过。「友谊凭证」什么的，也是随便开！说吧，需要本姑娘做什么。
E: Of course! We've been through everything together. This Proof of Friendship or whatever is no issue for us! Well, what is it that you want me to do?

C: 遇见我，就意味着「夹层世界」中又有不妙的事件发生了——如此看来，你我未来还是少见为妙！
E: If you meet me again, it means that something has gone terribly wrong in the "Betweenwhere" again... Looking at it this way: notot seeing each other again may be for the best!

C: 卢卡选手重振了精神！满血复活！好耶！
E: Luka has regained his energy! Full health revive! Oh yeah!

C: 加油吧，多赢几场。既然尽兴了，我也该走了。在罗浮上我还有不少生意要磋商呢。
E: Keep it up and keep winning matches. I've had my fill, so I should be leaving. I have a lot of negotiations to attend back on the Luofu.

C: 哇！这就是丹鼎司？这一整块地方都是医院吗？也太大了吧？
E: Woah! This is the Alchemy Commission? This whole place is a hospital? Can it get any bigger than this?

C: 我只明白，我要为贝洛伯格赢得荣誉！
E: All I know is that I must achieve glory for Belobog!

C: {NICKNAME}，宝了个贝的！竟然在这里见到你了！你也是来参赛的？
E: Butter my fudge and call me a biscuit! Can't believe I'm seeing you here, {NICKNAME}! You competin' too?

C: 你这是干什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: （藿藿和尾巴似乎也到竞锋舰上了，找找他们吧……）
E: (Huohuo and Tail seem to be on the Skysplitter too. Let's look for them...)

C: 稍等一下。
E: Just a minute.

C: 你想通了？
E: You got it all figured out?

C: 谢谢你，卡美丽小姐。我一定会成功的！
E: Thanks, Miss Carmella. I will succeed!

C: 但即使没有修复出此后的记录，我们这些未来人也非常清楚，事情没有这样展开。伊戈尔最后的希望，仙舟联盟，最终也没有来拯救他的家园。
E: Even without the records of what happened afterward, we know very well that things did not pan out that way. Igor's last hope — the Xianzhou Alliance — did not come to his world's rescue.

C: 我早就是了。
E: I already am.

C: 现在擂台上的两位选手，在各种意义上都颇为相似！
E: The two fighters in the ring right now are remarkably similar in many ways!

C: 我必须向你道歉，卢卡——我瞒着你，匿名参加了演武仪典。
E: I must apologize to you, Luka, for participating in the Wardance anonymously and keeping you in the dark.

C: 摄像头，我都不嫌弃你是公司的小可爱，你他宝贝个腿的倒嫌弃起我来了。
E: Camera girl, I don't even mind that you're one of them lil' IPC fudglings, yet here you are, acting all forkin' judgmental.

C: 我也是。
E: Likewise.

C: 以武会友，这是演武仪典的创立宗旨。但彼时我只是个云骑骁卫，没办法改变任何事，只能看着他绝望的背影，一句安慰的话也说不出口。
E: The Wardance is held to foster friendships through combat arts. However, I was just a Cloud Knight Lieutenant at that time, powerless to change anything. I couldn't even utter any words of solace as I watched his despondent silhouette grow smaller.

C: 身为断众护法僧，怎么可以耽于争斗之乐？
E: How could you find joy in conflict as a Dharmic monk?

C: 我是在看什么粗制滥造的喜剧节目吗？嗜血的步离人，为保护鲁珀特的屠杀兵器而死。哈哈哈，原来杀人不眨眼的禽兽也会抱团取暖。
E: Am I watching some low-production comedy show? The bloodthirsty borisin are willingly protecting Rubert's murder machine at the cost of their lives. Hahaha. So even ruthless beasts are capable of huddling together for comfort.

C: 而后，刺耳的轰鸣将你的意识叩响，带着机械帝国的号角，与流淌了上千个琥珀纪的血与火。
E: And then, a piercing roar strikes your consciousness, carrying with it the horn of the Machine Empire, as well as the blood and fire that had flowed for over a thousand Amber Eras.

C: 卢卡应该回休息室了，在附近稍微转转就去找他吧。
E: Luka should be back at the lounge now. Let's take a walk nearby and look for him.

C: （看向战术板）
E: (Look towards the Tactics Board)

C: 我必须要澄清一点，这俩人根本就没有私交。
E: I feel the need to clarify that they do not share any relationship.

C: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
E: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

C: 唉…我感觉你们发达地区的媒体还是太厉害了，让很多人都产生了像你这样的错误认知。
E: *sigh* Personally, I think the media in developed regions like yours wield too much influence, so many people develop misconceptions similar to yours.

C: 开始比赛。
E: Begin competition.

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 人呢？没来就请下一位了！
E: Who's supposed to be here? I'll skip to the next one if there's no one here!

C: 都这样了，随缘吧…
E: What's done is done. It's all up to luck now...

C: 你这是在侵犯选手的个人隐私，我拒绝回答你！
E: You are infringing on the privacy of the contestant. I refuse to respond.

C: 金人巷，杜氏茶庄。
E: Du's Teahouse, Aurum Alley.

C: 不…没什么…来吧！托帕小姐！
E: No... It's nothing... Come at me, Miss Topaz!

C: 能换点我没玩过的游戏吗？
E: You got something I haven't played before?

C: 其实，原本折纸大学有考虑过停办这次活动。蕉授引发的混乱才刚平息，又适逢匹诺康尼上市的关键时期，谁都不愿惹出更多事。
E: Actually, Paperfold University considered stopping this event. The ruckus that Profnana caused has just been quelled, and it's also the pivotal moment immediately after Penacony became listed. No one really wants any more trouble to arise.

C: 主要就是组织排练，为正式演出做准备吧。别担心，乐队成员已经确定好了，都是各个学院选出的优秀学生，不会让你为难的。
E: Mainly to organize practice and prepare for the actual performance. Don't worry. The band members have all been confirmed — they're all outstanding students that the various institutes have selected, and they won't trouble you at all.

C: 「吉他•忍徒」，我等将要共同登台，理应有彼此相称的名号，也能令诸位忍徒牢记阁下的身姿。
E: Ninja Initiate Guitar, we will take to the stage together, and thus should possess names that befit our mutual standing, and also allow other ninja to carve the memory of your poise in their minds.

C: 旅店…在下虽不解其中含义，但也觉得颇具意境。
E: Hotel... I do not fully grasp its meaning, but I reckon it evokes a rather artistic image.

C: 是《银河忍法帖》中的乱破大人，第一次见到本人…还有盛会巨星同学！
E: Oh. Lady Rappa of the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions! It's my first time meeting you... and the Festive Superstar!

C: 哼哼哼，在下随苦茶大师修行数十载，遍历试炼万千，区区音律•忍法自然不在话下。
E: Heh-heh-heh, I trained with Master Kucha for ten years, and mastered countless trials. Such a meager Sound Release ninjutsu technique is naturally mere child's play.

C: 乱破同学改造过的贝斯…用起来也很顺手。
E: The bass tweaked by Rappa... it's working smoothly.

C: …别舔了。
E: ...You can stop sucking up to her.

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，上台前也和大家说几句吧。
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Manager, you should say something to everyone before they go on.

C: 关于中央舞台…
E: About the central stage...

C: 准备乐队演出。
E: Prepare for the band performance.

C: 去试试吧！舞台演出还在继续，要是能有新的音乐当然更好啦！
E: Give it a try! The stage show is going to continue, so it'd be a bigger blast with new music!

C: （写下煽情的寄语）
E: (Write an emotional message)
...Woof?

C: 原来是同行，还好我没怯场，各位的表现确实很强，能否让我继续观赏？
E: Ah, you're from our profession. Good thing I didn't suffer from performance anxiety. All your performances were amazing. May I keep watching?

C: 如今远大理想即将达成，终于有人听懂我的歌声，{F#她}{M#他}就像是指路明灯。
E: Now my big dreams are finally coming true, someone's vibing with my song, they get the tune. {F#She}{M#He}'s like a guiding light, shining through.

C: 气氛怎么变得奇怪了？
E: Why's the atmosphere gone all weird?

C: 嗯。既然如此，我也不强求。那么，以后我们就是竞争对手了。
E: Mm. If that's the case, I won't insist. That means we'll be rivals when we next meet.

C: 譬如…譬如……
E: What about... what about...

C: 总结：逻辑混乱，漏洞百出，胡言乱语，毫无说服力可言。
E: Conclusion: Your logic is contradictory, your argument full of holes, your speech mystifying and nonsensical, and there is no persuasive power to speak of.

C: 嗯！我决定了，要跟随乱破忍首潜心修行，成为合格的音律忍者！
E: Yeah! I've decided that I will follow Head Ninja Rappa and study hard to become a fully qualified sound ninja!

C: 经理阁下。何时该出战，仍旧交由你决定了。
E: August Manager, deciding when we go to the contest remains in your hands.

C: 没关系，我们会赢的。
E: It's fine. We will be victorious.

C: ——不可！在下实在无法认同如此蛮横的做法！
E: ...Never! I cannot abide by such uncouth methods!

C: 但我们根本不想出场！不属于「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的舞台没有意义，并且，你们那么受欢迎，要是踢掉你们，我以后都没法在学校里露面了。
E: But we never really wanted to perform! A stage that doesn't belong to Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party is meaningless. And you're all so popular — I wouldn't be able to show my face on campus if I were responsible for replacing you guys.

C: 喂，作为学院代表，不想着好好教课，反而借着老师的身份欺负学生，你丢不丢人啊？
E: Hey, as the academy's rep, instead of intending to stick to your job and teach, you're abusing your seniority and bullying the students. Don't you find that shameful?

C: 资质平平的人，靠着外界帮助，抢走原本属于别人的东西，经理觉得这样算是公平吗？
E: Someone of average talent, relying on external help, and robbing something that originally belonged to others. Manager, you think this is fair?

C: …怎么回事？
E: ...What's going on?

C: 好吧…
E: Okay...

C: 但我会为你们应援的！要加油啊！！
E: But I will cheer for you! You can do it!!!

C: ——尽管来自遥远的冰天雪地，严寒从未浇熄我对音乐的热情，如今到访未踏足过的梦境，只为寻找那位挚友的踪迹。
E: Though I hail from distant icy lands, the cold never extinguished my passion for rhymes. Now I visit uncharted dreamscapes, only to seek the trail of my dear friend.

C: 忘了吗？我们是共同演出的同伴，你的说唱技巧给我留下了很深的印象。
E: Did you forget? We're comrades who performed together, and your rapping left a deep impression on me.

C: 「副导演」
E: "Assistant Director"

C: 啧。我直说了吧，那就是个蹭热度的。你看，我很早就在网上宣布了立项的消息，粉丝数都比他多十几倍，现在说自己是原创，谁认啊。
E: Tsk. I'll just be blunt then: That person's just riding the trend. I released news of this title's development on the internet a long time ago, and my fans outnumber his more than ten times over. Now he's claiming he's the original creator. Who'd even believe that?

C: …都是些无聊的故事而已，随便听听得了。
E: ...They're all just pointless stories. You can listen with a pinch of salt.

C: 所以，这趟买卖，你赚钱，我赚乐子。把能自发生产故事的「迷因」卖到宇宙各地去——今晚我就不愁没笑话可讲咯。
E: Which is why, you made money this trip, and I got to have my fun. To be able to sell memes that self-create stories across the galaxy — I won't be lacking in funny tales tonight.

C: 当然，我的老朋友了。
E: Of course, that's an old friend of mine.

C: 把我打包送给帕姆吧。
E: Just wrap me up and present me to Pom-Pom.

C: 要忙着休息。
E: I'll be busy taking a break.

C: （唔…该怎么说服{NICKNAME}陪我一起值日呢？）
E: (Ugh... How do I convince {NICKNAME} to accompany me for Express duty?)

C: 才不要！列车也难得开到他们的外卖配送范围内！有的时候就是会想要这样的体验：自己舒舒服服地窝在沙发上，想要的东西就能「嗖」地一下递到手边！
E: No way! It's not often the Express gets within delivery range of them! Sometimes you just want to enjoy this experience: Comfortably lounging on your sofa, and whatever you want just appearing in your hand with a "poof"!

C: 还是别再试了吧！要是再失败一次，列车就要变成水车了帕！
E: You'd better not! If you fail one more time, the Express would turn into an underwater train!

C: 嗯…昨晚，我在房间里画画的时候，换上了保护视力的专用眼镜。这一点我记得十分清晰。
E: Hmm... When I was drawing in my room last night, I switched to my special protective glasses. This I remember clearly.

C: 这么说来的话，眼镜应该……
E: That means to say, the glasses should be...

C: 那应该只是彩蛋性质的搞笑集吧。
E: That was probably just some parody episode with Easter eggs in it.

C: 亲爱的无名客…滋滋滋…我作为餐饮机器人，在清洁功能上尚有欠缺…滋滋滋…姬子小姐正在对此进行调整。
E: Dear Nameless... Zzt... As a catering robot, I am lacking in cleaning functions... Zzt... Miss Himeko is making calibrations right now.

C: 我看不懂，但我大受震撼。
E: I didn't understand a single word, but I was super-duper impressed.

C: 啊啊啊！这机动球决赛也太焦灼了！我的心要跳到嗓子眼了！
E: Ahh! This Roboball final is too dang intense! My heart's gonna burst out through my throat!

C: 你怎么知道它自己不想帮我们做值日呢？让我征求一下它的意见～
E: How do you know it doesn't want to help us with this glorious task? Let us ask its opinion...

C: 还有别的事…
E: There's more?

C: 诶嘿嘿，拍下了一张很有戏剧感的照片呢。不过，开拓小鸟怎么会出现在这里？
E: Eh-heh-heh, a photo that exudes dramatic poise. But what's a Trailbirder doing here?

C: 哼哼，{NICKNAME}，我在附近踩了一圈点，终于发现了这里！
E: Heh-heh, {NICKNAME}, I walked around the surrounding premises, and finally found this place!

C: 嘁，还以为你开窍了，居然只是被一个小玩意儿开涮了，还是回去再练练吧。
E: Tch, I thought you finally came to your senses, but it was just some gimmick that caused this. You'd better go back and train some more.

C: 我的剑前些日子被云璃带走修炼了，刚刚在竞锋舰上感应到了它的气息。咱们去找找看吧，没准能拍下朱明剑客修炼的宝贵画面呢~
E: Yunli borrowed my sword to do some training some days ago. I just felt its presence on the Skysplitter. Let's go find it. Maybe we can capture some precious scenes of the Zhuming swordmaster at practice!

C: 虽然说着重在参与，但想到有可能拿奖，还是紧张得心砰砰直跳呢。
E: I know I said participation is important, but when I think that I might win, my heart's pounding super hard.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来啦！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here!

C: 你不一起去吗？
E: You're not coming with?

C: （给它们来个下马威）
E: (Show them your authority)

C: 这座生命花园是奇美拉的培育场所和栖息地，灰宝感兴趣的话，可以到处转转哦。
E: This Garden of Life is the chimeras' nurturing ground and dwelling. If you're interested, you can take a look around, Grayie.

C: 欲戴王冠，必承其重。
E: Heavy is the head that wears the crown.

C: 很抱歉，我想暂时休息一段时间。
E: Sorry, I'd like to take some time off.

C: 此后，「自由之角」将不复存在。你们可以自谋出路，不用再跟着我了。
E: From now on, the Horn of Freedom will cease to exist. You can all find your own paths. No need to follow me any longer.

C: 以后再说。
E: Another time.

C: <unbreak>20</unbreak>只小海豹而已，让你瞧瞧！
E: Only <unbreak>20</unbreak>? I'll show you!

C: 你放弃治疗，就为参加比赛吗？
E: Did you abandon your treatment just to participate in the match?

C: 原来你在这里，快把徽章还给我！
E: There you are! Hand over my badge!

C: 求求你，把我放臭名昭著前面。
E: Would it kill you to introduce me before the notorious troublemaker?

C: 淘汰赛的最后一轮对战双方，竟然是{NICKNAME}选手和缇宁选手！
E: For the final Elimination Round, we have {NICKNAME} facing off against Trinnon!

C: 接下来，请公民朋友们和选手们休息一段时间，静待冠军赛……
E: Now, everyone please take a short break as we prepare for the Championship...

C: {NICKNAME}选手最在意的竟然是这个问题……
E: That's the question that Contestant {NICKNAME} is most concerned about...

C: 赛场因素也很多，裁判会帮你们；场外因素也很多，观众不为我们喝彩！
E: There were so many outside factors — referees were helping you folks, and so many external factors — no one cheered for us!

C: 把我拍好看点。
E: Make sure I look good in the shot!

C: 换句话说，到奥赫玛之后没怎么做梦？
E: So, you haven't had any dreams since arriving in Okhema?

C: 那个…我是不是…又变回人了？
E: Wait... am I human again?

C: 飞霄？
E: Ciphy-roth?

C: 缇宝阿姐别为难他了，毕竟…我也做了一个预言梦，而且，也不能说出预言的内容。
E: Big sis, go easy on him. I... also had a prophetic dream, of which I can't speak about.

C: 那是什么？
E: What's that?

C: 据说这是它「非暴力、不合作」的抗议方式。
E: It's said to be its way of protesting, "non-violence, non-cooperation."

C: 我明白了，只要预言散播得足够广，无形之中就会有人去实现它，使它应验…？
E: I understand now. As long as the prophecy is spread far and wide, someone out there is bound to fulfill it, making it come true...?

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: Can we talk for a bit?

C: 游戏的主角是一位小小的勇者，追寻着传说中的球棒踏出家乡，前往征服群星的道路……
E: The game's protagonist was a teeny hero, who set off from their hometown to find the legendary bat and conquer the stars...

C: 哈哈，能够获得如此之高的评价，实在是我们的荣幸。感谢您对《银河球棒侠：魔王篇》的喜爱——
E: Haha, getting such high praise is truly an honor. Thank you for your love of Galactic Baseballer: Demon King—

C: 那么除此之外，在体验过全部流程之后，你对于本游戏还有什么疑问吗？
